V010-N00006.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00006.definition: A condition that often occurs in babies under the age of one year. Characterized by continuous crying during or even through the night but appearing normal at daytime. Often results from spleen cold, heart heat and fear or fright that disturb the heart mind.

V010-N00007.path: 小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病
V010-N00007.definition: 因小儿神气未定，骤见生人或突遇异物，扰动心神所致。临床以突然惊叫啼哭，甚或伴见面色变异，呕吐，腹痛，腹泻，手足瘛疭等为特征的小儿心系病。

V010-N00007.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语

V010-N00007.englishNames: sudden frighten in infant; sudden frightening in infant; fright seizure; infantile fright; Fright seizure disorder
V010-N00007.path: 第7部分 儿科学｜心肝系病
V010-N00007.definition: 以小儿骤见生人异物，或骤闻巨大声响，突然惊叫啼哭，甚或面色变异，呕吐，腹痛，腹泻，手足瘈疭等为主要表现的儿科疾病。

V010-N00007.englishNames: Infantile Convulsive Seizure due to Fight; Infantile Convulsive Seizure due to Sudden Terror
V010-N00007.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V010-N00007.definition: 小儿由于神气未定，因骤见生人、突遇异物等所致。以突然惊叫啼哭，甚或面色变异、吐泻腹痛等为主要表现的小儿疾病。

V010-N00007.aliases: 小儿客忤； Fright seizure disorder； Infantile fright seizure
V010-N00007.englishNames: sudden frighten in infant; sudden frightening in infant; fright seizure; infantile fright; Fright seizure disorder; Fright seizure
V010-N00007.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00007.definition: Characterized by sudden screaming or crying, vomiting, facial colour change, diarrhoea and abdominal pain. Often results from fright upon exposure to strangers or unknown events.

V010-N00007.label: 客忤
V010-N00007.definition: a seizure of fright that causes vomiting, abdominal pain, and even convulsions

V010-N00008.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00008.label: 急惊风
V010-N00008.englishNames: acute infantile convulsion; Acute convulsion disorder; Acute infantile convulsion
V010-N00008.pinyinNames: ji jing feng; jí jīng fēng
V010-N00008.path: 小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜小儿惊风
V010-N00008.definition: 因感染时邪疫毒，高热或肠胃积滞、惊恐、风痰等邪陷心肝所致。临床以突发高热、神昏，目直，牙关紧闭，颈项强直，四肢抽搐等为特征的小儿急性痉病。

V010-N00008.label: 急惊风
V010-N00008.englishNames: acute infantile convulsion; Acute convulsion disorder
V010-N00008.path: 第7部分 儿科学｜心肝系病｜惊风
V010-N00008.definition: 以发病急骤，发热、抽搐、昏迷为特征的惊风。

V010-N00008.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V010-N00008.label: 急惊风
V010-N00008.englishNames: acute infantile convulsion; Acute convulsion disorder
V010-N00008.path: 中医儿科学｜儿科学心肝病
V010-N00008.definition: 以发病急骤，发热、抽搐、昏迷为主要表现的惊风。

V010-N00008.label: 急惊风
V010-N00008.englishNames: acute infantile convulsion; Acute convulsion disorder
V010-N00008.definition: 以发病急骤，高热抽搐，昏迷为特征的惊风。

V010-N00008.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00008.label: 急惊风
V010-N00008.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜神经病学表现｜惊厥
V010-N00008.definition: 多因感受时邪，肠胃湿热积滞，以及惊恐、痰食等所致。于多种疾病中突然出现神昏、目直、牙关紧闭、颈项强直、四肢抽搐为主要表现的痉病类疾病。

V010-N00008.label: 急惊风
V010-N00008.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证｜惊风
V010-N00008.definition: 来势急骤，以高热伴抽风、昏迷为特征。多由外感时邪疫疠，内蕴痰热食积以及暴受惊恐引起。

V010-N00008.label: 急惊风
V010-N00008.englishNames: acute infantile convulsion; Acute convulsion disorder
V010-N00008.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜小儿惊风

V010-N00008.label: 急惊
V010-N00008.aliases: 抽风； 急惊风； 惊厥
V010-N00008.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00008.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00008.label: 急惊风
V010-N00008.englishNames: acute infantile convulsion; Acute convulsion disorder; Acute infantile convulsion
V010-N00008.pinyinNames: ji jing feng; jí jīng fēng
V010-N00008.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00008.definition: Characterized by a sudden onset of fever, loss of consciousness, blank staring, trismus, neck stiffness and convulsions of the limbs. Often results from seasonal pathogens, heat or indigestion in the stomach, fear/fright and phlegm accumulation that affects the heart and liver.

V010-N00008.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00008.label: 急惊风

V010-N00008.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00008.label: 急惊风
V010-N00008.definition: infantile convulsion of acute onset, accompanied by high fever and loss of consciousness

V010-N00009.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病

V010-N00009.pinyinNames: man jing feng; màn jīng fēng

V010-N00009.definition: 因体质虚弱，病久正虚，脾阳受伤，肝风内动，或由急惊风转化所致。临床以肢体颤动或蠕动，或抽搐时作时止，嗜睡、露睛，神疲、面白，或吐或泻，大便色青等为特征，反复发作的小儿慢性痉病。

V010-N00009.definition: 病势缓慢，以反复抽痉，嗜睡或昏迷为主要表现的惊风。

V010-N00009.label: 慢惊风
V010-N00009.englishNames: chronic infantile convulsion; Recurrent convulsion disorder
V010-N00009.definition: 病势缓慢，以反复抽痉，昏迷或瘫痪为主症 的惊风。

V010-N00009.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00009.label: 慢惊风
V010-N00009.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜神经病学表现｜惊厥
V010-N00009.definition: 因气血亏虚，或由急惊风转化而成，于多种疾病中出现手足蠕动、或抽搐时作时止、神疲面白、大便色青等为主要表现的痉病类疾病。

V010-N00009.label: 慢惊风
V010-N00009.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证｜惊风
V010-N00009.definition: 来势缓慢，以反复抽痉、昏迷或瘫痪为主症，预后差。

V010-N00009.label: 慢惊风
V010-N00009.englishNames: chronic infantile convulsion; Recurrent convulsion disorder
V010-N00009.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜小儿惊风

V010-N00009.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00009.label: 慢惊
V010-N00009.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00009.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00009.label: 慢惊风
V010-N00009.englishNames: chronic infantile convulsion; Recurrent convulsion disorder; Chronic infantile convulsion
V010-N00009.pinyinNames: man jing feng; màn jīng fēng
V010-N00009.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00009.definition: Characterized by repeated twitching of hands and feet, intermittent convulsions, fatigue, a pale face, sleepiness with eyes unclosed, vomiting and diarrhoea of bluish stools. Often results from healthy qi deficiency, damage to spleen yang or internal stirring of liver wind. It may also develop from acute infantile convulsion.

V010-N00009.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00009.label: 慢惊风

V010-N00009.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00009.label: 慢惊风
V010-N00009.definition: repeated infantile convulsion of gradual onset, associated with loss of consciousness or paralysis and poor prognosis

V010-N00015.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00015.label: 小儿湮尻疮
V010-N00015.aliases: 臀红； Nappy/diaper dermatitis disorder； Red skin around the nappy/diaper
V010-N00015.pinyinNames: xiao dong yan kao chuang; xiǎo ér yān kāo chuāng
V010-N00015.path: 小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病
V010-N00015.definition: 因尿布未能及时更换，湿热秽浊浸渍肌肤所致。临床以婴儿臀部、阴部及大腿内侧尿布包裹部位皮肤出现红斑、糜烂、渗液等为特征的小儿皮肤病。

V010-N00015.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00015.label: 臀红
V010-N00015.englishNames: red buttock; diaper dermatitis; Diaper dermatitis disorder
V010-N00015.path: 第7部分 儿科学｜新生儿疾病
V010-N00015.definition: 以臀部、会阴、大腿尿布包裹部位内侧皮肤及外阴黏膜出血红斑、糜烂、渗液为主要表现的小儿皮肤病。

V010-N00015.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V010-N00015.label: 臀红
V010-N00015.path: 中医儿科学｜新生儿疾病
V010-N00015.definition: 以臀部、会阴、大腿内侧皮肤及外阴黏膜出现红斑、糜烂、渗液为主要表现的新生儿疾病。

V010-N00015.label: 臀红
V010-N00015.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V010-N00015.definition: 因尿布浸渍所致。以婴儿臀部、会阴、阴囊、大腿内侧皮肤出现红斑、糜烂、渗液为主要表现的小儿皮肤疾病。

V010-N00015.label: 小儿湮尻疮
V010-N00015.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V010-N00015.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00015.label: 臀红
V010-N00015.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V010-N00015.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00015.label: 小儿湮尻疮
V010-N00015.aliases: 臀红； Nappy/diaper dermatitis disorder； Red skin around the nappy/diaper
V010-N00015.pinyinNames: xiao dong yan kao chuang; xiǎo ér yān kāo chuāng
V010-N00015.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00015.definition: Characterized by sore, red and irritated skin on the convex surfaces of the buttocks and the bulge of the groin. Often occurs when the baby’s skin become exposed to urine and faeces in a nappy/diaper.

V010-N00013.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00013.label: 疳病
V010-N00013.aliases: 疳证； Infantile malnutrition disorder； Malnutrition pattern
V010-N00013.englishNames: Infantile malnutrition disorder; infantile malnutrition; infantile malnutrition disease; gan; Infantile malnutrition
V010-N00013.path: 小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病
V010-N00013.definition: 因喂养不当，或先天不足，或久病损伤，脾胃虚弱，气血精微不足以濡养脏腑，影响生长发育所致。临床以面黄肌瘦，腹部膨大等全身虚羸征象为特征的小儿脾系病。

V010-N00013.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00013.label: 疳积
V010-N00013.englishNames: infantile malnutrition; infantile malnutrition with accumulation; gan disease with food stagnation; mild (infantile) malnutrition with accumulation; Infantile Malnutrition; Mild malnutrition with food stagnation
V010-N00013.path: 小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜疳病
V010-N00013.definition: 因喂养不当，或多种原因致使脾胃受损，积滞日久所致。临床以面色萎黄，身体消瘦，腹胀膨大，青筋显露，精神萎软，烦闹不安等为特征的小儿初中期疳病。

V010-N00013.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00013.label: 疳证
V010-N00013.path: 第7部分 儿科学｜脾胃系病
V010-N00013.definition: 以小儿慢性营养不良，形体虚弱羸瘦为特征的疾病。

V010-N00013.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00013.label: 疳积
V010-N00013.englishNames: infantile malnutrition; infantile malnutrition with accumulation; gan disease with food stagnation; mild (infantile) malnutrition with accumulation; Infantile Malnutrition
V010-N00013.path: 第7部分 儿科学｜脾胃系病｜疳证
V010-N00013.definition: 以形体明显消瘦，四肢枯细，腹部膨隆，青筋显露为特征的疳证。

V010-N00013.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V010-N00013.label: 疳积
V010-N00013.englishNames: infantile malnutrition; infantile malnutrition with accumulation; gan disease with food stagnation; mild (infantile) malnutrition with accumulation; Infantile Malnutrition
V010-N00013.path: 中医儿科学｜儿科学脾胃病

V010-N00013.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V010-N00013.label: 疳证
V010-N00013.path: 中医儿科学｜儿科学脾胃病
V010-N00013.definition: 以小儿慢性营养不良，形体虚弱羸瘦为特征的疾病。

V010-N00013.label: 疳病
V010-N00013.englishNames: Infantile malnutrition disorder; infantile malnutrition; infantile malnutrition disease; gan
V010-N00013.definition: 以形体虚弱赢瘦为特征的慢性营养不良疾 病。

V010-N00013.label: 疳积
V010-N00013.englishNames: infantile malnutrition; infantile malnutrition with accumulation; gan disease with food stagnation; mild (infantile) malnutrition with accumulation; Infantile Malnutrition

V010-N00013.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00013.label: 疳积
V010-N00013.englishNames: mild (infantile) malnutrition with accumulation; Infantile Malnutrition
V010-N00013.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病
V010-N00013.definition: 疳病中期，虚实错杂，以形体消瘦显著，面色萎黄，腹胀青筋，精神不振为特点的疳病。

V010-N00013.label: 疳证
V010-N00013.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V010-N00013.definition: 以小儿慢性营养不良，形体虚弱羸瘦为特征的疾病。

V010-N00013.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00013.label: 疳证
V010-N00013.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V010-N00013.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00013.label: 疳病
V010-N00013.aliases: 疳证； Infantile malnutrition disorder； Malnutrition pattern
V010-N00013.englishNames: Infantile malnutrition disorder; infantile malnutrition; infantile malnutrition disease; gan; Infantile malnutrition
V010-N00013.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00013.definition: Characterized by a sallow complexion, muscle wasting and bulging abdomen. Often results from improper feeding, congenital weakness or deficiency of the spleen and stomach. These factors may cause the failure of qi, blood and nutrients to nourish the zang–fu organs, hence delaying the growth and development of babies.

V010-N00013.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00013.label: 疳积
V010-N00013.englishNames: infantile malnutrition; infantile malnutrition with accumulation; gan disease with food stagnation; mild (infantile) malnutrition with accumulation; Infantile Malnutrition; Mild malnutrition with food stagnation
V010-N00013.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00013.definition: An intermediate stage of infantile malnutrition characterized by emaciation, a sallow complexion, bulging abdomen, veins showing through the skin, poor spirit, and restlessness. Often results from improper feeding or food stagnation in the stomach and intestines.

V010-N00013.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00013.label: 疳病

V010-N00252.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00252.label: 食积
V010-N00252.englishNames: food dyspepsia; food accumulation; Food retention disorder; Spleen system disorders; dyspepsia; Food stagnation
V010-N00252.path: 小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜积滞
V010-N00252.definition: 因饮食所伤，积滞肠胃所致。临床以脘腹胀满，嗳腐吐酸，食欲减退，大便酸臭，或如败卵，或伴见腹痛、哭闹，大便不调等为特征的小儿积滞病。

V010-N00252.label: 食积
V010-N00252.englishNames: food accumulation; Food retention disorder; food dyspepsia; Spleen system disorders; dyspepsia
V010-N00252.definition: 1岁以上小儿因伤食所致的积滞。

V010-N00252.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00252.label: 食积
V010-N00252.aliases: 乳食内积； Syndrome Of Food Retention
V010-N00252.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜虚实证候｜实证
V010-N00252.definition: 由暴饮暴食、过食肥甘厚味或酗酒，以致饮食停滞于胃肠道不能及时运化，遂形成食积证。临床表现为胃脘胀满作痛，嗳腐吞酸，纳呆厌食，恶心或吐出酸腐不化的食物，舌苔腻浊垢，脉滑有力，为食滞于胃脘；脐腹胀满作痛，肠鸣而矢气频传，大便不爽，泄出糊状、水样粪便而臭如败卵，或便秘，苔微黄而根部厚腻，脉沉滑，为食滞于肠道。

V010-N00252.label: 食积
V010-N00252.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证

V010-N00252.label: 食积
V010-N00252.englishNames: food accumulation; Food retention disorder; food dyspepsia; Spleen system disorders; dyspepsia
V010-N00252.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜积滞

V010-N00252.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00252.label: 食积
V010-N00252.englishNames: food dyspepsia; food accumulation; Food retention disorder; Spleen system disorders; dyspepsia; Food stagnation
V010-N00252.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00252.definition: Characterized by abdominal distension and fullness, belching, acid reflux, decreased appetite, and strong-odoured stools. Associated symptoms may include abdominal pain, crying and irregular bowel movements. Often occurs when improper diet damages the spleen and stomach and food is retained in the stomach and intestines.

V010-N00252.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00252.label: 食积

V010-N00252.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00252.label: 食积
V010-N00252.definition: a diseased state characterized by the accumulation of undigested food in the stomach and intestines, causing abdominal distension and pain, vomiting, diarrhea and anorexia

V010-N00089.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00089.label: 鹅口疮
V010-N00089.pinyinNames: e kou chuang; dong kou chuang
V010-N00089.path: 小儿相关病类术语｜新生儿类病
V010-N00089.definition: 因胎禀不足，感受秽毒，或心脾积热，上熏口舌所致。临床以口腔、舌上出现点片状白屑，状如鹅口等为特征的新生儿及婴儿病。

V010-N00089.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00089.label: 鹅口疮
V010-N00089.pinyinNames: e kou chuang; dong kou chuang
V010-N00089.path: 第7部分 儿科学｜脾胃系病
V010-N00089.definition: 以小儿口腔黏膜、舌头上不满白屑状物，状如鹅口为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00089.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00089.label: 雪口
V010-N00089.path: 第9部分 耳鼻喉科学｜口腔病（总）
V010-N00089.definition: 以口内黏膜满布白屑或白色斑膜为主要表现的口腔病。

V010-N00089.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V010-N00089.label: 鹅口疮
V010-N00089.pinyinNames: e kou chuang; dong kou chuang
V010-N00089.path: 中医儿科学｜儿科学脾胃病
V010-N00089.definition: 以小儿口腔黏膜、舌头上布生白屑状物，状如鹅口为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00089.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V010-N00089.label: 雪口
V010-N00089.path: 中医耳鼻喉科学｜口腔病
V010-N00089.definition: 以口内黏膜满布白屑或白色斑膜为主要表现的口腔病。

V010-N00089.label: 鹅口疮
V010-N00089.pinyinNames: e kou chuang; dong kou chuang
V010-N00089.definition: 以小儿口腔黏膜、舌头上布生白屑状物，状 如鹅口为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00089.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00089.label: 鹅口疮
V010-N00089.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医五官科疾病｜中医耳鼻咽喉科疾病｜中医口齿科疾病｜口疮
V010-N00089.definition: 因感受邪毒，心脾积热，上熏口舌所致。以口腔、舌上出现片状白屑、状如鹅口为主要表现的口腔疾病。

V010-N00089.label: 鹅口疮
V010-N00089.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V010-N00089.definition: 由胎热内蕴，口腔不洁，感受秽毒之邪所致，以口腔、舌上满布白屑为主要临床特征的一种口腔疾病。因其状如鹅口，故称鹅口疮；因其色白如雪片，故又名雪口。其主要病变在心脾。

V010-N00089.label: 鹅口疮
V010-N00089.pinyinNames: e kou chuang; dong kou chuang
V010-N00089.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜新生儿类病

V010-N00173.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00173.label: 脏躁
V010-N00173.englishNames: hysteria; visceral agitation(hysteria); Hysteriform Diseases; Uneasiness disorder; Hysteria
V010-N00173.definition: 因情志不舒，气机逆乱，心脾气血暗耗，郁火不得发越，或天癸将绝，阴阳失调，扰动心神所致。临床以妇女情志异常，精神恍惚，烦躁不宁，无故悲伤，哭笑无常，呵欠频作等为特征的情志病。

V010-N00173.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00173.label: 脏躁
V010-N00173.englishNames: hysteria; visceral agitation(hysteria); Hysteriform Diseases; Uneasiness disorder
V010-N00173.path: 第6部分 妇科学｜妇科杂病
V010-N00173.definition: 以妇女情志异常，精神抑郁，心中烦乱，无辜悲伤欲哭，哭笑无常，呵欠频作为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00173.label: 脏躁
V010-N00173.englishNames: hysteria; visceral agitation(hysteria); Hysteriform Diseases; Uneasiness disorder
V010-N00173.definition: 以精神抑郁，心中烦乱，无故悲伤欲哭，哭笑 无常，呵欠频作为主要表现的情志疾病。

V010-N00173.label: 脏躁
V010-N00173.path: TF[中医精神疾病和心理学]｜中医精神疾病

V010-N00173.label: 脏躁
V010-N00173.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜精神情志病类
V010-N00173.definition: 因情志不舒，郁火内扰，或天癸将绝之时，阴血亏虚，阴阳失调，气机紊乱，心神不宁所致。以神情抑郁，烦躁不宁，悲伤欲哭等为主要表现的脑神疾病。

V010-N00173.label: 脏躁
V010-N00173.englishNames: hysteria; visceral agitation(hysteria); Hysteriform Diseases; Uneasiness disorder
V010-N00173.path: 中医疾病｜情志病类术语

V010-N00173.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00173.label: 脏躁
V010-N00173.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜情志情况

V010-N00173.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00173.label: 脏躁
V010-N00173.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00173.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00173.label: 脏躁
V010-N00173.englishNames: hysteria; visceral agitation(hysteria); Hysteriform Diseases; Uneasiness disorder; Hysteria
V010-N00173.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00173.definition: A paroxysmal mental disorder in women characterized by mood swings, mind wandering, sadness with no apparent reason, restlessness, crying or laughing with unexplained reason and frequent sighing. Often occurs when emotional disturbance causes qi disorder and consumes heart blood and spleen qi. It may also occur as a result of yin–yang disorder due to menopause.

V010-N00173.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00173.label: 脏躁

V010-N00173.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00173.label: 脏躁
V010-N00173.definition: a paroxysmal mental disease marked by depression and melancholy, irritability, lack of control over emotions, sadness with an urge to weep, and sighing for no apparent reason

V010-N00175.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00175.label: 郁病
V010-N00175.aliases: 郁证； Depression disorder； Depressive disorder； Melancholy disorder
V010-N00175.englishNames: depression disease; Depression; depressive disease; depression
V010-N00175.definition: 因长期情志不遂，或性格内向、偏颇，致使气机郁滞，不得发越，初病在肝，及于心脾，久则郁损成劳所致。临床以抑郁寡欢，情绪不宁，善悲易怒，焦虑多疑，强迫自责，兴趣索然，情感淡漠，甚则有消极避世，自虐、自杀意念，伴见胸胁痞满、胀痛，纳差不食，虚烦、失眠，健忘，消瘦等为特征的情志病。注：包括梅核气、肠郁、经行情志异常等。

V010-N00175.label: 郁病
V010-N00175.path: 内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V010-N00175.definition: 以心情抑郁，情绪不宁，胸部满闷，胁肋胀 痛，或易怒易哭，或咽中如有异物梗塞等为 主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00175.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00175.label: 郁证
V010-N00175.path: TF[中医精神疾病和心理学]｜中医精神疾病
V010-N00175.definition: 以心情抑郁，情绪不宁，胸部满闷，胁肋胀痛，或易怒易哭，或咽中如有异物哽塞等为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00175.label: 郁证
V010-N00175.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜精神情志病类
V010-N00175.definition: 以心情抑郁，情绪不宁，胸部满闷，胁肋胀痛，或易怒易哭，或咽中如有异物哽塞等为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00175.label: 郁病
V010-N00175.path: 中医疾病｜情志病类术语

V010-N00175.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00175.label: 六郁
V010-N00175.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V010-N00175.definition: A collective term for stagnation of qi, blood, phlegm, fire, food and dampness. Often results from qi stagnation of the liver and spleen.

V010-N00175.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00175.label: 郁病
V010-N00175.aliases: 郁证； Depression disorder； Depressive disorder； Melancholy disorder
V010-N00175.englishNames: depression disease; Depression; depressive disease; depression
V010-N00175.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00175.definition: Characterized by a low mood, lack of interest, fullness and stuffiness in the chest and subcostal region, and a poor appetite. In severe cases, a sense of guilt, dejection, paranoia, self-harm and tendency to commit suicide. Often occurs when long-term emotional disturbance or character defects causes qi to stagnate. It is first associated with the liver and later with the heart and spleen.

V010-N00175.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00175.label: 六郁

V010-N00175.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00175.label: 郁病

V010-N00175.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00175.label: 郁证

V010-N00175.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00175.label: 六郁
V010-N00175.definition: a collective term for stagnation of qi, blood, damp, fire, phlegm and food, the same as six stagnations

V010-N00227.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00227.label: 风水
V010-N00227.englishNames: wind edema; Wind edema disorder; Wind oedema
V010-N00227.path: 气血津液病类术语｜水肿类病
V010-N00227.definition: 因风邪侵袭，肺失宣降，不能通调水道，风水相搏，泛溢肌表所致。临床以骤然发热、恶风，咽喉肿痛，骨节疼痛，面目浮肿，继而全身浮肿，可伴见气急、尿少，蛋白尿及血压增高等为特征的急性水肿病。

V010-N00227.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00227.label: 风水
V010-N00227.englishNames: wind edema; Wind edema disorder; Wind oedema
V010-N00227.path: 第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病｜水肿[病]
V010-N00227.definition: 风邪外袭，以突发头面部即四肢水肿为主要表现的水肿病。

V010-N00227.label: 风水
V010-N00227.definition: 以突发局限性水肿为主要表现的水肿病。

V010-N00227.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00227.label: 风水
V010-N00227.aliases: 风水相搏； 风袭水泛； 风袭水停
V010-N00227.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜病因证候｜外感病证｜六淫证候｜风淫证候
V010-N00227.definition: 外感风邪，肺卫失宣，水湿浸淫肌肤，以突起眼睑、头面、四肢水肿，或起风团肿块，微恶风寒，小便短少，脉浮等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00227.label: 风水
V010-N00227.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证｜水肿
V010-N00227.definition: 风邪外袭，以突发头面部及四肢水肿为主要表现的水肿病。

V010-N00227.label: 风水
V010-N00227.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜水肿类病

V010-N00227.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00227.label: 风水
V010-N00227.englishNames: wind edema; Wind edema disorder; Wind oedema
V010-N00227.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00227.definition: Characterized by a sudden fever, aversion to wind, sore, swollen throat, joint pain, and swelling of the face and eyelid. Over time, individuals may experience generalized oedema. Associated signs and symptoms may include shortness of breath, scanty urine, proteinuria and elevated blood pressure. If often occurs when pathogenic wind affects the lung’s functions in dispersing and descending qi and regulating water passage.

V010-N00227.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00227.label: 风水

V010-N00163.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00163.label: 消渴病
V010-N00163.englishNames: wasting and thirsting disease
V010-N00163.path: 气血津液病类术语
V010-N00163.definition: 因恣食肥甘，或情志过极，房事不节，或温热邪伤，或滥服金石药物等，致使胃热液涸，或肺热化燥、心火偏盛、肾阴受灼，致使气化失常，津液精微不约而下泄等引起的，以多饮、多食、多尿为特征的一类疾病。注：包括上消、中消、下消、消渴厥、妊娠消渴、消渴内障等。

V010-N00163.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00163.label: 上消
V010-N00163.englishNames: wasting of the upper jiao; upper consumption; Wasting of the upper jiao; upper wasting-thirst
V010-N00163.path: 气血津液病类术语｜消渴病
V010-N00163.definition: 因上焦燥热，肺热耗损阴津，或胃热液涸所致。临床以随饮随渴，小便清利或甜，大便如常等为特征的消渴病。

V010-N00163.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00163.label: 下消
V010-N00163.aliases: 肾消； 痟肾； 消肾； Kidney wasting
V010-N00163.englishNames: lower consumption; Wasting of the lower jiao; lower wasting-thirst; wasting of the lower jiao
V010-N00163.path: 气血津液病类术语｜消渴病
V010-N00163.definition: 因心火偏盛，肾阴受灼，或蒸化失司，津液精微不约而下泄，肾水亏竭所致。临床以口渴引饮，饮一溲二，溲似淋浊，或如膏油，或甜，面黑，耳焦，形体消瘦等为特征的消渴病。

V010-N00163.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00163.label: 中消
V010-N00163.aliases: 消中； 痟中； 消脾； 胃消； Spleen/stomach wasting
V010-N00163.englishNames: middle consumption; wasting of the middle jiao; middle wasting-thirst; Wasting of the middle jiao
V010-N00163.path: 气血津液病类术语｜消渴病
V010-N00163.definition: 因中焦燥热，胃阴耗损所致。临床以善饥多食，形体消瘦，口渴、多饮，大便秘结等为特征的消渴病。

V010-N00163.vocabName: 中医药学名词（2004）
V010-N00163.label: 消渴
V010-N00163.aliases: 上消； 下消； 消瘅； 中消； Excess Eating Drinking Urine； 消渴病
V010-N00163.englishNames: Consumptive Thirst; consumptive thirst; wasting-thirst; Wasting thirst disorder
V010-N00163.path: 内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V010-N00163.definition: 以多饮、多食、多尿为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00163.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00163.label: 消渴
V010-N00163.aliases: BNV060； 消渴病； 上消； 下消； 消瘅； 中消； Excess Eating Drinking Urine
V010-N00163.englishNames: wasting-thirst; Consumptive Thirst; consumptive thirst
V010-N00163.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V010-N00163.definition: 因恣食肥甘、或情志过极、房事不节、热病之后等，郁热内蕴，气化失常，津液精微不能正常输布而下泄，阴虚燥热。以口渴多饮、多食而瘦、尿多而甜为主要表现。

V010-N00163.vocabName: 临床术语
V010-N00163.label: 消渴
V010-N00163.aliases: 肺消； 膈消； 消瘅； 消中
V010-N00163.englishNames: Excess Eating-drinking-urine
V010-N00163.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V010-N00163.definition: 是以多尿、多饮、多食、形体消瘦，或尿有甜味为主要临床表现的病证。其病机主要是禀赋不足，阴津亏损，燥热偏胜，且多与血瘀密切相关。

V010-N00163.vocabName: 临床术语
V010-N00163.label: 上消
V010-N00163.englishNames: Diabetes Characterized By Polydipsia; Diabetes Involving The Upper Warmer; The Upper Emaciation
V010-N00163.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜消渴
V010-N00163.definition: 渴而多饮为上消（经为膈消）。

V010-N00163.vocabName: 临床术语
V010-N00163.label: 下消
V010-N00163.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜消渴

V010-N00163.vocabName: 临床术语
V010-N00163.label: 中消
V010-N00163.englishNames: Diabetes Characterized By Polyphagia; Diabetes Involving The Middle-Warmer; The Midde Emaciation
V010-N00163.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜消渴
V010-N00163.definition: 消谷善饥为中消（经为消中）。

V010-N00163.vocabName: 临床术语
V010-N00163.label: 消渴
V010-N00163.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜饮食口味症状｜饮食症状｜口渴
V010-N00163.definition: 指口渴大量饮水而渴不解。

V010-N00163.vocabName: GBT15657-2021-中医病证分类与代码
V010-N00163.label: 消渴病
V010-N00163.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语

V010-N00163.vocabName: GBT15657-2021-中医病证分类与代码
V010-N00163.label: 上消
V010-N00163.englishNames: upper consumption; upper wasting-thirst
V010-N00163.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜消渴病

V010-N00163.vocabName: GBT15657-2021-中医病证分类与代码
V010-N00163.label: 下消
V010-N00163.aliases: 肾消； 消肾； 痟肾
V010-N00163.englishNames: lower consumption; lower wasting-thirst
V010-N00163.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜消渴病

V010-N00163.vocabName: GBT15657-2021-中医病证分类与代码
V010-N00163.label: 中消
V010-N00163.aliases: 胃消； 消脾； 消中； 痟中
V010-N00163.englishNames: middle consumption; middle wasting-thirst
V010-N00163.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜消渴病

V010-N00163.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00163.label: 上消
V010-N00163.englishNames: wasting of the upper jiao; upper consumption; Wasting of the upper jiao; upper wasting-thirst
V010-N00163.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00163.definition: Characterized by excessive thirst, excessive drinking, and clear urine with a sweet or fruit-like smell. Individuals often have normal bowel movements. Often occurs when lung heat consumes yin fluids.

V010-N00163.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00163.label: 下消
V010-N00163.aliases: 肾消； 痟肾； 消肾； Kidney wasting
V010-N00163.englishNames: lower consumption; Wasting of the lower jiao; lower wasting-thirst; wasting of the lower jiao
V010-N00163.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00163.definition: Characterized by thirst, excessive drinking, profuse urination with turbid, oily and sweet smelling urine, a dark complexion, and weight loss. Often occurs when hyperactive heart fire consumes kidney yin or disturbs the qi transformation.

V010-N00163.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00163.label: 中消
V010-N00163.aliases: 消中； 痟中； 消脾； 胃消； Spleen/stomach wasting
V010-N00163.englishNames: middle consumption; wasting of the middle jiao; middle wasting-thirst; Wasting of the middle jiao
V010-N00163.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00163.definition: Characterized by increased appetite but rapid hunger after eating food, weight loss, thirst, excessive drinking and constipation. Often occurs when dry heat in the middle jiao consumes stomach yin.

V010-N00163.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00163.label: 消渴类病
V010-N00163.englishNames: category of wasting and thirst disease; Wasting and thirst disorders
V010-N00163.pinyinNames: xiao ke lei bing; xiāo kě lèi bìng
V010-N00163.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00163.definition: A group of disorders characterized by polydipsia, polyphagia and polyuria. Contributing factors include overeating of oily, sweet food, emotions, sexual indulgence, exposure to pathogenic warm heat or abuse of medicinal minerals. These factors may cause stomach heat, lung dryness, hyperactive heart fire to consume yin and disturb qi transformation.

V010-N00163.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00163.label: 上消
V010-N00163.englishNames: upper consumptive thirst
V010-N00163.path: 内科病

V010-N00163.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V010-N00163.englishNames: lower consumptive thirst
V010-N00163.path: 内科病

V010-N00163.path: 内科病

V010-N00163.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V010-N00163.englishNames: consumptive thirst

V010-N00208.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00208.label: 悬饮
V010-N00208.englishNames: Pleural fluid retention disorder; suspending fluid retention; pleural fluid retention; pleural fluid retention [disease/disorder]; Pleural fluid retention; suspending fluid
V010-N00208.path: 气血津液病类术语｜痰饮类病
V010-N00208.definition: 因肺、胸部的痨、癌等病变，以及某些全身性疾病，使饮邪停积胸腔，阻碍气机升降所致。临床以胸胁饱满、胀闷，咳唾引痛等为特征的痰饮病。

V010-N00208.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00208.label: 悬饮
V010-N00208.englishNames: Pleural fluid retention disorder; suspending fluid retention; pleural fluid retention; pleural fluid retention [disease/disorder]; suspending fluid
V010-N00208.path: 第1部分 内科学｜肺病
V010-N00208.definition: 饮邪停留于胁肋部，以胸胁饱满、胀闷，咳唾引痛为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00208.label: 悬饮
V010-N00208.englishNames: Pleural fluid retention disorder; suspending fluid retention; pleural fluid retention; suspending fluid
V010-N00208.definition: 饮邪停留于胁胁部引起的，以胸胁饱满、胀 闷，咳唾引痛为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00208.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00208.label: 悬饮
V010-N00208.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医病因和病机｜中医病因｜痰饮｜饮证
V010-N00208.definition: 因肺、胸部的痨、癌等病变，以及某些全身性疾病，导致饮邪停积胸腔，阻碍气机升降。以胸胁饱满、胀闷，咳唾引痛等为主要表现的胸部痰饮类疾病。

V010-N00208.label: 悬饮
V010-N00208.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V010-N00208.definition: 因肺、胸部的痨、癌等病变，以及某些全身性疾病，导致饮邪停积胸腔，阻碍气机升降。以胸胁饱满、胀闷，咳唾引痛等为主要表现的胸部痰饮类疾病。

V010-N00208.label: 悬饮
V010-N00208.englishNames: Pleural fluid retention disorder; suspending fluid retention; pleural fluid retention; suspending fluid
V010-N00208.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜痰饮类病

V010-N00208.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00208.label: 悬饮
V010-N00208.englishNames: Pleural fluid retention disorder; suspending fluid retention; pleural fluid retention; pleural fluid retention [disease/disorder]; Pleural fluid retention; suspending fluid
V010-N00208.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00208.definition: Characterized by fullness, distension and tightness in the chest or subcostal region and cough-induced pain. Often occurs when fluid retention in the chest cavity (due to lung tuberculosis/cancer or other systemic conditions) obstructs the flow of qi.

V010-N00208.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V010-N00164.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00164.label: 虚劳类病
V010-N00164.englishNames: consumptive diseases diseases; category of consumptive disease; Deficiency/consumption
V010-N00164.pinyinNames: xu lao lei bing; xū láo lèi bìng
V010-N00164.definition: 泛指因劳倦或饮食、七情、酒色等所伤，或大病后失于调理，致使阴阳或气血脏腑等虚损不复而引起的以气、血、阴、阳及五脏虚损等为特征的一类虚衰性疾病。

V010-N00164.label: 虚劳
V010-N00164.aliases: 六极（中医）； 五劳七伤； 虚损； 虚劳病
V010-N00164.englishNames: Consumptive Diseases; consumptive disease; Consumptive disorder
V010-N00164.path: 内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V010-N00164.definition: 阴阳、气血、脏腑虚损的慢性虚衰性疾病的 统称。

V010-N00164.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00164.label: 虚劳
V010-N00164.aliases: BNV020； 六极（中医）； 五劳七伤； 虚损； 虚劳病
V010-N00164.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V010-N00164.definition: 劳逸失度而伤人致病，常渐积而发，起病徐缓，逐渐加重，病程较长，伤及脏腑气血为主，其次可伤及筋肉、经络及关节，多表现为虚证和慢性病。

V010-N00164.label: 虚劳
V010-N00164.aliases: 内科虚劳杂病； 虚损
V010-N00164.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V010-N00164.definition: 又称虚损，是以脏腑功能衰退，气血阴阳不足为主要病机的多种慢性虚弱症候的总称。

V010-N00164.label: 虚劳类病
V010-N00164.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语

V010-N00164.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00164.label: 虚劳类病
V010-N00164.englishNames: consumptive diseases diseases; category of consumptive disease; Deficiency/consumption
V010-N00164.pinyinNames: xu lao lei bing; xū láo lèi bìng
V010-N00164.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00164.definition: A collective term for chronic deficiency or consumption of qi, blood, yin, yang and the five zang organs. Contributing factors may include over-exertion, an improper diet, emotions, alcohol consumption, sexual indulgence or major medical conditions.

V010-N00164.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00164.label: 虚损
V010-N00164.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00164.definition: A group of chronic consumptive conditions characterized by a lustreless complexion, lassitude, shortness of breath, a low voice, dizziness, blurred vision and poor appetite. Associated symptoms include abdominal distension, loose stools, palpitations, forgetfulness, nocturnal emissions, irregular menstruation, spontaneous sweating, night sweats, weight loss, feverish sensations in the palms, soles and chest, cold intolerance and cold limbs. Contributing factors may include major or chronic disease, heavy blood loss during childbirth or surgery, congenital weakness or ageing. These factors may consume qi, blood, yin, yang and the zang–fu organs.

V010-N00164.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00164.label: 虚劳

V010-N00026.definition: 产后血性恶露持续10天以上，仍淋漓不尽者，称为“产后恶露不绝”。

V010-N00023.englishNames: postpartum pain of body; postpartum body pain

V010-N00036.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00036.label: 阴吹
V010-N00036.englishNames: vaginal flatus; flatus vaginalis; Vaginal flatus disorder; Vaginal flatulence
V010-N00036.pinyinNames: yin chui; yin chu; yīn chuī
V010-N00036.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜女性前阴类病
V010-N00036.definition: 因腑气失调，或气滞痰阻于胞宫所致。临床以阴道时或排出气体，或气出有声，状如矢气等为特征的妇科疾病。

V010-N00036.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00036.label: 阴吹
V010-N00036.englishNames: vaginal flatus; flatus vaginalis; Vaginal flatus disorder
V010-N00036.path: 第6部分 妇科学｜妇科杂病
V010-N00036.definition: 以妇女阴道中时时出气，或出气有声，状如矢气为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00036.label: 阴吹
V010-N00036.englishNames: Vaginal flatus disorder; flatus vaginalis; vaginal flatus
V010-N00036.definition: 以妇女阴道中时时出气，或出气有声，状如 矢气为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00036.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00036.label: 阴吹
V010-N00036.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医妇产科疾病｜中医妇科病
V010-N00036.definition: 多因腑气失调，或气滞痰阻等所致。以妇女阴道中时时有气排出、并有声响、状如矢气为主要表现的妇科疾病。

V010-N00036.label: 阴吹
V010-N00036.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜前阴病
V010-N00036.definition: 妇女阴道中时时出气，或气出有声，状如矢气者，称为“阴吹”。

V010-N00036.label: 阴吹
V010-N00036.englishNames: Vaginal flatus disorder; flatus vaginalis; vaginal flatus

V010-N00036.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00036.label: 阴吹
V010-N00036.englishNames: vaginal flatus; flatus vaginalis; Vaginal flatus disorder; Vaginal flatulence
V010-N00036.pinyinNames: yin chui; yin chu; yīn chuī
V010-N00036.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00036.definition: Characterized by an emission or expulsion of air from the vagina. The sound is somewhat comparable to flatulence from the anus. Often results from qi disorder of the fu organs or qi stagnation and phlegm affecting the uterus.

V010-N00036.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V010-N00036.label: 阴吹
V010-N00036.definition: noisy expulsion of gas from the vagina

V010-N00030.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00030.label: 不孕
V010-N00030.aliases: Female infertility disorder； Female sterility disorder； Infertility disorder
V010-N00030.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜女性杂病
V010-N00030.definition: 因性器官发育不全、畸形，或肾虚、肝郁、痰湿、血瘀等，致使冲任失调、胞宫孕育功能障碍所致。临床以育龄期女性有正常性生活，未采取避孕措施，与配偶同居1年以上而不受孕等为特征的妇科疾病。

V010-N00030.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00030.label: 不育，女性
V010-N00030.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医妇产科疾病｜中医妇科病
V010-N00030.definition: 女子婚后，夫妇同居2年以上，配偶生殖功能正常，未避孕而未受孕者；或曾孕育过，未避孕又两年以上未再受孕者。

V010-N00030.label: 不孕症
V010-N00030.aliases: 不孕； 断绪； 继发性不孕症； 全不产； 原发性不孕症
V010-N00030.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜妇科杂病
V010-N00030.definition: 女子婚后夫妇同居1年以上，配偶生殖功能正常，未避孕而未受孕者；或曾孕育过，未避孕又1年以上未再受孕者，称为“不孕症”。前者称“原发性不孕症”，后者称“继发性不孕症”。古称前者为“全不产”，后者为“断绪”。

V010-N00030.label: 不孕
V010-N00030.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜女性杂病

V010-N00030.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00030.label: 不孕
V010-N00030.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜妇科类｜孕

V010-N00030.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00030.label: 不孕
V010-N00030.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00030.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00030.label: 不孕
V010-N00030.aliases: Female infertility disorder； Female sterility disorder； Infertility disorder
V010-N00030.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00030.definition: Characterized by the inability of women of childbearing age to become pregnant after one year (or longer) of unprotected sex. Often results from dysfunctions of the uterus and Chong and Ren meridian. Contributing factors may include kidney deficiency, liver qi stagnation, phlegm dampness, and blood stasis.

V010-N00030.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00030.label: 不孕

V010-N00030.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00030.label: 不孕
V010-N00030.definition: lack of capacity to produce offspring

V010-N00033.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00033.label: 带下病
V010-N00033.englishNames: leukorrheal diseases; leucorrhea disdease/disorder; Leukorrhea disorder; morbid vaginal discharge; leukorrheal disease
V010-N00033.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病
V010-N00033.definition: 因湿热或湿毒下注，房事不洁，手术损伤，脾虚、肾虚等，引起带脉失约、任脉不固所致。临床以带下量、色、质、气味异常等为特征的一类疾病。注：包括白带、黄带、赤带、五色带、白崩等。

V010-N00033.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00033.label: 带下病
V010-N00033.englishNames: leukorrheal diseases; leucorrhea disdease/disorder; Leukorrhea disorder; morbid vaginal discharge
V010-N00033.path: 第6部分 妇科学｜带下病（总）
V010-N00033.definition: 以带下量、色、质异常为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00033.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V010-N00033.label: 带下病
V010-N00033.englishNames: leukorrheal diseases; Leukorrhea disorder; morbid vaginal discharge
V010-N00033.definition: 以带下量明显增多或减少，色、质、气味发生异常，或伴全身、局部症状为常见症的疾病的统称。

V010-N00033.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00033.label: 带下
V010-N00033.aliases: 带下病； 带下过多； 带下过少； Morbid Leukorrhea
V010-N00033.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医妇产科疾病｜中医妇科病
V010-N00033.definition: 妇女阴道分泌物明显增多，色、质、气味异常的症状。寒湿或湿热下注，或热毒浸淫，或脾肾阳气亏虚等常可见带下异常。带下一般见于女阴局部感染邪毒，或胞宫等的病变。但身体虚弱或痰湿内盛者亦可见带下量多。

V010-N00033.label: 带下病
V010-N00033.aliases: 白沃； 赤白沥； 流秽物； 下白物
V010-N00033.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病
V010-N00033.definition: 带下的量明显增多，色、质、气味发生异常，或伴全身、局部症状者，称为“带下病”

V010-N00033.label: 带下病
V010-N00033.englishNames: leukorrheal diseases; Leukorrhea disorder; morbid vaginal discharge
V010-N00033.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病

V010-N00033.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00033.label: 带下病

V010-N00033.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00033.label: 带下

V010-N00033.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00033.label: 带下
V010-N00033.aliases: 带下病； 带下过多； 带下过少； Morbid Leukorrhea
V010-N00033.definition: (1) normal discharge from the vagina; (2) diseases characterized by discharge from the vagina, the same as leukorrhea

V010-N00054.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00054.label: 崩漏
V010-N00054.aliases: 暴崩； 崩中； 漏下； 血崩； Uterine Bleeding
V010-N00054.englishNames: metrorrhagia; metrostaxis; Metrorrhagia and metrostaxis; metrorrhagia and metrostaxis; Metrorrhagia disorder; metrostaxis and metrorrhagia; Metrorrhagia; flooding and spotting
V010-N00054.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病
V010-N00054.definition: 因肾虚、血热、湿热、气虚、血瘀、外伤等，致使冲任不固所致。临床以妇女非正常行经期间阴道下血如崩或淋漓不尽等为特征的月经病。注：包括崩中和漏下等。

V010-N00054.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00054.label: 崩中
V010-N00054.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病｜崩漏
V010-N00054.definition: 因血热而迫血妄行，或瘀血阻滞，血不循经，或气虚冲任不固所致。临床以月经周期紊乱，子宫出血量多而势急如崩等为特征的崩漏病。

V010-N00054.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00054.label: 漏下
V010-N00054.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病｜崩漏
V010-N00054.definition: 因肾虚、血瘀，冲任失约，肝不藏血所致。临床以月经周期紊乱，子宫出血量少而势缓，淋漓不尽等为特征的崩漏病。

V010-N00054.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00054.label: 崩中
V010-N00054.path: 第6部分 妇科学｜月经病（总）
V010-N00054.definition: 以妇女月经周期紊乱，阴道下血不止，量大而势急如崩为主要表现的月经病。

V010-N00054.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00054.label: 崩漏
V010-N00054.aliases: 暴崩； 崩中； 漏下； 血崩； Uterine Bleeding
V010-N00054.englishNames: metrorrhagia; metrostaxis; metrorrhagia and metrostaxis; Metrorrhagia disorder; metrostaxis and metrorrhagia; Metrorrhagia; flooding and spotting
V010-N00054.path: 第6部分 妇科学｜月经病（总）
V010-N00054.definition: 以妇女月经周期紊乱，阴道突然大量下血不止，或小量下血淋漓不断为主要表现的月经病。

V010-N00054.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00054.label: 漏下
V010-N00054.path: 第6部分 妇科学｜月经病（总）
V010-N00054.definition: 以妇女月经周期紊乱，阴道下血，量少而淋漓不断为主要表现的月经病。

V010-N00054.vocabName: 中医药学名词（2004）
V010-N00054.label: 崩漏
V010-N00054.aliases: 暴崩； 崩中； 漏下； 血崩； Uterine Bleeding
V010-N00054.englishNames: metrorrhagia; metrostaxis; metrorrhagia and metrostaxis; Metrorrhagia disorder; metrostaxis and metrorrhagia; Metrorrhagia; flooding and spotting
V010-N00054.path: 妇科疾病
V010-N00054.definition: 以妇女不在行经期间，阴道突然大量下血， 或淋漓下血不断为主要表现的月经病。

V010-N00054.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00054.label: 崩漏
V010-N00054.aliases: 暴崩； 崩中； 漏下； 血崩； Uterine Bleeding
V010-N00054.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医妇产科疾病｜中医妇科病｜月经病
V010-N00054.definition: 妇女非正常行经而阴道下血如崩或淋漓不尽的症状。势急而出血量多者为崩；势缓而出血量少、淋漓不断者为漏。多由血热、湿热、气虚、血瘀、外伤等所致。妇女月经病变、崩漏病，以及石瘕、胎漏、异位妊娠、新产血崩、产后恶露不绝、疫斑热、紫癜病、血溢病等病中皆可出现崩漏。

V010-N00054.vocabName: 临床术语
V010-N00054.label: 崩漏
V010-N00054.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜月经病
V010-N00054.definition: 多由脾虚、肾虚、血热、血瘀造成的月经周期、经期、经量发生严重失常的病证，是指经血非时暴下不止或淋漓不尽，前者谓之崩中，后者谓之漏下。

V010-N00054.vocabName: 临床术语
V010-N00054.label: 崩漏
V010-N00054.aliases: 崩中； 不规则阴道出血； 经崩； 经漏； 漏下； 漏下不止； 月经淋漓； 月经淋漓不止
V010-N00054.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜经带胎产症状｜月经症状｜月经不调
V010-N00054.definition: 崩漏是月经的周期，经期，经量发生严重失常的病症，是指经血非时暴下不止或淋漓不尽，前者谓之崩中，后者谓之漏下。

V010-N00054.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00054.label: 漏下
V010-N00054.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00054.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00054.label: 崩中
V010-N00054.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00054.definition: Characterized by irregular menstrual cycle and sudden, profuse uterine bleeding. Often occurs when heat forces the blood to move recklessly. Alternatively, it may occur as a result of stagnant blood or qi failing to secure the Chong and Ren meridians.

V010-N00054.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00054.label: 崩漏
V010-N00054.aliases: 暴崩； 崩中； 漏下； 血崩； Uterine Bleeding
V010-N00054.englishNames: metrorrhagia; metrostaxis; Metrorrhagia and metrostaxis; metrorrhagia and metrostaxis; Metrorrhagia disorder; metrostaxis and metrorrhagia; Metrorrhagia; flooding and spotting
V010-N00054.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00054.definition: Characterized by a sudden onset of excessive uterine bleeding or small but continuous uterine bleeding. It includes metrorrhagia and metrostaxis, often resulting from insecurity of the Chong and Ren meridians. Contributing factors may include kidney deficiency, blood heat, damp heat, qi deficiency, blood stasis, or trauma, etc.

V010-N00054.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00054.label: 漏下
V010-N00054.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病

V010-N00056.definition: 因精血亏少，血海失充，或经脉阻滞，血行不畅所致。临床以月经周期正常，经量明显少于平时正常经量的1/2，或少于20mL，或经期不足2天，甚或点滴即净等为特征的月经病。

V010-N00056.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00056.label: 月经过少
V010-N00056.englishNames: hypomenorrhea; Hypomenorrhea; Decreased menstruation disorder; scant menstruation; scanty menstruation; hypermenorrhea; decreased menstruation; haypomenorrhea
V010-N00056.path: 第6部分 妇科学｜月经病（总）｜月经不调
V010-N00056.definition: 以月经周期正常，经量明显少于正常经量的二分之一，或少于20ml，或经期不足2天，甚至点滴即净，且连续2个周期以上为特征的月经病。

V010-N00056.label: 月经过少
V010-N00056.englishNames: hypomenorrhea; Hypomenorrhea; Decreased menstruation disorder; scant menstruation; scanty menstruation; hypermenorrhea
V010-N00056.definition: 以月经经量明显少于既往为主要表现的月 经病。

V010-N00056.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00056.label: 月经过少
V010-N00056.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医妇产科疾病｜中医妇科病｜月经病｜月经失调
V010-N00056.definition: 多因精血亏少，血海失充，或经脉阻滞，血行不畅所致。以月经血量较常量明显减少，甚至点滴即净，或经行时间不足2天，经量亦少为主要表现的月经类疾病。

V010-N00056.label: 月经过少
V010-N00056.aliases: Decreased menstruation disorder； 经量过少； 经水涩少
V010-N00056.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜月经病
V010-N00056.definition: 月经周期正常，经量明显少于既往，不足2天，甚或点滴即净者，称“月经过少”。亦称“经水涩少”、“经量过少”。一般月经量少于20ml为月经过少。

V010-N00056.label: 月经过少
V010-N00056.englishNames: hypomenorrhea; Hypomenorrhea; Decreased menstruation disorder; scant menstruation; scanty menstruation; hypermenorrhea
V010-N00056.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病

V010-N00056.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00056.label: 月经过少
V010-N00056.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00056.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00056.label: 月经过少
V010-N00056.aliases: Scanty menstruation disorder； 月经涩少
V010-N00056.englishNames: hypomenorrhea; Scanty menstruation; Hypomenorrhea; Decreased menstruation disorder; scant menstruation; scanty menstruation; hypermenorrhea; decreased menstruation; haypomenorrhea
V010-N00056.pinyinNames: yue jing guo shao; yuè jīng guò shǎo
V010-N00056.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00056.definition: An abnormally scanty menstrual volume (less than 1/2 of the normal menstrual volume, <20 ml, less than two days of menstrual duration, or just drops of menstrual blood). Often results from essence/blood deficiency or blood stagnation.

V010-N00056.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00056.label: 月经涩少

V010-N00056.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00056.label: 月经过少
V010-N00056.englishNames: hypomenorrhea; scant menstruation; hypermenorrhea; scanty menstruation

V010-N00056.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00056.label: 月经过少
V010-N00056.definition: menstrual discharge of less than the normal amount occurring at regular intervals

V010-N00058.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00058.label: 痛经
V010-N00058.aliases: 月经痛； 经行腹痛； Dysmenorrhea disorder； Painful periods disorder； Menstrual cramp disorder
V010-N00058.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病
V010-N00058.definition: 因月经期前后冲任不和，气血阻滞，或精血不足，胞脉失养等所致。临床以经期或经行前后出现周期性小腹疼痛，或痛引腰骶，牵掣大腿内侧，甚则剧痛、汗出、晕厥，伴见面色苍白等为特征的月经病。

V010-N00058.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00058.label: 痛经
V010-N00058.path: 第6部分 妇科学｜月经病（总）
V010-N00058.definition: 以行经前后、经期出现周期性小腹痛，或痛引腰骶，甚至剧痛晕厥，经后缓解为特征的月经病。

V010-N00058.label: 痛经
V010-N00058.definition: 以经期、经行前后，出现周期性腹痛，痛引腰 骶，甚至剧痛晕厥为主要表现的月经病。

V010-N00058.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00058.label: 痛经
V010-N00058.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医妇产科疾病｜中医妇科病｜月经病
V010-N00058.definition: 多因情志所伤，六淫为害，导致冲任阻滞，或因精血不足，胞脉失于濡养所致。以经期或经行前后周期性出现小腹疼痛、或痛引腰骶、甚至剧痛昏厥为主要表现的月经类疾病。

V010-N00058.label: 痛经
V010-N00058.aliases: 经行腹痛； 原发性痛经
V010-N00058.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜月经病
V010-N00058.definition: 凡在经期或经行前后，出现周期性小腹疼痛，或痛引腰骶，甚至剧痛晕厥者，称为“痛经”。亦称“经行腹痛”。

V010-N00058.label: 经行腹痛
V010-N00058.pinyinNames: jing xing fu tong; Menstrual Abdomminal Pain
V010-N00058.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜经带胎产症状｜月经症状｜经期症状
V010-N00058.definition: 属于妇产科视诊所见的一种异常症状。是指妇女正值经期或经行前后，出现周期性的小腹疼痛难忍的症状。

V010-N00058.label: 痛经
V010-N00058.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病

V010-N00058.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00058.label: 痛经
V010-N00058.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜妇科类｜经

V010-N00058.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00058.label: 经行腹痛
V010-N00058.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00058.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00058.label: 痛经
V010-N00058.aliases: 月经痛； 经行腹痛； Dysmenorrhea disorder； Painful periods disorder； Menstrual cramp disorder
V010-N00058.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00058.definition: Characterized by lower abdominal cramps or weight-bearing sensation before or during menstruation. The pain may radiate to the lumbosacral region. In severe cases, individuals may faint from severe pain. Often occurs when emotional disturbance or six exogenous pathogens obstruct the Chong and Ren meridians. Alternatively, it may also result from the failure of essence and blood to nourish the uterus.

V010-N00058.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00058.label: 痛经
V010-N00058.aliases: BFY070； 月经痛； 经行腹痛

V010-N00058.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00058.label: 经行腹痛

V010-N00058.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00058.label: 痛经
V010-N00058.definition: lower abdominal pain or referring pain to the lower back occurring around or during the menstrual period

V010-N00059.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00059.label: 经期延长
V010-N00059.englishNames: menostaxis; prolonged menstruation; Prolonged menstruation; Prolonged menstruation disorder
V010-N00059.pinyinNames: jing qi yan chang; jīng qī yán cháng
V010-N00059.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病
V010-N00059.definition: 因阴虚内热、气虚血失统摄，或瘀阻冲任、血不归经等所致。临床以月经周期正常，经期超过7天以上，甚或淋漓2周方净等为特征的月经病。

V010-N00059.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00059.label: 经期延长
V010-N00059.englishNames: menostaxis; prolonged menstruation; Prolonged menstruation disorder
V010-N00059.path: 第6部分 妇科学｜月经病（总）｜月经不调
V010-N00059.definition: 以月经周期正常，经期超过7天以上，甚至淋漓2周方净为特征的月经病。

V010-N00059.label: 经期延长
V010-N00059.englishNames: menostaxis; prolonged menstruation; Prolonged menstruation disorder
V010-N00059.definition: 以月经周期正常，经期超过7天以上，甚或 二周方净为主要表现的月经病。

V010-N00059.label: 经期延长
V010-N00059.aliases: Prolonged menstruation disorder； 经事延长
V010-N00059.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜月经病
V010-N00059.definition: 月经周期正常，经期超过7天以上，甚或2周方净者，称为“经期延长”。又称“经事延长”。

V010-N00059.label: 经期延长
V010-N00059.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜经带胎产症状｜月经症状｜经期症状

V010-N00059.label: 经期延长
V010-N00059.englishNames: menostaxis; prolonged menstruation; Prolonged menstruation disorder
V010-N00059.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病

V010-N00059.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00059.label: 经期延长
V010-N00059.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜妇科类｜经

V010-N00059.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00059.label: 经期延长
V010-N00059.aliases: 经候不止； 经来不止； 经脉不止； 经事延长
V010-N00059.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00059.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00059.label: 经期延长
V010-N00059.englishNames: menostaxis; prolonged menstruation; Prolonged menstruation; Prolonged menstruation disorder
V010-N00059.pinyinNames: jing qi yan chang; jīng qī yán cháng
V010-N00059.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00059.definition: A menstrual duration that lasts more than a week or up to two weeks long, with a normal menstrual cycle. Often results from internal heat due to yin deficiency, qi failing to keep blood within the vessels, or stagnant blood obstructing the Chong and Ren meridians.

V010-N00059.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00059.label: 经期延长

V010-N00059.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00059.label: 经期延长
V010-N00059.definition: excessively prolonged menstruation in regular cycles, the same as menostaxis

V010-N00060.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00060.label: 绝经前后诸症
V010-N00060.aliases: 绝经前后诸病； 更年期综合征； Menopausal disorder； Menopausal pattern
V010-N00060.englishNames: Perimenopausal disorders; premenopausal and postmenopausal syndrome; Menopausal disorder
V010-N00060.pinyinNames: jue jing qian hou zhu zheng; jué jīng qián hòu zhū zhèng
V010-N00060.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病
V010-N00060.definition: 因肾气渐衰，天癸将竭，阴阳失调所致。临床以妇女在绝经前后月经紊乱，渐至绝经，伴见潮热、烘热，手足心热，面红，汗出，烦躁，心悸，失眠，健忘，眩晕，耳鸣，腰背酸痛，皮肤燥痒或有蚁行感等为特征的妇科病。

V010-N00060.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00060.label: 更年期综合征
V010-N00060.aliases: 经断前后诸证； 绝经前后诸证
V010-N00060.pinyinNames: geng nian qi zong he zheng
V010-N00060.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医妇产科疾病｜中医妇科病
V010-N00060.definition: 妇女在绝经期前后的一段时期内，围绕月经紊乱或绝经出现烘热汗出、烦躁易怒、潮热面红、眩晕耳鸣、心悸失眠、腰背酸楚、目浮肢肿、皮肤蚁走感、情志不宁等症状。

V010-N00060.label: 经断前后诸证
V010-N00060.aliases: 更年期综合征； 绝经前后诸证
V010-N00060.pinyinNames: jing duan qian hou zhu zheng
V010-N00060.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜月经病
V010-N00060.definition: 妇女在绝经前后，出现烘热面赤，进而汗出，精神倦怠，烦躁易怒，头晕目眩，耳鸣心悸，失眠健忘，腰背痠痛，手足心热，或伴有月经紊乱等与绝经有关的症状，称“经断前后诸证”。又称“绝经前后诸证”。

V010-N00060.label: 绝经前后诸症
V010-N00060.aliases: 绝经前后诸病； 更年期综合征
V010-N00060.englishNames: Menopausal disorder; premenopausal and postmenopausal syndrome
V010-N00060.pinyinNames: jue jing qian hou zhu zheng
V010-N00060.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病

V010-N00060.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00060.label: 绝经前后诸症
V010-N00060.aliases: 绝经前后诸病； 更年期综合征； Menopausal disorder； Menopausal pattern
V010-N00060.englishNames: Perimenopausal disorders; premenopausal and postmenopausal syndrome; Menopausal disorder
V010-N00060.pinyinNames: jue jing qian hou zhu zheng; jué jīng qián hòu zhū zhèng
V010-N00060.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00060.definition: A group of disorders involving irregular menstruation and gradual menopause. Individuals may experience tidal fever, hot flashes, feverish sensations in the palms, soles and chest, flushed face, sweating, restlessness, palpitations, insomnia, poor memory, dizziness, tinnitus, and low back soreness. These conditions often result from kidney qi failure and imbalance between yin and yang.

V010-N00061.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00061.label: 闭经
V010-N00061.aliases: 经闭； 避年居经； Amenorrhoea disorder； No periods disorder
V010-N00061.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病
V010-N00061.definition: 因肝肾不足、气血亏虚、阴虚血燥，血海空虚，或因痨虫侵及胞宫，或气滞血瘀、痰湿阻滞冲任所致。临床以女子年逾16岁，虽有第二性征发育但无月经来潮，或年逾14岁，尚无第二性征发育及月经，或月经周期建立后又中断6个月以上，或月经停闭超过既往3个周期以上为特征的月经病。

V010-N00061.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00061.label: 闭经
V010-N00061.path: 第6部分 妇科学｜月经病（总）
V010-N00061.definition: 以女子年逾16周岁无月经来潮，或已有月经中断6个月以上为特征的月经病。

V010-N00061.label: 闭经
V010-N00061.definition: 以女子年逾18周岁，月经尚未来潮，或已来 潮、非怀孕而又中断3个月以上为主要表现 的月经病。

V010-N00061.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00061.label: 闭经
V010-N00061.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医妇产科疾病｜中医妇科病｜月经病
V010-N00061.definition: 多因肝肾不足、气血亏虚、阴虚血燥、血海空虚，或因痨虫侵及胞宫，或气滞血瘀、痰湿阻滞冲任所致。以女子年逾18周岁月经尚未初潮，或已行经、非怀孕而又中断达3个月以上为主要表现的月经类疾病。

V010-N00061.label: 闭经
V010-N00061.aliases: Amenorrhea disorder； 经闭； 经水不通； 女子不月； 月事不来
V010-N00061.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜月经病
V010-N00061.definition: 女子年逾16周岁，月经尚未来潮，或月经来潮后又中断6个月以上者，或月经停闭超过了3个月经周期者，称为“闭经”。前者称原发性闭经，后者称继发性闭经，古称“女子不月”、“月事不来”、“经水不通”、“经闭”等。

V010-N00061.label: 闭经
V010-N00061.aliases: 经闭； 经闭不行； 经水闭不利； 经水不通； 停经
V010-N00061.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜经带胎产症状｜月经症状｜月经不调
V010-N00061.definition: 女性年满18周岁月经尚未来潮的称原发性闭经；既往曾有过正常月经，现停经三个月以上的称继发性闭经。女性妊娠期、哺乳期、及绝经期后的无月经，称生理性闭经，均属生理现象。某些妇女有月经，但因生殖道下段如子宫颈、阴道、处女膜、阴唇等处的先天性缺陷或后天性损伤，造成粘连闭锁，月经血不能外流，这种情况称隐性闭经或假性闭经。正常月经的建立有赖于丘脑下部一脑垂体一卵巢轴的功能协调以及靶器官子宫内膜对性激素有周期性反应，其中任何一个环节发生故障，不论是器质性的还是功能性的，都可导致闭经。可将闭经按其原因的解剖部位分为：子宫性闭经、卵巢性闭经、脑垂体性闭经、丘脑下部性闭经等。

V010-N00061.label: 闭经
V010-N00061.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病

V010-N00061.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00061.label: 闭经
V010-N00061.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜妇科类｜经

V010-N00061.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码

V010-N00061.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00061.label: 闭经
V010-N00061.aliases: 经闭； 避年居经； Amenorrhoea disorder； No periods disorder
V010-N00061.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00061.definition: An absence of menarche by the age of 16 with normal secondary sexual characteristics, absence of menarche or secondary sexual characteristics by the age of 14, an abnormal stoppage of the menses for more than six months after an established menstruation, or a stoppage of menses for three consecutive cycles. Contributing factors may include deficiency of the liver and kidney, deficiency of qi and blood, blood dryness due to yin deficiency, tuberculosis, qi stagnation and blood stasis, or phlegm dampness. These factors may affect the normal functioning of the Chong and Ren meridians.

V010-N00061.label: 闭经
V010-N00061.definition: failure of menstruation to occur at puberty or abnormal stoppage of the menses for more than three months after menarche

V010-N00045.definition: 以妊娠期间小便不通，小腹胀急疼痛为特征的妊娠病。

V010-N00041.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00041.label: 子痫
V010-N00041.aliases: 妊娠痫证； 子冒； Eclampsia disorder
V010-N00041.englishNames: eclampsia; Eclampsia of pregnancy; Eclampsia disorder; Eclampsia; eclampsia of pregnancy
V010-N00041.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜胎孕类病
V010-N00041.definition: 因胎孕期间肝肾阴虚、阴血亏耗，致使肝风内动或痰火上扰所致。临床以妊娠晚期、临产时、新产后，忽然眩晕、倒仆，昏不知人，两目上视，牙关紧闭，口吐白沫，四肢搐搦，全身强直，少顷可醒，时或复发，甚则昏迷不醒为特征的胎孕病。

V010-N00041.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00041.label: 子痫
V010-N00041.englishNames: eclampsia; Eclampsia disorder; Eclampsia; eclampsia of pregnancy
V010-N00041.path: 第6部分 妇科学｜妊娠病（总）
V010-N00041.definition: 以妊娠晚期、临产时、新产后，忽然眩晕、倒扑，昏不知人，两目上视，牙关紧闭，口吐白沫，四肢抽搐，全身强直，少顷可醒，时或复发，甚则昏迷不醒为特征的妊娠病。

V010-N00041.definition: 以妊娠晚期、临产时、新产后，眩晕头痛，突然昏不知人，两目上视，牙关紧闭，四肢抽搐，腰背反张，少顷可醒，醒后复发，甚则昏迷不醒为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00041.label: 子癎
V010-N00041.definition: 以妊娠晚期、临产时、新产后， 眩晕头痛，突然昏不知人，两目上视，牙关紧 闭，四肢抽搐，腰背反张，少顷可醒，醒后复 发，甚则昏迷不醒为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00041.label: 妊娠痫证

V010-N00041.definition: Characterized by sudden vertigo, fainting, loss of consciousness, eyes fixed upward, trismus, vomiting white foam, convulsions of the limbs, and rigidity during the late pregnancy or before, during or after delivery. Individuals may return to normal after a while; however, some may develop into coma. Often results from internal stirring of liver wind or ascending of phlegm fire due to yin deficiency of the liver and kidney or consumption of yin blood.

V010-N00044.label: 胎动不安

V010-N00044.definition: 多因冲任气血不和，胎元不固所致。以妊娠期间仅有腰酸腹痛或下腹坠胀，或伴有少量阴道出血为主要表现的妊娠疾病。

V010-N00044.label: 胎动不安
V010-N00044.aliases: 妊娠胎动不安； 胎动易滑； 胎气不安； 先兆流产； 先兆早产
V010-N00044.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜妊娠病
V010-N00044.definition: 妊娠期，出现腰痠腹痛，胎动下坠，或阴道少量流血者，称为“胎动不安”。又称“胎气不安”。

V010-N00044.label: 胎动不安
V010-N00044.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜经带胎产症状｜妊娠症状

V010-N00044.label: 胎动不安
V010-N00044.englishNames: threatened abortion; excessive movement of fetus; threatened atbortion; Threatened Atbortion; Unstable fetus disorder
V010-N00044.pinyinNames: tai dong bu an; tai er bu an
V010-N00044.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜胎孕类病

V010-N00044.label: 胎动不安
V010-N00044.aliases: Restless fetus； Excessive movement of foetus
V010-N00044.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V010-N00044.definition: Threatened abortion often starts with a bearing-down sensation, low back soreness, and abdominal pain/discomfort, followed by a small amount of vaginal bleeding. Often results from insecurity of the Chong and Ren meridians due to qi deficiency, blood deficiency, kidney deficiency, blood heat, or traumatic injuries.

V010-N00044.label: 胎动不安
V010-N00044.definition: continuous moving of the fetus with lumbar pain and abdominal pain or small amount of vaginal bleeding

V010-N00221.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00221.label: 房事早泄
V010-N00221.definition: 因阴虚火旺，或心肾两亏，精关失固等所致。临床以男子房事持续时间极短即泄精，阴茎插入阴道不到1min便射精，或交媾前泄精等为特征的房事病。

V010-N00221.label: 早泄
V010-N00221.englishNames: premature ejaculation; prospermia; Prospermia; premature ejaculation (disease); Premature ejaculation disorder
V010-N00221.definition: 以性交之始即行排精，甚至性交前即泄精， 木能进行正常性生活为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00221.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00221.label: 早泄
V010-N00221.definition: 因肾气不固等所致。以阴茎插入阴道不到1分钟便发生射精、不能实行正常性交为主要表现的不固类疾病。

V010-N00221.label: 早泄
V010-N00221.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V010-N00221.definition: 多由情志内伤，湿热侵袭，纵欲过度，久病体虚所致。是指在性交之始即行排精，甚至性交前即泄精的病证。

V010-N00221.label: 早泄
V010-N00221.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜二阴症状｜前阴症状

V010-N00221.label: 房事早泄
V010-N00221.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜房事病

V010-N00221.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00221.label: 早泄
V010-N00221.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜男科类

V010-N00221.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00221.label: 早泄
V010-N00221.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00221.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00221.label: 早泄
V010-N00221.aliases: 早泄病； Premature ejaculation disorder； Premature Ejaculation
V010-N00221.englishNames: premature ejaculation; prospermia; Premature ejaculation; Prospermia; premature ejaculation (disease); Premature ejaculation disorder
V010-N00221.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00221.definition: A condition that ejaculation always or nearly always occurs prior to sexual intercourse or within about one minute. Often results from fire hyperactivity due to yin deficiency or deficiency of the heart and kidney.

V010-N00221.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00221.label: 早泄

V010-N00234.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00234.label: 房事阳痿
V010-N00234.definition: 因命门火衰，肝肾亏虚，或因惊恐、抑郁等所致。临床以性交时阴茎萎软，或举而不坚，不能插入阴道等为特征的房事病。

V010-N00234.label: 阳痿病
V010-N00234.definition: 以阴茎不能勃起，或勃起不坚，或坚而短暂， 不能进行性交为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00234.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00234.label: 阳萎
V010-N00234.definition: 因命门火衰，肝肾亏虚，或因惊恐、抑郁等所致。以阴茎萎软，或举而不坚，不能插入阴道进行性交为主要表现的痿病类疾病。

V010-N00234.label: 阳痿
V010-N00234.aliases: 筋痿； 阳事不举； 阴器不举； 阴痿； 宗筋弛纵
V010-N00234.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V010-N00234.definition: 是指青壮年男子，由于虚损、惊恐或湿热等原因，致使宗筋弛纵，引起阴茎萎软不举，或临房举而不坚的病证。

V010-N00234.label: 阳痿
V010-N00234.aliases: 阳萎； 阴茎萎软不举
V010-N00234.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜二阴症状｜前阴症状
V010-N00234.definition: 成年男子阴茎不能勃起，或勃起不坚，或坚而短暂，致使不能进行性交的表现。

V010-N00234.label: 房事阳痿
V010-N00234.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜房事病

V010-N00234.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00234.label: 阳痿
V010-N00234.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜男科类

V010-N00234.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00234.label: 阳痿
V010-N00234.aliases: 阳萎； 不起； 阳事不举； 阴器不用
V010-N00234.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00234.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00234.label: 阳痿
V010-N00234.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00234.definition: Characterized by the inability to develop or maintain an erection of the penis during sexual activity. Often results from decline of the vital gate, deficiency of the liver and kidney, fear/fright or depression.

V010-N00234.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00234.label: 阳痿

V010-N00234.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00234.label: 阳痿
V010-N00234.definition: lack of copulative power in the male

V010-N00232.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00232.label: 遗精
V010-N00232.englishNames: Nocturnal emissions; seminal emission (disease); Involuntary ejaculation disorder; spermatorrhea; seminal emission; Spermatorrhea
V010-N00232.path: 生殖病类术语｜男性生殖病｜精液类病
V010-N00232.definition: 因阴虚火旺，或劳伤心神、湿热下注、肾失封藏，致使精关不固所致。临床以不因性交而精液自行遗泄，一月4次以上等为特征的精液病。

V010-N00232.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00232.label: 滑精
V010-N00232.path: 生殖病类术语｜男性生殖病｜精液类病｜遗精
V010-N00232.definition: 因房事过度，肾失封藏，精关不固所致。临床以遗精一月4次以上，不伴性梦而无所知，甚或随意念所动而精自流出等为特征的精液病。

V010-N00232.label: 滑精病
V010-N00232.definition: 以无梦而精液遗泄，甚至清醒时精液流出为 主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00232.label: 遗精
V010-N00232.englishNames: seminal emission (disease); Involuntary ejaculation disorder; spermatorrhea; Spermatorrhea; seminal emission
V010-N00232.definition: 以不因性交而精液频繁遗泄为主要表现，并 伴有头昏，耳鸣，健忘，心悸，失眠，腰酸腿 软，精神萎靡等症状的疾病。

V010-N00232.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00232.label: 遗精
V010-N00232.definition: 因肾失封藏所致。以不因性交而精液自行遗泄，一月4次以上为主要表现的不固类疾病。

V010-N00232.label: 遗精
V010-N00232.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V010-N00232.definition: 是指不因性生活而精液频繁遗泄的病证。多因肾虚精关不固，或君相火旺，湿热下注等，扰动精室所致。有梦而遗精，称为梦遗，无梦而遗精，甚至清醒时精液流出，称滑精。

V010-N00232.label: 滑精
V010-N00232.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜二阴症状｜前阴症状
V010-N00232.definition: 无梦而遗，甚则在清醒状态下滑泄不禁。

V010-N00232.label: 遗精
V010-N00232.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜二阴症状｜前阴症状

V010-N00232.label: 遗精
V010-N00232.englishNames: seminal emission (disease); Involuntary ejaculation disorder; spermatorrhea; Spermatorrhea; seminal emission
V010-N00232.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜男性生殖病｜精液类病

V010-N00232.label: 滑精
V010-N00232.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜男性生殖病｜精液类病｜遗精

V010-N00232.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00232.label: 滑精
V010-N00232.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜男科类

V010-N00232.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00232.label: 滑精
V010-N00232.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00232.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00232.label: 遗精
V010-N00232.aliases: 精液自出； 精自下； 失精； 梦遗
V010-N00232.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00232.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00232.label: 滑精
V010-N00232.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00232.definition: Characterized by more than four times of involuntary discharge of semen in one month. Often results from kidney qi failing to secure the essence gate due to sexual indulgence.

V010-N00232.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00232.label: 遗精
V010-N00232.englishNames: Nocturnal emissions; seminal emission (disease); Involuntary ejaculation disorder; spermatorrhea; seminal emission; Spermatorrhea
V010-N00232.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00232.definition: Characterized by more than four times of involuntary ejaculations experienced during sleep in one month. Often results from fire hyperactivity due to yin deficiency, mental over-exertion, downward flow of damp heat, kidney qi failing to secure the essence gate.

V010-N00232.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00232.label: 滑精

V010-N00035.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00035.label: 石瘕
V010-N00035.englishNames: stony conglomeration; stony uterine mass; Stony masses; Uterine mass disorder
V010-N00035.pinyinNames: shi xia; shi jia; shí jiǎ
V010-N00035.definition: 因气血瘀滞等，使胞宫宫体生瘤所致。临床以月经周期提前，经期延长，经量增多，甚或腹大如孕，按之坚硬等为特征的妇人瘤病。

V010-N00035.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00035.label: 石瘕
V010-N00035.englishNames: stony conglomeration; stony uterine mass; Uterine mass disorder
V010-N00035.path: 第6部分 妇科学｜妇科杂病
V010-N00035.definition: 以胞宫长有包块，质地坚硬，固定不移为主要表现的疾病。注：相当于子宫肌瘤。

V010-N00035.label: 石瘕
V010-N00035.englishNames: stony conglomeration; stony uterine mass; Uterine mass disorder
V010-N00035.definition: 发生于妇女胞宫宫体的瘤病。

V010-N00035.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00035.label: 妇科癥瘕
V010-N00035.aliases: 瘕聚； 石瘕； 血瘕
V010-N00035.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医妇产科疾病｜中医妇科病
V010-N00035.definition: 指妇女胞中结块，伴有或胀、或痛、或满，甚或出血的病证。多因七情内伤，导致气滞，痰凝、血瘀，壅阻经脉，结于下腹部所致。

V010-N00035.label: 石瘕
V010-N00035.englishNames: stony uterine mass; Strong Uterine Mass
V010-N00035.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜妇科杂病
V010-N00035.definition: 多因气血瘀滞等，使胞宫宫体生瘤所致。以月经周期提前，经期延长，经量增多为主要表现的妇科疾病。

V010-N00035.label: 石瘕
V010-N00035.englishNames: stony conglomeration; stony uterine mass; Uterine mass disorder
V010-N00035.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜瘤类病

V010-N00035.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00035.label: 石瘕
V010-N00035.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜妇科类｜其他

V010-N00035.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00035.label: 石瘕
V010-N00035.englishNames: stony conglomeration; stony uterine mass; Stony masses; Uterine mass disorder
V010-N00035.pinyinNames: shi xia; shi jia; shí jiǎ
V010-N00035.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00035.definition: A condition that may cause earlier period, prolonged period, and heavy menstrual volume. In severe cases, individual may have solid, bulky masses that can enlarge the uterus. They often occur as a result of stagnation of qi and blood.

V010-N00035.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00035.label: 石瘕
V010-N00035.englishNames: stony conglomeration; stony uterine mass; Strong Uterine Mass

V010-N00035.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00035.label: 石瘕
V010-N00035.englishNames: stony conglomeration; stony uterine mass; Strong Uterine Mass
V010-N00035.definition: a mass as hard as stone formed in the uterus

V010-N00082.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00082.label: 流注
V010-N00082.aliases: 流注； 母子发； Multiple Metastatic Abscess
V010-N00082.englishNames: Deep multiple abscess disorder; Gravitational Abscess; deep multiple abscess; multiple abscess; Deep multiple abscess; gravitational abscess
V010-N00082.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病
V010-N00082.definition: 泛指因正气不充，感染邪毒，流窜血络，好发于肌肉深部的漫肿、疼痛、裹脓，皮色如常，此消彼长等为特征的一类疮疡病。

V010-N00082.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00082.label: 流注
V010-N00082.aliases: 流注； 母子发； Multiple Metastatic Abscess
V010-N00082.englishNames: Deep multiple abscess disorder; Gravitational Abscess; deep multiple abscess; multiple abscess; gravitational abscess
V010-N00082.path: 第2部分 外科学｜疮疡类疾病
V010-N00082.definition: 以脓肿好发于肌肉深部，漫肿疼痛，皮色如常，此处未愈，他处又发为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00082.label: 流注
V010-N00082.aliases: 流注； 母子发； Multiple Metastatic Abscess
V010-N00082.englishNames: Deep multiple abscess disorder; Gravitational Abscess; multiple abscess; deep multiple abscess; gravitational abscess
V010-N00082.definition: 发于肌肉深部的多发性脓肿。

V010-N00082.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00082.label: 流注
V010-N00082.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡
V010-N00082.definition: 因感染邪毒，流窜血络，阻于肌肉深部所致。以一处或数处漫肿、微热疼痛、皮色如常、内有脓液为主要表现的痈病类疾病。

V010-N00082.label: 流注
V010-N00082.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡
V010-N00082.definition: 是发于肌肉深部的多发性脓肿。相当于西医的脓血症、肌肉深部脓肿和髂窝脓肿。其特点是初起漫肿疼痛，皮色如常，好发于四肢、躯干肌肉丰厚的深处，常此处未愈他处又起。

V010-N00082.label: 流注
V010-N00082.aliases: 流注； 母子发； Multiple Metastatic Abscess

V010-N00082.label: 流注

V010-N00082.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00082.definition: Characterized by multiple, deeply located and painful abscesses with diffuse swelling but no skin colour changes.

V010-N00082.label: 流注

V010-N00082.definition: a secondary abscess, usually multiple, deeply located, and distant from the primary lesion, also called metastatic abscess

V010-N00072.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00072.label: 疔疮
V010-N00072.englishNames: Furuncle disorders; hard furuncle; ding; deep-rooted sore; boil and sore; Hard Furuncle; ding ［sore］
V010-N00072.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病
V010-N00072.definition: 泛指因竹木刺伤，诸虫螫咬，皮肤破损后染毒，火热邪毒蕴结于肌腠，或脏腑失调，火毒循经上攻等所引起，以好发于颜面、四肢，具有形小根深，坚硬如钉，肿痛灼热，反应剧烈，易于走黄或损筋伤骨等为特征的一类急性疮疡病。

V010-N00072.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00072.label: 疔疮
V010-N00072.englishNames: Furuncle disorders; hard furuncle; ding; deep-rooted sore; boil and sore; Hard Furuncle; ding ［sore］
V010-N00072.path: 第2部分 外科学｜疮疡类疾病
V010-N00072.definition: 好发于颜面、四肢，以形小根深，坚硬如钉，肿痛灼热，易于走黄、损筋伤骨为特征的疮疡。

V010-N00072.label: 疔疮
V010-N00072.englishNames: Furuncle disorders; hard furuncle; ding; deep-rooted sore; boil and sore; Hard Furuncle
V010-N00072.definition: 好发于颜面、四肢，以形小根深，坚硬如钉， 肿痛灼热，反应剧烈，易于走黄、损筋伤骨为 主要表现的疮疡。

V010-N00072.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00072.label: 疔疮
V010-N00072.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡
V010-N00072.definition: 泛指因竹木刺伤，或感受疫毒、疠毒、火毒等邪所致。好发于颜面、四肢，一般具有形小、根深、坚硬如钉、肿痛灼热、反应剧烈、易于走黄、损筋伤骨为主要表现的疮疡类疾病。

V010-N00072.label: 疔
V010-N00072.aliases: Furuncle disorders； Malignant Furuncle； 疔疮
V010-N00072.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡
V010-N00072.definition: 一种发病迅速，易于变化而危险性较大的急性化脓性疾病。多发生在颜面和手足等处。

V010-N00072.label: 疔
V010-N00072.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜皮肤症状｜疮疡

V010-N00072.label: 疔疮
V010-N00072.englishNames: Furuncle disorders; hard furuncle; ding; deep-rooted sore; boil and sore; Hard Furuncle
V010-N00072.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病

V010-N00072.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00072.label: 疔
V010-N00072.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V010-N00072.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00072.label: 疔
V010-N00072.definition: a boil with its central core deeply rooted

V010-N00075.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00075.label: 疔疮走黄
V010-N00075.englishNames: Septicemic furunculosis disorder; Boil toxins entering the zang–fu organs; Septimic Furunculosis; worsened rooted boil
V010-N00075.pinyinNames: dīng chuāng zǒu huáng; ding chuang zou huang
V010-N00075.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病｜疔疮
V010-N00075.definition: 因疔疮火毒炽盛，早期失治未能及时控制，或因挤压等，使邪毒走散入血，内攻脏腑所致。临床以原发病灶疮顶黑陷无脓，肿势散漫，迅速向周围扩散，伴见寒战、高热，烦躁，甚至神昏、谵语等为特征的疔疮。

V010-N00075.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00075.label: 疔疮走黄
V010-N00075.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡｜疔疮
V010-N00075.definition: 因疔疮火毒炽盛，早期失治未能及时控制，或因挤压等，使邪毒走散入血，内攻脏腑所致。以原发病灶疮顶陷黑无脓、肿势散漫、迅速向周围扩散，并有寒战高热、烦躁、甚至神昏谵语等全身症状的疔疮类疾病。

V010-N00075.label: 走黄
V010-N00075.aliases: Septicemic furunculosis disorder； 疔疮走黄； 癀走
V010-N00075.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡｜疔
V010-N00075.definition: 是疔疮火毒炽盛，走散入血，内攻脏腑的一种危急疾病。

V010-N00075.label: 疔疮走黄
V010-N00075.englishNames: Septicemic furunculosis disorder; Septimic Furunculosis; worsened rooted boil
V010-N00075.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病｜疔疮

V010-N00075.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00075.label: 疔疮走黄
V010-N00075.englishNames: Septicemic furunculosis disorder; Boil toxins entering the zang–fu organs; Septimic Furunculosis; worsened rooted boil
V010-N00075.pinyinNames: dīng chuāng zǒu huáng; ding chuang zou huang
V010-N00075.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00075.definition: Characterized by swollen sores or ulcers that rapidly spread over the surrounding area. The sores/ulcers appear black on the top and contain no pus. Systemic symptoms include chills, high fever, restlessness, unconsciousness and delirium. Often results from delayed treatment of boils or toxins entering the blood and zang–fu organs upon squeezing.

V010-N00085.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00085.label: 脱疽
V010-N00085.englishNames: Digital gangrene; Gangrene disorder; digital gangrene; Gangrene of Digit; toe or finger gangrene; gangrene; gangrene of digit
V010-N00085.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病
V010-N00085.definition: 因先天不足，正气虚弱，寒凝血瘀，或阴虚热毒蕴结，瘀阻脉络，气血不畅，甚或痹阻不通所致。临床以初起肢冷、麻木，行走时突然疼痛，出现间歇性跛行，继则疼痛加剧，趾（指）节黑腐溃烂，疮口经久不愈，后期趾（指）节坏死脱落等为特征的脉管病。

V010-N00085.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00085.label: 脱疽
V010-N00085.englishNames: Gangrene disorder; digital gangrene; Gangrene of Digit; toe or finger gangrene; gangrene; gangrene of digit
V010-N00085.path: 第2部分 外科学｜周围血管疾病
V010-N00085.definition: 发生于四肢末端，以局部疼痛、坏死，严重时趾（指）节坏死脱落为主要的慢性周围血管疾病。

V010-N00085.label: 脱疽
V010-N00085.englishNames: Gangrene disorder; digital gangrene; Gangrene of Digit; toe or finger gangrene; gangrene; gangrene of digit
V010-N00085.path: 外科疾病｜外科其他疾病
V010-N00085.definition: 发生于四肢末端，严重时趾（指）节坏疽脱落 的一种慢性周围血管疾病。

V010-N00085.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00085.label: 脱疽
V010-N00085.englishNames: gangrene of digit; Gangrene of Digit
V010-N00085.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡
V010-N00085.definition: 因先天不足，正气虚弱，寒湿之邪侵袭，瘀阻脉络，气血不畅，甚或痹阻不通所致。以初起肢冷麻木、后期趾节坏死脱落、黑腐溃烂、疮口经久不愈为主要表现的脉管疾病。

V010-N00085.label: 脱疽
V010-N00085.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜外伤性疾病与周围血管疾病
V010-N00085.definition: 是发于四肢末端，严重时趾（指）节坏疽脱落的一种慢性周围血管疾病。又称为脱骨疽，其特点是好发于四肢末节，下肢多于上肢。初期患肢末端发凉、怕冷、苍白、麻木，可伴间歇性跛行，继则疼痛剧烈，日久患趾（指）坏死发黑，甚至趾（指）节脱落。

V010-N00085.label: 脱疽
V010-N00085.englishNames: Gangrene disorder; digital gangrene; Gangrene of Digit; toe or finger gangrene; gangrene; gangrene of digit
V010-N00085.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病

V010-N00085.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00085.label: 脱疽
V010-N00085.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V010-N00085.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00085.label: 脱疽
V010-N00085.englishNames: Digital gangrene; Gangrene disorder; digital gangrene; Gangrene of Digit; toe or finger gangrene; gangrene; gangrene of digit
V010-N00085.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00085.definition: Characterized by limb coldness, numbness and sudden pain during walking, followed by intermittent claudication, severe pain, a change in skin colour to red or black, and eventually toe/finger necrosis. Often results from deficiency of anti-pathogenic qi, cold retention and blood stasis due to yang deficiency, toxic heat retention due to yin deficiency, or stagnation of qi and blood.

V010-N00085.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00085.label: 脱疽
V010-N00085.aliases: BWC200； 脱骨疽； Finger Toe Gangrene
V010-N00085.englishNames: digital gangrene; Gangrene of Digit; gangrene of digit

V010-N00085.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00085.label: 脱疽
V010-N00085.aliases: BWC200； 脱骨疽； Finger Toe Gangrene
V010-N00085.englishNames: digital gangrene; Gangrene of Digit; gangrene of digit
V010-N00085.definition: gangrene of the extremities, especially referring to thromboangiitis

V010-N00088.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00088.label: 褥疮
V010-N00088.aliases: 席疮； Bed sore disorder； Pressure ulcer
V010-N00088.englishNames: bedsore; bed sore; Bedsores; decubital ulcer; decubitus; Bed sore disorder
V010-N00088.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病
V010-N00088.definition: 因久病卧床，气血运行失畅，肌肤失养，长期摩擦，皮肤损坏所致。临床以多发于尾骶、肘踝、背脊等容易受压部位，以局限性浅表皮肤破损，疮口经久不愈，甚则坏死等为特征的疮疡病。

V010-N00088.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00088.label: 褥疮
V010-N00088.englishNames: bedsore; decubital ulcer; decubitus; Bed sore disorder; bed sore
V010-N00088.path: 第2部分 外科学｜疮疡类疾病
V010-N00088.definition: 长期卧床，躯体重压引起的慢性溃疡。

V010-N00088.label: 褥疮
V010-N00088.englishNames: bedsore; decubital ulcer; Bed sore disorder; bed sore; decubitus
V010-N00088.path: 外科疾病｜外科其他疾病
V010-N00088.definition: 长期卧床不起的患者，由于躯体的重压与摩 擦而引起的，以局限性浅表皮肤破损，疮口 经久不愈为主要表现的慢性疮疡类疾病。

V010-N00088.label: 褥疮
V010-N00088.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜外伤性疾病与周围血管疾病
V010-N00088.definition: 是指长期卧床褥不起的患者，由于躯体的重压与摩擦而引起的皮肤溃烂。亦称为席疮。

V010-N00088.label: 褥疮
V010-N00088.englishNames: bedsore; decubital ulcer; Bed sore disorder; bed sore; decubitus
V010-N00088.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病

V010-N00088.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00088.label: 褥疮
V010-N00088.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V010-N00088.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00088.label: 褥疮
V010-N00088.aliases: 席疮； Bed sore disorder； Pressure ulcer
V010-N00088.englishNames: bedsore; bed sore; Bedsores; decubital ulcer; decubitus; Bed sore disorder
V010-N00088.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00088.definition: Characterized by localized, superficial and persistent skin lesion or necrosis that usually occurs on the sacrum, elbows, ankles, or the hips. Often results from malnourishment of the skin due to obstructed flow of qi and blood, or an extended period of friction.

V010-N00088.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00088.label: 褥疮

V010-N00088.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00088.label: 褥疮
V010-N00088.definition: an ulceration caused by prolonged pressure in a patient lying in bed for a long period of time

V010-N00065.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00065.label: 丹毒
V010-N00065.aliases: 火丹； 丹熛； Erysipelas disorder
V010-N00065.englishNames: erysipelas; e	canula drainagerysipelas; Erysipelas disorder; Erysipelas
V010-N00065.pinyinNames: dan dong; dan du; dan er; dān dú
V010-N00065.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病
V010-N00065.definition: 因皮肤、黏膜破损，火毒与血热搏结，蕴阻肌肤，不得外泄所致。临床以患部突然皮肤鲜红成片、色如涂丹，灼热肿胀，迅速蔓延，可伴见寒战、高热等为特征的皮肤疾病。

V010-N00065.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00065.label: 丹毒
V010-N00065.englishNames: erysipelas; e	canula drainagerysipelas; Erysipelas disorder
V010-N00065.pinyinNames: dan dong; dan du; dan er
V010-N00065.path: 第2部分 外科学｜疮疡类疾病
V010-N00065.definition: 以皮肤突然发红成片，色如涂丹为主要表现的急性感染性疾病。

V010-N00065.label: 丹毒
V010-N00065.englishNames: erysipelas; e	canula drainagerysipelas; Erysipelas disorder
V010-N00065.pinyinNames: dan dong; dan du; dan er
V010-N00065.definition: 以皮肤突然发红，色如徐丹为主要表现的急 性感染性疾病。

V010-N00065.label: 丹毒
V010-N00065.aliases: 抱头火丹； 流火； 内发丹毒
V010-N00065.englishNames: Inflammatory Disease With Redness Of The Skin
V010-N00065.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡
V010-N00065.definition: 是皮肤突然发红，色如涂丹的急性感染疾病。相当于西医的急性网状淋巴管炎。生于下肢者，称流火；生于头面的，称抱头火丹；新生儿多生于臀部的，称赤游丹。

V010-N00065.label: 丹毒
V010-N00065.englishNames: erysipelas; e	canula drainagerysipelas; Erysipelas disorder
V010-N00065.pinyinNames: dan dong; dan du; dan er
V010-N00065.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V010-N00065.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码

V010-N00065.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00065.label: 丹毒
V010-N00065.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00065.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00065.label: 丹毒
V010-N00065.aliases: 火丹； 丹熛； Erysipelas disorder
V010-N00065.englishNames: erysipelas; e	canula drainagerysipelas; Erysipelas disorder; Erysipelas
V010-N00065.pinyinNames: dan dong; dan du; dan er; dān dú
V010-N00065.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00065.definition: Characterized by sudden onset of bright red, swollen and warm skin lesions that enlarge rapidly. Individuals may also experience chills and high fever. Often occurs when toxic fire and blood heat affects the skin.

V010-N00065.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00065.label: 丹毒
V010-N00065.aliases: BWC080； 火丹； 抱头火丹； 流火； 内发丹毒

V010-N00065.label: 丹毒
V010-N00065.aliases: BWC080； 火丹； 抱头火丹； 流火； 内发丹毒
V010-N00065.englishNames: erysipelas; Inflammatory Disease With Redness Of The Skin
V010-N00065.definition: an acute infection of the skin marked by intense local redness

V010-N00071.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00071.label: 湿疮
V010-N00071.englishNames: Dampness sore disorder; eczema; dampness sore
V010-N00071.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病
V010-N00071.definition: 因禀性不耐，风湿热邪客于肌肤所致。临床以对称分布、多形性皮疹，渗出流滋，剧烈瘙痒，反复发作等为特征的一类皮肤病。

V010-N00071.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00071.label: 湿疮
V010-N00071.englishNames: Dampness sore disorder; eczema; dampness sore
V010-N00071.path: 第3部分 皮肤科学｜疾病[皮肤科学]
V010-N00071.definition: 以多形损害，对称分布，剧烈瘙痒，渗出倾向，反复发作，易成慢性等为主要表现的皮肤疾病。注：相当于湿疹。

V010-N00071.label: 湿疮
V010-N00071.englishNames: Dampness sore disorder; eczema; dampness sore
V010-N00071.definition: 以对称分布，多形损害，剧烈瘙痒，倾向湿 润，反复发作，易成慢性等为主要表现的过 敏性炎症皮肤病。

V010-N00071.label: 湿疮
V010-N00071.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V010-N00071.definition: 湿疮是一种过敏性炎症性皮肤疾患。相当于西医学的湿疹。其特点是：皮损对称分布，多形损害，剧烈瘙痒，有渗出倾向，反复发作，易成慢性等。本病病因病机：由于禀赋不耐，饮食失节，或过食辛辣刺激荤腥动风之物，脾胃受损，失其健运，湿热内生，又兼外受风邪，内外两邪相搏，风湿热邪浸淫肌肤所致。指出本病的发生与心、肺、肝、脾四经又密切的关系。

V010-N00071.label: 湿疮
V010-N00071.englishNames: Dampness sore disorder; eczema; dampness sore
V010-N00071.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病
