V010-N00076.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00076.label: 疣病
V010-N00076.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病
V010-N00076.definition: 泛指因风热毒邪搏于肌肤，或怒动肝火，肝旺血燥，筋气不荣等所引起，以皮肤黏膜发生良性赘生物等为特征的一类皮肤病。

V010-N00076.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00076.label: 疣
V010-N00076.path: 第3部分 皮肤科学｜疾病[皮肤科学]
V010-N00076.definition: 以发生在皮肤浅表的良性赘生物为主要表现的疾病。注：相当于人乳头瘤病毒所致的疣。

V010-N00076.label: 疣
V010-N00076.definition: 发生在皮肤浅表的良性赘生物。

V010-N00076.label: 疣
V010-N00076.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V010-N00076.definition: 是一种发生在皮肤浅表的良性赘生物。因其皮损形态及发病部位不同而名称各异，如发于手背、手指、头皮等处者，称千日疮、疣目、枯筋箭或瘊子；发于颜面、手背、前臂等处者，称扁瘊；发于胸背中有脐窝的赘疣，称鼠乳；发于足跖部者，称跖疣；发于颈周围及眼睑部位，呈细软丝状突起者，称丝状疣或线瘊。本病西医学亦称疣，一般分为寻常疣、扁平疣、传染性软疣、掌跖疣和丝状疣等。本病病因病机：多由风热毒邪搏于肌肤而生；活怒动肝火，肝旺血燥，筋气不荣，肌肤不润所致。跖疣多由局部气血凝滞而成，外伤、摩擦常为其诱因。

V010-N00076.vocabName: 简帛医药文献词典（2018）（未校勘）
V010-N00076.label: 疣
V010-N00076.differentForms: 尤（疣）； 又（疣）； 宥（疣）
V010-N00076.path: 上編 簡帛醫學詞語｜病症詞語
V010-N00076.definition: 赘疣，是生於體表的一種赘生物。

V010-N00076.label: 疣病
V010-N00076.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V010-N00069.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00069.label: 圆癣
V010-N00069.aliases: 钱癣； 金钱癣； Tinea corporis disorder； Coin-shaped tinea
V010-N00069.englishNames: tinea circinata; round tinea(tinea circinata); Tinea circinate disorder; Tinea corporis
V010-N00069.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病｜癣
V010-N00069.definition: 因湿热内蕴，外感邪毒所致。临床以皮肤平滑处起红疹、水疱、结痂、脱屑，呈环状有框廓，瘙痒等为特征的癣病。

V010-N00069.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00069.label: 圆癣
V010-N00069.englishNames: tinea circinata; round tinea(tinea circinata); Tinea circinate disorder
V010-N00069.path: 第3部分 皮肤科学｜疾病[皮肤科学]｜癣
V010-N00069.definition: 发生于面部、颈部、躯干及四肢近端，以疹如钱币有匡廓，瘙痒为特征的癣。注：相当于体癣。

V010-N00069.label: 圆癣
V010-N00069.englishNames: tinea circinata; round tinea(tinea circinata); Tinea circinate disorder
V010-N00069.definition: 发生于面部、躯干及四肢近端，呈圆状的癣 病。

V010-N00069.label: 圆癣
V010-N00069.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病｜癣
V010-N00069.definition: 因湿热内蕴，外感邪毒所致。以皮肤平滑处起红疹、水疱、结痂、脱屑，呈环状有框廓，瘙痒为主要表现的癣病类疾病。

V010-N00069.label: 圆癣
V010-N00069.englishNames: tinea circinata; round tinea(tinea circinata); Tinea circinate disorder
V010-N00069.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病｜癣

V010-N00069.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00069.label: 圆癣
V010-N00069.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜疮癞

V010-N00069.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00069.label: 圆癣
V010-N00069.aliases: 钱癣； 金钱癣； Tinea corporis disorder； Coin-shaped tinea
V010-N00069.englishNames: tinea circinata; round tinea(tinea circinata); Tinea circinate disorder; Tinea corporis
V010-N00069.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00069.definition: Characterized by itchy, red rashes, blisters, crusting and scaling with a ring, especially on glabrous (hairless) skin. Often results from internal build up of damp heat and contraction of exogenous pathogens.

V010-N00084.definition: 因湿热下注，或感染邪毒所致。临床以足丫水疱、浸渍糜烂，渗流滋水，脱屑，自觉剧痒等为特征的癣病。

V010-N00084.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00084.label: 脚湿气
V010-N00084.englishNames: foot dampness qi(tinea pedis); tinea pedis; Foot dampness itch disorder
V010-N00084.path: 第3部分 皮肤科学｜疾病[皮肤科学]｜癣
V010-N00084.definition: 发生于足跖趾丫，以趾间浸渍糜烂，渗流滋水，足跖水疱，角化过度，脱屑，瘙痒等为特征的癣。注：相当于足癣。

V010-N00084.label: 脚湿气
V010-N00084.englishNames: foot dampness qi(tinea pedis); tinea pedis; Foot dampness itch disorder
V010-N00084.definition: 发生于趾丫，以趾间浸渍糜烂，渗流滋水，角 化过度，脱屑，瘙痒等为主要表现的癣病。

V010-N00084.label: 脚湿气
V010-N00084.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病｜癣
V010-N00084.definition: 因湿热下注，或血虚风燥，兼感邪毒所致。以足丫水疱、浸渍糜烂，自觉剧痒为主要表现的癣病类疾病。

V010-N00086.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00086.label: 蛇串疮
V010-N00086.aliases: 蛇丹； 缠腰火丹； 缠腰龙； 带状疱疹； Shingles； Herpes zoster
V010-N00086.englishNames: snakelike sores; herpes zoster; Herpes zoster disorder; snake-like sore; Snake-shaped sore; snake-clustered sores
V010-N00086.pinyinNames: she chuan chuang; shé chuàn chuāng
V010-N00086.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病
V010-N00086.definition: 因肝脾湿热，或肝经火盛，循经蕴肤，湿热火毒蕴积肌肤所致。临床以成簇疱疹沿身体单侧呈带状分布，初起红斑，随即为丘疹、水疱，累累如串珠，剧烈疼痛，灼痛或针刺样痛，或部分破溃，局部渗液，干燥结痂、脱落，可伴见臖核肿痛等为特征的皮肤病。

V010-N00086.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00086.label: 蛇串疮
V010-N00086.aliases: 蛇丹； 缠腰火丹； 缠腰龙
V010-N00086.englishNames: snakelike sores; herpes zoster; Herpes zoster disorder; snake-like sore; snake-clustered sores
V010-N00086.path: 第3部分 皮肤科学｜疾病[皮肤科学]
V010-N00086.definition: 以集簇性水疱等沿身体单侧，断续排列成带，宛如蛇形，四畔焮红，伴疼痛为主要表现的皮肤疾病。注：相当于带状疱疹。

V010-N00086.label: 蛇串疮
V010-N00086.aliases: 蛇丹； 缠腰火丹； 缠腰龙
V010-N00086.englishNames: snakelike sores; herpes zoster; Herpes zoster disorder; snake-like sore; snake-clustered sores
V010-N00086.definition: 以成簇水疱沿身体单侧呈带状分布，排列宛 如蛇形，疼痛剧烈为主要表现的急性疱疹性 皮肤病。

V010-N00086.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00086.label: 缠腰火丹
V010-N00086.aliases: 火带疮； 蛇串疮； Serpiginous Belt Eruption
V010-N00086.definition: 皮肤上出现簇集性水泡，呈带状分布，痛如火燎的急性疱疹性皮肤病。其皮损特点常见成簇水疱沿身体一侧呈带状分布，宛如蛇行，皮损最多见于腰肋间。

V010-N00086.label: 蛇串疮
V010-N00086.aliases: 缠腰火丹； 火带疮； 蛇丹； 蜘蛛疮
V010-N00086.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V010-N00086.definition: 蛇串疮是一种皮肤上出现成簇水疱，多呈带状分布，痛如火燎的急性疱疹性皮肤病。相当于西医学的带状疱疹。其特点是：皮肤上出现红斑、水疱或丘疱疹，累累如串珠，排列成带状，沿一侧周围神经分布区出现，局部刺痛或伴臖核肿大。本病多发于胸胁部，故又名缠腰火丹，亦称为火带疮、蛇丹、蜘蛛疮等。本病病因病机：由于情志内伤，肝气郁结，久而化火，肝经火毒蕴积，夹风邪上窜头面而发；或夹湿邪下注，发于阴部及下肢；火毒炽盛者多发于躯干。年老体弱者常因血虚肝旺，湿热毒蕴，导致气血凝滞，经络阻塞不通，以致疼痛剧烈，病程迁延。总之，本病初期以湿热火毒为主，后期是正虚血瘀兼夹湿邪为患。

V010-N00086.label: 蛇串疮
V010-N00086.aliases: 蛇丹； 缠腰火丹； 缠腰龙
V010-N00086.englishNames: snakelike sores; herpes zoster; Herpes zoster disorder; snake-like sore; snake-clustered sores

V010-N00086.definition: Characterized by severely painful, bean-sized skin rash with a single stripe (snake-shaped) of blisters that wraps around one side of the torso. Often results from liver qi stagnation transforming into fire, damp heat retention in the spleen meridian or stagnation of damp heat and toxic fire in the skin.

V010-N00087.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病

V010-N00087.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病
V010-N00087.definition: 因血虚风燥，皮肤失于濡养，或为遗传所致。临床以四肢、躯干皮肤干涩少汗，有蛇皮样鳞屑等为特征的皮肤疾病。

V010-N00087.definition: 以四肢、躯干皮肤干涩少汗，有蛇皮样鳞屑为主要表现的皮肤疾病。注：相当于鱼鳞病。

V010-N00087.label: 蛇皮癣
V010-N00087.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V010-N00087.definition: 因血虚风燥，皮肤失于濡养，或为遗传所致。以四肢、躯干皮肤干涩少汗，有蛇皮样鳞屑为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V010-N00087.label: 蛇皮癣
V010-N00087.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V010-N00087.pinyinNames: she pi xuan; shé pí xuǎn
V010-N00087.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00087.definition: Characterized by dry, thickened, scaly skin that resembles snake skin. Often results from genetic factors or malnourishment of the skin due to blood deficiency and invasion of wind dryness.

V010-N00091.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病

V010-N00091.pinyinNames: tian pao chuang; tiān pào chuāng
V010-N00091.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病
V010-N00091.definition: 因心火脾湿，外感风热暑湿邪毒，湿热蕴阻肌肤所致。临床以初起皮肤燎浆水疱，皮薄光泽，破流滋水，蔓延迅速，不易愈合，常伴有口腔黏膜损害等为特征的皮肤病。

V010-N00091.definition: Commonly affects children in summer or autumn. Characterized by initial skin blisters that contain pus and have an inflamed base, which often begin on the scalp and torso. Some individuals may also experience skin lesions that do not cause itch or pain. Often results from summer heat and dampness that affects the lung meridian and scorches the skin.

V010-N00091.definition: Characterized by itchy or painful small vesicles that may develop into scab-like, yellowish crust. Often occurs when exogenous summer heat and dampness obstructs the flow of qi and fumigates the skin.

V010-N00067.definition: 因脏腑本虚，饮食不节，或久坐、久立、负重、便秘等因素引起的气血瘀滞于肛门，筋脉交错，结滞不散所致。临床以肛门齿线以上发生静脉曲张团块，表面覆以黏膜，常有便血和痔核脱出等为特征的痔疮病。

V010-N00067.definition: Characterized by varicose dilatation of a vein above the dentate line, bloody stools and prolapsed haemorrhoids. Internal haemorrhoids often result from deficiency of the zang–fu organs, an improper diet, sitting or standing for an extended period of time, weight-bearing or constipation.

V010-N00081.definition: 因过食肥甘、辛辣、醇酒等物，或肛门破损染毒，或肺脾两虚，湿热下注，蕴阻肛门，气血瘀滞，热毒化腐成脓所致。临床以发热、恶寒，肛门部红肿、灼热、疼痛，化脓溃后易成肛瘘等为特征的肛肠病。

V010-N00081.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00081.definition: Characterized by fever, chills, redness, swelling, hotness and pain around the anus. In some cases, it can result in painful anal fistulas upon pus rupture. Often results from overeating of oily, sweet, hot and spicy food, excessive alcohol drinking, anal tears, deficiency of the lung and spleen, or downward flow of damp heat to affect the anus.

V010-N00083.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜肛肠类病
V010-N00083.definition: 因热结肠燥，或阴津不足，燥屎裂伤肛门皮肤，或湿热下注所致。临床以肛管皮肤全层裂开，形成溃疡，便秘，排便时和排便后肛门部疼痛、出血等为特征的肛肠病。

V010-N00083.definition: 以肛门周期性疼痛，即排便时阵发性刀割样 疼痛，便后数分钟缓解，随后又持续剧烈疼 痛可达数小时，伴有习惯性便秘，便时出血 为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00094.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00094.label: 五风内障
V010-N00094.englishNames: five kinds of wind glaucoma; five wind glaucoma; Wind glaucoma disorder; Glaucoma
V010-N00094.pinyinNames: wu feng nei zhang; wǔ fēng nèi zhàng
V010-N00094.path: 眼病类术语｜内障类病｜瞳神病
V010-N00094.definition: 因情志失调，气郁血瘀，肝胆火炽，神水积滞等所致。临床以眼压升高，头目胀痛，视力昏蒙，抱轮红赤，瞳神散大等为特征的瞳神病。

V010-N00094.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00094.label: 五风内障

V010-N00094.path: 第8部分 眼科学｜瞳神疾病
V010-N00094.definition: 青风内障、绿风内障、黄风内障、乌风内障、黑风内障的总称。

V010-N00094.label: 五风内障
V010-N00094.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医眼疾病｜瞳神疾病
V010-N00094.definition: 为青风内障，绿风内障，黄风内障，乌风内障，黑风内障之合称。因情志抑郁，气机郁结，肝胆火炽，深水积滞所致。以头目胀痛，抱轮红赤，视力昏蒙为主要表现的内障类疾病。

V010-N00094.label: 五风内障
V010-N00094.englishNames: five kinds of wind glaucoma; five wind glaucoma; Wind glaucoma disorder
V010-N00094.path: 中医疾病｜眼病类术语｜内障类病｜瞳神病

V010-N00094.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00094.label: 五风内障

V010-N00094.pinyinNames: wu feng nei zhang; wǔ fēng nèi zhàng
V010-N00094.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00094.definition: Characterized by increased pressure in the eye, headache, eye distension/pain, blurred vision, red eyes and dilation of the pupil. Often results from emotional stress, qi stagnation and blood stasis, and exuberant fire in the liver and gallbladder.

V010-N00105.definition: 因实热壅盛，脉络阻滞所致。临床以胞睑高度红肿，焮热疼痛，其状如桃为特征的胞睑病。

V010-N00105.definition: Characterized by severe pain, swelling and redness of the eyelid that resembles a ripe peach. Often results from exuberant heat obstructing the flow of qi and blood.

V010-N00106.definition: 因脾肾阳虚，水湿上泛，或心肺气虚，推动无力所致。临床以胞睑肿胀，虚软如球，皮色如常，按之不痛等为特征的胞睑病。

V010-N00098.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00098.label: 混睛障
V010-N00098.englishNames: Corneal opacity disorder; murky-eye nebula; stromal keratitis; interstitial keratitis; corneal opacity; mixed nebula; luterstitial keratitis; murky eye nebula(interstitial keratitis); Interstitial keratitis
V010-N00098.pinyinNames: hun jing zhang; hún jīng zhàng
V010-N00098.path: 眼病类术语｜外障类病｜黑睛病
V010-N00098.definition: 因肝经风热或肝胆热毒，郁久伤阴，邪伏风轮，气血瘀滞所致。临床以黑睛深层呈现一片灰白翳障，或赤脉从深层侵入，翳障浑赤，混浊不清，漫掩黑睛，妨碍视力，伴见目痛、畏光等为特征的黑睛病。

V010-N00098.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00098.label: 混睛障
V010-N00098.englishNames: Corneal opacity disorder; murky-eye nebula; stromal keratitis; interstitial keratitis; corneal opacity; mixed nebula; luterstitial keratitis; murky eye nebula(interstitial keratitis)
V010-N00098.path: 第8部分 眼科学｜黑睛病
V010-N00098.definition: 以黑睛深层起灰白色翳障一片，浑浊如雾，漫掩黑睛，妨碍视力，且羞明流泪，眼珠疼痛为主要表现的眼病。注：相当于角膜基质炎。

V010-N00098.label: 混睛障
V010-N00098.englishNames: Corneal opacity disorder; murky-eye nebula; stromal keratitis; interstitial keratitis; mixed nebula; luterstitial keratitis; murky eye nebula(interstitial keratitis)
V010-N00098.definition: 以黑睛深层起灰白色翳障一片，混浊如气 雾，漫掩黑睛，妨碍视力，且羞明流泪，眼珠 疼痛为主要表现的眼病。

V010-N00098.label: 混睛障
V010-N00098.aliases: Corneal opacity disorder； 混睛； 角膜基质炎
V010-N00098.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医眼疾病｜黑睛疾病
V010-N00098.definition: 是指黑睛深层呈圆盘状灰白色混浊翳障，障碍视力的眼病。结合临床归纳其病因病机为：风热外袭，上扰目珠，侵犯黑睛；脏腑热盛，肝胆热毒，循经上攻于目，火郁经脉，气血雍滞，黑睛浑浊于赤脉混杂；素体亏虚，脾胃虚弱，运化无力，内生湿热，熏蒸于目，损伤黑睛；邪毒不解，久伏体内，耗伤阴液，虚火上炎，黑睛受灼，发为本病。

V010-N00098.label: 混睛障
V010-N00098.englishNames: Corneal opacity disorder; murky-eye nebula; stromal keratitis; interstitial keratitis; mixed nebula; luterstitial keratitis; murky eye nebula(interstitial keratitis)

V010-N00101.definition: Characterized by sudden onset of hearing impairment in one or both ears. Individuals may also experience vertigo and tinnitus. Often results from stagnation of qi and blood due to dysfunctions of the zang–fu organs, or pathogenic factors affecting the ear.

V010-N00172.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00172.label: 百合病

V010-N00172.pinyinNames: bai he bing; bǎi hé bìng
V010-N00172.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病
V010-N00172.definition: 因继发于急性热病，或中毒、脑部损伤之后，余邪未尽，气血失调，阴液亏损，经脉失养，心神惑乱所致。临床以神情恍惚，行、卧、饮食等皆觉不适，口苦，小便短赤等为特征的神志病。

V010-N00172.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00172.label: 百合病
V010-N00172.englishNames: lily disease; Baihe Disease; Lily disorder; disease of all vessels
V010-N00172.path: 第1部分 内科学｜脑病
V010-N00172.definition: 以神情恍惚，行、卧、饮食等皆觉不适为主要表现的神志疾病。

V010-N00172.label: 百合病
V010-N00172.englishNames: lily disease; Baihe Disease; Lily disorder; disease of all vessels
V010-N00172.definition: 以神情恍惚，行、卧、饮食等皆觉不适为主要 表现的神志疾病。

V010-N00172.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00172.label: 百合病
V010-N00172.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病
V010-N00172.definition: 多继发于急性热病，或中毒、脑部疾患等之后，余邪未尽，阴液亏损，气血失调，经脉失养，心神惑乱。以神情恍惚，行、卧、饮食等皆觉不适为主要表现的脑神疾病。

V010-N00172.label: 百合病
V010-N00172.englishNames: Bulbus lillii syndrome; Depressive state of psychic disease
V010-N00172.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜精神情志病类
V010-N00172.definition: 多继发于急性热病，或中毒、脑部疾患等之后，余邪未尽，阴液亏损，气血失调，经脉失养，心神惑乱。以神情恍惚，行、卧、饮食等皆觉不适为主要表现的脑神疾病。

V010-N00172.label: 百合病
V010-N00172.englishNames: lily disease; Baihe Disease; Lily disorder; disease of all vessels

V010-N00172.label: 百合病
V010-N00172.englishNames: lily disease; Lily bulb disease; Baihe Disease; Lily disorder; disease of all vessels
V010-N00172.pinyinNames: bai he bing; bǎi hé bìng
V010-N00172.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00172.definition: Characterized by mental strain, listlessness, insomnia, and a poor appetite. Often results from disordered qi and blood, deficiency of yin fluids, malnourishment of meridians and disturbance of the heart mind after acute febrile diseases, poisoning or brain trauma.

V010-N00189.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00189.label: 真心痛
V010-N00189.englishNames: real heart pain; angina pectoris; true heart pain; true cardiac pain; True heart pain disorder; True cardiac pain
V010-N00189.pinyinNames: zhen xin tong; zhēn xīn tòng
V010-N00189.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病
V010-N00189.definition: 因胸阳虚损，或气阴不足，或瘀痰阻痹，心脉闭塞所致。临床以猝发心胸剧痛，甚或持续不解，可伴见汗出、肢冷，面白，唇青，手足青至节，脉微欲绝或结代等为特征的突发性心系病重症。

V010-N00189.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00189.label: 厥心痛
V010-N00189.englishNames: precordial pain; Cardiac pain with cold limbs; true heart pain with cold limbs; Pericordial Pain with Cold Limbs; precordial pain with cold limbs
V010-N00189.pinyinNames: jué xīn tòng; jue xin tong
V010-N00189.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病｜真心痛
V010-N00189.definition: 因五脏虚损，七情所伤，气逆乘心，或寒热诸邪逆犯心包，痰瘀阻痹，心经气逆所致。临床以心痛彻背、背痛彻心，劳累则甚，静息则缓，可伴见气从脘腹上冲咽喉，胸脘痞闷，善太息，甚则手足逆冷，面色青黑等为特征的阵发性真心痛。

V010-N00189.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00189.label: 真心痛
V010-N00189.englishNames: real heart pain; angina pectoris; true heart pain; true cardiac pain; True heart pain disorder; True cardiac pain
V010-N00189.pinyinNames: zhen xin tong; zhēn xīn tòng
V010-N00189.path: 第1部分 内科学｜心病
V010-N00189.definition: 以心胸剧痛，持续不解，伴汗出肢冷，面白唇青，手足青至节，脉微欲绝为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00189.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00189.label: 厥心痛
V010-N00189.englishNames: precordial pain; Cardiac pain with cold limbs; true heart pain with cold limbs; Pericordial Pain with Cold Limbs; precordial pain with cold limbs
V010-N00189.pinyinNames: jué xīn tòng; jue xin tong
V010-N00189.path: 第1部分 内科学｜心病｜真心痛
V010-N00189.definition: 以心痛发作伴四肢厥冷为主要表现的轻症真心痛。

V010-N00189.label: 厥心痛
V010-N00189.englishNames: Pericordial Pain with Cold Limbs; precordial pain with cold limbs; precordial pain; true heart pain with cold limbs
V010-N00189.definition: 一种较真心痛为轻的心系疾病，以心痛发作 时伴四肢厥冷为主要临床特征。

V010-N00189.label: 真心痛
V010-N00189.englishNames: real heart pain; angina pectoris; true heart pain; True heart pain disorder
V010-N00189.definition: 以心胸剧痛，持续不解，伴有汗出肢冷，面白 唇青，手足青至节，脉微欲绝为主要表现的 疾病。

V010-N00189.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00189.label: 厥心痛
V010-N00189.englishNames: Precordial Pain Caused by Cold-evil; Precordial Pain With Cold Limbs; Pericordial Pain with Cold Limbs
V010-N00189.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病｜胸痹
V010-N00189.definition: 因胸阳虚损，或气阴不足，或瘀痰阻痹、心脉闭塞所致。以心胸剧痛、甚至持续不解，伴有汗出肢冷、面白唇青、脉微欲绝为主要表现的痛症类疾病。

V010-N00189.label: 真心痛
V010-N00189.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证
V010-N00189.definition: 是胸痹进一步发展的严重病证，其特点为剧烈而持久的胸骨后疼痛，伴心悸、水肿、肢冷、喘促、汗出、面色苍白等症状。病因为寒邪内侵、饮食失调、情志失节、年迈体弱。病机为心脉痹阻，病位在心，涉及肝脾肾等。

V010-N00189.label: 真心痛
V010-N00189.englishNames: real heart pain; angina pectoris; true heart pain; True heart pain disorder
V010-N00189.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V010-N00189.label: 厥心痛
V010-N00189.englishNames: Pericordial Pain with Cold Limbs; precordial pain with cold limbs; precordial pain; true heart pain with cold limbs
V010-N00189.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病｜真心痛

V010-N00189.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00189.label: 厥心痛
V010-N00189.englishNames: precordial pain; Cardiac pain with cold limbs; true heart pain with cold limbs; Pericordial Pain with Cold Limbs; precordial pain with cold limbs
V010-N00189.pinyinNames: jué xīn tòng; jue xin tong
V010-N00189.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00189.definition: A paroxysmal heart condition characterized by cardiac pain radiating toward the back and aggravates upon physical exertion and alleviates after rest. Associated symptoms include upward rushing of qi to the throat, chest discomfort, repeated sighing, cold limbs and a dark-bluish facial complexion. Often results from deficiency of the five zang organs, emotional disturbance, and pathogenic factors affecting the pericardium or phlegm stasis obstructing the heart.

V010-N00189.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00189.label: 真心痛
V010-N00189.englishNames: real heart pain; angina pectoris; true heart pain; true cardiac pain; True heart pain disorder; True cardiac pain
V010-N00189.pinyinNames: zhen xin tong; zhēn xīn tòng
V010-N00189.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00189.definition: A critical heart condition characterized by sudden, severe or persistent cardiac pain. Associated symptoms include sweats, cold limbs, a pale face, bluish lips and an extremely feeble or regularly/irregularly intermittent pulse. Often results from heart yang deficiency, insufficiency of qi and yin, or phlegm-stasis obstructing the heart vessels.

V010-N00189.label: 真心痛

V010-N00186.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00186.label: 胸痹心痛
V010-N00186.englishNames: Chest bi-impediment /cardiac pain; heartache due to chest impediment
V010-N00186.pinyinNames: xiong bi xin tong; xiōng bì xīn tòng
V010-N00186.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病
V010-N00186.definition: 因胸阳不振，阴寒、痰浊、血瘀等留踞胸廓，或心气不足，鼓动乏力，致使气血痹阻，心失血养所致。临床以胸闷、气短及发作性心胸疼痛等为特征的心系病。

V010-N00186.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00186.label: 胸痹
V010-N00186.englishNames: chest bi; chest painful impediment; Chest Discomfort; chest impediment; chest discomfort; Chest impediment disorders
V010-N00186.path: 第1部分 内科学｜心病
V010-N00186.definition: 胸阳不振，以胸闷或发作性心胸疼痛为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00186.label: 胸痹
V010-N00186.englishNames: chest bi; chest painful impediment; Chest Discomfort; chest impediment; chest discomfort; Chest impediment disorders
V010-N00186.definition: 以胸闷或发作性心胸疼痛为主要表现的疾 病。

V010-N00186.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00186.label: 胸痹
V010-N00186.englishNames: chest impediment; Chest Discomfort; chest discomfort
V010-N00186.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病
V010-N00186.definition: 胸阳不振，阴寒、痰浊留踞胸廓，或心气不足，鼓动乏力，使气血痹阻，心失血养所致。以胸闷及发作性心胸疼痛为主要表现的内脏痹病类疾病。

V010-N00186.label: 胸痹
V010-N00186.aliases: Pectoral Stuffiness Pain； 胸痹心痛
V010-N00186.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证
V010-N00186.definition: 是指胸部闷痛，甚则胸痛彻背，喘息不得卧为主症的一种疾病。轻者仅感胸闷隐痛，呼吸欠畅，重者则有胸痛，严重者心痛彻背，背痛彻心。病因为寒邪内侵、饮食失调、情志失节、年迈体弱。病机为心脉痹阻，病位在心，涉及肝脾肾等。

V010-N00186.label: 胸痹心痛
V010-N00186.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V010-N00186.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00186.label: 胸痹心痛
V010-N00186.englishNames: Chest bi-impediment /cardiac pain; heartache due to chest impediment
V010-N00186.pinyinNames: xiong bi xin tong; xiōng bì xīn tòng
V010-N00186.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00186.definition: Characterized by chest tightness, shortness of breath and paroxysmal cardiac pain. Often occurs when heart qi fails to pump blood and results in malnourishment of the heart.

V010-N00194.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00194.label: 肝痈
V010-N00194.englishNames: liver abscess; Liver abscess disorder; Liver abscess; Liver Abscess
V010-N00194.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病
V010-N00194.definition: 因湿热或虫毒等淤积于肝，气血腐败，酿成痈脓所致。临床以骤然发热，右胁胀痛，逐渐加剧，日渐消瘦，甚或肝脏脓肿溃破，剧烈腹痛，或伴见咳吐脓血，下痢脓血及虚脱等为特征的肝系痈病。

V010-N00194.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00194.label: 肝痈
V010-N00194.englishNames: liver abscess; Liver abscess disorder; Liver Abscess
V010-N00194.path: 第1部分 内科学｜肝胆病
V010-N00194.definition: 以发热，右胁腹部疼痛拒按，右胁下肿块为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00194.label: 肝痈
V010-N00194.englishNames: liver abscess; Liver abscess disorder; Liver Abscess
V010-N00194.definition: 以急起发热疼痛，右胁下肿块为主要表现的 疾病。

V010-N00194.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00194.label: 肝痈
V010-N00194.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肝胆病｜肝病
V010-N00194.definition: 因邪热虫毒等淤积于肝，致气血腐败，酿成痈脓。以急起发热、右胁痛、右胁下肿块等为主要表现的内脏痈病类疾病。

V010-N00194.label: 肝痈
V010-N00194.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V010-N00194.definition: 因邪热虫毒等淤积于肝，致气血腐败，酿成痈疾。以急起发热，右胁痛，右胁下肿块等为主要表现的内脏痈病类疾病。

V010-N00194.label: 肝痈
V010-N00194.englishNames: liver abscess; Liver abscess disorder; Liver Abscess
V010-N00194.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V010-N00194.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00194.label: 肝痈
V010-N00194.englishNames: liver abscess; Liver abscess disorder; Liver abscess; Liver Abscess
V010-N00194.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00194.definition: Characterized by a sudden fever, gradually increased distending pain in the right subcostal region, and gradual weight loss. In severe cases, patients may experience severe abdominal pain following abscess rupture, coughing with phlegm that contains pus and blood, diarrhoea with stools that contain pus and blood and fainting. Often occurs when damp heat or parasitic toxin retains in the liver and form pus or abscess.

V010-N00195.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00195.label: 肝着
V010-N00195.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病
V010-N00195.definition: 因劳怒所伤，肝木侮金，肺气不利，或寒凝气血，邪气痹阻肝经所致。临床以胸胁痞闷或胀，按揉捶击或舒，喜热饮，善太息，可伴见咳唾气急，嗳气，因情志不遂而诱发等为特征的肝系病。

V010-N00195.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00195.label: 肝胀
V010-N00195.aliases: 肝着； 肝著； Liver distension disorder； Liver fixity
V010-N00195.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病
V010-N00195.definition: 因饮食、劳倦或外邪伤肝，肝失疏泄，气血郁滞所致。临床以右胁胀痛，右胁下触及肿块，喜按喜揉，叩击则痛，可伴见疲劳、乏力，纳滞，腹痛等为特征的肝系病。

V010-N00195.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00195.label: 肝胀
V010-N00195.path: 第1部分 内科学｜肝胆病
V010-N00195.definition: 以右胁胀痛，右胁下触及肿块，喜按喜揉，叩击则痛，可伴见疲劳、乏力、纳滞、腹痛等为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00195.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00195.label: 肝著
V010-N00195.englishNames: Liver distension disorder; stagnancy of liverqi and blood; liver fixity; liver stagnancy
V010-N00195.path: 第1部分 内科学｜肝胆病
V010-N00195.definition: 肝经气血郁滞，留着不行，以右胁或胸胁重着疼痛，或右胁下肿块，喜按喜揉等为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00195.label: 肝著
V010-N00195.englishNames: Liver distension disorder; stagnancy of liverqi and blood; liver fixity
V010-N00195.definition: 以右胁痛、右胁下肿块为主要表现的肝系疾 病。

V010-N00195.label: 肝著
V010-N00195.englishNames: Distension due to the Liver Disorder
V010-N00195.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V010-N00195.definition: 因肝热病、肝瘟等之后，肝脏气血郁滞，著而不行。以右胁痛，右胁下肿块，用手按捺捶击稍舒，肝功能异常等为主要表现的内脏胀[著]病类疾病。

V010-N00195.label: 肝着
V010-N00195.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V010-N00195.label: 肝胀
V010-N00195.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V010-N00195.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00195.label: 肝胀
V010-N00195.aliases: 肝着； 肝著； Liver distension disorder； Liver fixity
V010-N00195.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00195.definition: Characterized by pain and lumps in the right subcostal region that alleviate upon pressing or patting. Often occurs as a result of liver qi/blood stagnation.

V010-N00195.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00195.label: 肝着

V010-N00197.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00197.label: 胆胀病
V010-N00197.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病
V010-N00197.definition: 因湿热痰瘀等邪滞着于胆，或因饮食失节、情志刺激，使胆气郁滞不舒所致。临床以右胁痞胀或隐痛，胁下或可触及痞块，嗳气、泛恶，口苦、纳差，厌油腻，时作时止或反复发作等为特征的肝系病。

V010-N00197.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00197.label: 胆胀
V010-N00197.path: 第1部分 内科学｜肝胆病
V010-N00197.definition: 以反复发作右上腹（胆区）疼痛、痞胀为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00197.label: 胆胀
V010-N00197.definition: 以反复发作右上腹疼痛、痞胀为主要表现的 胆道疾病。

V010-N00197.label: 胆胀
V010-N00197.englishNames: Distending Pain of Hypochondrium due to Gallbadder Disorder
V010-N00197.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V010-N00197.definition: 因湿热瘀滞等邪阻滞于胆，或因情志郁怒等刺激，使胆气郁滞不舒，以反复发作右上腹疼痛，痞胀等为主要表现的内脏胀（著）病类疾病。

V010-N00197.label: 胆胀病
V010-N00197.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V010-N00197.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00197.label: 胆胀
V010-N00197.englishNames: gallbladder distention; Gallbladder distension disorder; Gallbladder distention
V010-N00197.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00197.definition: Characterized by recurrent right upper abdominal pain with stuffiness and distension. Often results from retention of damp heat or phlegm stasis in the gallbladder or anger-related gallbladder qi stagnation.

V010-N00197.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00197.label: 胆胀

V010-N00199.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00199.label: 臌胀病
V010-N00199.aliases: 臌胀； 鼓胀； 蛊胀； 单腹胀； Tympanites disorder
V010-N00199.pinyinNames: gu zhang bing; gǔ zhàng bìng
V010-N00199.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病
V010-N00199.definition: 泛指因酗酒伤肝，或肝病或痨病、腹内癥积、蛊虫病日久，阻碍气血运行，水积于腹等引起以腹部膨胀如鼓为特征的一类疾病。注：包括酒臌、水臌、气臌、血臌、虫臌等。

V010-N00199.label: 鼓胀
V010-N00199.aliases: 单腹胀； 臌； 臌胀； 蜘蛛蛊
V010-N00199.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V010-N00199.definition: 因酒食不节、情志刺激、虫毒感染、病后续发导致肝脾肾受伤，气滞血结，水停腹中。症见腹胀大如鼓、皮色苍黄、脉络暴露等。在古医籍中又称单腹胀、臌、蜘蛛蛊等。

V010-N00199.label: 鼓胀
V010-N00199.aliases: 单腹胀大； 单胀； 腹如鼓； 腹水； 腹胀如鼓； 腹胀如水状； 鼓肠； 水蛊
V010-N00199.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜躯体症状｜胸腹症状
V010-N00199.definition: 腹大胀满，绷急如鼓，皮色苍黄，脉络显露的病证。

V010-N00199.label: 臌胀病
V010-N00199.aliases: 臌胀； 鼓胀； 蛊胀
V010-N00199.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V010-N00199.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00199.label: 单腹胀大
V010-N00199.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00199.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00199.label: 臌胀病
V010-N00199.aliases: 臌胀； 鼓胀； 蛊胀； 单腹胀； Tympanites disorder
V010-N00199.pinyinNames: gu zhang bing; gǔ zhàng bìng
V010-N00199.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00199.definition: Characterized by severe abdominal bulging (like a drum). Contributing factors may include excessive alcohol drinking, liver disease, tuberculosis, abdominal masses or schistosomiasis. This condition is subdivided into alcohol tympanites, water tympanites, qi tympanites, blood tympanites and parasitic tympanites.

V010-N00199.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00199.label: 鼓胀

V010-N00206.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00206.label: 哮喘病
V010-N00206.pinyinNames: xiao chuan bing; xiào chuǎn bìng
V010-N00206.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病
V010-N00206.definition: 因先天不足，或久病肺、脾、肾三脏虚损，致使宿痰留伏体内，或由外邪引动，痰阻气道所致。临床以发作性咳喘、气促，胸廓胀满，端坐呼吸，喉中哮鸣有声，甚则喘息不得平卧等为特征的肺系病。

V010-N00206.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00206.label: 哮病
V010-N00206.aliases: 哮喘； 哮证； Wheezing disorder； Wheezing pattern
V010-N00206.englishNames: Wheezing disorder; asthma; wheezing disease; wheezing; Wheezing; wheezing [disease/disorder]
V010-N00206.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜哮喘病
V010-N00206.definition: 因禀赋异常，触及粉尘或刺激性气体等即发，或因外邪、劳累及饮食、情志失调等诱发，引动宿痰留饮，痰气交阻，气道挛急所致。临床以突发呼吸急促，喉中哮鸣有声，不得平卧，发作前可见鼻痒、喷嚏，咳嗽、胸闷等先兆症状为特征的反复发作性肺系病。

V010-N00206.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00206.label: 哮病
V010-N00206.englishNames: Wheezing disorder; asthma; wheezing; wheezing disease; wheezing [disease/disorder]
V010-N00206.path: 第1部分 内科学｜肺病
V010-N00206.definition: 以发作性喉中哮鸣有声，呼吸困难，甚则喘息不得平卧等为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00206.label: 哮病
V010-N00206.englishNames: Wheezing disorder; asthma; wheezing; wheezing disease
V010-N00206.definition: 以发作性喉中哮鸣有声，呼吸 困难，甚则喘息不得平卧为主要表现的疾 病。

V010-N00206.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00206.label: 哮喘
V010-N00206.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肺病
V010-N00206.definition: 哮指呼吸喘促而喉间有哮鸣音；喘指呼吸困难，短促急迫，甚则张口抬肩，鼻翼煽动，不能平卧。哮必兼喘，喘不必兼哮。

V010-N00206.label: 哮病
V010-N00206.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V010-N00206.definition: 是由于宿痰伏肺，遇诱因或感邪引触，以致痰阻气道，肺失肃降，气道挛急所致发作性的痰鸣气喘疾患。发作时喉中哮鸣有声，呼吸气促困难，甚则喘息不能平卧为主要表现。

V010-N00206.label: 喘证
V010-N00206.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V010-N00206.definition: 是指由于感受外邪，痰浊内蕴，情志失调而致肺气上逆，失于宣降，或久病气虚，肾失摄纳，以呼吸困难，甚则张口抬肩，鼻翼煽动，不能平卧等为主要临床表现的一种常见病证。严重者可致喘脱。

V010-N00206.label: 哮喘病
V010-N00206.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病

V010-N00206.label: 哮病
V010-N00206.englishNames: Wheezing disorder; asthma; wheezing; wheezing disease
V010-N00206.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜哮喘病

V010-N00206.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00206.label: 哮喘
V010-N00206.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜病理声音情况｜呼吸声

V010-N00206.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00206.label: 哮喘病
V010-N00206.pinyinNames: xiao chuan bing; xiào chuǎn bìng
V010-N00206.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00206.definition: Characterized by recurrent episodes of difficulty breathing, wheezing and shortness of breath with an inability to lie flat. Contributing factors may include congenital deficiency or impaired functions of the lung, spleen and kidney. These factors may generate phlegm to obstruct the airway.

V010-N00206.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00206.label: 哮病
V010-N00206.aliases: 哮喘； 哮证； Wheezing disorder； Wheezing pattern
V010-N00206.englishNames: Wheezing disorder; asthma; wheezing disease; wheezing; Wheezing; wheezing [disease/disorder]
V010-N00206.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00206.definition: Characterized by sudden, whistling sounds with an inability to lie flat. Precursory symptoms may include an itchy nose, sneezing, cough and chest tightness. Contributing factors may include heredity, exposure to dust or irritant gas, exogenous pathogenic factors, fatigue, improper diet or emotions. These factors, coupled with pre-existing phlegm may cause phlegm qi to stagnate and obstruct the respiratory airways.

V010-N00206.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00206.label: 哮喘

V010-N00206.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00206.label: 哮病

V010-N00207.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00207.label: 喘病
V010-N00207.aliases: 喘证； Dyspnoea disorder； Dyspnoea pattern
V010-N00207.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜哮喘病
V010-N00207.definition: 因外感风寒邪热束肺，或痰浊壅肺，痰气交结，肃降无权，或因先天不足，久咳伤肺，肾不纳气等所致。临床以气短喘促，呼吸困难，稍动尤甚，甚则张口抬肩，鼻翼煽动，不得平卧，伴见咳嗽、痰多，胸闷、紫绀，胸高胁胀等为特征的肺系病。

V010-N00207.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00207.label: 喘病
V010-N00207.path: 第1部分 内科学｜肺病
V010-N00207.definition: 以气短喘促等为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00207.label: 喘病
V010-N00207.definition: 因久患肺系疾病或他脏病变影响，致肺气上 逆肃降无权，以气短喘促为主要表现的疾 病。

V010-N00207.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00207.label: 哮喘
V010-N00207.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肺病
V010-N00207.definition: 哮指呼吸喘促而喉间有哮鸣音；喘指呼吸困难，短促急迫，甚则张口抬肩，鼻翼煽动，不能平卧。哮必兼喘，喘不必兼哮。

V010-N00207.label: 喘证
V010-N00207.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V010-N00207.definition: 是指由于感受外邪，痰浊内蕴，情志失调而致肺气上逆，失于宣降，或久病气虚，肾失摄纳，以呼吸困难，甚则张口抬肩，鼻翼煽动，不能平卧等为主要临床表现的一种常见病证。严重者可致喘脱。

V010-N00207.label: 喘病
V010-N00207.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜哮喘病

V010-N00207.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00207.label: 喘病
V010-N00207.aliases: 喘证； Dyspnoea disorder； Dyspnoea pattern
V010-N00207.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00207.definition: Characterized by shortness of breath, rapid breathing, and difficulty breathing that worsens upon exertion. In severe cases, breathing with an open mouth and elevated shoulder, nasal flaring and an inability to lie flat may be present. Associated symptoms may include cough with profuse phlegm, chest tightness, cyanosis, raised chest and distension in the subcostal region. Contributing factors may include heredity, exogenous pathogenic wind cold affecting the lung, turbid phlegm accumulating in the lung, chronic cough damaging lung qi or kidney failing to absorb qi.

V010-N00207.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00207.label: 喘证

V010-N00213.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00213.label: 肺痿
V010-N00213.englishNames: lung wilting; lund withering disease; atrophic lung disease; Atrophy of the lung lobes; lung atrophy; lung flaccidity; Atrophic Lung Disease; Lung withering disorder
V010-N00213.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病
V010-N00213.definition: 因咳喘日久不愈，肺气受损，津液耗伤，使肺叶枯萎或痿弱不用所致。临床以气短，咯吐浊唾涎沫等为特征的慢性肺系病。

V010-N00213.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00213.label: 肺痿
V010-N00213.englishNames: lung wilting; lund withering disease; atrophic lung disease; lung atrophy; lung flaccidity; Atrophic Lung Disease; Lung withering disorder
V010-N00213.path: 第1部分 内科学｜肺病
V010-N00213.definition: 肺叶枯萎不荣或痿弱不用，以胸憋气短，咯吐浊唾涎沫为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00213.label: 肺痿
V010-N00213.englishNames: lung wilting; atrophic lung disease; lung atrophy; lung flaccidity; Atrophic Lung Disease; Lung withering disorder
V010-N00213.definition: 肺叶枯萎不荣或痿弱不用，以胸憋气短、咯 吐浊唾诞沫为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00213.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00213.label: 肺痿
V010-N00213.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肺病
V010-N00213.definition: 因咳喘日久不愈，肺气受损，津液耗伤，致肺叶枯萎不荣或痿弱不用。以气短、咯吐浊唾涎沫为主要表现的内脏痿病类疾病。

V010-N00213.label: 肺痿
V010-N00213.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V010-N00213.definition: 因咳喘日久不愈，肺气受损，津液耗伤，致肺叶枯萎不荣或痿弱不用。以气短，咯吐浊唾涎沫为主要表现的内脏痿病类疾病。

V010-N00213.label: 肺痿
V010-N00213.englishNames: lung wilting; atrophic lung disease; lung atrophy; lung flaccidity; Atrophic Lung Disease; Lung withering disorder
V010-N00213.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病

V010-N00213.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00213.label: 肺痿
V010-N00213.englishNames: lung wilting; lund withering disease; atrophic lung disease; Atrophy of the lung lobes; lung atrophy; lung flaccidity; Atrophic Lung Disease; Lung withering disorder
V010-N00213.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00213.definition: Characterized by shortness of breath and cough with expectoration of turbid sputum. Often occurs when chronic cough damages lung qi, consumes fluids and results in withering or disuse of the lung lobes.

V010-N00213.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00213.label: 肺痿

V010-N00212.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00212.label: 肺瘅
V010-N00212.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病
V010-N00212.definition: 因邪热入肺，或脏腑瘅热及肺，痰热壅肺，肺失清肃所致。临床以咳嗽，痰黄而稠，或痰中夹血，口渴，可伴见潮热、寒热，胸胁肋痛，大便秘结，小便黄等为特征的肺系病。

V010-N00212.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00212.label: 肺热病
V010-N00212.englishNames: Lung heat disorder; lung heat disease
V010-N00212.path: 第1部分 内科学｜肺病
V010-N00212.definition: 以骤起发热，咳嗽，烦渴，胸痛为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00212.label: 肺热病
V010-N00212.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V010-N00212.definition: 风热病毒犯肺，热壅肺气，肺失清肃。以骤起发热，咳嗽，烦渴，胸痛为主要表现的内脏瘅[热]病类疾病。

V010-N00212.label: 肺瘅
V010-N00212.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病

V010-N00212.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00212.label: 肺瘅
V010-N00212.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00212.definition: Characterized by cough with sticky, yellow phlegm or blood-stained sputum and thirst. Associated symptoms may include tidal fever, chills, pain in the subcostal region, constipation and yellow urine. Often occurs when pathogenic heat, heat of zang–fu organs or phlegm heat affect the dispersing and descending of lung qi.

V010-N00214.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00214.label: 肺胀
V010-N00214.englishNames: lung distention; lung distension; Lung distension disorder; lungdistention; Lung distension; Lung Distention
V010-N00214.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病
V010-N00214.definition: 因肺咳、哮病久治不愈，肺气壅滞，久胀不敛，肺叶充胸胀廓所致。临床以胸廓膨胀，憋闷喘息，咳嗽、痰多，动辄气促，面色晦暗，唇舌紫绀，甚或喘脱，咯血，神昏等为特征的慢性肺系病。

V010-N00214.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00214.label: 肺胀
V010-N00214.englishNames: lung distention; lung distension; Lung distension disorder; lungdistention; Lung Distention
V010-N00214.path: 第1部分 内科学｜肺病
V010-N00214.definition: 肺叶久胀不敛，以胸中胀闷，咳嗽咯痰，气短而喘，唇舌紫绀为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00214.label: 肺胀
V010-N00214.englishNames: lung distention; lung distension; Lung distension disorder; lungdistention; Lung Distention
V010-N00214.definition: 肺叶久胀不敛，以胸中胀闷，咳嗽咯痰，气短 而喘，唇舌紫绀为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00214.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00214.label: 肺胀
V010-N00214.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肺病
V010-N00214.definition: 常继发于肺咳、哮病等之后，因肺气长期壅滞，肺叶恒久膨胀、不能敛降，而胀廓充胸。以胸中胀闷、咳嗽咯痰、气短而喘为主要表现的肺系疾病。

V010-N00214.label: 肺胀
V010-N00214.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V010-N00214.definition: 是指多种慢性肺系疾患反复发作，迁延不愈，肺脾肾三脏虚损，从而导致肺管不利，肺气壅滞，气道不畅，胸膺胀满不能敛降。临床表现见喘息气促，咳嗽，咯痰，胸部膨满，憋闷如塞，或唇甲紫绀，心悸浮肿等症。重者可出现昏迷、喘脱等危重证候。

V010-N00214.label: 肺胀
V010-N00214.englishNames: lung distention; lung distension; Lung distension disorder; lungdistention; Lung Distention
V010-N00214.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病

V010-N00214.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00214.label: 肺胀
V010-N00214.englishNames: lung distention; lung distension; Lung distension disorder; lungdistention; Lung distension; Lung Distention
V010-N00214.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00214.definition: Characterized by chest stuffiness or distension, cough with expectoration of sputum, shortness of breath and panting upon exertion. In severe cases, a raised chest, distention in the subcostal region and cyanosis of the lips and tongue may be present. Often occurs when chronic cough or wheezing causes lung qi to stagnate.

V010-N00214.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00214.label: 肺胀

V010-N00217.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00217.label: 关格
V010-N00217.englishNames: block and repulsion (disease); anuria and vomiting; urinary retention and vomiting; obstruction and rejection; Block and repulsion disorder; dysuria and frequent vomiting; block and repulsion disease/disorder; Anuria and Vomiting; Urinary block and vomiting
V010-N00217.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病
V010-N00217.definition: 因水肿、癃闭、淋病等晚期，脾肾阴阳衰惫，气化不利，湿浊毒邪上攻犯胃，或化热动风，甚或上蒙清空所致。临床以小便不通与呕吐不止并见，伴见皮肤瘙痒，口中臭秽，或有尿味，甚或手足搐搦，昏睡，神识不清等为特征的肾系病重症。

V010-N00217.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00217.label: 肠结
V010-N00217.englishNames: intestinal painful impediment; intestinal binding; Intestinal obstruction
V010-N00217.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病
V010-N00217.definition: 因腹部手术损伤，或因肿瘤压迫、癌毒积聚等，致使肠道痹阻，气机闭结所致。临床以腹部阵发性绞痛，腹胀，频繁呕吐，无肠鸣、矢气，大便闭结等为特征的脾系病重症。

V010-N00217.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00217.label: 关格
V010-N00217.englishNames: block and repulsion (disease); anuria and vomiting; urinary retention and vomiting; obstruction and rejection; Block and repulsion disorder; dysuria and frequent vomiting; block and repulsion disease/disorder; Anuria and Vomiting; Urinary block and vomiting
V010-N00217.path: 第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病
V010-N00217.definition: 关于格的合称。以小便不通（关）于呕吐不止（格）并见为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00217.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00217.label: 肠结
V010-N00217.path: 第1部分 内科学｜脾胃病
V010-N00217.definition: 以腹胀如鼓，腹痛，呕吐，便秘，无肠鸣，矢气为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00217.label: 关格
V010-N00217.englishNames: block and repulsion (disease); anuria and vomiting; obstruction and rejection; Block and repulsion disorder; dysuria and frequent vomiting; Anuria and Vomiting
V010-N00217.definition: 以小便不通与呕吐并见为主要表现的疾病。 小便不通称为关，呕吐不止称为格。

V010-N00217.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00217.label: 关格
V010-N00217.englishNames: block and repulsion (disease); Anuria and Vomiting; anuria and vomiting
V010-N00217.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肾病
V010-N00217.definition: 以小便不通与呕吐并见为主要表现的疾病。小便不通称为关，呕吐不止称为格。

V010-N00217.label: 关格
V010-N00217.path: 原理和经验｜原理｜诊断原理｜异常脉象
V010-N00217.definition: 指脉象。指人迎与寸口脉俱盛极，系阴阳离决的危象。;是病证名。小便不通与呕吐不止并见的病证。小便不通名关，呕吐不已名格。;是病理名。指阴阳均偏盛，不能相互营运的严重病理情况。

V010-N00217.label: 关格
V010-N00217.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V010-N00217.definition: 是指由于脾肾阴阳衰惫，气化不利，浊邪内蕴而致小便不通与呕吐并见的病证。多见于水肿、癃闭、淋证等病的晚期。

V010-N00217.label: 肠结
V010-N00217.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V010-N00217.definition: 多因腹部手术损伤，或实邪内积，使肠体活动异常而搏结不通，气机阻塞所致。以腹痛、呕吐，腹胀，便秘为主要表现的内脏痹病类疾病。

V010-N00217.label: 关格
V010-N00217.englishNames: block and repulsion (disease); anuria and vomiting; obstruction and rejection; Block and repulsion disorder; dysuria and frequent vomiting; Anuria and Vomiting
V010-N00217.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V010-N00217.label: 肠结
V010-N00217.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V010-N00217.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00217.label: 大便干结
V010-N00217.aliases: 肠结； 大便燥结； 干结便
V010-N00217.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00217.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00217.label: 关格
V010-N00217.englishNames: block and repulsion (disease); anuria and vomiting; urinary retention and vomiting; obstruction and rejection; Block and repulsion disorder; dysuria and frequent vomiting; block and repulsion disease/disorder; Anuria and Vomiting; Urinary block and vomiting
V010-N00217.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00217.definition: A critical condition characterized by urinary retention and persistent vomiting, coupled with skin itching, and a strong-odoured breath. In severe cases, convulsions of the hands and feet, drowsiness and mental cloudiness may be present. Often occurs in late-stage oedema, urinary retention or strangury. Contributing factors may include impaired qi transformation due to yin/yang failure of the spleen and kidney and toxic, turbid dampness attacking the stomach. Alternatively, it may also occur when dampness transforms into heat and stirs wind, or in severe cases, to disturb the heart mind.

V010-N00217.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00217.label: 肠结
V010-N00217.englishNames: intestinal painful impediment; intestinal binding; Intestinal obstruction
V010-N00217.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00217.definition: Characterized by paroxysmal abdominal colic, abdominal bloating, absence of bowel sounds, flatus, and constipation. Often occurs when abdominal surgery, tumour compression or carcinoma toxins obstruct the flow of intestinal qi.

V010-N00217.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00217.label: 关格

V010-N00219.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00219.label: 尿崩
V010-N00219.englishNames: flooding urination disease/disorder; flooding urination; profuse urination; diabetes insipidus; Flooding urine disorder; Profuse urination (diabetes insipidus); profuse urine
V010-N00219.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病
V010-N00219.definition: 因肾虚不固，或脑病及肾，气化失约，水津直趋膀胱而下泄所致。临床以尿多如崩，尿清如水，烦渴、多饮等为特征的肾系病。

V010-N00219.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00219.label: 尿崩
V010-N00219.englishNames: flooding urination disease/disorder; flooding urination; profuse urination; diabetes insipidus; Flooding urine disorder; Profuse urination (diabetes insipidus); profuse urine
V010-N00219.path: 第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病
V010-N00219.definition: 以尿多如崩，尿清如水，烦渴多饮为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00219.label: 尿崩
V010-N00219.englishNames: profuse urination; diabetes insipidus; flooding urination; Flooding urine disorder; profuse urine
V010-N00219.definition: 以尿多如崩，尿清如水，烦渴多饮为主要表 现的肾系疾病。

V010-N00219.label: 尿崩
V010-N00219.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V010-N00219.definition: 因肾虚下元不固，或脑神等病变及肾，肾之气化失司，水津直趋膀胱而下泄。以尿多如崩，尿清如水，烦渴多饮为主要表现的肾系疾病。

V010-N00219.label: 尿崩
V010-N00219.englishNames: profuse urination; diabetes insipidus; flooding urination; Flooding urine disorder; profuse urine
V010-N00219.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V010-N00219.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00219.label: 尿崩
V010-N00219.englishNames: flooding urination disease/disorder; flooding urination; profuse urination; diabetes insipidus; Flooding urine disorder; Profuse urination (diabetes insipidus); profuse urine
V010-N00219.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00219.definition: Characterized by large amounts of dilute urine and excessive thirst. Often occurs when the kidney fails to perform the qi transformation of the urinary bladder.

V010-N00233.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00233.label: 强中病
V010-N00233.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病
V010-N00233.definition: 因肝火、瘀阻、湿热下注，或滥用壮阳药，火毒内盛，引动相火，或色欲过度，肾阴亏耗，虚阳妄动等所致。临床以阴茎挺举，持久不倒等为特征的肾系病。

V010-N00233.label: 阳强
V010-N00233.englishNames: Persistent erection disorder; persistent erection of penis; persistent erection
V010-N00233.definition: 以阴茎久举不痿，精液自泄为主要表现的疾 病。

V010-N00233.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00233.definition: Characterized by abnormally prolonged erection of the penis. Contributing factors may include liver fire, stasis, damp heat, overuse of aphrodisiac drugs or sexual indulgence. These factors may cause internal toxic fire and trigger ministerial fire to consume kidney yang and result in hyperactivity of deficiency yang.

V010-N00235.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00235.label: 淋证
V010-N00235.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病
V010-N00235.definition: 泛指因湿热侵袭或蕴结下焦，或脾肾亏虚、肝郁气滞，或因痨虫、结石、岩瘤等，致使膀胱气化不利而引起，以小便频数涩痛、痛引腰腹等为特征的一类疾病。

V010-N00235.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00235.label: 淋证
V010-N00235.path: 第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病
V010-N00235.definition: 以小便频急，淋漓不尽，尿道涩痛，小腹拘急，痛引腰腹为主要表现的疾病的统称。注：包括热淋、石淋、气淋、血淋、膏淋、劳淋等。

V010-N00235.label: 淋证
V010-N00235.definition: 以小便频急，淋沥不尽，尿道涩痛，小腹拘 急，痛引腰腹为主要表现的疾病的统称。

V010-N00235.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00235.label: 淋证
V010-N00235.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肾病
V010-N00235.definition: 以小便频急、淋沥不尽、尿道涩痛、小腹拘急、痛引腰腹为主要表现的疾病的统称。

V010-N00235.label: 淋证
V010-N00235.aliases: 淋閟； 淋秘； 淋浊
V010-N00235.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V010-N00235.definition: 是因肾、膀胱气化失司、水道不利而致的以小便频急、淋沥不尽、尿道涩痛、小腹拘急、痛引腰腹为主要临床表现的一类病证。

V010-N00235.label: 淋证
V010-N00235.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V010-N00235.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00235.label: 小儿尿频
V010-N00235.aliases: 淋证； 溲数； 小便数
V010-N00235.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00235.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00235.label: 淋证
V010-N00235.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00235.definition: Characterized by frequent, urgent, hesitant and painful urination. The pain during urination may radiate to the low back and abdomen. Contributing factors may include damp heat affecting the lower jiao, deficiency of the spleen and kidney, liver qi stagnation, tuberculosis, stones or tumours. These factors may impair the qi transformation of the urinary bladder.

V010-N00235.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00235.label: 淋证

V010-N00238.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00238.label: 热淋
V010-N00238.aliases: 急淋； 湿热淋； Heat stranguria disorder； Damp heat stranguria； acute stranguria
V010-N00238.englishNames: heat strangury; heat stranguria; Heat stranguria disorder; Heat strangury
V010-N00238.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病｜淋证
V010-N00238.definition: 因湿热等邪客肾，蕴积膀胱所致。临床以小便频数、短赤，尿道灼热、涩痛，伴见寒热，腰痛，少腹拘急胀痛，舌苔黄腻，脉滑数等为特征的急性发作性淋证。

V010-N00238.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00238.label: 热淋
V010-N00238.aliases: 急淋； 湿热淋； Heat stranguria disorder； Damp heat stranguria； acute stranguria
V010-N00238.englishNames: heat strangury; heat stranguria; Heat stranguria disorder; Heat strangury
V010-N00238.path: 第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病｜淋证
V010-N00238.definition: 以起病急，尿频，尿急，尿道灼热涩痛，尿黄为主要表现的淋证。

V010-N00238.label: 热淋
V010-N00238.englishNames: heat strangury; heat stranguria; Heat stranguria disorder
V010-N00238.definition: 以起病急，尿频，尿急，尿道灼热涩痛，尿黄 为主要表现的淋证。

V010-N00238.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表

V010-N00238.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肾病｜淋证
V010-N00238.definition: 因染受湿热之邪，使膀胱气化不利，以引起尿频、尿痛、尿急、尿血为主要表现的淋病类疾病。

V010-N00238.label: 热淋
V010-N00238.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证｜淋证
V010-N00238.definition: 因染受湿热之邪，使膀胱气化不利。以新起尿频，尿痛，尿急，尿血为主要表现的淋病类疾病。

V010-N00238.label: 热淋
V010-N00238.englishNames: heat strangury; heat stranguria; Heat stranguria disorder
V010-N00238.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病｜淋证

V010-N00238.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00238.definition: Characterized by frequent, urgent and painful urination with scanty, red urine and a burning sensation. Associated symptoms may include fever, chills, lower back painlower back pain, lower abdominal cramps, distension and pain, a yellow, greasy tongue coating and a slippery, rapid pulse. Often occurs when damp heat affects the kidney and urinary bladder.

V010-N00239.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00239.label: 石淋
V010-N00239.englishNames: Stony stranguria disorder; stony strangury; urolithic stranguria; stony stranguria; Stone strangury; stone strangury
V010-N00239.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病｜淋证
V010-N00239.definition: 因湿热之邪蕴积下焦，煎熬尿浊杂质，结为砂石，停阻于肾系所致。临床以尿出砂石，或经检查发现结石，尿道窘迫疼痛，腰腹剧烈绞痛，或伴见尿血，影像学检查结石征象等为特征的淋证。

V010-N00239.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00239.label: 石淋
V010-N00239.englishNames: Stony stranguria disorder; stony strangury; urolithic stranguria; stony stranguria; Stone strangury; stone strangury
V010-N00239.path: 第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病｜淋证
V010-N00239.definition: 以小便排出砂石为主症，或排尿时突然中断，尿道窘迫疼痛，腰腹绞痛难忍为主要表现的淋证。

V010-N00239.label: 石淋
V010-N00239.englishNames: Stony stranguria disorder; stony strangury; urolithic stranguria; stone strangury
V010-N00239.definition: 以小便排出砂石为主症，或排尿时突然中 断，尿道窘迫疼痛，腰腹绞痛难忍为主要表 现的淋证。

V010-N00239.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00239.label: 石淋
V010-N00239.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肾病｜淋证
V010-N00239.definition: 因湿热之邪蕴结下焦，煎熬尿浊杂质，结为砂石，停阻于肾系。以腰痛、尿血，或尿出砂石。

V010-N00239.label: 石淋
V010-N00239.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证｜淋证
V010-N00239.definition: 因湿热之邪蕴结下焦，煎熬尿浊杂质，结尾砂石，停阻于肾系。以腰痛，尿血，或尿出砂石，或经检查发现结石为特征的结石类疾病。

V010-N00229.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00229.label: 癃闭
V010-N00229.englishNames: Urinary retention; dribbling urinary block (disease); dribbing urinary block; retention of urine; Dribbling urinary block disorder; dribbling and retention of urine; dribbling urinary block disease/disorder
V010-N00229.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病
V010-N00229.definition: 因湿热下注，或瘀血、败精、结石、肿瘤等阻塞膀胱、尿道，或因肾阳不足、气化无权，肾阴亏损、津液内耗，以及阴部手术等所致。临床以小便量少或点滴而出，甚至闭塞不通，小腹胀痛等为特征的肾系病。

V010-N00229.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00229.label: 癃闭
V010-N00229.englishNames: Urinary retention; dribbling urinary block (disease); dribbing urinary block; retention of urine; Dribbling urinary block disorder; dribbling and retention of urine; dribbling urinary block disease/disorder
V010-N00229.path: 第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病
V010-N00229.definition: 以小便量少，点滴而出，甚至闭塞不通为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00229.label: 癃闭
V010-N00229.englishNames: dribbling urinary block (disease); retention of urine; Dribbling urinary block disorder; dribbling and retention of urine; dribbing urinary block
V010-N00229.definition: 以小便量少，点滴而出，甚至闭塞不通为主 要表现的疾病。

V010-N00229.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00229.label: 癃闭
V010-N00229.aliases: 尿闭； 小便不通； Retention of Urine
V010-N00229.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肾病
V010-N00229.definition: 因败精阻塞、阴部手术等，使膀胱气化失司，水道不利，以小便量少、点滴而出、甚至闭塞不通为主要表现的内脏痹病类疾病。

V010-N00229.label: 癃闭
V010-N00229.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V010-N00229.definition: 是由于肾和膀胱气化失司而导致尿量减少，排尿困难，甚则小便闭塞不通主症的一种病证。其中又以小便不利，点滴而短少，病势较缓者称为“癃”；以小便闭塞，点滴全无，病势较急者称为“闭”。癃和闭虽有区别，但都是指排尿困难，只有程度上的不同，因此多合称为癃闭。

V010-N00229.label: 小便不通
V010-N00229.aliases: 胞痹； 闭癃； 不得解； 不得小便； 癃闭； 溺闭； 溺癃； 溺溲不通； 尿闭； 无尿； 小便闭； 小水不通
V010-N00229.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜二便症状｜小便症状
V010-N00229.definition: 小便排出困难，严重者点滴难出的表现。

V010-N00229.label: 癃闭
V010-N00229.englishNames: dribbling urinary block (disease); retention of urine; Dribbling urinary block disorder; dribbling and retention of urine; dribbing urinary block
V010-N00229.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V010-N00229.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00229.definition: Characterized by scanty urine, dripping urination and lower abdominal distension/pain. In severe cases, individuals may experience an inability to empty the bladder. Contributing factors may include damp heat in the urinary bladder, stagnant blood, stones or tumours obstructing the urethra, kidney yang failing to perform qi transformation, kidney yin deficiency or surgery.

V010-N00231.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肾病

V010-N00231.definition: Characterized by repeated inability to control urination during sleep. Contributing factors may include congenital weakness, kidney qi deficiency or internal retention of damp heat and stagnant blood. These factors may impair the qi transformation of the urinary bladder.

V010-N00244.pinyinNames: ye ge bing; yē gé bìng
V010-N00244.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病
V010-N00244.definition: 因忧思不解，痰气凝结，以及火郁或血瘀、津枯、癌毒等致使食道梗阻所致。临床以吞咽不顺，食入即吐，或饮食梗阻不下等为特征的脾系病。

V010-N00244.label: 噎膈
V010-N00244.definition: 以吞咽不顺，饮食梗塞难下为主要表现的疾 病。

V010-N00244.label: 吞食梗塞
V010-N00244.definition: 吞咽食物时梗噎不顺，甚或隔阻不通的表现。

V010-N00244.path: TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜脾胃病
V010-N00244.definition: 吞咽不顺、饮食梗塞难下的症状，常见于食管病变。

V010-N00244.label: 噎膈

V010-N00244.definition: 由七情内伤、酒食不节、久病年老致气痰瘀交阻，津气耗伤，胃失通降而发本病。症见吞咽食物哽咽不顺，饮食难下，或食而复出的疾患。

V010-N00244.label: 噎膈病

V010-N00244.definition: Characterized by difficulty in swallowing, vomiting immediately after eating food or inability to swallow solid food (a feeling of food stuck or held up before it either passes into the stomach or is regurgitated). Often occurs when phlegm qi stagnation (plum pit qi), stagnant fire, blood stasis or cancer toxin obstructs the oesophagus.

V010-N00262.label: 实证
V010-N00262.definition: 外邪侵犯人体，或是脏腑机能失调，痰饮、水湿、积气瘀血、宿食、燥屎、脓、虫、砂石等有形之物停积体内，导致各种邪气盛实的证候。

V010-N00262.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00262.definition: Characterized by high fever, thirst, chest tightness, panting, rapid breathing, phlegm sounds in the throat, restlessness, delirium, abdominal distension/pain/tenderness, and scanty, dark-yellow urine or hesitant, painful urination. The tongue is rough with a dry, yellow coating. The pulse is replete and forceful. Contributing factors may include six pathogenic factors, parasites or dysfunctions of the zang–fu organs (subsequent food stagnation, retention of phlegm/fluid/water/dampness and blood stasis).

V010-N00485.aliases: 外寒肺热证； 肺热表寒证； Exterior cold with lung heat pattern
V010-N00485.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of exterior cold with lung heat; Exterior cold with lung heat pattern
V010-N00485.pinyinNames: biao han fei re zheng; biǎo hán fèi rè zhèng
V010-N00485.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00485.definition: Characterized by aversion to cold, fever, thirst, absence of sweating, restlessness, cough, panting and chest tightness. The tongue coating is yellow mixed with white. The pulse is superficial and rapid. This pattern often occurs when cold binds the Wei-defence and causes internal lung heat.

V010-N00265.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00265.label: 寒证
V010-N00265.englishNames: cold pattern/ syndrome; cold syndrome/pattern; Cold pattern; Cold Syndrome
V010-N00265.definition: 与热证相对。泛指外感寒邪，或因阳气不足，阴气过盛等而引起寒凝肌表、经络、骨节，或脏腑虚寒、寒实等相应征象为特征的一类证候。

V010-N00265.label: 寒证
V010-N00265.definition: 寒邪侵袭，或阳虚阴盛，以恶寒，或畏寒，肢冷喜暖，口淡不渴，面白踡卧，分泌物、排泄物清稀，舌淡苔白，脉紧或迟等为常见症的寒性征候。

V010-N00265.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00265.label: 寒证
V010-N00265.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候
V010-N00265.definition: 由阴盛或阳虚所产生的以寒冷表现为主的一类证候。临床表现为恶寒或畏寒喜暖、面色晄白、肢冷蜷卧、口淡不渴，或痰、涎、涕稀量多，小便清长，大便稀溏，舌淡苔白而润滑，脉迟或紧等。

V010-N00265.label: 寒证
V010-N00265.path: 病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候
V010-N00265.definition: 由阴盛或阳虚所产生的以寒冷表现为主的一类证候。临床表现为恶寒或畏寒喜暖、面色晄白、肢冷蜷卧、口淡不渴，或痰、涎、涕稀量多，小便清长，大便稀溏，舌淡苔白而润滑，脉迟或紧等。

V010-N00265.label: 寒证
V010-N00265.englishNames: cold pattern/ syndrome; cold syndrome/pattern; Cold pattern; Cold Syndrome

V010-N00265.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00265.label: 寒证
V010-N00265.englishNames: cold pattern/ syndrome; cold syndrome/pattern; Cold pattern; Cold Syndrome
V010-N00265.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00265.definition: Characterized by aversion to cold, cold intolerance, cold pain with preference for warmth, absence of thirst, thin, clear phlegm and nasal discharge, clear, profuse urine, loose stools and a pale complexion. The tongue is purple with a white coating. The pulse is tight or slow. Often results from excess of yin qi or cold attacking the interior.

V010-N00265.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00265.label: 寒证

V010-N00265.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00265.label: 寒证
V010-N00265.definition: a general term for patterns/syndromes caused either by external cold pathogen or by insufficient yang within the body, commonly manifested by aversion to cold or fear of cold, cold pain with preference for heat, absence of thirst, thin clear sputum an

V010-N00267.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00267.label: 热证
V010-N00267.aliases: 热毒蕴结肌肤； 热扰胸膈； 热盛动风； 热盛动血； 热盛酿脓； 热盛气滞； 热实结胸； 热重于风； 热重于湿； 少腹热滞
V010-N00267.englishNames: Heat Syndrome; heat syndrome/pattern; heat pattern/ syndrome; Heat pattern
V010-N00267.definition: 与寒证相对。泛指外感热邪，或诸邪入里化热，或因阴虚阳亢等而引起邪热袭表、经气痹阻，或邪入脏腑经络，阳气亢盛、阴津亏损等相应征象为特征的一类证候。

V010-N00267.label: 热证
V010-N00267.definition: 热邪侵袭，或阳气亢盛，以身热烦躁，面目红赤，唇红而干，咽燥口渴，喜冷饮，大便秘结，小便短赤，舌红苔黄，脉数等为常见症的热性证候。

V010-N00267.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00267.label: 热证
V010-N00267.aliases: 热毒蕴结肌肤； 热扰胸膈； 热盛动风； 热盛动血； 热盛酿脓； 热盛气滞； 热实结胸； 热重于风； 热重于湿； 少腹热滞
V010-N00267.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候
V010-N00267.definition: 由阳盛或阴虚所产生的以温热表现为主的一类证候，临床表现为发热恶热，喜冷，口渴喜冷饮，面红目赤，烦躁昏谵，或痰、涕黄稠，或吐血衄血，小便短赤，大便干结，舌红苔燥，脉滑数等。

V010-N00267.label: 热胜则肿
V010-N00267.aliases: 毒盛酿脓； 热盛酿脓
V010-N00267.path: 病因病机｜病机｜八纲病机｜寒热失调｜热的病机｜实热
V010-N00267.definition: 指热邪炽盛，蕴郁肌肤，导致痈肿疮疡的病理变化。

V010-N00267.label: 热极生风
V010-N00267.aliases: 热甚动风； 热甚风动； 热盛动风； 热盛风动
V010-N00267.englishNames: Extreme Heat Causing Wind; Interior Wind due to Overabundance of Pathogenic Heat
V010-N00267.path: 病因病机｜病机｜内生五邪病机｜风气内动
V010-N00267.definition: 指邪热炽盛，伤及营血，燔灼肝经，筋脉失养而挛急抽搐的病理变化。

V010-N00267.label: 血热妄行
V010-N00267.aliases: 动血； 迫血妄行； 热盛动血； 热盛血涌
V010-N00267.path: 病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜血失调｜血热
V010-N00267.definition: 指血分热盛而动血耗血，或血脉受热而不能壅遏营血，导致出血的病机。

V010-N00267.label: 上焦热胜
V010-N00267.aliases: 热扰胸膈； 上焦烦热
V010-N00267.path: 病因病机｜病机｜脏腑病机｜心包与三焦病机｜三焦病机｜上焦病机

V010-N00267.label: 热证
V010-N00267.path: 病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候
V010-N00267.definition: 由阳盛或阴虚所产生的以温热表现为主的一类证候，临床表现为发热恶热，喜冷，口渴喜冷饮，面红目赤，烦躁昏谵，或痰、涕黄稠，或吐血衄血，小便短赤，大便干结，舌红苔燥，脉滑数等。

V010-N00267.label: 热证
V010-N00267.aliases: 热毒蕴结肌肤； 热扰胸膈； 热盛动风； 热盛动血； 热盛酿脓； 热盛气滞； 热实结胸； 热重于风； 热重于湿； 少腹热滞
V010-N00267.englishNames: Heat Syndrome; heat syndrome/pattern; heat pattern/ syndrome; Heat pattern

V010-N00267.vocabName: T/CIATCM 104-2023 张仲景经方传承信息基本数据集
V010-N00267.label: 热扰胸膈
V010-N00267.path: 数据元值域代码表（表14-表27）｜表14 经方病机（伤寒论）代码表

V010-N00267.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00267.label: 热证
V010-N00267.aliases: 热毒蕴结肌肤； 热扰胸膈； 热盛动风； 热盛动血； 热盛酿脓； 热盛气滞； 热实结胸； 热重于风； 热重于湿； 少腹热滞
V010-N00267.englishNames: Heat Syndrome; heat syndrome/pattern; heat pattern/ syndrome; Heat pattern
V010-N00267.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00267.definition: Characterized by fever, a red face, thirst, constipation and yellow or red urine. Alternatively, malar flush, night sweats, feverish sensations in the palms, soles and chest, a dry, red tongue and a thready, rapid pulse may be present. It is sub-categorized into patterns of exterior heat, interior heat, deficiency heat and excess heat. Often results from contracting pathogenic heat or hyperactivity of yang due to yin deficiency.

V010-N00267.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00267.label: 热盛动风

V010-N00267.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00267.label: 热证

V010-N00267.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00267.label: 热证
V010-N00267.definition: a general term for patterns/syndromes resulting either from attack of external heat or from prevalence of yang qi, usually manifested by fever, aversion to heat and liking for cold, thirst, flushed face, irritability and vexation, thick yellow sputum

V010-N00269.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00269.label: 虚证
V010-N00269.englishNames: deficiency pattern/ syndrome; deficiency syndrome/pattern; Deficiency Symptom Complex; Deficiency pattern
V010-N00269.definition: 与实证相对。泛指因正气不足，人体气血津精阴阳虚损而引起气血、阴阳、脏腑、经络功能衰退等相应征象为特征的一类证候。注：包括阴虚、阳虚、气虚、血虚及脏腑经络等虚证。

V010-N00269.label: 虚证
V010-N00269.definition: 先天禀赋不足，或后天失调，或疾病损伤等所致正气虚弱的证候，有阳虚证、阴虚证、气虚证、血虚证之分。

V010-N00269.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00269.label: 虚证
V010-N00269.englishNames: deficiency pattern/ syndrome; Deficiency Symptom Complex
V010-N00269.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜虚实证候
V010-N00269.definition: 在疾病过程中，以正气虚弱为矛盾的主要方面，正邪斗争所产生的较和缓的病理反应。

V010-N00269.label: 虚证
V010-N00269.path: 病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜虚实证候
V010-N00269.definition: 先天禀赋不足，或后天失调，或疾病损伤等所致正气虚弱的证候，有阳虚证、阴虚证、气虚证、血虚证之分。

V010-N00269.label: 虚证
V010-N00269.englishNames: deficiency pattern/ syndrome; deficiency syndrome/pattern; Deficiency Symptom Complex; Deficiency pattern

V010-N00269.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00269.label: 虚证
V010-N00269.englishNames: deficiency pattern/ syndrome; deficiency syndrome/pattern; Deficiency Symptom Complex; Deficiency pattern
V010-N00269.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00269.definition: Characterized by general weakness, a weak pulse and abdominal softness. Often results from insufficiency of qi, yin, yang or blood.

V010-N00269.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00269.label: 虚证

V010-N00269.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00269.label: 虚证
V010-N00269.englishNames: deficiency pattern/ syndrome; Deficiency Symptom Complex
V010-N00269.definition: a general term for patterns/syndromes caused by deficiency of the healthy qi (including deficiency of yin, yang, qi and blood)

V010-N00270.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00270.label: 表证
V010-N00270.englishNames: external syndrome/pattern; Exterior Syndrome; exterior pattern/ syndrome; Exterior pattern
V010-N00270.definition: 与里证相对。泛指外感病邪侵袭肌肤、肌肉、骨节、官窍等体表组织而引起营卫不和、经气不利等相应征象为特征的一类证候。

V010-N00270.label: 表证
V010-N00270.definition: 外感病的初期，起病较急，病位较浅，病情较轻，病程较短，以发热恶寒或恶风、头身痛、舌苔薄白、脉浮为常见症的证候。

V010-N00270.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00270.label: 表证
V010-N00270.englishNames: exterior pattern/ syndrome; Exterior Syndrome; superficies syndrome
V010-N00270.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜表里证候
V010-N00270.definition: 外感邪气经皮毛、口鼻侵入人体，正气（卫气）抗邪而表现于体表的轻浅证候。临床表现为发热恶寒（可恶风）、头身疼痛、舌苔薄白、脉浮。

V010-N00270.label: 表证
V010-N00270.path: 病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜表里证候
V010-N00270.definition: 是指六淫，疫疠，虫毒等邪气经皮毛，口鼻侵入机体，正气（卫气）抗邪所表现轻浅证候的概括。表证主要见于外感疾病初期阶段。

V010-N00270.label: 表证
V010-N00270.englishNames: external syndrome/pattern; Exterior Syndrome; exterior pattern/ syndrome; Exterior pattern

V010-N00270.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00270.label: 表证
V010-N00270.englishNames: external syndrome/pattern; Exterior pattern; Exterior Syndrome; exterior pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00270.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00270.definition: Characterized by aversion to wind/cold, fever, headache, and body aches. The tongue coating is thin. The pulse is floating. These signs and symptoms are often seen in the early stage of externally contracted conditions that have a sudden onset, superficial location and a short duration. Often occurs when exogenous pathogenic factors affect the interstices, joints and head.

V010-N00270.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00270.label: 表证

V010-N00270.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00270.label: 表证
V010-N00270.englishNames: exterior pattern/ syndrome; Exterior Syndrome; superficies syndrome
V010-N00270.definition: a general term for patterns/syndromes that occur chiefly at the early stage of external contractions affecting the exterior part of the body, characterized by a sudden onset, aversion to cold or to wind, fever, headache, generalized pain, thin tongue

V010-N00271.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00271.label: 里证
V010-N00271.englishNames: interior pattern/ syndrome; internal syndrome/pattern; Interior Syndrome; Interior pattern
V010-N00271.definition: 与表证相对。泛指外邪由表入里，或因饮食不节、劳倦过度、七情内伤、痰瘀凝滞等而引起气血、阴阳、脏腑经络功能失调等相应征象为特征的一类证候。

V010-N00271.label: 里证
V010-N00271.definition: 病邪深入于脏腑、气血、骨髓所致，病位深，病情重，病程长的证候。

V010-N00271.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00271.label: 里证
V010-N00271.englishNames: interior pattern/ syndrome; Interior Syndrome; interior syndrome
V010-N00271.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜表里证候
V010-N00271.definition: 泛指病变部位在内，病邪深入于脏腑、气血、骨髓所致，病位深、病情重、病程长的证候。

V010-N00271.label: 里证
V010-N00271.path: 病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜表里证候
V010-N00271.definition: 泛指病变部位在内，病邪深入于脏腑、气血、骨髓所致，病位深、病情重、病程长的证候。        >> 隐藏详细信息

V010-N00271.label: 里证
V010-N00271.englishNames: interior pattern/ syndrome; internal syndrome/pattern; Interior Syndrome; Interior pattern

V010-N00271.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00271.label: 里证
V010-N00271.englishNames: interior pattern/ syndrome; internal syndrome/pattern; Interior pattern; Interior Syndrome
V010-N00271.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00271.definition: A group of patterns caused by entering of external pathogens into the interior, improper diet, over exhaustion, emotional disturbance or phlegm stasis, resulting in disorders and dysfunctions in qi, blood, yin, yang, zang–fu organs and meridian systems.

V010-N00271.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00271.label: 里证

V010-N00271.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00271.label: 里证
V010-N00271.englishNames: interior pattern/ syndrome; Interior Syndrome; interior syndrome
V010-N00271.definition: a general term for patterns/syndromes that indicate the existence of disease in the interior of the body such as bowels and viscera, qi and blood, or bone marrow

V010-N00272.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00272.label: 阳证
V010-N00272.englishNames: Yang Syndrome; yang syndrome/pattern; Yang pattern; yang pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00272.definition: 与阴证相对。泛指具有兴奋、趋外、上升、机能亢进或色泽明亮等病机特征，具有统领表证、热证、实证辨证意义的一类证候。

V010-N00272.label: 阳证
V010-N00272.definition: 符合阳的兴奋、躁动、亢进、快速等属性的证候，是对表证、实证、热证的概括。

V010-N00272.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00272.label: 阳证
V010-N00272.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候
V010-N00272.definition: 符合阳的兴奋、躁动、亢进、快速等属性的证候，是对表证、实证、热证的概括。

V010-N00272.label: 阳证
V010-N00272.path: 病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候
V010-N00272.definition: 符合阳的兴奋、躁动、亢进、快速等属性的证候，是对表证、实证、热证的概括。

V010-N00272.label: 阳证
V010-N00272.englishNames: Yang Syndrome; yang syndrome/pattern; Yang pattern; yang pattern/ syndrome

V010-N00272.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00272.label: 阳证
V010-N00272.englishNames: Yang Syndrome; yang syndrome/pattern; Yang pattern; yang pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00272.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00272.definition: Causes outward, upward symptoms and manifests as conditions characterized by excitability, hyperactivity, restlessness, and brightness. It encompasses exterior pattern, heat pattern and excess pattern.

V010-N00272.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00272.label: 阳证

V010-N00272.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00272.label: 阳证
V010-N00272.definition: a collective term for exterior, heat and excess patterns/ syndromes with excitatory, hyperfunctional, restless or bright manifestations, or outward and upward symptoms, as well as morbid conditions caused by pathogenic factors of yang nature

V010-N00273.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00273.label: 阴证
V010-N00273.englishNames: Yin Syndrome; yin pattern/syndrome; Yin pattern; yin syndrome/pattern
V010-N00273.definition: 与阳证相对。泛指具有抑制、内敛、萎靡、机能衰退或色泽晦暗等病机特征，具有统领里证、寒证、虚证辨证意义的一类证候。

V010-N00273.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00273.label: 阴证
V010-N00273.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候
V010-N00273.definition: 符合阴的抑制、衰退、沉静、缓慢等属性的证候，是对里证、虚证、寒证的概括。

V010-N00273.label: 阴证
V010-N00273.path: 病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候
V010-N00273.definition: 符合阴的抑制、衰退、沉静、缓慢等属性的证候，是对里证、虚证、寒证的概括。

V010-N00273.label: 阴证
V010-N00273.englishNames: Yin Syndrome; yin pattern/syndrome; Yin pattern; yin syndrome/pattern

V010-N00273.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00273.label: 阴证
V010-N00273.englishNames: Yin Syndrome; yin pattern/syndrome; Yin pattern; yin syndrome/pattern
V010-N00273.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00273.definition: Causes inward, downward symptoms and manifests as conditions characterized by inhibition, listlessness, tranquillity and gloominess. It encompasses interior pattern, cold pattern and deficiency pattern.

V010-N00273.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00273.label: 阴证

V010-N00273.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00273.label: 阴证
V010-N00273.definition: a collective term for interior, cold and deficiency patterns/syndromes with inhibitory, hypofunctional, quiescent or dimmed manifestations, or inward and downward symptoms, as well as morbid conditions caused by pathogenic factors of yin nature

V010-N00286.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00286.label: 卫分证
V010-N00286.englishNames: Wei Fen Symptom Complex; defense aspect pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of defense phase; Defense phase patterns
V010-N00286.path: 卫气营血证候类术语｜卫分证类
V010-N00286.definition: 因温热疫毒等邪由口鼻而入，侵袭肺卫，肺失宣降所致。临床以发热，微恶风寒，咳嗽，咯痰黄白，咽赤肿痛，口渴，鼻流浊涕，舌边尖红，舌苔白或微黄，脉浮数或弦数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00286.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00286.label: 风热犯表证
V010-N00286.aliases: 风热袭表证； 风热表证； 卫分证； 风热犯卫证
V010-N00286.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of wind and heat invading the surface
V010-N00286.path: 病因证候类术语｜风证类｜风热证｜风热外袭证｜风热感冒证
V010-N00286.definition: 因风热时邪客于肌表，腠理不固所致。临床以发热、微恶风寒，汗出、口渴，鼻塞、涕浊，头痛，肢体酸楚，咽喉肿痛，舌尖红，舌苔薄黄，脉浮数，指纹浮紫等为特征的证候。

V010-N00286.label: 卫分证
V010-N00286.definition: 一般为温病初起，邪犯卫分，肺气失宣，以头痛发热，微恶风寒，口微渴，少汗，咳嗽，咽痛，苔薄白，脉浮数为常见症的证候。

V010-N00286.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00286.label: 卫分证
V010-N00286.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜卫气营血证候
V010-N00286.definition: 风热之邪侵犯肌表，人体卫外功能失常，肺卫失宣所表现的证候，常见于温热病的初期阶段。

V010-N00286.label: 卫分证
V010-N00286.path: 病证｜证候｜卫气营血证候
V010-N00286.definition: 风热之邪侵犯肌表，人体卫外功能失常，肺卫失宣所表现的证候，常见于温热病的初期阶段。

V010-N00286.label: 卫分证
V010-N00286.englishNames: Wei Fen Symptom Complex; defense aspect pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of defense phase; Defense phase patterns
V010-N00286.path: 证候｜卫气营血证候类术语｜卫分证类

V010-N00286.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of wind and heat invading the surface

V010-N00286.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00286.label: 卫分证
V010-N00286.aliases: 卫分病； 卫分证候； Defence phase pattern； Wei aspect pattern
V010-N00286.englishNames: Wei Fen Symptom Complex; Wei-defence phase pattern; defense aspect pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of defense phase; Defense phase patterns
V010-N00286.pinyinNames: wei fen zheng; wèi fèn zhèng
V010-N00286.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00286.definition: Characterized by fever and mild aversion to wind cold. The pulse is superficial and rapid. This pattern often occurs when pathogenic warm heat affects the normal functioning of Wei-defensive qi and disturbs the dispersing and descending of lung qi.

V010-N00286.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00286.label: 卫分证

V010-N00286.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00286.label: 卫分证
V010-N00286.aliases: ZWW010； 卫分病； 卫分证候
V010-N00286.englishNames: defense aspect pattern/syndrome; Wei Fen Symptom Complex; weifen syndrome
V010-N00286.path: 诊断学｜卫气营血辨证类
V010-N00286.definition: the initial stage of an epidemic febrile disease when only the superficial part of the defense qi is involved, marked by fever, slightly aversion to wind and cold, headache, reddened tongue tip and rapid floating pulse

V010-N00295.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00295.label: 气分湿热证
V010-N00295.englishNames: qi aspect dampnessheat pattern/ syndrome; Qi phase dampness and heat pattern; syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in qi phase
V010-N00295.path: 卫气营血证候类术语｜气分证类
V010-N00295.definition: 因湿温疫毒等蕴结气分所致。临床以身热不扬。胸闷腹胀，身冃发黄。肢体困倦，呕恶，尿黄，舌质红，舌苔黄腻，脉濡数或滑数，指纹红紫等为特征的证候。

V010-N00295.label: 气分湿热证
V010-N00295.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness-heat in qi aspect; syndrome of dampnessheat in qifen
V010-N00295.definition: 湿热之邪侵入气分，以身热不扬，胸闷腹胀，身目发黄，肢体困倦，呕恶，尿黄，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00295.label: 气分湿热证
V010-N00295.englishNames: Damp and Heat in the inner defensive system Syndrome
V010-N00295.path: 病证｜证候｜卫气营血证候｜气分证
V010-N00295.definition: 湿热侵迫气分，以身热不扬，胸闷腹胀，身目发黄，肢体困倦，呕恶，尿黄，舌红苔黄腻，脉濡数或滑数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00295.label: 气分湿热证
V010-N00295.englishNames: qi aspect dampnessheat pattern/ syndrome; Qi phase dampness and heat pattern; syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in qi phase
V010-N00295.path: 证候｜卫气营血证候类术语｜气分证类

V010-N00295.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00295.label: 气分湿热证
V010-N00295.aliases: Qi phase dampness and heat pattern
V010-N00295.englishNames: qi aspect dampnessheat pattern/ syndrome; Qi phase dampness and heat pattern; syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in qi phase; Damp heat in the qi phase
V010-N00295.pinyinNames: qi fen shi re zheng; qì fèn shī rè zhèng
V010-N00295.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00295.definition: Characterized by unresolved fever after sweating, chest tightness, abdominal distension, yellowish pigmentation of the skin and eyes, limb weakness, nausea, vomiting and yellow urine. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is soft and rapid or slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when damp heat affects the qi phase.

V010-N00295.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00295.label: 气分湿热证
V010-N00295.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness-heat in qi aspect

V010-N00295.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00295.label: 气分湿热证
V010-N00295.path: 诊断学｜卫气营血辨证类
V010-N00295.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising when pathogenic dampness-heat invades qi aspect, marked by unsurfaced fever, oppression in the chest and distension in the abdomen, jaundice, cumbersome limbs, nausea and vomiting, reddened tongue with yellow slimy coating

V010-N00292.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00292.label: 气分证
V010-N00292.aliases: 气分热盛； 热炽气分
V010-N00292.englishNames: Qi phase patterns; syndrome/pattern of qi phase; qi aspect pattern/ syndrome; Qifen Syndrome
V010-N00292.path: 卫气营血证候类术语｜气分证类
V010-N00292.definition: 因温热或湿热疫毒等邪由卫分入气，或直接侵犯气分所致。临床以壮热不已，不恶寒、反恶热，汗出不解，烦渴引饮，舌质红，舌苔黄燥或腻滞，脉洪大或数实有力，指纹紫，可伴见咳嗽、痰黄，鼻煽、气促，胸闷、呕恶，心悸、怔忡，大便秘结，或下利赤白等为特征的证候。

V010-N00292.label: 热盛气分
V010-N00292.path: 病机学｜卫气营血病机｜气分
V010-N00292.definition: 邪入气分，里热蒸腾，伤津耗液的病理变化。

V010-N00292.label: 气分证
V010-N00292.definition: 一般为温热病的第二个阶段，邪热由卫分传入气分，或径犯气分，或由营分转出，以壮热烦渴，不恶寒，舌红苔黄，脉数，或气促，胸闷脘痞，小便短赤，大便闭结等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00292.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00292.label: 气分证
V010-N00292.aliases: 气分热盛； 热炽气分
V010-N00292.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜卫气营血证候
V010-N00292.definition: 外感温热病邪内入脏腑，正盛邪实，邪正剧争，以壮热烦渴、舌红苔黄、尿赤便结、脉洪或数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00292.label: 热盛气分
V010-N00292.aliases: 气分热盛； 气分郁热
V010-N00292.path: 病因病机｜病机｜卫气营血病机｜气分病机
V010-N00292.definition: 指邪入气分，里热蒸腾，伤津耗液的病理变化。

V010-N00292.label: 气分证
V010-N00292.aliases: 气分热盛证； 热炽气分证
V010-N00292.path: 病证｜证候｜卫气营血证候
V010-N00292.definition: 外感温热病邪内入脏腑，正盛邪实，邪正剧争，以壮热烦渴，舌红苔黄，尿赤便结，脉洪或数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00292.label: 气分证
V010-N00292.aliases: 气分热盛； 热炽气分
V010-N00292.englishNames: Qi phase patterns; syndrome/pattern of qi phase; qi aspect pattern/ syndrome; Qifen Syndrome
V010-N00292.path: 证候｜卫气营血证候类术语｜气分证类

V010-N00292.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00292.label: 气分证
V010-N00292.aliases: 气分热盛证； 气分热盛； 热炽气分
V010-N00292.englishNames: Qi phase pattern; Qi phase patterns; syndrome/pattern of qi phase; qi aspect pattern/ syndrome; Qifen Syndrome
V010-N00292.pinyinNames: qì fèn zhèng; qi fen zheng
V010-N00292.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00292.definition: Characterized by fever without aversion to cold. The tongue coating turns yellow. This pattern often occurs when pathogenic warm transforms into heat.

V010-N00292.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00292.label: 气分证

V010-N00292.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00292.label: 气分证
V010-N00292.aliases: 气分热盛； 热炽气分
V010-N00292.englishNames: qi aspect pattern/ syndrome; Qifen Syndrome
V010-N00292.path: 诊断学｜卫气营血辨证类
V010-N00292.definition: the second stage of an epidemic febrile disease showing intrusion of pathogenic heat on the yang brightness meridian or the lung, gallbladder, spleen, stomach or large intestine, marked by high fever without chills, strong thirst, flushed face, dark u

V010-N00298.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00298.label: 营分证
V010-N00298.aliases: 热炽营分； 营分病； 营分热盛； 营分证候； 营热炽盛
V010-N00298.englishNames: Yingfen Syndrome; nutrient aspect pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of nutrient phase; Nutrient phase patterns
V010-N00298.path: 卫气营血证候类术语｜营分证类
V010-N00298.definition: 因温热疫毒等邪入里，或内陷营分，营阴受损，心神被扰所致。临床以身热夜甚，心烦、不寐，甚则神昏、谵语，斑疹隐隐，舌质红绛，舌苔少或无，脉细数，指纹紫滞等为特征的证候。

V010-N00298.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00298.label: 营分热盛证
V010-N00298.aliases: 营热炽盛证； 热炽营分证； 心营热盛证； 营分证
V010-N00298.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of exuberant heat in the nutrient phase and qi phase
V010-N00298.path: 卫气营血证候类术语｜营分证类｜营分证
V010-N00298.definition: 因温热疫毒等邪入营，心营热盛所致。临床以午后潮热，夜甚早凉，或高热、烦躁，神昏、谵语，渴不欲饮，舌质深绛，舌苔焦褐或少苔，脉细数或滑数，指纹紫滞，可伴见红斑密布，项强，四肢搐搦，角弓反张等为特征的证候。

V010-N00298.label: 营分证
V010-N00298.definition: 一般为温热病的第三个阶段，邪热深入，犯及营分，损伤营阴，扰动心神，以身热夜甚，心烦不寐，神昏谵语，癍疹隐隐，舌红绛，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00298.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V010-N00298.label: 营分证
V010-N00298.aliases: 热炽营分； 营分病； 营分热盛； 营分证候； 营热炽盛
V010-N00298.path: TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜卫气营血证候
V010-N00298.definition: 温热病邪内陷，营阴受损，心神被扰，以身热夜甚、心烦不寐、神昏谵语、斑疹隐隐、舌质红绛、脉细而数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00298.label: 营分证

V010-N00298.definition: 温热病邪内陷，营阴受损，心神被扰，以身热夜甚，心烦不寐，神昏谵语，斑疹隐隐，舌质红绛，脉细而数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00298.label: 营分证
V010-N00298.aliases: 热炽营分； 营分病； 营分热盛； 营分证候； 营热炽盛

V010-N00298.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of exuberant heat in the nutrient phase and qi phase
V010-N00298.path: 证候｜卫气营血证候类术语｜营分证类｜营分证

V010-N00298.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00298.definition: Characterized by fever that aggravates at night, restlessness and insomnia. The tongue is deep red. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when pathogenic heat consumes the Ying nutrient yin and disturbs the heart mind.

V010-N00298.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V010-N00298.path: 诊断学｜卫气营血辨证类
V010-N00298.definition: serious development of an epidemic febrile disease characterized by pathogenic heat entering the nutrient aspect and disturbing the heart (mind), manifested by fever higher at night, restlessness or delirium, faint skin rashes and crimson tongue

V010-N00304.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00304.label: 血分证
V010-N00304.aliases: 血热内扰证； 热炽血分证； 血热证； 热炽血分； 血热内扰； 温邪侵袭血分证
V010-N00304.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood phase; Xuefen Syndrome; blood aspect pattern/ syndrome; Blood phase patterns; Blood phase pattern
V010-N00304.path: 卫气营血证候类术语｜血分证类
V010-N00304.definition: 因温热疫毒等邪深入血分，耗血伤阴，动血生风所致。临床以壮热或夜热早凉，手足抽搐或蠕动。神昏、谵语，斑疹紫黑，舌质深绛，舌苔少或无，脉弦数，指纹紫黑，伴见吐血或衄血、尿血、便血等为特征的证候。

V010-N00304.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00304.label: 血热证
V010-N00304.englishNames: Blood heat pattern; blood heat pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of blood heat
V010-N00304.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类
V010-N00304.definition: 泛指因血热内蕴，或热入血分，壅滞肌腠，灼伤血络，迫血妄行，内扰脏腑，化燥伤阴、夹湿动风等所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00304.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00304.label: 血热妄行证
V010-N00304.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of frenetic movement of blood due to heat
V010-N00304.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血热证｜血热内盛证
V010-N00304.definition: 因邪入血分，迫血妄行，或血热内盛，灼伤血络所致。临床以突然大咳血或呕血、衄血、便血、尿血、产后血崩等，势急量多，血色鲜红或紫暗，或斑疹密布，颜色紫赤，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉弦数，可伴见身热、神昏，狂躁不安，头胀，眩晕，胸胁脘腹疼痛等为特征的证候。

V010-N00304.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00304.label: 热入血分证
V010-N00304.aliases: 热炽血分证； 热在血分证
V010-N00304.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of heat entering the blood aspect; Heat entering the blood phase pattern; syndrome/pattern of heat entering the blood phase
V010-N00304.path: 病因证候类术语｜火证类｜火热证｜热在营血证
V010-N00304.definition: 因温热邪毒深入血分，迫血妄行所致。临床以温热外感病过程中出现咳血或吐血、衄血、尿血、便血，斑疹密布，色紫或黑，舌质深绛或起刺，脉数，伴见身热、口渴，心烦、不寐等为特征的证候。

V010-N00304.vocabName: 中医药学名词（2004）

V010-N00304.englishNames: xuefen syndrome; blood aspect syndrome/pattern
V010-N00304.path: 诊断学｜辨证
V010-N00304.definition: 一般为温热病的第四个阶段，邪热深入血分，耗血伤阴，动血生风，以壮热或低热，手足抽搐或蠕动，神昏谵语，癍疹紫黑，吐血、衄血、尿血、便血等，舌质深绛，脉弦数等为常见症的证候。
