V010-N00304.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00304.label: 热入血分证
V010-N00304.aliases: 热炽血分证； 热在血分证； Excess heat in the blood aspect pattern； Blood and heat pattern
V010-N00304.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of heat entering the blood aspect; Heat entering the blood phase pattern; syndrome/pattern of heat entering the blood phase
V010-N00304.pinyinNames: re ru xue fen zheng; rè rù xuè fèn zhèng
V010-N00304.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00304.definition: Characterized by haemorrhagic symptoms such as haemoptysis, nosebleed, bloody urine and bloody stools. Alternatively, a high-grade fever, unconsciousness and twitching of hands/feet may be present. The tongue is dark purple. This pattern often occurs when fire/heat consumes Ying nutrients and blood.

V010-N00304.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00304.label: 血分证
V010-N00304.aliases: 血热内扰证； 热炽血分证； 血热证； 热炽血分； 血热内扰； 温邪侵袭血分证
V010-N00304.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood phase; Xuefen Syndrome; blood aspect pattern/ syndrome; Blood phase patterns; Blood phase pattern
V010-N00304.pinyinNames: xue fen zheng; xuè fèn zhèng
V010-N00304.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00304.definition: Characterized by fever that aggravates at night, restlessness, insomnia, unconsciousness, delirium, a dark purple tongue and a wiry, rapid pulse. Alternatively, dark purple maculae, haematemesis, nosebleed, bloody stools, bloody urine, a dry tongue with a scanty coating and a thready, deficient pulse may be present. This pattern often occurs when heat in febrile conditions moves blood, stirs wind and consumes yin.

V010-N00304.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00304.label: 血热证
V010-N00304.englishNames: Blood heat pattern; blood heat pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of blood heat
V010-N00304.pinyinNames: xue re zheng; xuè rè zhèng
V010-N00304.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00304.definition: Characterized by haemoptysis, haematemesis, nosebleed, bloody urine, bloody stools with a bright red, sticky colour, and earlier period with heavy menstruation. Alternatively, red, swollen and painful sores/boils, restlessness, thirst, and fever may be present. The tongue is deep red. The pulse is slippery and rapid. Often occurs when exuberant fire heat in the zang–fu organs causes the blood to flow recklessly.

V010-N00380.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood phase; Xuefen Syndrome; blood aspect pattern/ syndrome; Blood phase patterns; Blood phase pattern
V010-N00380.path: 卫气营血证候类术语｜血分证类
V010-N00380.definition: 因温热疫毒等邪深入血分，耗血伤阴，动血生风所致。临床以壮热或夜热早凉，手足抽搐或蠕动。神昏、谵语，斑疹紫黑，舌质深绛，舌苔少或无，脉弦数，指纹紫黑，伴见吐血或衄血、尿血、便血等为特征的证候。

V010-N00380.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00380.label: 血热证
V010-N00380.englishNames: Blood heat pattern; blood heat pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of blood heat
V010-N00380.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类
V010-N00380.definition: 泛指因血热内蕴，或热入血分，壅滞肌腠，灼伤血络，迫血妄行，内扰脏腑，化燥伤阴、夹湿动风等所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00380.path: 病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病
V010-N00380.definition: 多由于邪热入血所致，也可由于情志郁结、五志过极化火而导致的症状。

V010-N00380.label: 血分证

V010-N00380.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00380.label: 血分证
V010-N00380.aliases: 血热内扰证； 热炽血分证； 血热证； 热炽血分； 血热内扰； 温邪侵袭血分证
V010-N00380.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood phase; Xuefen Syndrome; blood aspect pattern/ syndrome; Blood phase patterns; Blood phase pattern
V010-N00380.pinyinNames: xue fen zheng; xuè fèn zhèng
V010-N00380.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00380.definition: Characterized by fever that aggravates at night, restlessness, insomnia, unconsciousness, delirium, a dark purple tongue and a wiry, rapid pulse. Alternatively, dark purple maculae, haematemesis, nosebleed, bloody stools, bloody urine, a dry tongue with a scanty coating and a thready, deficient pulse may be present. This pattern often occurs when heat in febrile conditions moves blood, stirs wind and consumes yin.

V010-N00380.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00380.label: 血热证
V010-N00380.englishNames: Blood heat pattern; blood heat pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of blood heat
V010-N00380.pinyinNames: xue re zheng; xuè rè zhèng
V010-N00380.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00380.definition: Characterized by haemoptysis, haematemesis, nosebleed, bloody urine, bloody stools with a bright red, sticky colour, and earlier period with heavy menstruation. Alternatively, red, swollen and painful sores/boils, restlessness, thirst, and fever may be present. The tongue is deep red. The pulse is slippery and rapid. Often occurs when exuberant fire heat in the zang–fu organs causes the blood to flow recklessly.

V010-N00380.definition: a pattern/syndrome that occurs when exuberant pathogenic heat enters the blood aspect and is manifested by fever, nose-bleeds, vomiting of blood, expectoration of blood, bloody stool, skin eruptions, or advanced periods with profuse bright-red menstru

V010-N00358.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00358.label: 气滞证
V010-N00358.aliases: 气机郁结证； 气结证； 气郁证； 气机阻滞证
V010-N00358.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi stagnation; qi stagnation pattern/ syndrome; Qi stagnation pattern
V010-N00358.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证
V010-N00358.definition: 泛指因各种原因导致气机郁滞，内生或兼夹湿、痰、热、火、瘀浊等邪，影响经络、脏腑、官窍功能等所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00358.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00358.label: 气机阻滞证
V010-N00358.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证｜气滞证
V010-N00358.definition: 泛指因各种原因导致气机不畅，或气郁而不散，阻滞脏腑、经络、官窍等所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00358.label: 气滞证
V010-N00358.englishNames: syndrome of qi stagnation; qi stagnation syndrome/pattern
V010-N00358.definition: 气机阻滞，运行不畅，以胸胁、脘腹胀闷疼痛，时轻时重，时作时休，或走窜不定，胀痛可随暖气、肠鸣、矢气而减，脉弦等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00358.label: 气滞证
V010-N00358.aliases: 气机郁结证； 气机郁滞证； 气机阻滞证； 气结证； 气郁证
V010-N00358.path: 病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病
V010-N00358.definition: 某些脏腑或局部气机阻滞，以胸胁脘腹胀闷疼痛，时轻时重，走窜不定，胀痛常随太息、嗳气、肠鸣、矢气而减，脉弦等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00358.label: 气滞证
V010-N00358.aliases: 气机郁结证； 气结证； 气郁证； 气机阻滞证
V010-N00358.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi stagnation; qi stagnation pattern/ syndrome; Qi stagnation pattern
V010-N00358.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证

V010-N00358.label: 气机阻滞证
V010-N00358.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证｜气滞证

V010-N00358.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00358.label: 气滞证
V010-N00358.aliases: 气机郁结证； 气结证； 气郁证； 气机阻滞证
V010-N00358.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi stagnation; qi stagnation pattern/ syndrome; Qi stagnation pattern
V010-N00358.pinyinNames: qi zhi zheng; qì zhì zhèng
V010-N00358.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00358.definition: Characterized by migratory distension, fullness and pain in the subcostal region and abdomen that alleviate after sighing, belching, bowel sounds and flatus. The pulse is wiry. Often results from qi stagnation of the zang–fu organs or in the localized area.

V010-N00358.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00358.label: 气滞证

V010-N00358.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00358.label: 气滞证
V010-N00358.definition: a pattern/syndrome resulting from stagnation of qi, marked by intermittent thoracic, hypochondriac, epigastric and abdominal distention or pain, often ameliorated by sighing or belching

V010-N00358.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00358.label: 气郁证
V010-N00358.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by feeling of distension in the chest, pain in the hypochondriac region, irritability, irascibility, anorexia and menstrual disorders in women, the same as the qi stagnation pattern/syndrome

V010-N00359.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00359.label: 气脱证
V010-N00359.aliases: 元气虚脱证； 元气衰败证
V010-N00359.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi collapse; qi collapse pattern/ syndrome; Qi collapse pattern
V010-N00359.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证
V010-N00359.definition: 因外感或内伤等原因，致使真气急骤外泄所致。临床以突然面色苍白，口唇青紫，汗出，肢冷，呼吸微弱，舌质淡，脉细数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00359.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00359.label: 元气败脱证
V010-N00359.aliases: 元气衰败证； 元阳衰败证
V010-N00359.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜元气不足证
V010-N00359.definition: 因外感、内伤耗损真元，阴不恋阳，元气暴脱所致。临床以骤然冷汗淋漓，四肢逆冷，口开、手撒，气息微弱，二便失禁，神志昏愦，甚则昏迷不醒，瞳神散大，舌质暗淡或紫，脉微欲绝等为特征的证候。

V010-N00359.label: 气脱证
V010-N00359.englishNames: syndrome of qi desertion; qi collapse syndrome/pattern
V010-N00359.definition: 真气急骤外泄，以突然大汗淋漓，面色苍白，口唇青紫，目合口张，肢冷，呼吸微弱，甚者昏迷，二便失禁，舌淡，脉微欲绝等为常见症的危重证候。

V010-N00359.label: 气脱证
V010-N00359.aliases: 元气衰败证； 元气虚脱证
V010-N00359.path: 病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病
V010-N00359.definition: 真气因某种原因而急聚外泄，以突然面色苍白，口唇青紫，汗出肢冷，呼 吸微弱，舌淡脉细数为常见症的危重证候。

V010-N00359.label: 气脱证
V010-N00359.aliases: 元气虚脱证； 元气衰败证
V010-N00359.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi collapse; qi collapse pattern/ syndrome; Qi collapse pattern
V010-N00359.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证｜气滞证

V010-N00359.label: 元气败脱证
V010-N00359.aliases: 元气衰败证； 元阳衰败证
V010-N00359.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜元气不足证

V010-N00359.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00359.label: 气脱证
V010-N00359.aliases: 元气虚脱证； 元气衰败证
V010-N00359.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi collapse; Qi collapse pattern; qi collapse pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00359.pinyinNames: qi tuo zheng; qì tuō zhèng
V010-N00359.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00359.definition: Characterized by a sudden pale complexion, cyanotic lips, sweating, cold limbs and faint breathing. The tongue is pale. The pulse is thready and rapid. Often results from sudden and rapid leaking of qi.

V010-N00359.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00359.label: 气脱证

V010-N00359.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00359.label: 气脱证
V010-N00359.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by sudden appearance of profuse sweating, somber pale complexion, cyanotic lips, cold extremities, feeble breathing, even fainting or loss of consciousness with incontinence of urine, pale tongue and hardly perceptible pulse

V010-N00361.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00361.label: 气逆证
V010-N00361.aliases: 气机上逆证； 气机横逆证
V010-N00361.englishNames: Qi uprising pattern; qi counterflow pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of qi counterflow
V010-N00361.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证
V010-N00361.definition: 泛指因肺、肝、肾、胃等脏腑气机逆乱，上逆或横逆等所引起的一类证候。注：包括肺气上逆证、胃热气逆证、胃寒气逆证、胃滞气逆证、肝肾气逆证、肝气犯胃证、肝气犯肺证等。

V010-N00361.label: 气逆证
V010-N00361.englishNames: qi counterflow syndrome/pattern; syndrome of reversed flow ofqi
V010-N00361.definition: 气机升降失常，逆乱向上所致的证候，因脏腑逆气不同，表现可各不相同。

V010-N00361.label: 气逆证
V010-N00361.englishNames: syndrome of reversed flow of qi
V010-N00361.path: 病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病
V010-N00361.definition: 泛指气机逆乱向上，以咳嗽气喘，或恶心、呕吐、呃逆、嗳气，或觉气从少腹上冲胸咽，胸胁胀闷，头胀眩晕等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00361.label: 气逆证
V010-N00361.aliases: 气机上逆证； 气机横逆证
V010-N00361.englishNames: Qi uprising pattern; qi counterflow pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of qi counterflow
V010-N00361.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证｜气滞证

V010-N00361.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00361.label: 气逆证
V010-N00361.aliases: 气机上逆证； 气机横逆证
V010-N00361.englishNames: Qi uprising pattern; Qi counterflow pattern; qi counterflow pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of qi counterflow
V010-N00361.pinyinNames: qì nì zhèng; qi ni zheng
V010-N00361.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00361.definition: Characterized by dizziness, blurred vision, vomiting, belching, hiccups, and acid reflux. In severe cases, sudden fainting or panting may be present. Often results from counterflow of qi or disordered qi activity.

V010-N00361.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00361.label: 气逆证

V010-N00361.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00361.label: 气逆证
V010-N00361.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising when qi moves abnormally upward, manifested by cough and dyspnea, or nausea, vomiting, hiccup, belching or even hematemesis, or feeling of gas ascending from the lesser abdomen to the chest or throat with distension and oppr

V010-N00362.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00362.label: 气陷证
V010-N00362.englishNames: Qi sinking pattern; qi sinking pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of qi sinking
V010-N00362.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证
V010-N00362.definition: 因气虚无力升举，中气下陷所致。临床以头晕，眼花，少气，倦怠，舌质淡，舌苔白，脉弱，可伴见脘腹坠胀，脱肛，内脏、子宫下垂，久痢久泄等为特征的证候。

V010-N00362.label: 气陷证
V010-N00362.englishNames: syndrome of qi sinking; qi sinking syndrome/pattern
V010-N00362.definition: 气虚升举无力，应升反降，以头晕眼花，少气倦怠，院腹坠胀，脱肛，胃、肾、子宫等内脏下垂，舌谈苔白，脉细弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00362.label: 气陷证
V010-N00362.path: 病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病
V010-N00362.definition: 气虚无力升举，应升反降，以头晕眼花，少气倦怠，脘腹坠胀，脱肛，内脏、子宫下垂，舌淡苔白，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00362.label: 气陷证
V010-N00362.englishNames: Qi sinking pattern; qi sinking pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of qi sinking
V010-N00362.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证｜气滞证

V010-N00362.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00362.label: 气陷证
V010-N00362.englishNames: Qi sinking pattern; qi sinking pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of qi sinking
V010-N00362.pinyinNames: qi xian zheng; qì xiàn zhèng
V010-N00362.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00362.definition: Characterized by dizziness, blurred vision, lassitude, a bearing-down sensation in the abdomen, rectal prolapse, and prolapsed internal organs or uterus. The tongue is pale with a white coating. The pulse is weak. Often occurs when qi fails to ascend.

V010-N00362.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00362.label: 气陷证

V010-N00362.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00362.label: 气陷证
V010-N00362.definition: a pattern/syndrome resulting from failure in its lifting or holding function, marked by dizziness, blurred vision, shortage of qi, lassitude, prolapse of the anus, prolapse of the uterus or visceroptosis, pale tongue with white coating and weak pulse

V010-N00525.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00525.label: 脾气下陷证
V010-N00525.aliases: 脾虚气陷证； 中气下陷证
V010-N00525.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi collapse due to spleen deficiency; Spleen qi sinking pattern
V010-N00525.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证｜气陷证
V010-N00525.definition: 因脾气虚弱，中气下陷所致。临床以胃脘坠胀，食后加重，或肛门重坠，便意频数，或久泄脱肛，小便频数，甚或失禁，或子宫下垂，崩漏，胎漏，舌质淡，舌苔白，脉缓弱，伴见食少、便溏，消瘦、乏力，头晕、目眩等为特征的证候。

V010-N00525.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00525.label: 中气下陷证
V010-N00525.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of middle qi sinking; sunken middle qi pattern/syndrome
V010-N00525.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜中气亏虚证
V010-N00525.definition: 因中气亏损，清阳不升，反而陷下所致。临床以小腹坠胀，尿频滴沥，甚则遗尿、失禁，或久泻不止，肛门重坠、脱肛，或阴挺，舌质淡，舌苔薄白，脉缓细，伴见脘腹坠胀，神疲、乏力，头晕、食少等为特征的证候。

V010-N00525.label: 脾虚气陷证
V010-N00525.englishNames: syndrome of sinking ofqi due to spleen deficiency; syndrome/pattern of spleen deficiency and sinking of qi
V010-N00525.definition: 脾气虚弱，中气下陷，以神疲乏力，头晕食少，腹胀便溏，或脘腹坠胀，食后益甚，或便意频数，肛门重坠，或久泻不止，或脱肛，或阴挺，或小便浑浊，或崩漏、胎漏，舌淡苔白，脉缓弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00525.label: 脾气下陷证
V010-N00525.aliases: 脾气不升证； 脾虚气陷证； 中气下陷证

V010-N00525.definition: 脾气虚弱，中气下陷，以脘腹重坠作胀，食后益甚，或便意频数，肛门重坠，或脱肛、阴挺，或小便混浊，或久泄不止，或崩漏、胎漏，神疲乏力，食少，腹胀，便溏，眩晕，舌淡，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00525.label: 脾气下陷证
V010-N00525.aliases: 脾虚气陷证； 中气下陷证
V010-N00525.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi collapse due to spleen deficiency; Spleen qi sinking pattern

V010-N00525.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi collapse due to spleen deficiency; Spleen qi sinking pattern
V010-N00525.pinyinNames: pi qi xia xian zheng; pí qì xià xiàn zhèng
V010-N00525.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00525.definition: Characterized by a bearing-down sensation in the abdomen that aggravates after eating food. Frequent urges to defaecate with a bearing-down sensation of the anus, persistent diarrhoea, rectal prolapse, prolapsed uterus or cloudy urine may be present. Associated symptoms may include shortness of breath, fatigue, lassitude, reluctance to talk, dizziness, blurred vision, a pale, lustreless face, poor appetite and loose stools. The tongue is pale with a white coating. The pulse is delayed and weak. This pattern often develops from severe spleen qi deficiency and occurs when spleen qi fails to ascend.

V010-N00525.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by bearing-down sensation in the epigastrium and abdomen, protracted diarrhea, even prolapse of rectum or visceroptosis

V010-N00303.definition: 因卫弱营强，腠理不固，或卫强营弱，阳气郁于肌表，内迫营阴所致。临床以发热，或微恶风寒，时有汗出，脉缓等为特征的证候。

V010-N00303.label: 营卫不和证

V010-N00303.definition: 卫弱营强，或卫强营弱，以身微热或微恶风寒、时有汗出、脉缓等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00303.pinyinNames: ying wei bu he zheng; yíng wèi bù hé zhèng
V010-N00303.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00303.definition: Characterized by spontaneous sweating without fever. Alternatively, patients may present with fever and spontaneous sweating, or neither. This pattern often occurs when yang qi becomes deficient or when stagnant yang qi in the surface of the body affects Ying nutrients and yin fluids.

V010-N00360.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候

V010-N00360.definition: 泛指因先天禀赋不足，或后天调养不当，致使气虚失充或不摄、下陷、虚脱等所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00360.label: 气虚证
V010-N00360.englishNames: qi deficiency syndrome/pattern; syndrome of qi deficiency
V010-N00360.definition: 元气不足，脏腑机能衰退，以气短乏力，神疲懒言，自汗，舌淡，脉虚等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00360.label: 气虚证
V010-N00360.path: 病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病
V010-N00360.definition: 元气不足，脏腑机能衰退，以气短乏力、神疲懒言、自汗、舌淡、脉虚等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00360.label: 气虚证
V010-N00360.englishNames: qi deficiency pattern/ syndrome; Qi deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency
V010-N00360.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类

V010-N00360.label: 气虚证
V010-N00360.englishNames: qi deficiency pattern/ syndrome; Qi deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency
V010-N00360.pinyinNames: qi xu zheng; qì xū zhèng
V010-N00360.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00360.definition: Characterized by shortness of breath, fatigue, lassitude, reluctance to talk, and spontaneous sweating. The tongue is pale. The pulse is deficient. Often results from hypofunctions of the zang–fu organs.

V010-N00360.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00360.label: 气虚证

V010-N00360.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00360.label: 气虚证
V010-N00360.definition: a pattern/syndrome of deficiency of genuine qi with diminished function of internal organs, marked by shortness of breath, lassitude, listlessness, spontaneous sweating, pale tongue and weak pulse

V010-N00367.definition: 泛指因外感、内伤，或中毒、烧伤，治疗不当等，伤津劫液，形体失却润养所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00367.englishNames: fluid deficiency syndrome/pattern; syndrome of deficiency of fluid
V010-N00367.definition: 津液亏损，脏腑组织失却濡养，以口燥咽干，唇焦或裂，渴欲饮水，小便短少，大便于结，舌红少津，脉细数无力等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00367.label: 津液亏损证
V010-N00367.aliases: 津液不足证； 津液亏少证
V010-N00367.path: 病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜津液病
V010-N00367.definition: 津液亏少，脏腑组织失却濡养，以口燥咽干，唇焦或裂，渴欲饮水，小便短少，大便干结，舌红少津，脉细数无力等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00367.label: 津液亏虚证
V010-N00367.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of fluid and humor depletion; Fluid deficiency pattern; fluid-humor deficiency pattern/syndrome

V010-N00367.definition: Characterized by dry mouth, nose, throat and lips, thirst with a desire to drink water, scanty urine and constipation. The tongue is dry and red. The pulse is thready, rapid and weak. Often occurs when bodily fluids fail to nourish the zang–fu organs and tissues.

V010-N00367.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V010-N00367.label: 津液亏虚证
V010-N00367.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by dry mouth and throat, parched or cracked lips, thirst with desire for drink, oliguria, constipation, reddened tongue lacking moisture, and rapid fine weak pulse

V010-N00379.definition: 因寒客血脉，凝滞气机，血行不畅所致。临床以肢体麻木冷痛，局部紫暗、发凉，手足清冷，喜暖、恶寒，得温痛减，或少腹疼痛，月经衍期，痛经，经色紫暗，夹有血块，唇色青紫，舌质暗淡，舌苔白，脉沉迟涩等为特征的证候。

V010-N00379.label: 血寒证
V010-N00379.englishNames: syndrome of cold in blood; blood cold syndrome/pattern
V010-N00379.definition: 寒邪客手血脉，凝滞气机，血行不畅，以肢体麻木冷痛，手足清冷，喜暖恶寒，唇舌青紫，妇女月经后期，痛经，经色紫暗夹块，苔白滑，脉沉迟涩等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00379.label: 血寒证
V010-N00379.path: 病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病
V010-N00379.definition: 寒邪客于血脉，凝滞气机，血行不畅，以恶寒，肢体麻木、冷痛，手足清冷，得热痛减，唇舌青紫，妇女月经后期、痛经、经色紫暗夹块，苔白滑，脉沉迟涩等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00379.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00379.definition: Characterized by pain in the hands/feet with a dark purple colour and cold sensation, the pain alleviates with warmth and aggravates with cold. Alternatively, lower abdominal pain, cold limbs and delayed period with a dark purple menstrual colour and clots may be present. The tongue is pale dark with a white coating. The pulse is deep, slow and hesitant. Often occurs when cold causes the qi and blood to stagnate.

V010-N00381.label: 血燥证
V010-N00381.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood dryness; Blood dryness pattern
V010-N00381.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类

V010-N00381.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood dryness; Blood dryness pattern
V010-N00381.pinyinNames: xue zao zheng; xuè zào zhèng
V010-N00381.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00381.definition: Characterized by flaking of grey-white dandruff and dry scalp. Often results from blood/fluid deficiency, spleen deficiency or heat-damaging yin.

V010-N00382.definition: 泛指因气血痹阻或停滞，致使肌腠、筋骨、经络、脏腑官窍等功能失常所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00382.definition: 瘀血内阻，血行不畅，以局部出现青紫肿块、疼痛拒按，或心、肝、脑等主要脏器瘀血阻络，功能障碍；或腹内肿块、刺痛不移、拒按；或出血紫暗成块，舌紫暗，脉弦涩等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00382.label: 瘀血内结证
V010-N00382.aliases: 瘀结证； 瘀血内阻证
V010-N00382.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of internal binding of blood stasis
V010-N00382.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血瘀证

V010-N00382.label: 瘀血阻滞证
V010-N00382.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood stasis obstruction and stagnation
V010-N00382.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜瘀血证类

V010-N00382.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00382.label: 血瘀证
V010-N00382.aliases: 瘀血内阻证； 瘀血阻滞证
V010-N00382.englishNames: Blood stasis pattern; syndrome/pattern of blood stasis; blood stasis pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00382.pinyinNames: xue yu zheng; xuè yū zhèng
V010-N00382.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00382.definition: Characterized by local bluish lumps with tenderness. Alternatively, abdominal masses with stabbing pain in a fixed location or dark purple haemorrhagic spots may be present. The tongue is purple or with ecchymosis. The pulse is wiry and hesitant. Often occurs when stagnant blood obstructs the circulation of blood.

V010-N00382.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00382.label: 血瘀证

V010-N00382.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00382.label: 血瘀证
V010-N00382.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by formation of visible painful and tender purple mass, or abdominal mass with stabbing pain and tenderness, or bleeding of dark purple blood with clots, dark purple tongue, and fine choppy or irregular pulse

V010-N00383.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00383.label: 血虚证
V010-N00383.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood deficiency; Blood deficiency pattern; blood deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00383.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类
V010-N00383.definition: 泛指因各种原因导致血虚失养，或阴血不足，外邪侵袭，或兼夹风、寒、湿、热、痰、瘀等内生邪实所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00383.label: 血虚证
V010-N00383.englishNames: blood deficiency syndrome/pattern; syndrome of blood deficiency
V010-N00383.definition: 血液亏虚，失于荣养，以面色淡白或萎黄，唇、甲淡白，头晕眼花，心悸多梦，手足发麻，妇女经少经闭，舌淡，脉细等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00383.label: 血虚证
V010-N00383.path: 病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病
V010-N00383.definition: 血液亏虚，脏腑、经络、形体失养，以面色淡白或萎黄，唇舌爪甲色淡，头晕眼花，心悸多梦，手足发麻，妇女月经量少、色淡、衍期或经闭，脉细等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00383.label: 血虚证
V010-N00383.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood deficiency; Blood deficiency pattern; blood deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00383.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类

V010-N00383.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00383.label: 血虚证
V010-N00383.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood deficiency; Blood deficiency pattern; blood deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00383.pinyinNames: xue xu zheng; xuè xū zhèng
V010-N00383.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00383.definition: Characterized by a pale or sallow complexion, pale lips, tongue and fingernails, dizziness, blurred vision, palpitations, dream-disturbed sleep, hands/feet numbness, scanty menstruation with a pale menstrual colour, and delayed period or amenorrhea. The pulse is thready. Often occurs when blood fails to nourish the zang–fu organs, meridians and other body tissues.

V010-N00383.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00383.label: 血虚证

V010-N00383.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00383.label: 血虚证
V010-N00383.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by pale or sallow complexion, pale lips and nails, dizziness, dimmed vision, palpitations, numbness of extremities and fine pulse

V010-N00499.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00499.label: 元阳亏虚证
V010-N00499.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阳证类｜阳虚证｜阳气亏虚证
V010-N00499.definition: 因先天禀赋虚薄，或久病、重病伤损元阳所致。临床以遗精、早泄，或精少不育，闭经、不孕，或头眩、晕仆，动辄心悸、怔忡，或五更泄泻，完谷不化，小便频数、清长，舌质淡胖，舌苔白，脉沉迟，尺部弱，伴见精神萎靡，面色？白，形寒、畏冷，四肢不温，腰膝酸软，齿浮、齿摇等为特征的证候。

V010-N00499.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00499.label: 肾阳虚证
V010-N00499.aliases: 肾阳亏虚证； 肾阳虚损证； 肾虚寒证； 元阳亏虚证； 元阳虚衰证； 命门火衰证
V010-N00499.englishNames: Kidney yang deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of kidney yang deficiency; kidney yang deficiency pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00499.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证
V010-N00499.definition: 因秉质阳虚，或外感、内伤致使肾阳亏虚，机体失却温煦所致。临床以神疲、欲寐，畏寒、肢冷，腰膝以下尤甚，面色？白或黧黑，小便清长，夜尿频数，舌质淡或胖，舌苔白，脉沉弱，尺部无力，或伴见性欲衰减，阳痿、早泄，小便白浊，心悸、喘促，浮肿，五更泄泻，白带清稀量多，小腹或阴部有冷感，崩漏不止等为特征的证候。

V010-N00499.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00499.label: 命门火衰证
V010-N00499.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of life gate fire decline
V010-N00499.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证｜肾阳虚证
V010-N00499.definition: 因禀赋虚薄，元阳虚衰，温煦推动失职所致。临床以形寒、畏冷，冷彻骨髓，神倦、蜷卧，小便清长，夜尿频多，舌质淡，舌苔白，脉沉弱或迟，尺部尤甚，或伴见五更泄泻，遗尿淋浊，阳痿不举，精液清冷或无精子，性欲淡漠，不孕、不育等为特征的证候。

V010-N00499.label: 命门火衰证
V010-N00499.englishNames: syndrome of decline of vital gate fire
V010-N00499.definition: 元阳虚衰，温煦推动失职，以畏寒蜷卧，四肢逆冷，小便清长，夜尿频多，或五更泄泻，男子阳痿、早泄，女子性欲减退、宫寒不孕，舌淡，苔白，脉沉弱尺部尤甚等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00499.label: 肾阳虚证
V010-N00499.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of kidney yang
V010-N00499.definition: 肾阳亏虚，机体失却温煦，以畏寒肢冷，腰以下为甚，面色(白光)白或黧黑，神疲乏力，小便清长，夜尿多，舌淡苔白，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00499.label: 肾阳虚证
V010-N00499.aliases: 命门火衰证； 肾阳不足证； 肾阳亏虚证； 肾阳衰惫证； 肾阳衰微证； 肾阳虚衰证； 肾阳虚损证； 下元虚寒证； 元阳虚衰证； 真阳不足证
V010-N00499.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of kidney yang
V010-N00499.path: 病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候｜阳虚证
V010-N00499.definition: 肾阳亏虚，机体失却温煦，以畏寒肢冷，腰膝以下尤甚，面色？白或黧黑，小便清长，夜尿多，舌淡苔白，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00499.label: 元阳亏虚证
V010-N00499.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阳证类｜阳虚证｜阳气亏虚证

V010-N00499.label: 肾阳虚证
V010-N00499.aliases: 肾阳亏虚证； 肾阳虚损证； 肾虚寒证； 元阳亏虚证； 元阳虚衰证； 命门火衰证
V010-N00499.englishNames: Kidney yang deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of kidney yang deficiency; kidney yang deficiency pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00499.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证

V010-N00499.label: 命门火衰证
V010-N00499.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of life gate fire decline
V010-N00499.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证｜肾阳虚证

V010-N00499.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00499.label: 肾阳虚证
V010-N00499.aliases: Kidney yang deficiency with water flooding pattern； Kidney yang deficiency with water retention pattern； Life-gate fire depletion pattern； Primordial yang deficiency pattern； 肾阳亏虚证； 肾阳虚损证； 肾虚寒证； 元阳亏虚证； 元阳虚衰证； 命门火衰证
V010-N00499.englishNames: Kidney yang deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of kidney yang deficiency; kidney yang deficiency pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00499.pinyinNames: shèn yáng xū zhèng; shen yang xu zheng
V010-N00499.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00499.definition: Characterized by cold intolerance, cold limbs (especially below the lower back and knee joints), a bright, pale or dark complexion, profuse, clear urine and frequent urination at night. The tongue is pale. The pulse is weak. This pattern often occurs when kidney yang fails to warm the body.

V010-N00499.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00499.label: 肾阳虚证

V010-N00512.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00512.label: 寒湿困脾证
V010-N00512.aliases: 湿困脾阳证； 寒湿偏胜，中阳被困证； 寒湿蕴脾证
V010-N00512.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of cold-dampness encumbering the spleen; syndrome/pattern of cold and dampness encumbering the spleen; Cold-dampness encumbering the spleen system pattern
V010-N00512.path: 病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒湿证｜寒湿内侵证
V010-N00512.definition: 因寒湿或阴寒内蕴，困阻脾阳所致。临床以脘闷、腹胀，口腻、不渴，食少、纳呆，肠鸣作泻，或肢体浮肿，或身目发黄而晦暗，或白带量多，舌质淡胖，舌苔白腻，脉濡缓等为特征的证候。

V010-N00512.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00512.label: 湿困脾阳证
V010-N00512.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness encumbering spleen yang
V010-N00512.path: 病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜湿邪证｜湿邪内蕴证
V010-N00512.definition: 因水湿内蕴，困阻脾阳，或久病脾虚，寒湿困阻所致。临床以全身浮肿，面色？白，甚则腹大如鼓，按之如囊裹水，或大便水泻，肠鸣、腹痛，或白带清稀、量多，舌质胖嫩，边有齿痕，舌苔白滑，脉濡缓或沉细无力，可伴见脘闷、腹胀，口腻，口淡乏味等为特征的证候。

V010-N00512.label: 寒湿困脾证
V010-N00512.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold-dampness disturbing spleen; syndrome of colddampness disturbing spleen
V010-N00512.definition: 寒湿内盛，困阻脾阳，以脘腹胀闷，纳呆呕恶，口淡不渴，腹痛便溏，头身困重，身目发黄而晦暗，或妇女白带量多，舌淡胖，苔白腻，脉濡缓等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00512.label: 寒湿困脾证
V010-N00512.aliases: 湿困脾阳证； 水湿困脾证
V010-N00512.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脾和胃证候｜脾系证候
V010-N00512.definition: 寒湿内盛，困阻脾阳，以脘腹胀闷，口腻纳呆，泛恶欲呕，口淡不渴，腹痛便溏，头身困重，或身目发黄而晦暗，或白带量多，体胖，舌淡胖，苔白腻，脉濡缓等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00512.label: 寒湿困脾证
V010-N00512.aliases: 湿困脾阳证； 寒湿偏胜，中阳被困证； 寒湿蕴脾证
V010-N00512.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of cold-dampness encumbering the spleen; syndrome/pattern of cold and dampness encumbering the spleen; Cold-dampness encumbering the spleen system pattern
V010-N00512.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒湿证｜寒湿内侵证

V010-N00512.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness encumbering spleen yang
V010-N00512.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜湿邪证｜湿邪内蕴证

V010-N00512.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00512.label: 寒湿困脾证
V010-N00512.aliases: 湿困脾阳证； 寒湿偏胜，中阳被困证； 寒湿蕴脾证； Cold dampness encumbering the spleen system pattern； Cold dampness accumulating in the spleen pattern
V010-N00512.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of cold-dampness encumbering the spleen; syndrome/pattern of cold and dampness encumbering the spleen; Cold dampness affecting the spleen pattern; Cold-dampness encumbering the spleen system pattern
V010-N00512.pinyinNames: han shi kun pi zheng; hán shī kùn pí zhèng
V010-N00512.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00512.definition: Characterized by abdominal distension/tightness, a greasy taste, a poor appetite, nausea, vomiting, tastelessness, abdominal pain, loose stools, and heaviness of the head and body. Dark yellow eyes/skin, profuse leucorrhoea, and obesity may also be present. The tongue is pale and enlarged with a white, greasy coating. The pulse is soft and delayed. This pattern often occurs when internal cold dampness obstructs spleen yang.

V010-N00512.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00512.label: 寒湿困脾证

V010-N00512.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00512.label: 寒湿困脾证
V010-N00512.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of cold-dampness encumbering the spleen; syndrome of colddampness disturbing spleen
V010-N00512.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by epigastric and abdominal distention, stickiness and tastelessness in the mouth, nausea, loose bowels, heaviness sensation of the head and body, or jaundice with dull yellow discoloration, pale plump tongue with white slimy

V010-N00472.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00472.label: 寒痰阻肺证
V010-N00472.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold phlegm obstructing the lung; Cold phlegm obstructing the lung pattern; pattern/syndrome of cold- phlegm obstructing the lung
V010-N00472.path: 病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒痰证
V010-N00472.definition: 因宿痰内伏，复感寒邪，寒痰交并，壅阻气道，肺失肃降所致。临床以咳喘经年，胸膈胀满，喉间痰鸣，痰白而黏，动辄气急，发则喘促，不得平卧，舌质淡暗或青紫，舌苔白滑或腻，脉弦滑或紧，指纹淡红，伴见形寒、畏冷，四肢欠温等为特征的证候。

V010-N00472.label: 寒痰阻肺证
V010-N00472.englishNames: syndrome of cold-phlegm obstructing lung; syndrome/pattern of cold-phlegm obstructing lung
V010-N00472.definition: 寒痰壅阻于肺，肺失宣降，以咳嗽痰多，色白易咯，胸闷，或见哮喘痰鸣，畏寒肢冷，苔白滑，脉弦紧等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00472.label: 寒痰阻肺证
V010-N00472.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肺和大肠证候｜肺系证候
V010-N00472.definition: 寒痰停聚于肺，以恶寒畏冷，咳嗽气喘，吐白痰量多，苔白滑，脉弦紧等为常见症的证侯。

V010-N00472.label: 寒痰阻肺证
V010-N00472.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold phlegm obstructing the lung; Cold phlegm obstructing the lung pattern; pattern/syndrome of cold- phlegm obstructing the lung
V010-N00472.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒痰证

V010-N00472.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00472.label: 寒痰阻肺证
V010-N00472.aliases: 寒痰停肺证； Cold phlegm obstructing the lung pattern； Retention of cold phlegm in the lung
V010-N00472.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold phlegm obstructing the lung; Cold phlegm obstructing the lung pattern; pattern/syndrome of cold- phlegm obstructing the lung
V010-N00472.pinyinNames: han tan zu fei zheng; hán tán zǔ fèi zhèng
V010-N00472.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00472.definition: Characterized by cough, panting, phlegm sounds in the throat, chest fullness/tightness, white, sticky or thin/clear phlegm, shortness of breath upon physical exertion, an inability to lie flat, cold limbs, and cold intolerance. Fever and aversion to cold may also be present. The tongue coating is white and greasy. The pulse is tense. This pattern often occurs when retained phlegm and external cold affect the descending of lung qi.

V010-N00472.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00472.label: 寒痰阻肺证

V010-N00472.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00472.label: 寒痰阻肺证
V010-N00472.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of cold- phlegm obstructing the lung
V010-N00472.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by cough with profuse phlegm easy to expectorate and a feeling of pressure in the chest, or phlegmatic wheezing, aversion to cold and cold limbs, pale tongue with white slimy or slippery coating, and string-like slippery puls

V010-N00443.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00443.label: 寒滞肝脉证
V010-N00443.aliases: 寒滞肝经证； 肝经实寒证； 肝寒证
V010-N00443.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold stagnation in the liver meridian; Liver meridian cold stagnation pattern; pattern/syndrome of cold stagnating in the liver meridian
V010-N00443.path: 病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证｜寒邪直中证
V010-N00443.definition: 因寒邪偏盛，直中厥阴，或阴寒凝滞肝脉所致。临床以胸胁冷痛如刺，或少腹冷痛，阴器内缩引痛，或巅顶冷痛，或肢端发白，遇寒痛增，得温痛缓，舌苔白，脉弦紧，可伴见呕吐清涎，恶寒，肢冷等为特征的证候。

V010-N00443.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00443.label: 肝寒证
V010-N00443.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类
V010-N00443.definition: 泛指因寒邪直中肝经，或肝气、肝阳虚损等所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00443.label: 寒滞肝脉证
V010-N00443.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold stagnation in liver channel/meridian; syndrome of cold accumulated in liver channel
V010-N00443.definition: 寒邪侵袭，凝滞肝脉，以少腹冷痛，或阴器收缩作痛，或颠顶冷痛，得温痛缓，遇寒痛增，畏寒肢冷，呕吐清诞，舌苔白，脉弦紧等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00443.label: 寒滞肝脉证
V010-N00443.aliases: 肝经实寒证； 肝脉实寒证； 寒滞肝经证
V010-N00443.englishNames: syndrome of cold accumulated in liver channel
V010-N00443.path: 病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候｜寒证
V010-N00443.definition: 寒邪侵袭，凝滞肝经，以少腹冷痛，或阴器收引疼痛，或巅顶疼痛，遇寒痛增，得温痛缓，恶寒肢冷，呕吐清涎，苔白，脉弦紧等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00443.label: 寒滞肝脉证
V010-N00443.aliases: 寒滞肝经证； 肝经实寒证； 肝寒证
V010-N00443.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold stagnation in the liver meridian; Liver meridian cold stagnation pattern; pattern/syndrome of cold stagnating in the liver meridian
V010-N00443.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证｜寒邪直中证

V010-N00443.label: 肝寒证
V010-N00443.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类

V010-N00443.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00443.label: 寒滞肝脉证
V010-N00443.aliases: 寒滞肝经证； Cold stagnation in liver meridian pattern； Liver cold pattern； Liver meridian cold stagnation pattern； Liver meridian excess cold pattern； 肝经实寒证； 肝寒证
V010-N00443.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold stagnation in the liver meridian; Liver meridian cold stagnation pattern; Cold retention in the liver meridian pattern; pattern/syndrome of cold stagnating in the liver meridian
V010-N00443.pinyinNames: han zhi gan mai zheng; hán zhì gān mài zhèng
V010-N00443.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00443.definition: Characterized by pain in the lateral lower abdomen with a cold sensation, aversion to cold and cold limbs. Alternatively, genital pain with contraction or parietal headache may be present, which aggravates with cold and alleviates with warmth. The tongue coating is white. The pulse is wiry and tight. This pattern often occurs when cold remains in the liver meridian.

V010-N00443.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00443.label: 寒滞肝脉证

V010-N00443.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00443.label: 寒滞肝脉证
V010-N00443.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of cold stagnating in the liver meridian
V010-N00443.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by spasmodic symptoms in the area related to the liver meridian, such as stretching pain with cold sensation in the lower abdomen and testicles

V010-N00513.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00513.label: 寒滞肠道证
V010-N00513.englishNames: Intestine cold stagnation pattern; syndrome/pattern of cold stagnation in intestines
V010-N00513.path: 病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证｜寒邪直中证
V010-N00513.definition: 因寒邪偏盛，或阴寒凝聚于肠道所致。临床以大便硬结，排出困难，或夹白冻黏液，腹中冷痛，小便清长，四肢不温，舌质淡，舌苔白，脉沉迟等为特征的证候。

V010-N00513.label: 寒滞肠道证
V010-N00513.englishNames: syndrome of cold accumulated in intestinal
V010-N00513.path: 病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候｜寒证
V010-N00513.definition: 寒邪侵袭肠道，传化失常，以腹部冷痛、痛势急剧、喜温，腹泻清稀，恶寒肢冷，苔白，脉弦紧等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00513.label: 寒滞肠道证
V010-N00513.englishNames: Intestine cold stagnation pattern; syndrome/pattern of cold stagnation in intestines
V010-N00513.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证｜寒邪直中证

V010-N00514.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00514.label: 寒滞胃脘证
V010-N00514.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold stagnation in stomach
V010-N00514.path: 病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证｜寒邪直中证
V010-N00514.definition: 因秉质阳虚，阴寒凝滞于胃所致。临床以胃痛经年，遇寒凉刺激则作，得温热稍缓，口泛清水，甚或恶心、呕吐，吐后痛减，消瘦，舌苔白润，脉弦紧，可伴见口淡，不渴，面白或青，肢冷不温等为特征的证候。

V010-N00514.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00514.label: 寒邪犯胃证
V010-N00514.aliases: 寒邪客胃证； 胃中寒冷证； 寒滞胃脘证； 胃实寒证； 胃寒证
V010-N00514.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of pathogenic cold invading the stomach; Cold invading the stomach system pattern
V010-N00514.path: 病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证｜寒邪直中证
V010-N00514.definition: 因寒邪偏盛，直中胃经，或贪凉饮冷，胃系痉挛所致。临床以突发胃脘冷痛，甚或痉挛、绞痛，冷汗出，面色苍白，时作时止，遇寒加重，得温稍舒，舌苔白，脉弦紧或迟，可伴见泛恶，呕吐清水，形寒、肢冷等为特征的证候。

V010-N00514.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00514.label: 胃寒证
V010-N00514.englishNames: stomach cold pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of stomach cold
V010-N00514.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类
V010-N00514.definition: 因寒客胃脘，或饮食生冷，阴寒偏盛，胃失和降，或胃寒虫窜等所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00514.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00514.label: 胃实寒证
V010-N00514.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of stomach excess-cold; stomach excess cold pattern/syndrome
V010-N00514.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃寒证
V010-N00514.definition: 因寒邪客胃，或饮食生冷，阴寒凝胃，胃失和降所致。临床以胃脘冷痛，时作时止，甚则绞痛，呕吐清水，遇寒则甚，得热则舒，舌苔白，脉弦紧或迟缓等为特征的证候。

V010-N00514.label: 寒邪犯胃证
V010-N00514.englishNames: syndrome of cold pathogen attacking stomach
V010-N00514.definition: 寒邪侵袭胃脘，胃失和降，以胃脘冷痛，痛势急剧，喜温，呕吐清水，恶寒肢冷，苔白，脉弦紧等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00514.label: 寒邪犯胃证
V010-N00514.aliases: 寒邪客胃证； 寒滞胃脘证； 胃寒证； 胃实寒证； 胃中寒冷证
V010-N00514.englishNames: syndrome of cold pathogen attacking stomach
V010-N00514.path: 病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候｜寒证
V010-N00514.definition: 寒邪侵袭胃脘，胃失和降，以胃脘冷痛、痛势急剧、喜温，呕吐清水，恶寒肢冷，苔白，脉弦紧等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00514.label: 寒滞胃脘证
V010-N00514.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold stagnation in stomach
V010-N00514.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证｜寒邪直中证

V010-N00514.label: 寒邪犯胃证
V010-N00514.aliases: 寒邪客胃证； 胃中寒冷证； 寒滞胃脘证； 胃实寒证； 胃寒证
V010-N00514.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of pathogenic cold invading the stomach; Cold invading the stomach system pattern
V010-N00514.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证｜寒邪直中证

V010-N00514.label: 胃寒证
V010-N00514.englishNames: stomach cold pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of stomach cold
V010-N00514.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类

V010-N00514.label: 胃实寒证
V010-N00514.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of stomach excess-cold; stomach excess cold pattern/syndrome
V010-N00514.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃寒证

V010-N00514.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00514.label: 寒邪犯胃证
V010-N00514.aliases: 寒邪客胃证； 胃中寒冷证； 寒滞胃脘证； 胃实寒证； 胃寒证
V010-N00514.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of pathogenic cold invading the stomach; Cold invading the stomach system pattern; Cold attacking the stomach pattern
V010-N00514.pinyinNames: han xie fan wei zheng; hán xié fàn wèi zhèng
V010-N00514.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00514.definition: Characterized by cold, intense stomach ache that alleviates upon warmth, vomiting of clear saliva, aversion to cold, and cold limbs. The tongue coating is white. The pulse is wiry. This pattern often occurs when cold affects the descending of stomach qi.

V010-N00514.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00514.label: 胃实寒证
V010-N00514.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising when the stomach is attacked by pathogenic cold, usually manifested by acute severe epigastric pain with cold sensation, vomiting of watery fluid, aversion to cold with cold limbs and white tongue coating

V010-N00514.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00514.label: 胃寒证
V010-N00514.definition: a pattern/syndrome of stomach cold, either of excess type or of deficiency type

V010-N00490.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00490.label: 寒滞胞宫证
V010-N00490.aliases: 寒滞胞中证； 胞宫寒滞证
V010-N00490.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold stagnation in the uterus
V010-N00490.path: 病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证｜寒邪直中证
V010-N00490.definition: 因寒邪偏盛，直中胞脉，或阴寒凝滞胞宫所致。临床以痛经，小腹冷痛，得温热痛减，或月经后期，经血紫暗，或带下清稀，色白量多，或不孕，舌苔白，脉沉紧，或伴见畏寒、肢冷等为特征的证候。

V010-N00490.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00490.label: 胞宫寒凝证
V010-N00490.aliases: 寒凝胞宫证； 寒凝胞中证； 寒凝胞中，寒湿凝滞证
V010-N00490.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold congealing in the uterus
V010-N00490.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜胞宫证类
V010-N00490.definition: 因阳气虚损，阴寒凝滞于胞宫所致。临床以痛经，喜温、喜按，或月经后期，经色紫暗，或久婚不孕，或带下清稀，色白量多，舌质淡或胖，舌苔白，脉沉紧或弦，伴见小腹冷痛、坠痛，畏寒、肢冷等为特征的证候。

V010-N00490.label: 寒凝胞宫证
V010-N00490.aliases: 胞宫寒滞证； 寒滞胞宫证
V010-N00490.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold congealing in uterus
V010-N00490.path: 病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜寒热证候｜寒证｜寒凝证
V010-N00490.definition: 寒邪凝滞胞宫，以小腹冷痛，或痛经，喜温，或月经后期、色紫暗，或带下清稀色白，苔白，脉沉紧等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00490.label: 寒滞胞宫证
V010-N00490.aliases: 寒滞胞中证； 胞宫寒滞证
V010-N00490.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold stagnation in the uterus
V010-N00490.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证｜寒邪直中证

V010-N00490.label: 胞宫寒凝证
V010-N00490.aliases: 寒凝胞宫证； 寒凝胞中证； 寒凝胞中，寒湿凝滞证
V010-N00490.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold congealing in the uterus
V010-N00490.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜胞宫证类

V010-N00490.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00490.label: 寒凝胞宫证
V010-N00490.aliases: 胞宫寒滞证； 寒滞胞宫证； Cold congealment in the uterus pattern； Cold stagnation in the uterus pattern
V010-N00490.englishNames: Cold stagnation in the uterus pattern; Cold retention in the uterus pattern
V010-N00490.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00490.definition: Characterized by lower abdominal pain with a cold sensation that alleviates upon warmth. Dysmenorrhoea, delayed period with dark purple colour, white, thin and clear vaginal discharge and infertility may also be present. The tongue coating is white. The pulse is deep and tight. This pattern often occurs when cold remains in the uterus.

V010-N00490.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00490.label: 寒凝胞宫证
V010-N00490.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of cold congealing in the uterus; syndrome/pattern of cold congealing in uterus

V010-N00490.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00490.label: 寒凝胞宫证
V010-N00490.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of cold congealing in the uterus
V010-N00490.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by cold and pain in the lower abdomen, dysmenorrhea or delayed periods with dark menstrual discharge, white tongue coating and sunken tight pulse

V010-N00436.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00436.label: 忧郁伤神证
V010-N00436.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of excessive anxiety and depression damaging spirit
V010-N00436.path: 病因证候类术语｜情志证类｜忧思气郁证
V010-N00436.definition: 因过度忧郁，损伤神气，或神不守舍所致。临床以情绪低落，神志恍惚，呵欠频作，独处不语，悲忧善哭，心悸，失眠，多梦、易醒，甚则彻夜不寐，哭笑无常，神情淡漠，疲乏、无力，舌质红，舌苔薄，脉弦细，可伴见心胸烦闷，注意力下降，甚或出现幻视、幻听，梦游、夜游等为特征的证候。

V010-N00436.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00436.label: 忧伤神气证
V010-N00436.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of anxiety damaging spirit; Anxiety damaging the spirit pattern
V010-N00436.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心神不宁证
V010-N00436.definition: 因忧虑过度，损伤神气所致。临床以情志抑郁，表情淡漠，不欲饮食，舌质淡暗，舌苔白，脉弦，伴见失眠、多梦，头晕，神疲等为特征的证候。

V010-N00436.label: 忧伤神气证
V010-N00436.englishNames: Syndrome of Sorrow Injure Mental Energy
V010-N00436.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜心和小肠证候｜心系证候
V010-N00436.definition: 忧虑过度，损伤神气，以情志抑郁，表情淡漠，失眠多梦，头晕神疲，不欲饮食，脉弦等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00436.label: 忧郁伤神证
V010-N00436.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of excessive anxiety and depression damaging spirit
V010-N00436.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜情志证类｜忧思气郁证

V010-N00436.label: 忧伤神气证
V010-N00436.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of anxiety damaging spirit; Anxiety damaging the spirit pattern
V010-N00436.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心神不宁证

V010-N00436.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00436.label: 情志郁结证
V010-N00436.aliases: 忧伤神气证； Excessive worry damaging spirit qi pattern
V010-N00436.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of emotional stagnation; Emotional stagnation pattern
V010-N00436.pinyinNames: qing zhi yu jie zheng; qíng zhì yù jié zhèng
V010-N00436.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00436.definition: Characterized by depression, apathetic facial expression, insomnia, dream-disturbed sleep, dizziness, lassitude, and a poor appetite. The pulse is wiry. Often occurs when excessive worry damages the mind.

V010-N00515.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00515.label: 思虑伤脾证
V010-N00515.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of excessive contemplation damaging the spleen
V010-N00515.path: 病因证候类术语｜情志证类｜忧思气郁证
V010-N00515.definition: 因劳神过度，或思虑难解，脾郁失运所致。临床以多思、善疑，头晕、神疲，难以恢复，少食、纳呆，甚或厌食，腹胀、便溏，舌质淡，舌苔薄白，脉细缓无力，或伴见惊悸，失眠，健忘等为特征的证候。

V010-N00515.label: 思伤脾气证
V010-N00515.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脾和胃证候｜脾系证候
V010-N00515.definition: 思虑太过，脾气郁滞，以神情呆滞，不思饮食，胸胁脘腹作胀，喜叹息，大便不爽，脉弦等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00515.label: 思虑伤脾证
V010-N00515.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of excessive contemplation damaging the spleen
V010-N00515.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜情志证类｜忧思气郁证

V010-N00515.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00515.label: 思虑伤脾证
V010-N00515.aliases: 思伤心脾证； 思伤脾气证； Anxiety damaging the spleen system pattern； Overthinking damaging spleen qi
V010-N00515.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of excessive contemplation damaging the spleen; Worry damaging the spleen pattern
V010-N00515.pinyinNames: si lv shang pi zheng; sī lǜ shāng pí zhèng
V010-N00515.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00515.definition: Characterized by worries, suspiciousness, dizziness, lassitude, palpitations, timidity, insomnia, forgetfulness, a poor appetite, and a lustreless complexion. The tongue is pale with a thin, white coating. The pulse is thready. This pattern often results from qi stagnation due to thinking too much, mental over-exertion or emotional disturbance.

V010-N00491.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00491.label: 惊恐伤肾证
V010-N00491.aliases: 恐惧伤肾证； 恐伤肾气证
V010-N00491.englishNames: Fear damaging the kidney system pattern; syndrome/pattern of sudden fright and terror damaging the kidney
V010-N00491.path: 病因证候类术语｜情志证类｜惊恐证
V010-N00491.definition: 因秉质怯弱，遭受惊吓，气泄于下，肾气不固所致。临床以骤然惊吓，二便失禁，惊惶不定，易惊、多疑，胆怯，时作恶梦，面色苍白，舌质淡红，脉沉伏或疾数，指纹青紫，可伴见阳痿、滑精等为特征的证候。

V010-N00491.label: 惊恐伤肾证
V010-N00491.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肾和膀胱证候｜肾系证候
V010-N00491.definition: 大惊大恐损伤肾气，以惊慌不定，阳痿，滑精，或二便失禁等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00491.label: 惊恐伤肾证
V010-N00491.aliases: 恐惧伤肾证； 恐伤肾气证
V010-N00491.englishNames: Fear damaging the kidney system pattern; syndrome/pattern of sudden fright and terror damaging the kidney
V010-N00491.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜情志证类｜惊恐证

V010-N00491.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00491.label: 惊恐伤肾证
V010-N00491.aliases: 恐惧伤肾证； 恐伤肾气证
V010-N00491.englishNames: Fear damaging the kidney system pattern; syndrome/pattern of sudden fright and terror damaging the kidney; Fear/fright damaging the kidney pattern
V010-N00491.pinyinNames: jing kong shang shen zheng; jīng kǒng shāng shèn zhèng
V010-N00491.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00491.definition: Characterized by panic, impotence, nocturnal emissions, timidity, paranoia, and bladder/bowel incontinence. Often occurs when severe fear or fright damages kidney qi.

V010-N00366.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00366.label: 水毒证
V010-N00366.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of water toxin; Fluid disturbance pattern
V010-N00366.path: 病因证候类术语｜毒证类
V010-N00366.definition: 泛指因水湿秽毒蕴积，湿毒郁闭三焦，或上凌心肺等引起的一类证候。

V010-N00366.label: 水毒证
V010-N00366.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of water toxin; Fluid disturbance pattern
V010-N00366.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜毒证类

V010-N00302.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00302.label: 火毒入营血证
V010-N00302.aliases: 热毒入营血证； 火毒炽盛，热入营血证
V010-N00302.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of fire toxin in the nutrient and blood
V010-N00302.pinyinNames: huo dong ru ying xue zheng
V010-N00302.path: 病因证候类术语｜毒证类｜火毒证｜火毒内攻证
V010-N00302.definition: 因火毒炽盛，热入营血所致。临床以壮热、烦渴，目赤肿痛，神昏、谵语，或衄血，血色暗红，或全身泛发红斑、疱疹、糜烂、溃脓、结痂，或口腔、阴部等局部溃疡、糜烂，舌质红绛，舌苔黄，脉滑数，可伴见恶心、呕吐，关节疼痛，大便秘结，小便黄赤等为特征的证候。

V010-N00302.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00302.label: 热入营血证
V010-N00302.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heat entering the nutrient and blood phases; Heat entering the nutrient and blood phase pattern; pattern/syndrome of heat entering nutrient-blood aspects
V010-N00302.path: 病因证候类术语｜火证类｜火热证｜热在营血证
V010-N00302.definition: 因温热邪毒炽盛，邪入或内陷营血所致。临床以身热夜甚，心烦、不寐，咽干、唇燥，烦躁，神昏、谵语，舌质绛，舌苔少或无苔，脉细数，指纹紫黑，可伴见斑疹紫红或黑，咳血或呕血、衄血、尿血等为特征的证候。

V010-N00302.label: 热入营血证
V010-N00302.path: 病证｜证候｜卫气营血证候｜卫气营血兼证
V010-N00302.definition: 温热病邪深入营血分，伤耗阴血，扰乱心神，以身热夜甚，心烦不寐，或神昏，渴不多饮，斑疹隐隐，或出血，便结尿黄，舌绛，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00302.label: 火毒入营血证
V010-N00302.aliases: 热毒入营血证； 火毒炽盛，热入营血证
V010-N00302.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of fire toxin in the nutrient and blood
V010-N00302.pinyinNames: huo dong ru ying xue zheng
V010-N00302.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜毒证类｜火毒证｜火毒内攻证

V010-N00302.label: 热入营血证
V010-N00302.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heat entering the nutrient and blood phases; Heat entering the nutrient and blood phase pattern; pattern/syndrome of heat entering nutrient-blood aspects
V010-N00302.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜火证类｜火热证｜热在营血证

V010-N00302.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00302.label: 热入营血证
V010-N00302.aliases: 热灼营血证； Heat entering the nutrient and blood phase pattern
V010-N00302.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heat entering the nutrient and blood phases; Heat entering the nutrient and blood phase pattern; pattern/syndrome of heat entering nutrient-blood aspects; Heat entering the Ying nutrients and blood phases pattern
V010-N00302.pinyinNames: re ru ying xue zheng; rè rù yíng xuè zhèng
V010-N00302.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00302.definition: Characterized by fever that aggravates at night, restlessness and insomnia. Alternatively, unconsciousness, thirst with little water intake, maculae, bleeding, constipation and yellow urine may be present. The tongue is deep red. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when pathogenic warm/heat consumes yin blood and disturbs the heart mind.

V010-N00302.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00302.label: 热入营血证

V010-N00302.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00302.label: 热入营血证
V010-N00302.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of heat entering nutrient-blood aspects
V010-N00302.path: 诊断学｜卫气营血辨证类
V010-N00302.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by fever higher at night, vexing insomnia or impaired consciousness, barely visible skin rashes or bleeding, constipation, crimson tongue and rapid fine pulse

V010-N00438.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00438.label: 水气凌心证
V010-N00438.aliases: 肾水凌心证； 心肾阳虚水泛证
V010-N00438.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of water qi intimidating the heart; pattern/syndrome of water qi intimidating the heart; Water qi intimidating the heart system pattern
V010-N00438.path: 病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜水气证｜水气上凌证
V010-N00438.definition: 因水湿凝聚，上凌冲心所致。临床以心悸、怔忡，胸膺憋闷，不得平卧，肢体浮肿，按之没指，小便短少，舌质淡胖，舌苔白滑，脉沉迟或细促结代，可伴见唇甲青紫，畏冷、肢凉，乏力等为特征的证候。

V010-N00438.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00438.label: 肾水凌心证
V010-N00438.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of kidney water attacking the heart
V010-N00438.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肾脏兼证类
V010-N00438.definition: 因肾阳虚，阳不制阴，水气上凌，心阳被遏所致。临床以心悸、怔忡，气上撞心，或欲作奔豚状，胸闷、气短，下肢浮肿，小便短少，舌质淡胖，或舌质暗、青紫，舌苔白滑，脉细数无力，或沉弦，可伴见咳唾痰白，或血色泡沫痰，不得平卧?畏冷、肢凉等为特征的证候。

V010-N00438.label: 水气凌心证
V010-N00438.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of water pathogen attacking heart; syndrome of water pathogen attacking heaft
V010-N00438.definition: 阳虚水气不化，水液泛滥，上凌于心，以心悸怔忡，畏寒肢冷，肢体浮肿，下肢尤甚，气喘不能平卧，咳嗽吐稀白痰，舌淡胖，苔白滑，脉沉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00438.label: 水气凌心证
V010-N00438.aliases: 肾水凌心证； 心肾阳虚水泛证
V010-N00438.englishNames: syndrome of water pathogen attacking heaft
V010-N00438.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脏腑兼证
V010-N00438.definition: 心与肾的阳气亏虚，水液泛滥，以畏冷肢凉，肢体浮肿，下肢尤甚，心悸，气喘不能平卧，咳嗽吐稀白痰，舌淡胖，苔白滑，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00438.label: 水气凌心证
V010-N00438.aliases: 肾水凌心证； 心肾阳虚水泛证
V010-N00438.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of water qi intimidating the heart; pattern/syndrome of water qi intimidating the heart; Water qi intimidating the heart system pattern
V010-N00438.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜水气证｜水气上凌证

V010-N00438.label: 肾水凌心证
V010-N00438.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of kidney water attacking the heart
V010-N00438.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肾脏兼证类

V010-N00438.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00438.label: 水气凌心证
V010-N00438.aliases: 肾水凌心证； 心肾阳虚水泛证
V010-N00438.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of water qi intimidating the heart; pattern/syndrome of water qi intimidating the heart; Water retention affecting the heart pattern; Water qi intimidating the heart system pattern
V010-N00438.pinyinNames: shui qi ling xin zheng; shuǐ qì líng xīn zhèng
V010-N00438.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00438.definition: Characterized by cold intolerance, cold limbs, leg oedema, palpitations, an inability to lie flat, and cough with thin, white sputum. The tongue is pale and enlarged with a white, slippery coating. The pulse is weak. This pattern often occurs when water retention (due to yang qi deficiency of the heart and kidney) affects the heart.

V010-N00438.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V010-N00438.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of water qi intimidating the heart
V010-N00438.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising when deficiency of yang qi of the heart and the kidney results in water flooding, marked by palpitations and shortness of breath associated with general edema, especially in the legs, short voidings of scanty clear urine, as

V010-N00296.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00296.label: 湿阻气分证
V010-N00296.aliases: 湿阻证； 湿邪阻滞证
V010-N00296.englishNames: Dampness obstructing the qi phase pattern; syndrome/pattern of dampness obstruction in qi phase
V010-N00296.path: 病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜湿邪证｜湿邪外感证
V010-N00296.definition: 因湿邪困阻气分所致。临床以身热，汗出不减，胸脘痞闷，恶心欲呕，大便黏滞不爽，口渴、不欲多饮，舌质或红，舌苔微黄而腻，脉濡数，可伴见腹泻，身重、体倦，白？隐现等为特征的证候。

V010-N00296.label: 湿阻证
V010-N00296.definition: 湿浊之邪困阻气机，以头重肢困，关节、肌肉酸痛沉重，胸闷院痞，纳呆腹胀，大便溏泻，苔滑腻，脉濡缓等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00296.label: 湿阻气分证
V010-N00296.aliases: 湿阻证； 湿邪阻滞证
V010-N00296.englishNames: Dampness obstructing the qi phase pattern; syndrome/pattern of dampness obstruction in qi phase
V010-N00296.path: 病证｜证候｜卫气营血证候｜气分证

V010-N00296.label: 湿浊困阻证
V010-N00296.aliases: 湿邪困阻证； 湿邪阻滞证； 湿浊内蕴证； 湿阻证
V010-N00296.path: 病证｜证候｜病因证候｜外感证｜湿淫证
V010-N00296.definition: 湿浊邪气阻滞气机，以身体重困，关节、肌肉酸痛，屈伸不利，腹胀腹泻，食欲不振，苔滑脉濡等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00296.label: 湿浊困阻证
V010-N00296.aliases: 阳虚浊聚证； 湿邪阻滞证； 湿阻证
V010-N00296.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness-turbidity encumbrance and obstruction
V010-N00296.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜湿浊证

V010-N00296.label: 湿阻气分证
V010-N00296.aliases: 湿阻证； 湿邪阻滞证
V010-N00296.englishNames: Dampness obstructing the qi phase pattern; syndrome/pattern of dampness obstruction in qi phase
V010-N00296.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜湿邪证｜湿邪外感证

V010-N00296.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00296.label: 湿阻气分证
V010-N00296.aliases: 湿阻证； 湿邪阻滞证； Dampness obstructing the qi phase pattern
V010-N00296.englishNames: Dampness obstructing the qi phase pattern; syndrome/pattern of dampness obstruction in qi phase; Dampness obstructing the qi phase
V010-N00296.pinyinNames: shi zu qi fen zheng; shī zǔ qì fèn zhèng
V010-N00296.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00296.definition: Characterized by fever that cannot be resolved by sweating, thirst with no desire to drink water, chest or gastric discomfort, nausea, vomiting, and a sensation of incomplete evacuation after bowel movements. Associated symptoms may include diarrhoea, body heaviness and fatigue. The tongue is red with a slightly yellow, slippery and greasy coating. The pulse is soft and rapid. This pattern often occurs when dampness affects the qi phase.

V010-N00502.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00502.label: 湿热蕴胞证
V010-N00502.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat accumulation in the uterus
V010-N00502.path: 病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜湿热证｜湿热内侵证｜湿热下注证
V010-N00502.definition: 因湿热下注，蕴结胞宫所致。临床以白带色黄、腥臭、量多，或阴部瘙痒、糜烂，舌质红，舌苔黄腻，脉滑数，可伴见少腹隐痛，月经先期等为特征的证候。

V010-N00502.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00502.label: 胞宫湿热证
V010-N00502.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of uterine dampness and heat; Dampness-heat in the uterus pattern
V010-N00502.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜胞宫证类
V010-N00502.definition: 因湿热侵袭，蕴结胞宫所致。临床以带下量多、色黄、黏稠、秽臭，阴部瘙痒、糜烂，舌质红，舌苔黄腻，脉滑数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00502.label: 胞宫湿热证
V010-N00502.englishNames: uterus dampness-heat syndrome/pattern; uterine dampnessheat pattern/ syndrome; syndrome of dampnessheat in uterus; syndrome of dampnessheat in womb
V010-N00502.definition: 湿热侵袭，蕴结胞宫，以带下量多、色黄，黏稠秽臭，阴部瘙痒、糜烂，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00502.label: 胞宫湿热证
V010-N00502.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肾和膀胱证候｜肾系证候
V010-N00502.definition: 湿热侵袭，蕴结胞宫，以带下量多、色黄、粘稠秽臭，阴部瘙痒、糜烂，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00502.label: 湿热蕴胞证
V010-N00502.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat accumulation in the uterus
V010-N00502.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜湿热证｜湿热内侵证｜湿热下注证

V010-N00502.label: 胞宫湿热证
V010-N00502.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of uterine dampness and heat; Dampness-heat in the uterus pattern
V010-N00502.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜胞宫证类

V010-N00502.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00502.label: 胞宫湿热证
V010-N00502.aliases: Dampness heat in the uterus pattern； 湿热蕴胞证
V010-N00502.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of uterine dampness and heat; Damp heat in the uterus pattern; Dampness-heat in the uterus pattern
V010-N00502.pinyinNames: bao gong shi re zheng; bāo gōng shī rè zhèng
V010-N00502.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00502.definition: Characterized by profuse, yellow, sticky and smelly vaginal discharge, and itching and ulceration of the vulva. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when damp heat remains in the uterus.

V010-N00502.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00502.label: 胞宫湿热证
V010-N00502.englishNames: uterine dampnessheat pattern/ syndrome; uterus dampness-heat syndrome/pattern

V010-N00502.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00502.label: 胞宫湿热证
V010-N00502.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by large amount of yellowish leukorrhea, thick, fetid, associated with pudental itching and erosion, reddened tongue with yellow slimy coating and rapid slippery pulse

V010-N00517.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00517.label: 湿热困脾证
V010-N00517.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of damp-heat encumbering the  spleen; syndrome/pattern of damp-heat encumbering the spleen
V010-N00517.path: 病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜湿热证｜湿热内侵证｜湿热中阻证
V010-N00517.definition: 因湿热内蕴，困滞中气，脾失健运所致。临床以脘腹痞胀，食后加重，纳呆、食少，口中黏腻，大便黏滞或清，肢体困重或浮肿，或面目发黄，带下量多、色黄，气味腥臭，舌质偏红，舌苔黄腻，脉滑数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00517.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00517.label: 脾经湿热证
V010-N00517.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the spleen meridian
V010-N00517.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾经证
V010-N00517.definition: 因湿热时邪或疫毒蕴结脾经所致。临床以身热不扬，汗出不彻，胸腹等处白？显现，或脘腹痞满，恶心、呕吐，肢体困重，大便溏泄，尿少色黄，或面目肌肤黄染，皮肤瘙痒，舌质红，舌苔黄腻，脉濡数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00517.label: 湿热蕴脾证
V010-N00517.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness-heat accumulation in spleen; syndrome of dampnessheat stagnating in spleen
V010-N00517.definition: 湿热内蕴，脾失健运，以腹胀纳呆，便溏不爽，肢体困重，或面目发黄，或身热不扬，汗出热不解，渴不多饮，或妇女带下量多色黄，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00517.label: 脾经湿热证
V010-N00517.aliases: 湿热困脾证； 湿热蕴脾证
V010-N00517.englishNames: syndrome of dampnessheat stagnating in spleen
V010-N00517.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脾和胃证候｜脾系证候
V010-N00517.definition: 湿热内蕴，脾失健运，以腹胀，呕恶纳呆，肢体困重，便溏不爽，或面目发黄，或身热不扬，汗出热不解，渴不多饮，舌红苔黄腻，脉濡数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00517.label: 湿热困脾证
V010-N00517.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of damp-heat encumbering the  spleen; syndrome/pattern of damp-heat encumbering the spleen
V010-N00517.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜湿热证｜湿热内侵证｜湿热中阻证

V010-N00517.label: 脾经湿热证
V010-N00517.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the spleen meridian
V010-N00517.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾经证

V010-N00517.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00517.label: 湿热困脾证
V010-N00517.aliases: 湿热蕴脾证； Damp heat accumulating in the spleen pattern
V010-N00517.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of damp-heat encumbering the  spleen; Damp heat affecting the spleen pattern; syndrome/pattern of damp-heat encumbering the spleen
V010-N00517.pinyinNames: shi re kun pi zheng; shī rè kùn pí zhèng
V010-N00517.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00517.definition: Characterized by abdominal fullness/upset, a poor appetite, nausea, vomiting, loose stools with a sensation of incomplete evacuation, body heaviness, thirst but drink a small amount of water, feverish sensation (but no fever) that cannot be resolved after sweating. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is soft and rapid. This pattern often occurs when internal damp heat affects the functioning of the spleen and stomach.

V010-N00517.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00517.label: 湿热蕴脾证
V010-N00517.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness-heat accumulation in spleen

V010-N00517.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00517.label: 湿热蕴脾证
V010-N00517.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of dampness-heat in the spleen
V010-N00517.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by abdominal distention, nausea, vomiting, anorexia, heaviness sensation in the limbs, or jaundice, reddened tongue with yellow slimy coating and rapid soggy pulse

V010-N00518.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00518.label: 湿阻肠道证
V010-N00518.aliases: 湿滞肠道证； 湿蕴肠道证
V010-N00518.englishNames: Dampness in the intestines pattern; syndrome/pattern of dampness obstructing the intestines
V010-N00518.path: 病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜湿邪证｜湿邪内蕴证
V010-N00518.definition: 因湿邪内蕴，肠道传化失常所致。临床以腹胀，隐痛，大便濡泻清稀，或便质黏垢而腥臭，舌苔白滑，脉濡缓等为特征的证候。

V010-N00518.label: 湿阻肠道证
V010-N00518.aliases: 湿蕴肠道证； 湿滞肠道证
V010-N00518.englishNames: syndrome of dampness hampering in the intestines
V010-N00518.path: 病证｜证候｜病因证候｜外感证｜湿淫证
V010-N00518.definition: 湿邪蕴阻肠道，传化失常，以腹胀隐痛，大便濡泻，便质粘垢而腥臭，苔白滑，脉濡缓等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00518.label: 湿阻肠道证
V010-N00518.aliases: 湿滞肠道证； 湿蕴肠道证
V010-N00518.englishNames: Dampness in the intestines pattern; syndrome/pattern of dampness obstructing the intestines
V010-N00518.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜湿邪证｜湿邪内蕴证

V010-N00518.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00518.label: 湿阻肠道证
V010-N00518.aliases: 湿滞肠道证； 湿蕴肠道证
V010-N00518.englishNames: Dampness in the intestines pattern; Dampness obstructing the large intestine pattern; syndrome/pattern of dampness obstructing the intestines
V010-N00518.pinyinNames: shī zǔ cháng dào zhèng; shi zu chang dao zheng
V010-N00518.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00518.definition: Characterized by abdominal distension/dull pain, and thin, clear and loose stools or sticky, strong-odoured stools. The tongue coating is white and slippery. The pulse is soft and slack. This pattern often occurs when dampness affects the conduction of the large intestine.

V010-N00297.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00297.label: 热炽气分证
V010-N00297.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of intense heat in the qi phase
V010-N00297.path: 病因证候类术语｜火证类｜火热证｜热在气分证
V010-N00297.definition: 因感受温热邪毒，或邪由卫分传入，邪正交争于气分所致。临床以壮热、恶热，大汗出，烦渴引饮，颜面红赤，胸闷，小便黄，舌质红，舌苔黄燥，脉洪数，指纹紫红等为特征的证候。

V010-N00297.label: 热入气分证
V010-N00297.englishNames: Heat entering the qi phase pattern
V010-N00297.path: 病证｜证候｜卫气营血证候｜气分证

V010-N00297.label: 热炽气分证
V010-N00297.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of intense heat in the qi phase
V010-N00297.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜火证类｜火热证｜热在气分证

V010-N00297.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00297.label: 热入气分证
V010-N00297.aliases: Heat entering the qi phase pattern
V010-N00297.englishNames: Heat entering the qi phase pattern; Heat entering the qi phase
V010-N00297.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00297.definition: Characterized by fever, thirst, dark yellow urine, and constipation. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when toxic fire/heat struggles with anti-pathogenic qi in the qi phase.

V010-N00479.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00479.label: 热邪壅肺证
V010-N00479.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of pathogenic heat obstructing the lung
V010-N00479.path: 病因证候类术语｜火证类｜火热证｜热在气分证
V010-N00479.definition: 因温热之邪侵袭，或外邪入里化热，壅滞于肺，宣降失常所致。临床以咳喘气粗，痰稠色黄，鼻翼煽动，胸胁胀满，甚则咳吐脓血，痰稠腥臭，胸肋疼痛，舌质红，舌苔黄或腻，脉数，指纹紫红，伴见发热、汗出，口渴，烦躁等为特征的证候。

V010-N00479.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00479.label: 肺热炽盛证
V010-N00479.aliases: 肺火证； 肺热亢盛证； 肺热壅盛证； 肺实热证； 邪热壅肺证
V010-N00479.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of intense  exuberance of lung heat; intense lung heat pattern/syndrome; Intense congestion of lung heat pattern; syndrome/pattenn of intense exuberance of lung heat
V010-N00479.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜肺证类｜肺热证
V010-N00479.definition: 因邪热壅盛或化火，壅积于肺所致。临床以壮热、恶热，汗出不解，烦渴欲饮，大便秘结，咳喘气 粗，咳痰黄稠，甚则咯血，胸膺胀痛或灼痛，鼻翼煽张，舌质红，舌苔黄燥或焦黄，脉滑数或洪数有力等 为特征的证候。

V010-N00479.label: 肺热炽盛证
V010-N00479.englishNames: lung heat exuberance syndrome/pattern; syndrome of exuberance of lung heat
V010-N00479.definition: 火热炽盛，壅结于肺，以发热口渴，咳嗽，气粗而喘，或有胸痛、咽痛，鼻煽气灼，便秘尿黄，舌红苔黄，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00479.label: 肺热炽盛证1
V010-N00479.aliases: 肺火证； 肺热壅盛证； 肺热证； 肺实热证； 肺实热症； 热邪壅肺证； 邪热壅肺证
V010-N00479.englishNames: syndrome of exuberance of lung heat
V010-N00479.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肺和大肠证候｜肺系证候
V010-N00479.definition: 火热炽盛，壅积于肺，以发热口渴，咳嗽，气粗而喘，或有胸痛、咽痛，鼻煽气灼，便秘尿黄，舌红苔黄，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00479.label: 热邪壅肺证
V010-N00479.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of pathogenic heat obstructing the lung
V010-N00479.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜火证类｜火热证｜热在气分证

V010-N00479.label: 肺热炽盛证
V010-N00479.aliases: 肺火证； 肺热亢盛证； 肺热壅盛证； 肺实热证； 邪热壅肺证
V010-N00479.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of intense  exuberance of lung heat; intense lung heat pattern/syndrome; Intense congestion of lung heat pattern; syndrome/pattenn of intense exuberance of lung heat
V010-N00479.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜肺证类｜肺热证

V010-N00479.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00479.label: 肺实热证
V010-N00479.aliases: 肺热壅盛证； 肺热炽盛证； Excess lung heat pattern； exuberance of lung heat pattern
V010-N00479.englishNames: Excess heat in the lung pattern
V010-N00479.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00479.definition: Characterized by fever, thirst, cough, rapid breathing and panting. Chest pain, sore throat, nasal flaring, constipation and yellow urine may also be present. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is rapid. This pattern often occurs when pathogenic heat affects the lung.

V010-N00479.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00479.label: 肺热炽盛证

V010-N00479.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00479.label: 肺热炽盛证
V010-N00479.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by fever, thirst, cough, dyspnea or chest pain, constipation, dark urine, reddened tongue with yellow coating

V010-N00301.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00301.label: 热入营分证
V010-N00301.englishNames: Heat in the nutrient phase pattern; syndrome/pattern of heat entering the nutrient phase
V010-N00301.path: 病因证候类术语｜火证类｜火热证｜热在营血证
V010-N00301.definition: 因温热邪毒入营，或热动心神所致。临床以身体灼热，发热夜甚，心烦、不寐，斑疹隐隐，或时作谵语、躁妄，或目赤肿痛，舌质红绛，中有裂纹，舌苔薄黄或无苔，脉细数，指纹紫红或紫滞等为特征的证候。

V010-N00301.label: 热入营分证
V010-N00301.englishNames: Heat in the nutrient phase pattern; syndrome/pattern of heat entering the nutrient phase
V010-N00301.path: 病证｜证候｜卫气营血证候｜营分证

V010-N00301.label: 热入营分证
V010-N00301.englishNames: Heat in the nutrient phase pattern; syndrome/pattern of heat entering the nutrient phase
V010-N00301.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜火证类｜火热证｜热在营血证

V010-N00301.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00301.label: 热入营分证
V010-N00301.aliases: Heat in the nutrient phase pattern
V010-N00301.englishNames: Heat in the nutrient phase pattern; Heat entering the Ying nutrients phase pattern; syndrome/pattern of heat entering the nutrient phase
V010-N00301.pinyinNames: rè rù yíng fèn zhèng; re ru ying fen zheng
V010-N00301.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00301.definition: Characterized by fever that aggravates at night, restlessness, insomnia, unconsciousness, delirium and maculae. The tongue is deep red. This pattern often occurs when toxic fire/heat enters the Ying nutrients phase and disturbs the heart mind.

V010-N00474.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00474.label: 燥邪犯肺证
V010-N00474.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of pathogenic dryness invading the lung; Dryness invading the lung pattern; pattern/syndrome of dryness invading the lung
V010-N00474.path: 病因证候类术语｜燥证类｜燥邪证
V010-N00474.definition: 因外感燥邪，或感受风热，化燥伤阴，肺失清肃所致。临床以干咳、少痰或无痰，痰黏不易咳出，唇鼻咽喉干燥，声音嘶哑，口渴，咳甚则胸痛，或痰中血丝，舌尖红，舌苔薄黄、少津，脉细或数，初起或伴见发热、恶寒，头痛等为特征的证候。

V010-N00474.label: 燥邪犯肺证
V010-N00474.aliases: 燥热伤肺证； 燥邪伤肺证
V010-N00474.path: 病证｜证候｜病因证候｜外感证｜燥淫证
V010-N00474.definition: 秋燥伤津，肺失宣降，以微有寒热，干咳无痰，或痰中夹血丝，口渴，舌燥少津，脉浮等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00474.label: 燥邪犯肺证
V010-N00474.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of pathogenic dryness invading the lung; Dryness invading the lung pattern; pattern/syndrome of dryness invading the lung
V010-N00474.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜燥证类｜燥邪证

V010-N00474.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00474.label: 风燥伤肺证
V010-N00474.aliases: 风燥犯肺证； 燥邪伤肺证； 燥邪犯肺证； Dryness invading the lung pattern； Dryness damaging/attacking the lung
V010-N00474.englishNames: Wind dryness damaging the lung pattern; syndrome/pattern of wind and dryness damaging the lung
V010-N00474.pinyinNames: feng zao shang fei zheng; fēng zào shāng fèi zhèng
V010-N00474.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00474.definition: Characterized by unproductive coughs or cough with scanty, sticky or blood-stained phlegm, dry nose and throat, and a dry mouth. The tongue tip is red with a dry, thin and yellow coating. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when wind dryness consumes body fluids and affects the dispersing and descending of lung qi.

V010-N00474.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00474.label: 燥邪犯肺证

V010-N00474.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00474.label: 燥邪犯肺证
V010-N00474.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of dryness invading the lung
V010-N00474.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by dry cough without sputum or with scanty sticky sputum difficult to expectorate, chest pain, mild chills and fever, thirst, dry lips, mouth, throat and nose, and floating pulse

V010-N00475.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00475.label: 痰浊阻肺证
V010-N00475.aliases: 痰浊蕴肺证； 痰湿阻肺证； 痰湿蕴肺证
V010-N00475.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of turbid phlegm obstructing the lung; pattern/syndrome of phlegm turbidity obstructing the lung; Turbid phlegm accumulation in the lung pattern
V010-N00475.path: 病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰浊证｜痰浊壅塞证｜痰浊上扰证
V010-N00475.definition: 因痰浊壅塞，痹阻肺气所致。临床以胸闷、气促，咳喘、痰鸣，咯痰白黏、量多，不易咳出，或不得平卧，舌苔白滑或厚腻，脉弦滑等为特征的证候。

V010-N00475.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00475.label: 痰浊壅肺证
V010-N00475.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of turbid phlegm congesting the lung
V010-N00475.path: 病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰浊证｜痰浊壅塞证｜痰浊上扰证｜痰浊阻肺证
V010-N00475.definition: 因痰浊内伏或壅塞，阻遏气道，肺失清肃所致。临床以咳喘阵作，胸满闷窒，不得平卧，痰鸣、声高，痰白黏稠，或夹脓痰、血痰，舌质淡，舌苔垢腻或厚，脉沉滑或濡等为特征的证候。

V010-N00475.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00475.label: 痰湿蕴肺证
V010-N00475.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm and dampness accumulating in the lung 痰湿壅肺证; syndrome/pattern of phlegm and dampness accumulating in the lung
V010-N00475.path: 病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰湿证｜痰湿阻结证｜痰湿上阻证｜痰湿犯肺证
V010-N00475.definition: 因脾湿生痰，内蕴于肺，肺失宣降所致。临床以久咳不已，咳声重浊，痰多色白，痰呈泡沫、黏稠，夹有脓痰、血痰，体位改变咯痰尤甚，痰出咳缓，舌质淡，舌苔白腻，脉濡滑，伴见胸闷，脘腹胀满，纳差等为特征的证候。

V010-N00475.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00475.label: 痰湿阻肺证
V010-N00475.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm and dampness obstructing the lung
V010-N00475.path: 病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰湿证｜痰湿阻结证｜痰湿上阻证｜痰湿犯肺证
V010-N00475.definition: 因痰湿壅阻于肺，肺气不得宣降所致。临床以咳嗽、痰多，痰白清稀或稠，容易咯出，胸膈满闷，体位变动则咯痰增多，甚则喘促、痰鸣，舌质淡，舌苔白腻或滑，脉濡缓等为特征的证候。

V010-N00475.label: 痰浊阻肺证
V010-N00475.englishNames: syndrome of turbid phlegm obstructing lung
V010-N00475.definition: 痰浊蕴结，肺气阻滞，以胸闷，咳嗽气喘，吐白痰量多，苔白清腻，脉滑等为常见症的证数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00475.label: 痰湿阻肺证
V010-N00475.aliases: 痰湿蕴肺证； 痰浊壅肺证； 痰浊蕴肺证； 痰浊阻肺证
V010-N00475.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肺和大肠证候｜肺系证候
V010-N00475.definition: 痰湿蕴结，肺气阻滞，以胸闷，咳嗽气喘，吐白痰量多，苔白滑腻，脉弦滑等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00475.label: 痰浊阻肺证
V010-N00475.aliases: 痰浊蕴肺证； 痰湿阻肺证； 痰湿蕴肺证
V010-N00475.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of turbid phlegm obstructing the lung; pattern/syndrome of phlegm turbidity obstructing the lung; Turbid phlegm accumulation in the lung pattern
V010-N00475.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰浊证｜痰浊壅塞证｜痰浊上扰证

V010-N00475.label: 痰浊壅肺证
V010-N00475.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of turbid phlegm congesting the lung
V010-N00475.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰浊证｜痰浊壅塞证｜痰浊上扰证｜痰浊阻肺证

V010-N00475.label: 痰湿蕴肺证
V010-N00475.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm and dampness accumulating in the lung 痰湿壅肺证; syndrome/pattern of phlegm and dampness accumulating in the lung
V010-N00475.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰湿证｜痰湿阻结证｜痰湿上阻证｜痰湿犯肺证

V010-N00475.label: 痰湿阻肺证
V010-N00475.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm and dampness obstructing the lung
V010-N00475.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰湿证｜痰湿阻结证｜痰湿上阻证｜痰湿犯肺证

V010-N00475.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00475.label: 痰湿蕴肺证
V010-N00475.aliases: 痰湿壅肺证； 痰湿阻肺证； 痰浊蕴肺证； 痰浊阻肺证； Turbid phlegm accumulation in the lung pattern； Phlegm-dampness obstructing the lung； phlegm dampness accumulating in the lung
V010-N00475.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm and dampness accumulating in the lung 痰湿壅肺证; syndrome/pattern of phlegm and dampness accumulating in the lung; Phlegm dampness accumulating in the lung pattern
V010-N00475.pinyinNames: tan shi yun fei zheng; tán shī yùn fèi zhèng
V010-N00475.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00475.definition: Characterized by cough with profuse phlegm (white and sticky/thick/thin and clear, especially in the morning, cough alleviates upon expectoration of phlegm), heavy, turbid coughing sounds, chest tightness, abdominal fullness/distension, and a poor appetite. The tongue coating is white and greasy. The pulse is soft and slippery. This pattern often occurs when phlegm-dampness affects the dispersing and descending of lung qi.

V010-N00475.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00475.label: 痰浊阻肺证
V010-N00475.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of phlegm turbidity obstructing the lung
V010-N00475.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by cough with expectoration of copious whitish sputum, feeling of stuffiness in the chest, whitish slimy coating of the tongue and soggy pulse

V010-N00368.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00368.label: 痰湿证
V010-N00368.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm and dampness; phlegm-dampness pattern/syndrome
V010-N00368.path: 病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类
V010-N00368.definition: 泛指肺脾等脏因外感邪客，或恣食肥甘，脏腑气机失调，凝津聚液化痰，内蕴或阻滞于人体肌腠、经络、脏、官窍等部位所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00368.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00368.label: 痰湿阻结证
V010-N00368.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of binding obstruction due to phlegm and dampness
V010-N00368.path: 病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰湿证

V010-N00368.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00368.label: 痰湿阻滞证
V010-N00368.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of stagnation due to phlegm and dampness
V010-N00368.path: 病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰湿证｜痰湿阻结证
V010-N00368.definition: 因痰湿壅盛，痹阻或凝结气血所致。临床以眩晕，胸闷，咯吐痰多，痰易咯吐，犯困、嗜睡，形体丰满或肥胖，肢体麻木，舌质淡胖，舌苔白腻，脉濡缓或滑，可伴见头重、昏蒙，呕恶，口淡或腻，纳滞、食少，或体表触及质地柔软、圆滑、无痛性肿块，乳房胀痛，月经不调，白带增多，不孕，恶阻等为特征的证候。

V010-N00368.label: 湿痰证
V010-N00368.definition: 痰湿内阻，以咳吐多量黏稠痰，痰滑易咯，肢体困重，胸脘痞闷，食少口腻，苔白腻，脉濡缓或滑等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00368.label: 湿痰证
V010-N00368.aliases: 痰湿内盛证； 痰湿内阻证； 痰湿凝结证； 痰湿证； 痰湿阻滞证
V010-N00368.path: 病证｜证候｜病因证候｜外感证｜湿淫证
V010-N00368.definition: 痰湿内阻，以咯吐多量粘稠痰，痰滑易咯，肢体困重，胸脘痞闷，食少口腻，苔白腻，脉濡缓或滑等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00368.label: 痰湿证
V010-N00368.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm and dampness; phlegm-dampness pattern/syndrome
V010-N00368.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类

V010-N00368.label: 痰湿阻结证
V010-N00368.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of binding obstruction due to phlegm and dampness
V010-N00368.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰湿证

V010-N00368.label: 痰湿阻滞证
V010-N00368.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of stagnation due to phlegm and dampness
V010-N00368.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰湿证｜痰湿阻结证

V010-N00368.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00368.label: 湿痰证
V010-N00368.aliases: 痰湿证； 痰湿阻滞内阻证； 痰湿阻滞证； 痰湿内阻证
V010-N00368.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00368.definition: Characterized by cough with easy expectoration of profuse, sticky phlegm, limb heaviness, dizziness, tinnitus, chest stuffiness, and tightness, a low food intake, a greasy taste and a foreign body sensation in the throat. The tongue coating is white and greasy. The pulse is soft and slippery. Often results from the internal build up of phlegm dampness.

V010-N00368.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00368.label: 湿痰证

V010-N00368.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00368.label: 湿痰证
V010-N00368.definition: a pattern/syndrome due to accumulation of dampness phlegm in the lung, marked by cough with profuse expectoration, heaviness sensation of the limbs, feeling of stuffiness in the chest, reduced food intake, stickiness of the mouth, white slimy tongue c

V010-N00368.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00368.label: 痰湿证
V010-N00368.definition: a pattern/syndrome that arises when dampness gathers to form phlegm, with different manifestations according to location: cough with profuse whitish expectoration and oppression in chest if phlegm obstructs the lung, and epigastric stuffiness, reduced

V010-N00370.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00370.label: 痰火扰神证
V010-N00370.aliases: 痰火闭窍证； 痰火扰心证； 痰热扰神证； 痰热扰心证
V010-N00370.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm and fire harassing the spirit
V010-N00370.path: 病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰火证｜痰火壅结证｜痰火内扰证
V010-N00370.definition: 因痰火内盛，或痰因火动，上扰心神所致。临床以头痛，烦躁，多动、多语，少寐或不眠，注意力不集中，冲动任性，易激动、愤怒、嚎叫哭闹，难于约束，甚则哭笑无常，打人毁物，或表情肌、颈肌、四肢等肌肉迅速、反复、不规则的运动性抽动，口出秽语、恶声，舌质红绛，舌苔黄腻，脉弦滑数，指纹紫滞，可伴见颜面红赤，喜食肥甘，喉间痰鸣，大便秘结，小便短赤等为特征的证候。

V010-N00370.label: 痰火扰神证
V010-N00370.englishNames: syndrome of phlegmfire disturbing mind; syndrome/pattern of phlegm-fire harassing spirt
V010-N00370.definition: 火热与痰浊交给，闭扰心神，以发热口渴，面赤气粗，吐痰色黄，便秘尿黄，喉中痰鸣，胸闷心悸，烦躁不寐，甚则神昏谚语，或哭笑无常，打人毁物，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00370.label: 痰火扰心证
V010-N00370.aliases: 痰火闭窍证； 痰火扰神证； 痰火上扰证； 痰热扰神证； 痰热扰心证
V010-N00370.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of phlegm-fire harassing the heart
V010-N00370.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜心和小肠证候｜心系证候
V010-N00370.definition: 火热痰浊交结，闭扰心神，以发热口渴，面赤气粗，便秘尿黄，吐痰色黄，或喉间痰鸣，胸闷心悸，烦躁不寐，甚或发狂，或神昏谵语，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00370.label: 痰火扰神证
V010-N00370.aliases: 痰火闭窍证； 痰火扰心证； 痰热扰神证； 痰热扰心证
V010-N00370.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm and fire harassing the spirit
V010-N00370.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰火证｜痰火壅结证｜痰火内扰证

V010-N00370.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00370.label: 痰火扰心证
V010-N00370.aliases: 痰火扰神证； 痰热扰神证； 痰热扰心证； Phlegm-fire harassing the heart system pattern； Phlegm fire/heat disturbing the mind； phlegm heat disturbing the heart
V010-N00370.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of phlegm-fire harassing the heart; Phlegm fire disturbing the heart pattern; Phlegm-fire harassing the heart system pattern
V010-N00370.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00370.definition: Characterized by hyperactivity, talkativeness, restlessness, impulsiveness, uncontrollable behaviour, inattention, feverish sensation in the chest, vexation, a poor appetite, a bitter mouth, constipation, and dark-yellow urine. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs as a result of an internal build-up of phlegm fire.

V010-N00370.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00370.label: 痰火扰神证

V010-N00370.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00370.label: 痰火扰心证
V010-N00370.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of phlegm-fire harassing the heart
V010-N00370.definition: a pattern/syndrome caused by phlegm-fire which harasses the heart spirit, marked by restlessness, insomnia or even raving madness, reddened tongue tip, yellow dense and slimy tongue coating, and rapid slippery pulse

V010-N00476.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00476.label: 痰热壅肺证
V010-N00476.aliases: 痰热蕴肺证； 痰火壅肺证； 痰火蕴肺证
V010-N00476.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm and heat congesting in the lung; Phlegm heat obstructing the lung pattern
V010-N00476.path: 病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰热证｜痰热搏结证｜痰热阻肺证
V010-N00476.definition: 因痰热交结，壅积于肺所致。临床以发热、咳喘，呼吸迫促，胸膈满闷，张口抬肩，喉中有水鸡声，痰黄黏稠，舌质红，舌苔黄腻，脉滑数，指纹紫等为特征的证候。

V010-N00476.label: 痰热壅肺证
