V010-N00476.aliases: 痰火壅肺证； 痰火蕴肺证； 痰热蕴肺证； 痰热阻肺证
V010-N00476.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肺和大肠证候｜肺系证候
V010-N00476.definition: 痰热交结，壅积于肺，以发热口渴，咳嗽气喘，吐痰黄稠，胸闷，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00476.label: 痰热壅肺证
V010-N00476.aliases: 痰热蕴肺证； 痰火壅肺证； 痰火蕴肺证
V010-N00476.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm and heat congesting in the lung; Phlegm heat obstructing the lung pattern
V010-N00476.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰热证｜痰热搏结证｜痰热阻肺证

V010-N00476.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00476.label: 痰热壅肺证
V010-N00476.aliases: 痰热蕴肺证； 痰火壅肺证； 痰火蕴肺证； 痰热闭肺证； Phlegm heat obstructing the lung pattern； Phlegm fire/heat accumulating in the lung； phlegm heat obstructing the lung
V010-N00476.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm and heat congesting in the lung; Phlegm heat obstructing the lung pattern; Phlegm heat accumulating in the lung pattern
V010-N00476.pinyinNames: tan re yong fei zheng; tán rè yōng fèi zhèng
V010-N00476.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00476.definition: Characterized by fever, thirst, cough, panting, expectoration of yellow, sticky phlegm, and chest tightness. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when phlegm heat accumulates in the lung.

V010-N00476.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00476.label: 痰热壅肺证

V010-N00486.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00486.label: 风寒犯肺证
V010-N00486.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of wind and cold invading the lung
V010-N00486.path: 病因证候类术语｜风证类｜风寒证
V010-N00486.definition: 因风寒外袭，肺气失宣或上逆所致。临床以咳嗽或喘，痰白清稀，喷嚏、鼻塞，遇寒凉则发作或加重，舌苔白，脉浮或浮紧，可伴见恶寒，发热，无汗，头身疼痛等为特征的证候。

V010-N00486.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00486.label: 风寒袭肺证
V010-N00486.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of wind and cold attacking the lung; pattern/syndrome of wind-cold assailing the lung
V010-N00486.path: 病因证候类术语｜风证类｜风寒证｜风寒犯肺证
V010-N00486.definition: 因风寒犯肺，肺卫失宣所致。临床以咳嗽声重，气急，咽痒，痰白清稀，鼻塞流涕，舌苔薄白，脉浮或浮紧，可伴见恶寒、发热，无汗，头痛，肢体酸痛等为特征的证候。

V010-N00486.label: 风寒束肺证
V010-N00486.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肺和大肠证候｜肺系证候
V010-N00486.definition: 风寒侵袭，肺气失宣，以恶寒，无汗，咳嗽，胸闷气喘，吐白痰，苔白，脉浮紧等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00486.label: 风寒犯肺证
V010-N00486.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of wind and cold invading the lung
V010-N00486.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜风证类｜风寒证

V010-N00486.label: 风寒袭肺证
V010-N00486.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of wind and cold attacking the lung; pattern/syndrome of wind-cold assailing the lung
V010-N00486.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜风证类｜风寒证｜风寒犯肺证

V010-N00486.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00486.label: 风寒袭肺证
V010-N00486.aliases: 风寒束肺证； Wind cold fettering the lung pattern； Wind cold binding the lung
V010-N00486.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of wind and cold attacking the lung; Wind cold attacking the lung pattern; pattern/syndrome of wind-cold assailing the lung
V010-N00486.pinyinNames: feng han xi fei zheng; fēng hán xí fèi zhèng
V010-N00486.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00486.definition: Characterized by aversion to cold, fever, absence of sweating, cough, chest tightness, panting and expectoration of white phlegm. The tongue coating is thin and white. The pulse is superficial and tense. This pattern often occurs when wind cold affects the dispersing of lung qi.

V010-N00486.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00486.label: 风寒束肺证
V010-N00486.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of wind-cold fettering the lung
V010-N00486.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising when wind-cold invades the lung to cause nondiffusion of lung qi, manifested by cough with thin white phlegm, aversion to cold with possible mild fever, stuffy nose with clear nasal discharge, itchy throat, oppression in the

V010-N00487.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00487.label: 风热犯肺证
V010-N00487.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of wind and heat invading the lung; pattern/syndrome of wind-heat invading the lung; Wind-heat invading the lung pattern
V010-N00487.path: 病因证候类术语｜风证类｜风热证
V010-N00487.definition: 因风热侵袭肺卫，肺失清肃所致。临床以咳嗽，气促，咳声重浊或音哑，咯痰不爽，痰黏或黄，咽痛，口渴，鼻流浊涕，舌质红，舌苔薄黄，脉浮数或浮滑，伴见发热、恶风，头痛等为特征的证候。

V010-N00487.label: 风热犯肺证
V010-N00487.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of wind-heat invading lung; syndrome of windheat invading lung
V010-N00487.definition: 风热侵袭肺卫，以发热，微恶风寒，或身痛，咽痛，咳嗽，气喘，舌尖红，苔薄黄，脉浮数等为常见症的征候。

V010-N00487.label: 风热犯肺证
V010-N00487.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肺和大肠证候｜肺系证候
V010-N00487.definition: 风热侵袭肺卫，以发热微恶风寒，身痛或咽痛，咳嗽，气喘，舌尖红，苔薄黄，脉浮数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00487.label: 风热犯肺证
V010-N00487.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of wind and heat invading the lung; pattern/syndrome of wind-heat invading the lung; Wind-heat invading the lung pattern
V010-N00487.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜风证类｜风热证

V010-N00487.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00487.label: 风热犯肺证
V010-N00487.aliases: Wind heat invading the lung pattern
V010-N00487.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of wind and heat invading the lung; Wind heat attacking the lung pattern; pattern/syndrome of wind-heat invading the lung; Wind-heat invading the lung pattern
V010-N00487.pinyinNames: feng re fan fei zheng; fēng rè fàn fèi zhèng
V010-N00487.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00487.definition: Characterized by cough, panting, fever, mild aversion to wind cold, and body ache or sore throat. The tongue tip is red with a thin, yellow coating. The pulse is superficial and rapid. This pattern often occurs when wind heat invades the lung defence and affects the dispersing and descending of lung qi.

V010-N00487.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00487.label: 风热犯肺证

V010-N00487.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00487.label: 风热犯肺证
V010-N00487.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of wind-heat invading the lung
V010-N00487.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by fever with mild chilliness, headache, sore throat, cough, reddened tip of the tongue with thin yellowish coating, and rapid floating pulse

V010-N00371.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00371.label: 风痰证
V010-N00371.englishNames: Wind-phlegm pattern; syndrome/pattern of wind and phlegm; wind-phlegm pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00371.path: 病因证候类术语｜风证类
V010-N00371.definition: 泛指因风邪引动伏痰，或肝风夹痰，横窜入络，上攻清窍，蒙蔽心神等引起的一类证候。

V010-N00371.label: 风痰证
V010-N00371.definition: 外风挟痰为患，或肝风痰浊内扰，以咳吐泡沫痰诞，胸闷，眩晕，头目胀痛；或喉中痰鸣，肢体麻木，口眼喎斜，苔白腻，脉弦滑等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00371.label: 风痰证
V010-N00371.aliases: 风痰闭阻证； 风痰痹阻证； 风痰内蕴证
V010-N00371.path: 病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜津液病｜水液停聚证｜痰饮内停证｜痰证
V010-N00371.definition: 外风挟痰浊为患，或肝风痰浊内扰，以咯吐泡沫痰涎，胸闷，眩晕，头目眩晕，头目胀痛，或喉中痰鸣，口眼喎斜，苔白腻，脉弦滑等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00371.label: 风痰证
V010-N00371.englishNames: Wind-phlegm pattern; syndrome/pattern of wind and phlegm; wind-phlegm pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00371.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜风证类

V010-N00371.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00371.label: 风痰证
V010-N00371.englishNames: Wind-phlegm pattern; syndrome/pattern of wind and phlegm; wind-phlegm pattern/ syndrome; Wind phlegm pattern
V010-N00371.pinyinNames: feng tan zheng; fēng tán zhèng
V010-N00371.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00371.definition: Characterized by vomiting of foamy phlegm, chest tightness, dizziness, headache, eye distension/pain, sound of phlegm in the throat, and deviation of the eyes and mouth border. The tongue coating is white and greasy. The pulse is wiry and slippery. Often occurs when external wind that carries turbid phlegm attacks the body or liver wind that carries turbid phlegm affects the body.

V010-N00371.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00371.label: 风痰证

V010-N00371.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00371.label: 风痰证
V010-N00371.definition: a pattern/syndrome attributable either to external wind with phlegm or to liver wind with phlegm, marked by expectoration of foamy sputum, fullness and oppression in the chest, dizziness, and distending pain of the head and eyes, or marked by phlegmat

V010-N00415.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00415.label: 心系证类
V010-N00415.englishNames: category of heart system syndromes/patterns; Heart system patterns
V010-N00415.definition: 泛指由外邪侵袭，或七情、劳损、水饮、瘀血等引起心及其络属腑脏、经络病变的一类证候。注：包括心证和小肠证。

V010-N00415.label: 心系证类
V010-N00415.englishNames: category of heart system syndromes/patterns; Heart system patterns
V010-N00415.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语

V010-N00415.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00415.label: 心系证类
V010-N00415.englishNames: category of heart system syndromes/patterns; Patterns of the heart system; Heart system patterns
V010-N00415.pinyinNames: xin xi zheng lei; xīn xì zhèng lèi
V010-N00415.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候

V010-N00417.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00417.label: 小肠实热证
V010-N00417.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of excess-heat in the small intestine; Small intestine excess heat pattern
V010-N00417.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜小肠证类
V010-N00417.definition: 因心火下移小肠，或湿热等邪蕴蓄，小肠里热炽盛所致。临床以脐腹胀痛，小便频数，尿道涩痛或灼痛，甚则尿血，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉数，可伴见发热、口渴，口舌生疮，心烦、失眠等为特征的证候。

V010-N00417.label: 小肠实热证
V010-N00417.englishNames: syndrome of excessiveheat of small intestine
V010-N00417.definition: 心火亢盛，下移小肠，以发热口渴，心烦，口舌生疮、赤烂疼痛，面红，小便黄赤、淋沥涩痛，甚则尿血，舌尖红，苔黄，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00417.label: 小肠实热证
V010-N00417.aliases: 心移热膀胱证； 心移热于小肠证
V010-N00417.englishNames: syndrome of excessiveheat of small intestine
V010-N00417.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜心和小肠证候｜小肠证候
V010-N00417.definition: 心火炽盛，下移膀胱，以发热口渴，心烦失眠，小便短黄、灼热、涩痛，舌红苔黄，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00417.label: 小肠实热证
V010-N00417.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of excess-heat in the small intestine; Small intestine excess heat pattern
V010-N00417.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜小肠证类

V010-N00417.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00417.label: 小肠实热证
V010-N00417.aliases: Small intestine excess heat pattern； 心移热膀胱证
V010-N00417.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of excess-heat in the small intestine; Excess heat in the small intestine pattern; Small intestine excess heat pattern
V010-N00417.pinyinNames: xiao chang shi re zheng; xiǎo cháng shí rè zhèng
V010-N00417.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00417.definition: Characterized by fever, thirst, restlessness, insomnia, mouth/tongue ulcerations, scanty, yellow urine and painful urination with a burning sensation. In severe cases, bloody urine may also be present. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is rapid. This pattern often occurs when heart fire flows downward to the small intestine or when damp heat retains in the small intestine.

V010-N00418.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00418.label: 小肠气滞证
V010-N00418.englishNames: small intestinal qi stagnation pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of qi stagnation in the small intestine; Small intestine qi stagnation pattern
V010-N00418.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜小肠证类
V010-N00418.definition: 因腹部受寒，或贪食生冷寒凉之品，或情志不畅，啼哭怒嚎，致使小肠气机阻滞所致。临床以小腹拘急、胀痛或窜痛，痛掣阴囊，睾丸坠痛，或腹部包块，时聚时散，舌质淡或暗，舌苔白，脉沉弦或紧等为特征的证候。

V010-N00418.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00418.label: 肠道气滞证
V010-N00418.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi stagnation in the intestines
V010-N00418.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜大肠证类｜大肠实证
V010-N00418.definition: 因七情郁结，或饮食不当，肠道气机阻滞所致。临床以腹部胀痛或窜痛，随情志变化而加重或减轻，肠鸣矢气，得之则舒，脉弦，或伴见阴囊、睾丸偏坠引痛，腹部扪及包块，时聚时散等为特征的证候。

V010-N00418.label: 肠道气滞证
V010-N00418.englishNames: syndrome of small intestinal qi stagnation
V010-N00418.path: 病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病｜气滞证
V010-N00418.definition: 肠道气机阻滞，以腹部胀痛或窜痛，腹胀，肠鸣矢气、得之觉舒，脉弦等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00418.label: 小肠气痛证
V010-N00418.englishNames: Syndrome of Small Intestine Qi Stagnation Cause Pain
V010-N00418.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜心和小肠证候｜小肠证候
V010-N00418.definition: 常见于疝气病中的寒疝，具有小肠从少腹下垂阴囊而致气胀坠痛的特点。

V010-N00418.label: 小肠气滞证
V010-N00418.englishNames: small intestinal qi stagnation pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of qi stagnation in the small intestine; Small intestine qi stagnation pattern
V010-N00418.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜小肠证类

V010-N00418.label: 肠道气滞证
V010-N00418.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi stagnation in the intestines
V010-N00418.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜大肠证类｜大肠实证

V010-N00418.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00418.label: 小肠气滞证
V010-N00418.aliases: 小肠气痛证； Small intestine qi stagnation pattern
V010-N00418.englishNames: small intestinal qi stagnation pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of qi stagnation in the small intestine; Small intestine qi stagnation pattern
V010-N00418.pinyinNames: xiao chang qi zhi zheng; xiǎo cháng qì zhì zhèng
V010-N00418.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00418.definition: Characterized by abdominal fullness/distension/pain that aggravates upon emotional disturbance and is alleviated upon belching or flatus. The pulse is wiry. This pattern often results from qi stagnation in the small intestine.

V010-N00418.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00418.label: 小肠气滞证
V010-N00418.englishNames: small intestinal qi stagnation pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00418.definition: a pattern/syndrome caused by qi stagnation in the small intestine, marked by abdominal pain with borborygmi

V010-N00419.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00419.label: 小肠虚寒证
V010-N00419.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of deficiency cold in the small intestine; Small intestine deficiency cold pattern
V010-N00419.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜小肠证类
V010-N00419.definition: 因阳气不足，小肠化物、分清泌浊功能失司所致。临床以少腹隐痛或冷痛，喜温喜按，肠鸣、泄泻，面色萎黄，神疲、乏力，舌质淡，舌苔薄白，脉缓弱等为特征的证候。

V010-N00419.label: 小肠虚寒证
V010-N00419.englishNames: Syndrome of Small Intestine Yang Deficiency Cold
V010-N00419.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜心和小肠证候｜小肠证候
V010-N00419.definition: 多由于饮食不节，损伤脾胃，致小肠化物、分清泌浊的功能发生障碍，临床表现为肠鸣泄泻，小腹隐痛喜按，舌淡苔薄白，脉细而缓。

V010-N00419.label: 小肠虚寒证
V010-N00419.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of deficiency cold in the small intestine; Small intestine deficiency cold pattern
V010-N00419.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜小肠证类

V010-N00419.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00419.label: 小肠虚寒证
V010-N00419.englishNames: Deficiency cold in the small intestine pattern; syndrome/pattern of deficiency cold in the small intestine; Small intestine deficiency cold pattern
V010-N00419.pinyinNames: xiao chang xu han zheng; xiǎo cháng xū hán zhèng
V010-N00419.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00419.definition: Characterized by undigested food in stools, dull abdominal pain that alleviates upon warmth, thirst with a desire to drink warm water, cold limbs, inhibited urination and loose stools. The tongue is pale with a white, slippery coating. The pulse is deep, weak and slack. This pattern often occurs when internal cold (due to yang qi deficiency) affects the functions of the small intestine in separating the clear from turbid.

V010-N00423.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00423.label: 心火上炎证
V010-N00423.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart fire flaming up; pattern/syndrome of heart fire flaming upward; Heart fire flaming upward pattern
V010-N00423.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心热证｜心火炽盛证
V010-N00423.definition: 因心经火旺，循经上炎于口舌所致。临床以口舌生疮，焮红灼痛，心烦，面赤，舌质红，脉弦数，或伴见发热，口渴、饮冷，大便秘结等为特征的证候。

V010-N00423.label: 心火上炎证
V010-N00423.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of upflaming heart fire; syndrome of flaring up ofheart fire
V010-N00423.definition: 心经火旺，上炎口舌，以烦热口渴，口舌生疮，溃烂疼痛，面赤，舌尖红，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00423.label: 心火上炎证
V010-N00423.englishNames: syndrome of flaring up ofheart fire
V010-N00423.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜心和小肠证候｜心系证候
V010-N00423.definition: 心经火旺，上炎口舌，以发热口渴，心烦，口舌生疮、赤烂疼痛，面红，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00423.label: 心火上炎证
V010-N00423.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart fire flaming up; pattern/syndrome of heart fire flaming upward; Heart fire flaming upward pattern
V010-N00423.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心热证｜心火炽盛证

V010-N00423.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00423.label: 心火上炎证
V010-N00423.aliases: 心火偏亢证； Heart fire flaming upward pattern
V010-N00423.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart fire flaming up; pattern/syndrome of heart fire flaming upward; Heart fire flaming upward pattern; Upward flaming of heart fire pattern
V010-N00423.pinyinNames: xin huo shang yan zheng; xīn huǒ shàng yán zhèng
V010-N00423.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00423.definition: Characterized by fever, thirst, restlessness, a red face and red and painful mouth/tongue ulcerations. The pulse is rapid. This pattern often occurs when hyperactive fire ascends to the mouth/tongue along the heart meridian.

V010-N00423.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00423.label: 心火上炎证

V010-N00423.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00423.label: 心火上炎证
V010-N00423.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of heart fire flaming upward; syndrome of flaring up ofheart fire
V010-N00423.definition: a pattern/syndrome of up-flaring fire from the heart, marked by oral ulceration, mental irritability, insomnia, and a red tip of the tongue

V010-N00424.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00424.label: 心神不宁证
V010-N00424.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart spirit inquietude; Heart spirit restlessness pattern
V010-N00424.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类
V010-N00424.definition: 泛指因外感或内伤等各种原因扰动或劳伤心神，甚则蒙闭心神等所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00424.label: 心神不宁证
V010-N00424.aliases: 神志不安证； 心神不安证
V010-N00424.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜心和小肠证候｜心系证候
V010-N00424.definition: 泛指各种原因导致以心悸心慌，心烦，失眠多梦，胆怯易惊等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00424.label: 心神不宁证
V010-N00424.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart spirit inquietude; Heart spirit restlessness pattern
V010-N00424.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类

V010-N00424.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00424.label: 心神不宁证
V010-N00424.aliases: 心神不安证； Heart spirit restlessness pattern
V010-N00424.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart spirit inquietude; Disquieted heart spirit pattern; Heart spirit restlessness pattern
V010-N00424.pinyinNames: xin shen bu ning zheng; xīn shén bù níng zhèng
V010-N00424.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00424.definition: Characterized by palpitations, panic, restlessness, insomnia, dream-disturbed sleep, and jumpy or easily startled. This pattern often results from emotional disturbance or medical conditions.

V010-N00439.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00439.label: 火扰心神证
V010-N00439.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of fire harassing heart spirit
V010-N00439.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心神不宁证
V010-N00439.definition: 因五志化火，扰动心神所致。临床以心烦、易怒，躁扰不宁，失眠、多梦，颜面潮红，甚则惊惕肉瞤，神志错乱，狂言狂语，舌质红绛，舌苔黄燥，脉洪数或疾促有力，可伴见口舌生疮，大便燥结，小便短黄等为特征的证候。

V010-N00439.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00439.label: 热扰心神证
V010-N00439.englishNames: Fire harassing heart spirit pattern; syndrome/pattern of heat disturbing the heart spirit; pattern/syndrome of heat harassing the heart spirit
V010-N00439.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心神不宁证
V010-N00439.definition: 因邪热炽盛，扰动心神所致。临床以壮热、口渴，面赤，心悸，失眠，躁扰不宁，甚或神昏、谵语，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00439.label: 热扰心神证
V010-N00439.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heat harassing heart spirit; syndrome of heat disturbing heartmind
V010-N00439.definition: 邪热炽盛，上扰心神，以高热，口渴，面赤，心悸失眠，躁扰不宁，甚或神昏谵语，舌红苔黄，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00439.label: 热扰心神证
V010-N00439.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜心和小肠证候｜心系证候
V010-N00439.definition: 邪热炽盛，心神被扰，以心悸心烦，失眠多梦，甚或谵语，发热口渴，面赤，舌红苔黄，脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00439.label: 火扰心神证
V010-N00439.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of fire harassing heart spirit
V010-N00439.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心神不宁证

V010-N00439.label: 热扰心神证
V010-N00439.englishNames: Fire harassing heart spirit pattern; syndrome/pattern of heat disturbing the heart spirit; pattern/syndrome of heat harassing the heart spirit
V010-N00439.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心神不宁证

V010-N00439.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00439.label: 热扰心神证
V010-N00439.aliases: 火扰心神证； Fire harassing heart spirit pattern； Fire disturbing the heart mind
V010-N00439.englishNames: Fire harassing heart spirit pattern; Heat disturbing the heart spirit pattern; syndrome/pattern of heat disturbing the heart spirit; pattern/syndrome of heat harassing the heart spirit
V010-N00439.pinyinNames: re rao xin shen zheng; rè rǎo xīn shén zhèng
V010-N00439.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00439.definition: Characterized by palpitations, restlessness, insomnia and dream-disturbed sleep. Delirium, fever, thirst and a red face may also be present. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when exuberant excessive heat disturbs the heart spirit.

V010-N00439.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00439.label: 热扰心神证
V010-N00439.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heat harassing heart spirit

V010-N00439.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00439.label: 热扰心神证
V010-N00439.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of heat harassing the heart spirit
V010-N00439.definition: a pattern/syndrome caused by exuberant heat which disturbs the heart spirit, and marked by fever, thirst, vexation, insomnia, or even manic or delirious speech, flushed face, constipation, deep-colored urine, reddened tongue tip, yellow tongue coating

V010-N00420.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00420.label: 心气虚证
V010-N00420.aliases: 心气不足证； 心气亏虚证； 心气虚弱证
V010-N00420.englishNames: heart qi deficiency pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of heart qi deficiency; Heart qi deficiency pattern
V010-N00420.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证
V010-N00420.definition: 因心气亏虚，心神失主，鼓动无力所致。临床以神思恍惚，心悸、惊惕，如人将捕之，自汗，甚则时出冷汗，舌质淡，脉虚弱或结代，伴见神疲、乏力，胸闷、气短，动辄尤甚等为特征的证候。

V010-N00420.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00420.label: 心气不足证
V010-N00420.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心气虚证
V010-N00420.definition: 因心气偏弱，心神虚怯，鼓动乏力所致。临床以畏见生人，恶闻声响，容易惊惕，或动辄心悸，胸闷，短气，自汗，神疲、乏力，舌质偏淡，舌苔白，脉虚无力等心虚证轻者为特征的证候。

V010-N00420.label: 心气虚证
V010-N00420.englishNames: heart qi deficiency syndrome/pattern; syndrome of deficiency of heart qi
V010-N00420.definition: 心气亏虚，无力鼓动，以心悸气短，神疲乏力，动则加重，自汗，面白舌淡，脉虚等为常候。

V010-N00420.label: 心气虚证
V010-N00420.aliases: 心气不足证； 心气亏虚证
V010-N00420.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of heart qi
V010-N00420.path: 病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病｜气虚证
V010-N00420.definition: 心脏与心神气虚，以心悸气短，精神疲倦，或有自汗，面白舌淡，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00420.label: 心气虚证
V010-N00420.aliases: 心气不足证； 心气亏虚证； 心气虚弱证
V010-N00420.englishNames: heart qi deficiency pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of heart qi deficiency; Heart qi deficiency pattern
V010-N00420.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证

V010-N00420.label: 心气不足证
V010-N00420.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心气虚证

V010-N00420.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00420.label: 心气虚证
V010-N00420.aliases: 心气不足证； 心气亏虚证； 心气虚弱证
V010-N00420.englishNames: heart qi deficiency pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of heart qi deficiency; Heart qi deficiency pattern
V010-N00420.pinyinNames: xin qi xu zheng; xīn qì xū zhèng
V010-N00420.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00420.definition: Characterized by palpitations, shortness of breath and lassitude that aggravate upon physical exertion. Spontaneous sweating and a pale face may also be present. The tongue is pale. The pulse is deficient. This pattern often occusr when heart qi fails to help with the heart to pump blood.

V010-N00420.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00420.label: 心气虚证

V010-N00420.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00420.label: 心气虚证
V010-N00420.aliases: 心气不足证； 心气亏虚证
V010-N00420.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by palpitations, shortness of breath, listlessness, spontaneous sweating, pallor, pale tongue, and weak or irregular pulse

V010-N00421.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00421.label: 心气血两虚证
V010-N00421.englishNames: Dual deficiency of heart qi and blood pattern; syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of heart qi and blood; pattern/syndrome of dual deficiency of heart qi and blood
V010-N00421.pinyinNames: xin qi xue liang xu zheng
V010-N00421.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心气虚证
V010-N00421.definition: 因气血两虚，心与心神失养所致。临床以心悸、怔忡，眩晕、气短，倦怠、嗜卧，健忘，多梦，面色苍白，舌质淡，脉细弱，或伴见神思恍惚，神情呆滞，失认失算等为特征的证候。

V010-N00421.label: 心气血两虚证
V010-N00421.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of both qi and blood of heart; syndrome/pattern of both heart qi and heart blood deficiency
V010-N00421.pinyinNames: xin qi xue liang xu zheng
V010-N00421.definition: 气血两虚，心脏与心神失养，以心悸，头晕，神疲乏力，健忘，多梦，面白舌淡，脉细弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00421.label: 心气血两虚证
V010-N00421.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of both qi and blood of heart
V010-N00421.pinyinNames: xin qi xue liang xu zheng
V010-N00421.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜心和小肠证候｜心系证候
V010-N00421.definition: 气血两虚，心与心神失养，以心悸，神疲头晕，多梦健忘，面白舌淡，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00421.label: 心气血两虚证
V010-N00421.englishNames: Dual deficiency of heart qi and blood pattern; syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of heart qi and blood; pattern/syndrome of dual deficiency of heart qi and blood
V010-N00421.pinyinNames: xin qi xue liang xu zheng
V010-N00421.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心气虚证

V010-N00421.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00421.label: 心气血两虚证
V010-N00421.aliases: Dual deficiency of heart qi and blood pattern
V010-N00421.englishNames: Dual deficiency of heart qi and blood pattern; syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of heart qi and blood; Deficiency of heart qi and blood pattern; pattern/syndrome of dual deficiency of heart qi and blood
V010-N00421.pinyinNames: xin qi xue liang xu zheng; xīn qì xuè liǎng xū zhèng
V010-N00421.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00421.definition: Characterized by palpitations, shortness of breath, lassitude, fatigue, dizziness, forgetfulness, dream-disturbed sleep and a pale face. The tongue is pale. The pulse is thready and weak. This pattern often occurs when qi and blood fail to nourish the heart and heart mind.

V010-N00421.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00421.label: 心气血两虚证
V010-N00421.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of both heart qi and heart blood deficiency
V010-N00421.pinyinNames: xin qi xue liang xu zheng

V010-N00421.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00421.label: 心气血两虚证
V010-N00421.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of dual deficiency of heart qi and blood
V010-N00421.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising when deficiency of both qi and blood deprives the heart and spirit of nourishment, usually manifested by palpitations, shortness of breath, listlessness, fatigue, dizziness, forgetfulness, dream-disturbed sleep, pale complex

V010-N00422.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00422.label: 心气阴两虚证
V010-N00422.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of heart qi and yin; Deficiency of heart qi and yin pattern
V010-N00422.pinyinNames: xin qi yin liang xu zheng
V010-N00422.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心气虚证
V010-N00422.definition: 因气阴两虚，心与心神失养所致。临床以头晕、心悸，神疲、气短，多梦、易惊，颧红、口干，五心烦热，自汗、盗汗，舌质偏红，舌苔少，脉细弱或数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00422.label: 心气阴两虚证
V010-N00422.englishNames: syndrome of deficoency of both qi and yin of heart
V010-N00422.definition: 气阴两虚，心脏与心神失养，以心悸气短，神疲头晕，失眠多梦，颧红口干，舌红少苔，脉弱而数为常见症的证候。

V010-N00422.label: 心气阴两虚证
V010-N00422.englishNames: syndrome of deficoency of both qi and yin of heart
V010-N00422.pinyinNames: xin qi yin liang xu zheng
V010-N00422.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜心和小肠证候｜心系证候
V010-N00422.definition: 气阴两虚，心与心神失养，以心悸气短，神疲头晕，失眠多梦，颧红，舌红少苔，脉弱而数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00422.label: 心气阴两虚证
V010-N00422.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of heart qi and yin; Deficiency of heart qi and yin pattern
V010-N00422.pinyinNames: xin qi yin liang xu zheng
V010-N00422.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心气虚证

V010-N00422.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00422.label: 心气阴两虚证
V010-N00422.englishNames: Deficiency of heart qi and yin pattern; syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of heart qi and yin
V010-N00422.pinyinNames: xin qi yin liang xu zheng; xīn qì yīn liǎng xū zhèng
V010-N00422.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00422.definition: Characterized by palpitations, shortness of breath, lassitude, dizziness, insomnia, dream-disturbed sleep and flushed cheeks. The tongue is red with a scanty coating. The pulse is rapid or weak. This pattern often occurs when qi and yin fail to nourish the heart and heart mind.

V010-N00432.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00432.label: 心血虚证
V010-N00432.aliases: 心血亏虚证； 心虚血少证； 心血不足证
V010-N00432.englishNames: heart blood deficiency pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of heart blood deficiency; Heart blood deficiency pattern
V010-N00432.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证
V010-N00432.definition: 因心血亏虚，心气与心神失养所致。临床以心悸、怔忡，甚则心中憺憺大动，失眠、多梦，健忘，眩晕，舌质淡，脉细或弱，伴见面色无华，口唇色淡等为特征的证候。

V010-N00432.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00432.label: 心血不足证
V010-N00432.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心血虚证
V010-N00432.definition: 因失血或久病血虚，或脾失健运，血的生化之源不足，血不养心所致。临床以心悸、易惊，头晕，少寐、多梦，面色淡白或萎黄，舌质淡，脉细等心血虚证轻者为特征的证候。

V010-N00432.label: 心血虚证
V010-N00432.englishNames: heart blood deficiency syndrome/pattern; syndrome of deficiency of heart blood
V010-N00432.definition: 心血亏虚，心脏、心神失养，以心悸，头晕，多梦，健忘，面色淡白或萎黄，唇舌色淡，脉细等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00432.label: 心血虚证
V010-N00432.aliases: 心血不足证； 心血亏虚证
V010-N00432.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of heart blood
V010-N00432.path: 病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病｜血虚证
V010-N00432.definition: 血液亏虚，心与心神失养，以心悸，头晕，多梦，健忘，面色淡白或萎黄，唇舌色淡，脉细等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00432.label: 心血虚证
V010-N00432.aliases: 心血亏虚证； 心虚血少证； 心血不足证
V010-N00432.englishNames: heart blood deficiency pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of heart blood deficiency; Heart blood deficiency pattern
V010-N00432.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证

V010-N00432.label: 心血不足证
V010-N00432.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心血虚证

V010-N00432.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00432.label: 心血虚证
V010-N00432.aliases: 心血亏虚证； 心虚血少证； 心血不足证
V010-N00432.englishNames: Heart blood deficiency pattern; heart blood deficiency pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of heart blood deficiency
V010-N00432.pinyinNames: xīn xuè xū zhèng; xin xue xu zheng
V010-N00432.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00432.definition: Characterized by palpitations, dizziness, dream-disturbed sleep, forgetfulness, a pale white or sallow complexion and pale lips. The tongue is pale. The pulse is thready. This pattern often occurs when heart blood fails to nourish the heart and heart spirit.

V010-N00432.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00432.label: 心血虚证

V010-N00432.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00432.label: 心血虚证
V010-N00432.aliases: 心血不足证； 心血亏虚证
V010-N00432.definition: a pattern/syndrome resulting from deficiency of blood to nourish the heart spirit, manifested by palpitations, dizziness, dream-disturbed sleep, forgetfulness, pale or sallow complexion, pale lips and tongue, and fine pulse

V010-N00434.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00434.label: 心阳虚证
V010-N00434.aliases: 心阳亏虚证； 心阳气虚证； 心阳不足证
V010-N00434.englishNames: syndrome/pattern heart yang deficiency; syndrome/ pattern heart yang deficiency; Heart yang deficiency pattern; heart yang deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00434.pinyinNames: xin yang xu zheng; xin yin xu zheng
V010-N00434.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证
V010-N00434.definition: 因心阳不振，温运失职所致。临床以心悸，甚则怔忡不已，心胸憋闷，形寒、肢冷，面色淡白，自汗，动辄尤甚，唇舌紫绀，舌质淡，舌苔白，脉弱或结代，可伴见气短，乏力，下肢浮肿等为特征的证候。

V010-N00434.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00434.label: 心阳不足证
V010-N00434.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart yang insufficiency; syndrome/ pattern of heart yang insufficiency
V010-N00434.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心阳虚证
V010-N00434.definition: 因久病或老年体虚，或误治伤及心阳，失于温运所致。临床以心悸、怔忡，胸闷，面白、肢冷，脉弱或结代等心阳虚证轻者为特征的证候。

V010-N00434.label: 心阳虚证
V010-N00434.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of heart yang; heart yang deficiency syndrome/pattern
V010-N00434.definition: 心阳虚衰，温运失职，以心悸怔忡，心胸憋闷而喘，畏冷肢凉，面色（白光）白，或见下肢浮肿，唇舌色暗，苔白滑，脉弱或结或代等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00434.label: 心阳虚证
V010-N00434.aliases: 心阳不足证； 心阳亏虚证； 心阳虚衰证
V010-N00434.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of heart yang
V010-N00434.path: 病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候｜阳虚证
V010-N00434.definition: 心阳虚衰，温运失司，以心悸怔忡、心胸憋闷而喘、畏冷肢凉、面色？白、或下肢浮肿、唇舌色暗、苔白、脉弱或结代等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00434.label: 心阳气虚证
V010-N00434.englishNames: Syndrome of Deficiency of Yang-Qi of the Heart
V010-N00434.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜心和小肠证候｜心系证候
V010-N00434.definition: 心阳亏虚，心气不足，温运失司，以神疲气短，心悸怔忡，畏冷肢凉，自汗懒言，唇舌暗淡等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00434.label: 心阳虚证
V010-N00434.aliases: 心阳亏虚证； 心阳气虚证； 心阳不足证
V010-N00434.englishNames: syndrome/pattern heart yang deficiency; syndrome/ pattern heart yang deficiency; Heart yang deficiency pattern; heart yang deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00434.pinyinNames: xin yang xu zheng; xin yin xu zheng
V010-N00434.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证

V010-N00434.label: 心阳不足证
V010-N00434.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart yang insufficiency; syndrome/ pattern of heart yang insufficiency
V010-N00434.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心阳虚证

V010-N00434.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00434.label: 心阳虚证
V010-N00434.aliases: 心阳亏虚证； 心阳气虚证； 心阳不足证
V010-N00434.englishNames: syndrome/pattern heart yang deficiency; syndrome/ pattern heart yang deficiency; Heart yang deficiency pattern; heart yang deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00434.pinyinNames: xin yang xu zheng; xin yin xu zheng; xīn yáng xū zhèng
V010-N00434.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00434.definition: Characterized by mild to severe palpitations, chest tightness, cold intolerance, cold limbs, a bright pale face, shortness of breath, and spontaneous sweating. Oedema in the leg and dark lips may also be present. The tongue is purple with a white, slippery coating. The pulse is weak or regularly/irregularly intermittent. This pattern can be a further progression of heart qi deficiency. It may also occur when heart yang fails to warm the body.

V010-N00434.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00434.label: 心阳虚证

V010-N00434.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00434.label: 心阳虚证
V010-N00434.aliases: 心阳不足证； 心阳亏虚证
V010-N00434.definition: a pattern/syndrome resulting from deficiency of yang qi to warm and activate the heart, usually manifested by palpitation, dyspnea, a feeling of pressure in the chest, aversion to cold with cold limbs, bright pale complexion, dark lips and tongue with

V010-N00433.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00433.label: 心阳暴脱证
V010-N00433.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of sudden collapse of heart yang; Heart yang collapse pattern
V010-N00433.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心阳虚证
V010-N00433.definition: 因各种原因导致心阳衰败，阴不恋阳，阳气暴脱所致。临床以骤然面色苍白，冷汗淋漓，四肢厥冷，烦躁不安，呼吸微弱，怔忡不已，甚则昏迷，舌质暗淡，脉微欲绝，或如虾游等为特征的危重证候。

V010-N00433.label: 心阳暴脱证
V010-N00433.englishNames: syndrome of sudden collapse of heart yang
V010-N00433.definition: 心阳衰败而欲脱，以突然冷汗淋漓，四肢厥冷，呼吸微弱，心悸怔忡，神志模糊、昏迷，面色苍白，脉微欲绝等为常见症的危重征候。

V010-N00433.label: 心阳暴脱证
V010-N00433.englishNames: syndrome of sudden collapse of heart yang
V010-N00433.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜心和小肠证候｜心系证候
V010-N00433.definition: 实邪暴袭、阻滞等，使心阳突然衰败而欲脱，以突然冷汗淋漓，四肢厥冷，呼吸微弱，心悸怔忡，面色苍白，脉微欲绝，神志模糊等为常见症的危重证候。

V010-N00433.label: 心阳暴脱证
V010-N00433.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of sudden collapse of heart yang; Heart yang collapse pattern
V010-N00433.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心阳虚证

V010-N00433.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00433.label: 心阳暴脱证
V010-N00433.aliases: 心阳欲脱证； Heart yang collapse pattern
V010-N00433.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of sudden collapse of heart yang; Heart yang collapse pattern; Sudden collapse of heart yang pattern
V010-N00433.pinyinNames: xin yang bao tuo zheng; xīn yáng bào tuō zhèng
V010-N00433.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00433.definition: Characterized by cold sweats, cold limbs, faint breathing, mild to severe palpitations, a pale complexion and mental confusion or unconsciousness. The pulse is extremely weak. This pattern can be a further progression of heart yang deficiency. It may also occur as a result of sudden blockage or attack by excess pathogens.

V010-N00435.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00435.label: 心阴虚证
V010-N00435.aliases: 心阴亏虚证； 心阴不足证
V010-N00435.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart yin deficiency; heart yin deficiency pattern/syndrome; Heart yin deficiency pattern
V010-N00435.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证
V010-N00435.definition: 因阴液亏虚，心与心神失养所致。临床以心悸、怔忡，眩晕，心烦，失眠、多梦，善忘，口渴，舌质红，舌苔少，脉细数，伴见颧红，五心烦热，盗汗等为特征的证候。

V010-N00435.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00435.label: 心阴不足证
V010-N00435.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart yin insufficiency; syndrome/ pattern of heart yin insufficiency
V010-N00435.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心阴虚证
V010-N00435.definition: 因心阴不足，心失濡养所致。临床以容易激动，心烦、心慌，时作惊悸，少寐、梦多，舌质偏红，脉细或数等心阴虚证轻者为特征的证候。

V010-N00435.label: 心阴虚证
V010-N00435.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of heart yin; heart yin deficiency syndrome/pattern
V010-N00435.definition: 心阴亏损，心脏、心神失养，以心悸心烦，失眠多梦，头晕健忘，潮热，盗汗，舌红少苔，脉细数等为常见症的征候。

V010-N00435.label: 心阴虚证
V010-N00435.aliases: 心阴不足证； 心阴亏虚证
V010-N00435.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of heart yin
V010-N00435.path: 病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候｜阴虚证
V010-N00435.definition: 阴液亏虚，心与心神失养，以心悸心烦，失眠多梦，头晕健忘，舌红少苔，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00435.label: 心阴虚证
V010-N00435.aliases: 心阴亏虚证； 心阴不足证
V010-N00435.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart yin deficiency; heart yin deficiency pattern/syndrome; Heart yin deficiency pattern
V010-N00435.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证

V010-N00435.label: 心阴不足证
V010-N00435.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart yin insufficiency; syndrome/ pattern of heart yin insufficiency
V010-N00435.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心阴虚证

V010-N00435.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00435.label: 心阴虚证
V010-N00435.aliases: 心阴亏虚证； 心阴不足证
V010-N00435.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart yin deficiency; heart yin deficiency pattern/syndrome; Heart yin deficiency pattern
V010-N00435.pinyinNames: xin yin xu zheng; xīn yīn xū zhèng
V010-N00435.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00435.definition: Characterized by palpitations, restlessness, insomnia, dream-disturbed sleep, dizziness, forgetfulness, hot flushes and night sweats. The tongue is red with a scanty coating. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when heart yin fails to nourish the heart and heart spirit.

V010-N00435.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00435.label: 心阴虚证

V010-N00435.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00435.label: 心阴虚证
V010-N00435.aliases: 心阴不足证； 心阴亏虚证
V010-N00435.definition: a pattern/syndrome resulting from deficiency of yin fluid to nourish the heart spirit, manifested by mental irritability, palpitation, insomnia, low fever, night sweating, malar flush, thirst and rapid fine pulse

V010-N00430.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00430.label: 心血瘀阻证
V010-N00430.aliases: 心脉痹阻证； 心脉瘀阻证； 心血瘀痹证； 心血瘀滞证
V010-N00430.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart blood stasis obstruction; heart blood stasis (obstruction) pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00430.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心血瘀滞证
V010-N00430.definition: 因血行不畅，瘀血阻滞心脉所致。临床以心痹胸痛或刺痛，痛引胸背、臂内，舌质紫暗，或有瘀点、瘀斑，舌苔薄白，脉细涩或结代，伴见心悸、怔忡，心中憺憺大动等为特征的证候。

V010-N00430.label: 心脉痹阻证
V010-N00430.englishNames: syndrome of blockade of heart vessel; heart vessel obstruction syndrome/pattern
V010-N00430.definition: 血行不畅，瘀血阻痹心脉，以心悸怔忡，心胸憋闷，疼痛如刺，痛引肩背内臂，唇舌紫暗，脉细涩或结或代为常见症的证候。

V010-N00430.label: 心血瘀阻证
V010-N00430.aliases: 心脉痹阻证； 心脉瘀阻证； 心血瘀滞证
V010-N00430.englishNames: syndrome of blockade of heart vessel
V010-N00430.path: 病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病｜血瘀证
V010-N00430.definition: 血行不畅，瘀血阻滞心脉，以胸闷心悸，心痛如刺，痛引肩背内臂，唇舌紫暗，脉细涩或结代等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00430.label: 心血瘀阻证
V010-N00430.aliases: 心脉痹阻证； 心脉瘀阻证； 心血瘀痹证； 心血瘀滞证
V010-N00430.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart blood stasis obstruction; heart blood stasis (obstruction) pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00430.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心血瘀滞证

V010-N00430.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00430.label: 心脉瘀阻证
V010-N00430.aliases: 心血瘀滞证； 心脉痹阻证； Heart blood stagnation pattern； heart vessel obstruction pattern
V010-N00430.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00430.definition: Characterized by chest tightness, palpitations, and stabbing cardiac pain that radiates to the shoulder and back. The tongue is dark purple. The pulse is thready and hesitant or regularly/irregularly intermittent. This pattern often occurs when stagnant blood obstructs the heart vessels.

V010-N00430.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00430.label: 心脉痹阻证

V010-N00430.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00430.label: 心脉痹阻证
V010-N00430.englishNames: heart vessel obstruction pattern/ syndrome; syndrome of blockade of heart vessel
V010-N00430.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising when the heart vessels are impeded, marked by paroxysms of palpitations with fearful throbbing, pain and a feeling of pressure in the heart and chest referring to the shoulder or upper arm

V010-N00441.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00441.label: 肝系证类
V010-N00441.englishNames: category of liver system syndromes/patterns; Liver system patterns
V010-N00441.definition: 泛指由外邪侵袭，或七情、劳损、水饮、瘀血等引起肝及其络属腑脏、经络病变的一类证候。注：包括肝证和胆证。

V010-N00441.label: 肝系证类
V010-N00441.englishNames: category of liver system syndromes/patterns; Liver system patterns
V010-N00441.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语

V010-N00441.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00441.label: 肝系证类
V010-N00441.englishNames: category of liver system syndromes/patterns; Patterns of the liver system; Liver system patterns
V010-N00441.pinyinNames: gan xi zheng lei; gān xì zhèng lèi
V010-N00441.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候

V010-N00445.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00445.label: 肝郁化火证
V010-N00445.aliases: 肝气化火证； 气火郁结证； 肝经郁热证； 气郁化火证
V010-N00445.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of depressed liver qi transforming into fire; syndrome/pattern of stagnated liver qi transforming into fire
V010-N00445.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝实证｜肝郁证｜肝郁兼夹证
V010-N00445.definition: 因肝气郁滞，久郁化火，气火上冲所致。临床以两胁胀痛或灼痛，急躁、易怒，头痛、面赤，耳暴鸣或暴聋，目赤灼痛，口干、口苦，小便黄或短赤，舌质红，或边尖红刺，舌苔黄燥，脉弦数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00445.label: 肝郁化火证
V010-N00445.aliases: 肝气化火证； 气火郁结证； 肝经郁热证； 气郁化火证
V010-N00445.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of depressed liver qi transforming into fire; syndrome/pattern of stagnated liver qi transforming into fire
V010-N00445.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝实证｜肝郁证｜肝郁兼夹证

V010-N00445.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00445.label: 肝郁化火证
V010-N00445.aliases: 肝气化火证； 气火郁结证； 肝经郁热证； 气郁化火证； Qi stagnation transforming into fire pattern
V010-N00445.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of depressed liver qi transforming into fire; syndrome/pattern of stagnated liver qi transforming into fire; Liver qi stagnation transforming into fire pattern
V010-N00445.pinyinNames: gan yu hua huo zheng; gān yù huà huǒ zhèng
V010-N00445.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00445.definition: Characterized by distending pain in the subcostal region, restlessness, irritability, a dry, bitter mouth and dark yellow urine. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is wiry and rapid. This pattern often occurs when prolonged liver qi stagnation transforms into heat/fire.

V010-N00457.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00457.label: 肝郁血瘀证
V010-N00457.aliases: 肝瘀气滞证； 肝血瘀滞证
V010-N00457.englishNames: Liver depression and blood stasis pattern; syndrome/pattern of blood stasis due to liver depression; pattern/syndrome of liver depression and blood stasis
V010-N00457.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝实证｜肝郁证｜肝郁兼夹证
V010-N00457.definition: 因肝气郁结，血瘀于肝所致。临床以两胁胀痛或刺痛，可触及胁下或少腹肿块，面色黯，舌质暗淡，或有瘀点、瘀斑，脉弦涩，伴见情志抑郁、烦闷，大便不畅，或时溏时秘等为特征的证候。

V010-N00457.label: 肝郁血瘀证
V010-N00457.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver depression and blood stasis; syndrome of stagnation of liver qi and blood stasis
V010-N00457.definition: 肝气郁结，血瘀于肝，以两胁胀痛或刺痛，或胁下、少腹有肿块，情志抑郁，舌紫暗或有斑点，脉弦涩等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00457.label: 肝血瘀滞证
V010-N00457.aliases: 肝瘀气滞证； 肝郁血瘀证
V010-N00457.englishNames: syndrome of liver depression and blood stasis
V010-N00457.path: 病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病｜血瘀证
V010-N00457.definition: 肝气郁结，血瘀于肝，以两胁胀痛或刺痛，或胁下、少腹有肿块，情志抑郁，舌紫暗或有斑点，脉弦涩等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00457.label: 肝郁血瘀证
V010-N00457.aliases: 肝瘀气滞证； 肝血瘀滞证
V010-N00457.englishNames: Liver depression and blood stasis pattern; syndrome/pattern of blood stasis due to liver depression; pattern/syndrome of liver depression and blood stasis
V010-N00457.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝实证｜肝郁证｜肝郁兼夹证

V010-N00457.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00457.label: 肝血瘀滞证
V010-N00457.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00457.definition: Characterized by stabbing pain/masses with a fixed location in the subcostal region, and tenderness. The tongue is dark purple or with ecchymosis. The pulse is wiry and hesitant. This pattern often occurs when blood stasis obstructs the liver collaterals.

V010-N00457.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00457.label: 肝郁血瘀证
V010-N00457.aliases: 肝瘀气滞证； 肝血瘀滞证； Pattern of liver blood stasis and stagnation； Pattern of liver stasis with qi stagnation； Liver depression and blood stasis pattern
V010-N00457.englishNames: Liver depression and blood stasis pattern; syndrome/pattern of blood stasis due to liver depression; pattern/syndrome of liver depression and blood stasis; Liver qi stagnation with blood stasis pattern
V010-N00457.pinyinNames: gan yu xue yu zheng; gān yù xuè yū zhèng
V010-N00457.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00457.definition: Characterized by distending or stabbing pain in the rib area, subcostal or lower abdominal masses and emotional depression. The tongue is dark purple or with ecchymosis. The pulse is wiry and hesitant. This pattern often occurs when liver qi stagnation causes blood stasis.

V010-N00457.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00457.label: 肝郁血瘀证
V010-N00457.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver depression and blood stasis

V010-N00457.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00457.label: 肝郁血瘀证
V010-N00457.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of liver depression and blood stasis
V010-N00457.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising when stagnant liver qi causes blood stasis in the liver, marked by depressed mood, hypochondriac distending or stabbing pain, or formation of mass in the hypochondriac region or lesser abdomen, purple tongue or purple spots

V010-N00458.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00458.label: 肝阳上亢证
V010-N00458.aliases: 肝阳上扰证； 肝阳亢盛证
V010-N00458.englishNames: Liver yang ascendant hyperactivity pattern; pattern/syndrome of ascendant hyperactivity of liver yang; syndrome/pattern of liver yang hyperactivity; syndrome/ pattern of liver yang hyperactivity
V010-N00458.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝实证｜肝阳实证
V010-N00458.definition: 因肝阴不足，阳亢上扰所致。临床以头目胀痛，眩晕、耳鸣，颜面潮红，口苦、咽干，急躁、易怒，烦劳郁怒则加重，甚则不寐，项强、足软，容易仆倒，舌质红，脉弦等为特征的证候。

V010-N00458.label: 肝阳上亢证
V010-N00458.englishNames: syndrome of upper hyperactivity of liver yang; syndrome/pattern of ascendant hyperactivity of liver yang
V010-N00458.definition: 肝阳亢扰于上，以眩晕耳鸣，头目胀痛，头重脚轻，面红目赤，急躁易怒，失眠多梦，腰膝酸软，口苦，舌红脉弦为常见症的证候。

V010-N00458.label: 肝阳上亢证
V010-N00458.aliases: 肝阳亢盛证； 肝阳上扰证
V010-N00458.englishNames: syndrome of upper hyperactivity of liver yang
V010-N00458.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肝和胆证候｜肝系证候
V010-N00458.definition: 肝阳亢扰于上，以眩晕耳鸣，头目胀痛，头重脚轻，面红目赤，急躁易怒，失眠多梦，腰膝酸软，口苦，舌红脉弦等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00458.label: 风阳上扰证
V010-N00458.aliases: 风毒上扰证； 肝风上扰证； 肝阳上扰证
V010-N00458.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肝和胆证候｜肝系证候
V010-N00458.definition: 肝阳有余，扰头面清窍，以头目胀痛，头晕耳鸣，急躁多怒，面红口苦，失眠多梦，舌红脉弦等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00458.label: 肝阳上亢证
V010-N00458.aliases: 肝阳上扰证； 肝阳亢盛证
V010-N00458.englishNames: Liver yang ascendant hyperactivity pattern; pattern/syndrome of ascendant hyperactivity of liver yang; syndrome/pattern of liver yang hyperactivity; syndrome/ pattern of liver yang hyperactivity
V010-N00458.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝实证｜肝阳实证

V010-N00458.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00458.label: 肝阳上亢证
V010-N00458.aliases: Liver yang ascendant hyperactivity pattern； Liver yang disturbing the mind； 肝阳上扰证； 肝阳亢盛证
V010-N00458.englishNames: Liver yang ascendant hyperactivity pattern; pattern/syndrome of ascendant hyperactivity of liver yang; Hyperactivity of liver yang pattern; syndrome/pattern of liver yang hyperactivity; syndrome/ pattern of liver yang hyperactivity
V010-N00458.pinyinNames: gān yáng shàng kàng zhèng; gan yang shang kang zheng
V010-N00458.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00458.definition: Characterized by dizziness, blurred vision, tinnitus, lower back pain, limb numbness, feverish sensations in the palms, soles and chest, flushed cheeks, restlessness, irritability, and a dry and bitter mouth. The tongue is red with a scanty coating. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when liver yin fails to control liver yang.

V010-N00458.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00458.label: 肝阳上亢证
V010-N00458.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of ascendant hyperactivity of liver yang

V010-N00458.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00458.label: 肝阳上亢证
V010-N00458.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of ascendant hyperactivity of liver yang
V010-N00458.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by dizziness, headache, flushed face, blurred vision, tinnitus, bitter taste in the mouth and string-like pulse

V010-N00461.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00461.label: 肝风内动证
V010-N00461.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver wind stirring inside; Liver wind stirring the interior pattern; pattern/syndrome of internal stirring of liver wind
V010-N00461.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝实证
V010-N00461.definition: 泛指因肝阳化风，或热极动风，或肝阳风痰上扰等所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00461.label: 肝风内动证
V010-N00461.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of internal stirring of liver wind; syndrome of liver wind stirring up internally
V010-N00461.definition: 泛指因风阳、邪热、阴血亏虚等所致肝阳升动无制，以抽搐、眩晕、震颤、痉挛为主症的证候。

V010-N00461.label: 肝风内动证
V010-N00461.englishNames: syndrome of internal stirring of liver wind
V010-N00461.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肝和胆证候｜肝系证候
V010-N00461.definition: 泛指因风阳、火热、阴血亏虚等所致，以四肢抽搐、眩晕、震颤等为主症的证候。

V010-N00461.label: 肝风内动证
V010-N00461.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver wind stirring inside; Liver wind stirring the interior pattern; pattern/syndrome of internal stirring of liver wind
V010-N00461.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝实证

V010-N00461.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00461.label: 肝风内动证
V010-N00461.aliases: 肝风证； Internal stirring of liver wind； Liver wind stirring the interior pattern
V010-N00461.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver wind stirring inside; Liver wind stirring the interior pattern; Internal stirring of liver wind pattern; pattern/syndrome of internal stirring of liver wind
V010-N00461.pinyinNames: gan feng nei dong zheng; gān fēng nèi dòng zhèng
V010-N00461.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00461.definition: Characterized by convulsions of the four limbs, vertigo and tremor. This pattern often results from wind yang, fire heat and yin blood deficiency.

V010-N00461.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00461.label: 肝风内动证
V010-N00461.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of internal stirring of liver wind

V010-N00461.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00461.label: 肝风内动证
V010-N00461.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of internal stirring of liver wind
V010-N00461.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by convulsion, tremor or spasm, also known as the liver wind pattern/ syndrome

V010-N00450.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00450.label: 肝热动风证
V010-N00450.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver heat stirring wind; Liver heat stirring wind pattern
V010-N00450.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝实证｜肝风内动证
V010-N00450.definition: 因邪热炽盛，热极动风所致。临床以高热，口渴，神昏，谵语，四肢抽搐，角弓反张，舌质红、舌苔黄，脉弦数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00450.label: 肝热动风证
V010-N00450.aliases: 热动肝风证； 邪陷厥阴证
V010-N00450.englishNames: syndrome of stirring wind liver fire
V010-N00450.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肝和胆证候｜肝系证候
V010-N00450.definition: 邪热炽盛，热极动风，以高热口渴，神昏谵语，四肢抽搐，角弓反张，舌红苔黄，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00450.label: 肝热动风证
V010-N00450.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver heat stirring wind; Liver heat stirring wind pattern
V010-N00450.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝实证｜肝风内动证

V010-N00450.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00450.label: 肝热动风证
V010-N00450.aliases: 热动肝风证； Liver heat stirring wind pattern； Pattern of heat stirring liver wind
V010-N00450.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver heat stirring wind; Liver heat stirring wind pattern
V010-N00450.pinyinNames: gan re dong feng zheng; gān rè dòng fēng zhèng
V010-N00450.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00450.definition: Characterized by a high-grade fever, thirst, unconsciousness, delirium, convulsions of the limbs, and opisthotonos. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is rapid. This pattern often occurs when exuberant heat generates wind.

V010-N00447.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00447.label: 肝火上炎证
V010-N00447.aliases: 肝火上扰清窍证； 肝火上扰证； 肝热上扰证
V010-N00447.englishNames: Liver fire flaming upward pattern; pattern/syndrome of liver fire flaming upward; syndrome/pattern of liver fire flaming up
V010-N00447.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝热证｜肝火证
V010-N00447.definition: 因肝火炽盛，气火上犯清窍，壅滞脉络所致。临床以发热，口渴、口苦，烦躁，失眠，头痛，面赤，或目赤、肿痛，或耳暴鸣、暴聋，或吐血、衄血，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉弦数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00447.label: 肝火上炎证
V010-N00447.englishNames: syndrome of liver fire flaring up; syndrome/pattern of upflaming liver fire
V010-N00447.definition: 肝火炽盛而上炎，以发热口渴，烦躁失眠，头痛，或目赤肿痛，或耳暴鸣暴聋，或吐血、衄血，面赤，舌红苔黄，脉弦数为常见症的证候。

V010-N00447.label: 肝火上炎证
V010-N00447.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肝和胆证候｜肝系证候
V010-N00447.definition: 肝火炽盛而上炎，以发热口渴，烦躁失眠，头痛，或目赤肿痛，或耳暴鸣暴聋，或吐血、衄血，面赤，舌红苔黄，脉弦数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00447.label: 肝火上炎证
V010-N00447.aliases: 肝火上扰清窍证； 肝火上扰证； 肝热上扰证
V010-N00447.englishNames: Liver fire flaming upward pattern; pattern/syndrome of liver fire flaming upward; syndrome/pattern of liver fire flaming up
V010-N00447.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝热证｜肝火证

V010-N00447.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00447.label: 肝火上炎证
V010-N00447.aliases: 肝火上扰清窍证； 肝火上扰证； 肝热上扰证； Liver fire flaming upward pattern； Hyperactivity of liver fire pattern
V010-N00447.englishNames: Liver fire flaming upward pattern; pattern/syndrome of liver fire flaming upward; syndrome/pattern of liver fire flaming up; Upward flaming of liver fire pattern
V010-N00447.pinyinNames: gan huo shang yan zheng; gān huǒ shàng yán zhèng
V010-N00447.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00447.definition: Characterized by fever, thirst, restlessness, insomnia, and headache. Alternatively, eye redness, swelling and pain, sudden tinnitus/deafness, haematemesis, nosebleed and a red face may be present. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is wiry and rapid. This pattern often occurs when exuberance liver fire flows upward.

V010-N00447.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00447.label: 肝火上炎证

V010-N00447.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00447.label: 肝火上炎证
V010-N00447.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of liver fire flaming upward; syndrome of liver fire flaring up
V010-N00447.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by headache, dizziness, tinnitus with buzzing in the ears, impairment of hearing, blood-shot eyes, mental irritability, bitter taste in the mouth, yellow coating of the tongue, rapid stringlike pulse, and hematuria, hemoptysi

V010-N00451.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00451.label: 肝经湿热证
V010-N00451.englishNames: Liver meridian dampness-heat pattern; pattern/syndrome of dampness-heat in the liver meridian; syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the liver meridian
V010-N00451.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝经证
V010-N00451.definition: 因湿热邪毒蕴结于肝，循经下注所致。临床以阴部潮湿、瘙痒，或生疮、溃疡、溢脓，阴器肿痛，或带下量多，黄稠、秽臭，或黄白相兼，白如豆渣、凝乳，或如脓似血，舌质红、舌苔黄腻，脉滑数，或伴见胁肋胀痛，耳胀痛、溢脓等为特征的证候。

V010-N00451.label: 肝经湿热证
V010-N00451.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness-heat in liver channel/meridian; syndrome of dampnessheat of liver channel
V010-N00451.definition: 湿热蕴聚肝经，以胁肋胀痛，阴部潮湿、病痒，阴器肿胀疼痛，或耳胀痛流脓水，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数为常见症的证候。

V010-N00451.label: 肝经湿热证
V010-N00451.englishNames: syndrome of dampnessheat of liver channel
V010-N00451.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肝和胆证候｜肝系证候
V010-N00451.definition: 湿热蕴聚肝经，以胁肋胀痛，或阴部潮湿、瘙痒，阴器肿胀疼痛，或耳胀痛流脓水，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00451.label: 肝经湿热证
V010-N00451.englishNames: Liver meridian dampness-heat pattern; pattern/syndrome of dampness-heat in the liver meridian; syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the liver meridian
V010-N00451.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝经证

V010-N00451.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00451.label: 肝经湿热证
V010-N00451.aliases: Liver meridian damp heat pattern； 肝经湿毒证
V010-N00451.englishNames: Liver meridian dampness-heat pattern; pattern/syndrome of dampness-heat in the liver meridian; Damp heat affecting the liver meridian pattern; syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the liver meridian
V010-N00451.pinyinNames: gān jīng shī rè zhèng; gan jing shi re zheng
V010-N00451.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00451.definition: Characterized by distending pain in the subcostal region, itching, swelling and pain of the external genitalia or yellow, sticky vaginal discharge. Earache with discharge may also be present. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when damp heat affects the liver meridian.

V010-N00451.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00451.label: 肝经湿热证

V010-N00451.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00451.label: 肝经湿热证
V010-N00451.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of dampness-heat in the liver meridian; syndrome of dampnessheat of liver channel
V010-N00451.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by distending pain in the hypochondriac region, or itching and painful swollen genitalia, or ear pain with purulent discharge, reddened tongue with yellow slimy coating and rapid slippery pulse

V010-N00446.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00446.label: 肝气虚证
V010-N00446.englishNames: Liver qi deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of liver qi deficiency
V010-N00446.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝虚证
V010-N00446.definition: 因秉质气虚，或久病伤肝，肝气虚损，升发无力，疏泄不及所致。临床以胁肋痞闷或坠胀，精神忧郁，情绪低沉，畏惧、胆怯，如人将捕，眩晕，肌肤不仁，四肢麻木、痉挛甚或痿弱，或视物昏花，黑矇、视歧或幻视，舌质淡白，脉虚弦或弱，伴见懈怠、乏力，懒言、声低，面色青黄等为特征的证候。

V010-N00446.label: 肝气虚证
V010-N00446.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of liver qi
V010-N00446.definition: 气虚肝炎疏泄，以两胁胀闷，情绪低沉，疲乏气短，头晕眼花，舌淡，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00446.label: 肝气虚证
V010-N00446.aliases: Deficiency of the Liver-qi Syndrom； 肝气亏虚证
V010-N00446.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of liver qi

This pattern often occurs when yang qi becomes deficient, and the liver fails to maintain the free flow of qi.

In severe cases, amenorrhoea may be present. The tongue is pale. The pulse is thready. This pattern often occurs when blood fails to nourish the liver.

V010-N00463.definition: Characterized by jumpiness or easily startled, palpitations, insomnia, nightmares, shortness of breath, spontaneous sweating, tinnitus, blurred vision, limb oedema, loss of taste during eating, and restlessness. The tongue is pale with a greasy coating. The pulse is deep and delayed. This pattern often results from gallbladder qi deficiency and dysfunctions of the zang–fu organs.

V010-N00463.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00463.label: 胆气虚证
V010-N00463.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by panic, suspicion, sighing, nervousness, irritability, lassitude, dizziness and insomnia

V010-N00468.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00468.label: 肠道实热证
V010-N00468.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of excess-heat in the intestines
V010-N00468.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜大肠证类｜大肠实证
V010-N00468.definition: 因肠道热盛，腑气不通所致。临床以发热，面赤，口渴，腹胀满或痛，大便硬结，或喘咳不已，舌质红，舌苔黄、少津，右寸脉实而有力，或脉沉数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00468.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00468.label: 大肠热结证
V010-N00468.aliases: 肠道热结证； 肠热腑实证； 热结肠燥证； 肠道实热证； 大肠实热证
V010-N00468.englishNames: large intestinal heat bind pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of heat binding in the large intestine
V010-N00468.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜大肠证类｜大肠实证｜肠道实热证
V010-N00468.definition: 因里热炽盛，结于大肠，腑气不通，或燥屎内结而迫津下泄所致。临床以潮热、恶热，烦渴引饮，腹胀硬满，疼痛拒按，大便秘结，或热结旁流，泻下黄臭粪水，舌质红，舌苔焦黄。脉沉实或沉数有力等为特征的证候。

V010-N00468.label: 肠道实热证
V010-N00468.englishNames: Syndrome of   large intestine excess heat
V010-N00468.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肺和大肠证候｜大肠证候
V010-N00468.definition: 肠道热盛，腑气不通，以发热口渴，大便秘结，腹胀硬满作痛，舌红苔黄少津，脉沉数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00468.label: 肠道实热证
V010-N00468.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of excess-heat in the intestines
V010-N00468.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜大肠证类｜大肠实证

V010-N00468.label: 大肠热结证
V010-N00468.aliases: 肠道热结证； 肠热腑实证； 热结肠燥证； 肠道实热证； 大肠实热证
V010-N00468.englishNames: large intestinal heat bind pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of heat binding in the large intestine
V010-N00468.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜大肠证类｜大肠实证｜肠道实热证

V010-N00468.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00468.label: 大肠热结证
V010-N00468.aliases: 肠道热结证； 肠道实热证； 大肠实热证； Large intestine excess heat pattern； Excess heat in the large intestine； 肠热腑实证； 热结肠燥证
V010-N00468.englishNames: large intestinal heat bind pattern/ syndrome; Heat stagnation in the large intestine pattern; syndrome/pattern of heat binding in the large intestine
V010-N00468.pinyinNames: dà cháng rè jié zhèng; da chang re jie zheng
V010-N00468.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00468.definition: Characterized by fever, thirst, constipation, abdominal distension/hardness/fullness and abdominal pain with tenderness. The tongue is red with a dry, yellow coating. The pulse is deep and rapid. This pattern often occurs when exuberant interior heat blocks the intestinal qi.

V010-N00470.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00470.label: 大肠湿热证
V010-N00470.englishNames: large intestinal dampness-heat pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the large intestine; Large intestine dampness heat pattern
V010-N00470.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜大肠证类｜大肠实证｜肠道实热证
V010-N00470.definition: 因湿热蕴结大肠，阻滞气机，损伤肠络，传导失常所致。临床以腹胀、腹痛，暴注下泻，或下痢脓血，里急后重，或腹泻不爽，粪质黏稠腥臭，肛门灼热，舌质红，舌苔黄腻，脉滑数，伴见发热，口渴，小便短黄等为特征的证候。

V010-N00470.label: 大肠湿热证
V010-N00470.englishNames: syndrome of dampnessheat in large intestine
V010-N00470.definition: 湿热内蕴，阻滞肠道，以腹胀腹痛，暴注下泻，或下痢脓血，里急后重，或腹泻不爽，粪质黏稠腥臭，肛门灼热，身热口渴，尿短黄，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见疾的证候。

V010-N00470.label: 大肠湿热证
V010-N00470.englishNames: syndrome of dampnessheat in large intestine
V010-N00470.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肺和大肠证候｜大肠证候
V010-N00470.definition: 湿热内蕴，阻滞肠道，以腹胀腹痛，暴注下泻，或下痢脓血，里急后重，或腹泻不爽、粪质粘稠腥臭，肛门灼热，身热口渴，尿短黄，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00470.label: 大肠湿热证
V010-N00470.englishNames: large intestinal dampness-heat pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the large intestine; Large intestine dampness heat pattern
V010-N00470.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜大肠证类｜大肠实证｜肠道实热证

V010-N00470.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00470.label: 肠道湿热证
V010-N00470.aliases: Large intestine dampness heat pattern； 大肠湿热证
V010-N00470.englishNames: Damp heat in the intestine pattern; intestinal dampnessheat pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00470.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00470.definition: Characterized by abdominal distension/pain, sudden, fulminant diarrhoea, diarrhoea with blood, tenesmus, a sensation of incomplete evacuation, sticky, strong-odoured stools, a burning sensation around the anus, fever, thirst, and scanty urine. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when internal damp heat obstructs the intestine.

V010-N00470.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00470.label: 肠道湿热证

V010-N00470.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00470.label: 大肠湿热证
V010-N00470.englishNames: large intestinal dampness-heat pattern/syndrome; syndrome of dampnessheat in large intestine
V010-N00470.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by discharge of purulent and bloody stools, abdominal pain, tenesmus, scanty dark urine, yellow and slimy tongue coating, and rapid slippery pulse

V010-N00470.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00470.label: 肠道湿热证
V010-N00470.definition: a syndrome marked by discharge of purulent and bloody stools, accompanied by abdominal pain, tenesmus, scanty dark urine, yellow and slimy tongue coating, and rapid slippery pulse

V010-N00469.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00469.label: 大肠津亏证
V010-N00469.aliases: 肠道津伤证； 肠道津亏证； 肠燥津亏证； 津伤肠燥证； 肠燥津伤证
V010-N00469.englishNames: large intestinal fluid deficiency pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of fluid depletion in the large intestine; Large intestine fluid deficiency pattern
V010-N00469.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜大肠证类｜大肠虚证
V010-N00469.definition: 因津液亏损，肠失濡润所致。临床以答辩燥如羊屎，数日一行，舌质红而干，舌苔少，脉细数，可伴见心烦，口渴，腹胀等为特征的证候。

V010-N00469.label: 肠道津亏证
V010-N00469.aliases: 肠燥津亏证； 大肠津亏证； 大肠液亏证
V010-N00469.englishNames: pattern of intestinal dryness and fluid consumption
V010-N00469.path: 病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜津液病｜津液亏损证
V010-N00469.definition: 津液亏损，肠失濡润，以大便干燥如羊屎，多日不便，腹胀作痛，少腹触及包块，口渴，舌干少津，脉弦涩等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00469.label: 大肠津亏证
V010-N00469.aliases: 肠道津伤证； 肠道津亏证； 肠燥津亏证； 津伤肠燥证； 肠燥津伤证
V010-N00469.englishNames: large intestinal fluid deficiency pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of fluid depletion in the large intestine; Large intestine fluid deficiency pattern
V010-N00469.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜大肠证类｜大肠虚证

V010-N00469.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00469.label: 肠燥津亏证
V010-N00469.aliases: 大肠液亏证； 大肠津亏证； Large intestine fluid deficiency pattern； Fluid insufficiency in the large intestine； 肠燥津伤证
V010-N00469.englishNames: Intestinal dryness pattern; pattern/syndrome of intestinal dryness and fluid depletion
V010-N00469.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00469.definition: Characterized by extremely dry stools (like sheep droppings), one bowel movement in several days, abdominal distension/pain, palpable abdominal masses, and thirst. The tongue is dry. The pulse is wiry and hesitant. This pattern often occurs when body fluids fail to nourish the large intestine.

V010-N00469.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00469.label: 肠燥津亏证
V010-N00469.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of intestinal dryness and fluid consumption

V010-N00469.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00469.label: 大肠津亏证
V010-N00469.englishNames: large intestinal fluid deficiency pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00469.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by constipation or difficulty in defecation accompanied by dry throat and reddened tongue with scanty coating

V010-N00469.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00469.label: 肠燥津亏证
V010-N00469.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of intestinal dryness and fluid depletion
V010-N00469.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by dry feces difficult to evacuate, infrequent bowel movement, abdominal distension and pain, or palpable mass in the lower abdomen, thirst, reddened tongue with scanty moisture and yellow dry coating, and string-like choppy

V010-N00471.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00471.label: 大肠虚寒证
V010-N00471.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of deficiency-cold in the large intestine; Large intestine deficiency cold pattern
V010-N00471.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜大肠证类｜大肠虚证
V010-N00471.definition: 因阳气虚衰，虚寒内生，大肠功能减退，传导失常所致。临床以久泻或久痢，下利稀薄，完谷不化，腹痛隐隐，喜温、喜按，舌质淡，舌苔白润或滑，脉沉迟无力，或伴见食少，畏寒、肢冷等为特征的证候。

V010-N00471.label: 大肠虚寒证
V010-N00471.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肺和大肠证候｜大肠证候
V010-N00471.definition: 阳气虚衰，温煦失职，大肠功能减退，虚寒内生，可见肠鸣转气、腹痛喜温喜按、溲清便溏、腹胀不食、畏寒肢冷、舌淡苔白滑、脉沉细或迟缓等症。

V010-N00471.label: 大肠虚寒证
V010-N00471.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of deficiency-cold in the large intestine; Large intestine deficiency cold pattern
V010-N00471.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜大肠证类｜大肠虚证

V010-N00471.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00471.label: 大肠虚寒证
V010-N00471.aliases: 大肠虚冷证； Large intestine deficiency cold pattern
V010-N00471.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of deficiency-cold in the large intestine; Large intestine deficiency cold pattern; Deficiency cold in the large intestine pattern
V010-N00471.pinyinNames: da chang xu han zheng; dà cháng xū hán zhèng
V010-N00471.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00471.definition: Characterized by chronic diarrhoea/dysentery, dull abdominal pain that alleviates upon warmth and pressure, cold intolerance and cold limbs. The tongue is pale with a white, slippery coating. The pulse is deep, slow and weak. This pattern often occurs when yang qi fails to secure the large intestine.

V010-N00477.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00477.label: 肺气虚证
V010-N00477.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of lung qi deficiency; lung qi deficiency pattern/syndrome; Lung qi deficiency pattern
V010-N00477.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜肺证类｜肺虚证
V010-N00477.definition: 因秉质气虚，或久病虚损，肺功能减退所致。临床以咳嗽无力，气短而喘，动辄尤甚，咯痰清稀，语声低微，面白，自汗，舌质淡，舌苔白，脉弱，或伴见神疲、乏力，畏风、怯冷等为特征的证候。

V010-N00477.label: 肺气虚证
V010-N00477.englishNames: lung-qi deficiency syndrome/pattern; syndrome of deficiency oflung qi
V010-N00477.definition: 肺气虚弱，以咳嗽无力，气短而端，动则尤甚，吐痰清稀，声音低弱，自汗，畏风，舌淡，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00477.label: 肺气虚证
V010-N00477.aliases: 肺气亏虚证； 肺气虚耗证
V010-N00477.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肺和大肠证候｜肺系证候
V010-N00477.definition: 气虚弱，以咳嗽无力、气短而喘、动则尤甚、吐痰清稀、声低、或有自汗、畏风、舌淡、脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00477.label: 肺气虚证
V010-N00477.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of lung qi deficiency; lung qi deficiency pattern/syndrome; Lung qi deficiency pattern
V010-N00477.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜肺证类｜肺虚证

V010-N00477.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00477.label: 肺气虚证
V010-N00477.aliases: 肺气亏虚证； 肺卫气虚不固证； 肺卫气虚证； Lung qi deficiency pattern； Defense qi deficiency pattern； Lung deficiency with exterior weakness pattern； Lung and defense qi insecurity pattern； Insecurity of lung Wei-defence
V010-N00477.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of lung qi deficiency; lung qi deficiency pattern/syndrome; Lung qi deficiency pattern
V010-N00477.pinyinNames: fei qi xu zheng; fèi qì xū zhèng
V010-N00477.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00477.definition: Characterized by weak coughing and panting, and shortness of breath that aggravate upon physical exertion, expectoration of thin clear phlegm, a low voice, spontaneous sweating, wind intolerance and susceptibility to common colds. The tongue is pale. The pulse is weak. This pattern often results from lung qi deficiency and decreased lung function.

V010-N00477.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00477.label: 肺气虚证

V010-N00477.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00477.label: 肺气虚证
V010-N00477.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by pale complexion, shortness of breath, feeble voice, intolerance of wind and spontaneous sweating

V010-N00478.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00478.label: 肺气阴两虚证
V010-N00478.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of lung qi and yin; Lung qi and yin deficiency pattern
V010-N00478.pinyinNames: fei qi yin liang xu zheng
V010-N00478.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜肺证类｜肺虚证
V010-N00478.definition: 因肺气虚弱，阴液亏虚所致。临床以干咳无力，气短而喘，咽喉干燥，声音哑哑，五心烦热，舌质淡红，舌苔少津，脉细无力等为特征的证候。

V010-N00478.label: 肺气阴两虚证
V010-N00478.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of both qi and yin of lung
V010-N00478.definition: 肺气虚弱，阴液亏虚，以干咳无力，气短而喘，声低或音哑，五心烦热，脉细无力等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00478.label: 肺气阴两虚证
V010-N00478.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of both qi and yin of lung
V010-N00478.pinyinNames: fei qi yin liang xu zheng
V010-N00478.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肺和大肠证候｜肺系证候
V010-N00478.definition: 肺气虚弱，阴液亏虚，以干咳无力，气短而喘，声低或音哑，五心烦热，脉细无力等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00478.label: 肺气阴两虚证
V010-N00478.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of lung qi and yin; Lung qi and yin deficiency pattern
V010-N00478.pinyinNames: fei qi yin liang xu zheng
V010-N00478.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜肺证类｜肺虚证

V010-N00478.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00478.label: 肺气阴两虚证
V010-N00478.aliases: Lung qi and yin deficiency pattern
V010-N00478.englishNames: Lung qi/yin deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of lung qi and yin; Lung qi and yin deficiency pattern
V010-N00478.pinyinNames: fèi qì yīn liǎng xū zhèng; fei qi yin liang xu zheng
V010-N00478.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00478.definition: Characterized by weak, unproductive coughs, shortness of breath, panting, a low/hoarse voice and feverish sensations in the palms, soles and chest. The pulse is thready and weak. This pattern often results from a deficiency of lung qi and yin.

V010-N00483.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00483.label: 肺阳虚证
V010-N00483.aliases: 肺虚寒证； 肺阳亏虚证
V010-N00483.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of lung yang deficiency; Lung yang deficiency pattern; lung yang deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00483.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜肺证类｜肺虚证
V010-N00483.definition: 因秉质阳虚，或久病伤及阳气，肺阳亏虚所致。临床以咳嗽或喘，咳唾痰白、清稀，遇冷加重或反复，胸闷、背寒，神疲、气短、息微，或面目浮肿，小便不利，舌质淡胖，舌苔白滑，脉沉弱或弦缓，伴见畏冷、肢凉，面色？白，口不渴等为特征的证候。

V010-N00483.label: 肺阳虚证1
V010-N00483.aliases: 肺气虚寒证； 肺虚寒证
V010-N00483.path: 病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候｜阳虚证
V010-N00483.definition: 阳气亏虚，肺失温煦，以咳嗽气喘，畏冷肢凉，吐稀白痰，胸闷，苔白滑，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00483.label: 肺阳虚证
V010-N00483.aliases: 肺虚寒证； 肺阳亏虚证
V010-N00483.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of lung yang deficiency; Lung yang deficiency pattern; lung yang deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00483.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜肺证类｜肺虚证

V010-N00483.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00483.label: 肺阳虚证
V010-N00483.aliases: 肺虚寒证； 肺阳亏虚证； Lung yang deficiency pattern
V010-N00483.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of lung yang deficiency; Lung yang deficiency pattern; lung yang deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00483.pinyinNames: fei yang xu zheng; fèi yáng xū zhèng
V010-N00483.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00483.definition: Characterized by panting, weak coughs with thin, white phlegm, chest tightness, a low voice, shallow breathing, shortness of breath, and cold limbs. The tongue is pale, purple, enlarged and tender with a white, slippery coating. The pulse is deep, slow and weak. This pattern often occurs when yang qi fails to warm the lung.

V010-N00483.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00483.label: 肺阳虚证

V010-N00483.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00483.label: 肺阳虚证
V010-N00483.definition: a pattern/syndrome resulting from deficiency of yang qi to warm the lung, usually manifested by cough, dyspnea and thin expectoration, fear of cold and cold extremities, spontaneous sweating, pale complexion, enlarged tongue with white slippery coatin

V010-N00484.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00484.label: 肺阴虚证
V010-N00484.aliases: 肺阴亏虚证； 肺虚热证
V010-N00484.englishNames: lung yin deficiency pattern/syndrome; Lung yin deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of lung yin deficiency; syndrome/ pattern of lung yin deficiency
V010-N00484.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜肺证类｜肺虚证
V010-N00484.definition: 因痨虫蚀肺，耗损阴津，或虚劳内伤，肺阴亏虚所致。临床以干咳、痰少，痰不易咯出，或痰中带血，咽干、声嘶，舌质红，舌苔少津，脉细数，伴见低热、盗汗，五心烦热，颧红等为特征的证候。

V010-N00484.label: 肺阴虚证
V010-N00484.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of lung yin; lung yin deficiency syndrome/pattern
V010-N00484.definition: 肺阴不足，虚热内生，以干咳，或痰少而黏，或痰中带血，口燥咽干，或音哑，潮热颧红，或有盗汗，舌红少津，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00484.label: 肺阴虚证
V010-N00484.aliases: 肺虚热证； 肺阴不足证； 肺阴亏耗证； 肺阴亏损证； 肺阴亏虚型； 肺阴亏虚证； 肺阴亏证； 肺阴虚症
V010-N00484.path: 病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候｜阴虚证
V010-N00484.definition: 肺阴亏虚，虚热内扰，以干咳少痰，或痰粘不易咯出，或痰中带血，口燥咽干，或音哑，潮热颧红，或有盗汗，舌红少津，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00484.label: 肺阴虚证
V010-N00484.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜肺证类｜肺虚证

V010-N00484.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00484.label: 肺阴虚证
V010-N00484.aliases: 肺阴亏虚证； 肺虚热证； Lung yin deficiency pattern； Insufficiency of lung yin pattern
V010-N00484.englishNames: lung yin deficiency pattern/syndrome; Lung yin deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of lung yin deficiency; syndrome/ pattern of lung yin deficiency
V010-N00484.pinyinNames: fei yin xu zheng; fèi yīn xū zhèng
V010-N00484.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00484.definition: Characterized by unproductive coughs or coughing with scanty, sticky phlegm or blood-stained phlegm, a dry mouth and throat, a hoarse voice, hot flushes, flushed cheeks, and night sweats. The tongue is dry and red. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when lung yin deficiency generates internal heat.

V010-N00484.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00484.label: 肺阴虚证

V010-N00484.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00484.label: 肺阴虚证
V010-N00484.definition: a pattern/syndrome attributed to yin deficiency of the lung with endogenous heat, manifested by unproductive cough, afternoon fever, night sweating, flushed cheeks, dry throat, red and dry tongue, and rapid fine pulse

V010-N00496.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00496.label: 肾气虚证
V010-N00496.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of kidney qi deficiency; Kidney qi deficiency pattern; kidney qi deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00496.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证
V010-N00496.definition: 因先天不足，肾气未充，或年高肾虚，久病伤肾所致。临床以腰膝酸软，眩晕，耳鸣、耳背，健忘，动辄气促，神疲、乏力，面色淡白，四肢欠温，小便清长，夜尿增多，舌质淡或胖，舌苔白，脉细或弱，尺部无力，或伴见小便频数，余沥不尽，甚则遗尿，或性欲衰减，滑精、早泄，或月经淋漓，闭经，滑胎等为特征的证候。

V010-N00496.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00496.label: 肾精亏虚证
V010-N00496.aliases: 肾精不足证； 肾精亏损证； 肾虚精亏证； 肾精亏耗证； 肾气亏虚证
V010-N00496.englishNames: Kidney essence deficiency pattern; syndrome/ pattern of kidney essence depletion; syndrome/pattern of kidney essence depletion
V010-N00496.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证
V010-N00496.definition: 因先天不足，精髓不充，或后天失养，肾虚精亏所致。临床以生长发育迟缓，腰酸、骨痿，动作迟缓，或骨折难以愈合，早衰，健忘，或愚笨、痴呆，舌质淡，脉细弱，尺部无力，伴见头晕、眼花，耳鸣、耳聋，毛发稀疏，齿浮松动等为特征的证候。

V010-N00496.label: 肾气虚证
V010-N00496.englishNames: kidney qi deficiency syndrome/pattern; syndrome of deficiency of kidney qi
V010-N00496.definition: 肾气虚弱，以腰酸，耳鸣，性欲减退，头晕健忘，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00496.definition: Characterized by delayed growth in children, decreased reproductive function, premature ageing, tinnitus, hair loss, loose teeth, and poor memory. This pattern often results from kidney essence deficiency.

V010-N00494.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证｜肾气虚证｜肾虚不固证
