V010-N00494.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency in the lung and kidney; lung-kidney qi deficiency pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00494.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肺脏兼证类｜肺肾兼证｜肺肾两虚证
V010-N00494.definition: 因肺肾气虚，摄纳无权所致。临床以呼多吸少，咳嗽无力，动则尤甚，吐痰清稀，声低，自汗，或尿随咳出，舌质淡紫，脉弱等为特征的证候。

V010-N00494.label: 肺肾气虚证
V010-N00494.aliases: 肾不纳气证； 肾失摄纳证； 肾虚不纳证
V010-N00494.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脏腑兼证
V010-N00494.definition: 肺肾气虚，摄纳无权，以呼多吸少，咳嗽无力，动则尤甚，吐痰清稀，声低自汗，或尿随咳出，舌淡紫，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00494.label: 肾不纳气证
V010-N00494.englishNames: Kidney failing to receive qi pattern; syndrome/pattern of kidney failing to receive qi; pattern/syndrome of kidney failing to receive qi
V010-N00494.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证｜肾气虚证｜肾虚不固证

V010-N00494.label: 肺肾气虚证
V010-N00494.aliases: 肾不纳气证； 肾失摄纳证
V010-N00494.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency in the lung and kidney; lung-kidney qi deficiency pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00494.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肺脏兼证类｜肺肾兼证｜肺肾两虚证

V010-N00494.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00494.label: 肺肾气虚证
V010-N00494.aliases: Insufficient qi of the lung and kidney pattern； Kidney failing to receive qi pattern； Lung–kidney deficiency pattern； 肾不纳气证； 肾失摄纳证
V010-N00494.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency in the lung and kidney; Qi deficiency of the lung and kidney pattern; lung-kidney qi deficiency pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00494.pinyinNames: fei shen qi xu zheng; fèi shèn qì xū zhèng
V010-N00494.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00494.definition: Characterized by more exhalation than inhalation, weak coughs that aggravate upon physical exertion, expectoration of thin, clear sputum, a low voice and spontaneous sweating. Cough-induced urine leaking may also be present. The tongue is pale purple. The pulse is weak. This pattern often results from qi deficiency of the lung and kidney.

V010-N00494.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00494.label: 肾不纳气证
V010-N00494.aliases: Kidney failing to receive qi pattern； 肾气失纳证
V010-N00494.englishNames: Kidney failing to receive qi pattern; Kidney failing to absorb qi pattern; syndrome/pattern of kidney failing to receive qi; pattern/syndrome of kidney failing to receive qi
V010-N00494.pinyinNames: shèn bú nà qì zhèng; shen bu na qi zheng
V010-N00494.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00494.definition: Characterized by shortness of breath, dyspnoea, panting or sweating upon physical exertion, and more exhalation than inhalation. In severe cases, facial puffiness and leg oedema may be present. The pulse is thready or deficient, floating and rootless. This pattern often occurs when kidney qi fails to absorb lung qi.

V010-N00494.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00494.label: 肺肾气虚证
V010-N00494.aliases: ZZFS20； 肾不纳气证； 肾失摄纳证
V010-N00494.englishNames: lung-kidney qi deficiency pattern/ syndrome; syndrome of qi deficiency of lung and kidney
V010-N00494.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by dyspnea with prolonged exhalation, spontaneous sweating, lack of strength, aching lumbus and limp legs, and cough with thin sputum

V010-N00494.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00494.label: 肾不纳气证
V010-N00494.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of kidney failing to receive qi
V010-N00494.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by dyspnea with prolonged exhalation, asthenic cough and feeble voice

V010-N00498.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00498.label: 肾虚髓亏证
V010-N00498.englishNames: Kidney deficiency with marrow depletion pattern; syndrome/pattern of kidney deficiency and marrow depletion
V010-N00498.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证｜肾精亏虚证
V010-N00498.definition: 因禀赋虚薄，或久病劳损，肾精不足，精髓亏减所致。临床以生长发育迟缓，腰脊酸软，眩晕，耳鸣，健忘，痴愚或痴呆，舌质淡，舌苔白，脉虚、尺弱等为特征的证候。

V010-N00498.label: 肾虚髓亏证
V010-N00498.englishNames: syndrome of marrow depletion due to kidney deficiency
V010-N00498.definition: 肾精亏虚，精髓不足，以生长发育迟缓，或骨折久不愈合，或腰酸骨痿，头晕耳鸣，健忘痴呆等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00498.label: 肾虚髓亏证
V010-N00498.englishNames: syndrome of marrow depletion due to kidney deficiency
V010-N00498.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肾和膀胱证候｜肾系证候
V010-N00498.definition: 肾精亏虚，精髓不足，以生长发育迟缓，或骨折久不愈合，或腰酸骨痿，头晕耳鸣，健忘痴呆等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00498.label: 肾虚髓亏证
V010-N00498.englishNames: Kidney deficiency with marrow depletion pattern; syndrome/pattern of kidney deficiency and marrow depletion
V010-N00498.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证｜肾精亏虚证

V010-N00498.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00498.label: 肾虚髓亏证
V010-N00498.aliases: 肾虚髓减证； Kidney deficiency with marrow depletion pattern
V010-N00498.englishNames: Kidney deficiency with marrow depletion pattern; Kidney marrow deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of kidney deficiency and marrow depletion
V010-N00498.pinyinNames: shen xu sui kui zheng; shèn xū suǐ kuī zhèng
V010-N00498.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00498.definition: Characterized by delayed growth and development, delayed healing of bone fracture, low back/knee soreness and weakness, dizziness, tinnitus, poor memory and dementia. This pattern often results from kidney essence/marrow deficiency.

V010-N00495.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00495.label: 肾气虚水泛证
V010-N00495.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of kidney qi deficiency and water flooding; Kidney qi deficiency with water retention pattern
V010-N00495.pinyinNames: shen qi xu shui fan zheng
V010-N00495.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证｜肾虚兼夹证｜肾虚水泛证
V010-N00495.definition: 因肾气亏虚，气化失职，水湿泛溢所致。临床以下肢水肿明显，尿少，腰膝酸软，面色淡白或暗滞，舌质淡胖，舌苔白滑，脉弱等为特征的证候。

V010-N00495.label: 肾气虚水泛证
V010-N00495.englishNames: Syndrome of Water Retention Within Body in case of Kidney-qi Deficiency
V010-N00495.pinyinNames: shen qi xu shui fan zheng
V010-N00495.path: 病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜津液病｜水液停聚证
V010-N00495.definition: 肾气亏虚，气化无权，水液泛溢，以水肿下肢为甚，尿少，腰膝酸软，舌淡胖，苔白滑，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00495.label: 肾气虚水泛证
V010-N00495.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of kidney qi deficiency and water flooding; Kidney qi deficiency with water retention pattern
V010-N00495.pinyinNames: shen qi xu shui fan zheng
V010-N00495.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证｜肾虚兼夹证｜肾虚水泛证

V010-N00495.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00495.label: 肾气虚水泛证
V010-N00495.aliases: 肾气虚水停证； Kidney qi deficiency with water retention pattern； Kidney qi deficiency with water flooding pattern
V010-N00495.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of kidney qi deficiency and water flooding; Kidney qi deficiency with water retention pattern; Water retention due to kidney qi deficiency pattern
V010-N00495.pinyinNames: shen qi xu shui fan zheng; shèn qì xū shuǐ fàn zhèng
V010-N00495.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00495.definition: Characterized by leg oedema, scanty urine, and low back/knee soreness and weakness. The tongue is pale and enlarged with a white, slippery coating. The pulse is weak. This pattern often occurs when kidney qi fails to perform qi transformation, resulting in water retention.

V010-N00500.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00500.label: 肾阴虚证
V010-N00500.aliases: 阴虚肾亏证； 肾阴亏虚证； 肾阴虚热证； 肾阴虚损证
V010-N00500.englishNames: Kidney yin deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of kidney yin deficiency; kidney yin deficiency pattern/syndrome; syndrome/ pattern of kidney yin deficiency
V010-N00500.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证
V010-N00500.definition: 因先天禀赋不足，或房劳多产、久病大病损伤肾阴，或虚热内扰所致。临床以五心烦热，腰膝酸软或痛，眩晕，耳鸣，齿松，发脱，遗精，月经后期，量少红稠，甚则经闭，舌质红，舌苔少，脉细数，或伴见潮热，颧红，盗汗等为特征的证候。

V010-N00500.label: 肾阴虚证
V010-N00500.englishNames: kidney yin deficiency syndrome/pattern; syndrome of deficiency of kidney yin
V010-N00500.definition: 肾阴亏虚，虚热内生，以腰膝酸软而痛，眩晕耳鸣，齿松发脱，五心烦热，潮热颧红，男子遗精，女子经少或闭经，舌红少苔，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00500.label: 肾阴虚证
V010-N00500.aliases: 肾水亏虚证； 肾阴不足型； 肾阴亏虚证； 真阴不足证
V010-N00500.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of kidney yin
V010-N00500.path: 病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候｜阴虚证
V010-N00500.definition: 肾阴亏损，虚热内扰，以腰膝酸软而痛，男子遗精，女子经少或经闭，齿松发脱，眩晕耳鸣，五心烦热，潮热颧红，舌红少苔，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00500.label: 肾阴虚证
V010-N00500.aliases: 阴虚肾亏证； 肾阴亏虚证； 肾阴虚热证； 肾阴虚损证
V010-N00500.englishNames: Kidney yin deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of kidney yin deficiency; kidney yin deficiency pattern/syndrome; syndrome/ pattern of kidney yin deficiency
V010-N00500.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证

V010-N00500.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00500.label: 肾阴虚证
V010-N00500.aliases: 阴虚肾亏证； 肾阴亏虚证； 肾阴虚热证； 肾阴虚损证； Genuine yin deficiency pattern； Kidney water depletion and deficiency pattern； Primordial yin deficiency pattern
V010-N00500.englishNames: Kidney yin deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of kidney yin deficiency; kidney yin deficiency pattern/syndrome; syndrome/ pattern of kidney yin deficiency
V010-N00500.pinyinNames: shen yin xu zheng; shèn yīn xū zhèng
V010-N00500.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00500.definition: Characterized by low back/knee soreness and weakness, lassitude, dizziness, blurred vision, deafness, tinnitus, nocturnal emissions, a dry mouth, sore throat, flushed cheeks, feverish sensations in the palms, soles and chest, and tidal fever in the afternoon. The tongue is red with no or scanty coating. The pulse is thready and rapid. Often results from kidney yin deficiency.

V010-N00500.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00500.label: 肾阴虚证

V010-N00500.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00500.label: 肾阴虚证
V010-N00500.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by lumbago, lassitude, dizziness, tinnitus, nocturnal emission in men and oligomenorrhea in women, emaciation, dry throat, thirst, flushed cheeks, hot sensation in the palms and soles, afternoon fever, night sweating, reddene

V010-N00501.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00501.label: 肾阴阳两虚证
V010-N00501.englishNames: syndrome/ pattern of dual deficiency of kidney yin and yang; syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of kidney yin and yang; Kidney yin and yang deficiency pattern
V010-N00501.pinyinNames: shen yin yang liang xu zheng
V010-N00501.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证
V010-N00501.definition: 因体虚久病，阴虚及阳，或阳损及阴，肾阴肾阳俱虚所致。临床以畏冷、肢凉，五心烦热，眩晕、耳鸣，腰膝酸软，遗精、早泄，梦交、滑泄，经少、难孕，舌质暗淡，舌苔光润，脉细或弱，尺部无力等为特征的证候。

V010-N00501.label: 肾阴阳两虚证
V010-N00501.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of both yin and yang of kidney
V010-N00501.definition: 肾的阴阳俱虚，以畏冷肢凉，五心烦热，眩晕耳鸣，腰膝酸痛，男子遗精早泄，女子经少难孕，尺脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00501.label: 肾阴阳两虚证
V010-N00501.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of both yin and yang of kidney
V010-N00501.pinyinNames: shen yin yang liang xu zheng
V010-N00501.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肾和膀胱证候｜肾系证候
V010-N00501.definition: 肾的阴阳俱虚，以畏冷肢凉，五心烦热，眩晕耳鸣，腰膝酸痛，遗精早泄，尺脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00501.label: 肾阴阳两虚证
V010-N00501.englishNames: syndrome/ pattern of dual deficiency of kidney yin and yang; syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of kidney yin and yang; Kidney yin and yang deficiency pattern
V010-N00501.pinyinNames: shen yin yang liang xu zheng
V010-N00501.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证

V010-N00501.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00501.label: 肾阴阳两虚证
V010-N00501.aliases: Kidney yin and yang deficiency pattern
V010-N00501.englishNames: syndrome/ pattern of dual deficiency of kidney yin and yang; syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of kidney yin and yang; Deficiency of kidney yin and yang pattern; Kidney yin and yang deficiency pattern
V010-N00501.pinyinNames: shen yin yang liang xu zheng; shèn yīn yáng liǎng xū zhèng
V010-N00501.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00501.definition: Characterized by low back soreness, back pain, dizziness, insomnia, poor memory, hearing decline, low libido and decreased reproductive function. This pattern often results from congenital deficiency, over-exertion or chronic diseases.

V010-N00506.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00506.label: 膀胱蓄水证
V010-N00506.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of bladder amassment of water; Bladder water accumulation pattern
V010-N00506.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜膀胱证类｜膀胱实证｜膀胱停水证
V010-N00506.definition: 因膀胱气化障碍，水蓄膀胱所致。临床以小腹膨大、胀满或急痛，小便不利，舌苔白滑。脉沉弦或紧等为特征的证候。

V010-N00506.label: 太阳蓄水证
V010-N00506.path: 病证｜证候｜六经证候｜三阳病｜太阳病证｜太阳腑证
V010-N00506.definition: 太阳经证不解，邪与水结，膀胱气化不利，水液停蓄，以发热恶寒，小便不利，少腹满，消渴，水入即吐，脉浮或浮数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00506.label: 膀胱蓄水证
V010-N00506.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of bladder amassment of water; Bladder water accumulation pattern
V010-N00506.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜膀胱证类｜膀胱实证｜膀胱停水证

V010-N00506.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00506.label: 太阳蓄水证
V010-N00506.aliases: 太阳蓄水； 膀胱蓄水证； Bladder water accumulation pattern； Water amassment in the bladder pattern； Water retention in the urinary bladder
V010-N00506.englishNames: greater yang waterretention pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of taiyang amassment of water; Taiyang water retention pattern
V010-N00506.pinyinNames: tai yang xu shui zheng; tài yáng xù shuǐ zhèng
V010-N00506.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00506.definition: Characterized by lower abdominal bulging, distension and pain and inhibited urination. This pattern often occurs when the bladder fails to perform qi transformation, resulting in water retention.

V010-N00505.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00505.label: 膀胱湿热证
V010-N00505.englishNames: Bladder dampness-heat pattern; bladder dampnessheat pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the bladder
V010-N00505.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜膀胱证类｜膀胱实证
V010-N00505.definition: 因湿热侵袭，蕴结膀胱所致。临床以小便急迫、频数、涩痛、灼痛，小便黄赤或浑浊，舌质红，舌苔黄腻，脉滑数，或伴见发热，口渴，尿血或砂石等为特征的证候。

V010-N00505.label: 膀胱湿热证
V010-N00505.englishNames: syndrome of dampnessheat of bladder; bladder dampness-heat syndrome/pattern
V010-N00505.definition: 湿热侵袭，蕴结膀胱，以小便频数、急迫、灼热、涩痛，或尿液浑浊，或尿血，或尿中有砂石，发热口渴，小腹胀痛，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00505.label: 膀胱湿热证
V010-N00505.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肾和膀胱证候｜膀胱证候
V010-N00505.definition: 湿热侵袭，蕴结膀胱，以小便频数、急迫、灼热、涩痛，或混浊，或有脓血、砂石，发热口渴，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00505.label: 膀胱湿热证
V010-N00505.englishNames: Bladder dampness-heat pattern; bladder dampnessheat pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the bladder
V010-N00505.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜膀胱证类｜膀胱实证

V010-N00505.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00505.label: 膀胱湿热证
V010-N00505.englishNames: Bladder dampness-heat pattern; Damp heat in the urinary bladder pattern; bladder dampnessheat pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the bladder
V010-N00505.pinyinNames: páng guāng shī rè zhèng; bang guang shi re zheng
V010-N00505.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00505.definition: Characterized by urgent, frequent and painful urination with a burning sensation, fever and thirst. Alternatively, the urine may be turbid or contain stones. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when damp heat accumulates in the urinary bladder.

V010-N00505.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00505.label: 膀胱湿热证

V010-N00505.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00505.label: 膀胱湿热证
V010-N00505.definition: a pattern/syndrome attributed to dampness-heat attacking on and accumulating in the bladder, marked by frequency and urgency of urination, strangury, turbid urine or hematuria, reddened tongue with yellow slimy coating and rapid pulse

V010-N00507.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00507.label: 膀胱蓄血证
V010-N00507.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood amassment in the bladder; Blood accumulation in the bladder pattern
V010-N00507.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜膀胱证类｜膀胱实证
V010-N00507.definition: 因腹部外伤，或邪热内侵，血蓄膀胱所致。临床以小腹憋胀，小便刺痛、不畅或中断，血尿或尿中血丝、血块，舌质紫或有瘀点，脉弦涩等为特征的证候。

V010-N00507.label: 太阳蓄血证
V010-N00507.path: 病证｜证候｜六经证候｜三阳病｜太阳病证｜太阳腑证
V010-N00507.definition: 太阳经证不解，邪热内传，与血相结于少腹，以少腹急结或硬满，小便自利，如狂或发狂，善忘，大便色黑，脉沉涩或沉结等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00507.label: 膀胱蓄血证
V010-N00507.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood amassment in the bladder; Blood accumulation in the bladder pattern
V010-N00507.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜膀胱证类｜膀胱实证

V010-N00507.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00507.label: 太阳蓄血证
V010-N00507.aliases: 太阳蓄血； 膀胱蓄血证； Blood accumulation in the bladder pattern； Blood and heat build up in the bladder pattern； Blood retention in the urinary bladder
V010-N00507.englishNames: greater yang blood amassment pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/ pattern of taiyang amassment of blood; Taiyang disease with stagnated blood syndrome; syndrome/pattern of taiyang amassment of blood; Taiyang blood retention pattern
V010-N00507.pinyinNames: tai yang xu xue zheng; tài yáng xù xuè zhèng
V010-N00507.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00507.definition: Characterized by lower abdominal distension and stabbing pain with a fixed location, and normal urination. The tongue is purple with ecchymosis. The pulse is wiry and hesitant. This pattern often results from abdominal injury or occurs when heat affects the urinary bladder, causing blood accumulating in the urinary bladder.

V010-N00508.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00508.label: 膀胱蕴热证
V010-N00508.aliases: 膀胱实热证； 热迫膀胱证； 热结膀胱证； 热积膀胱证； 膀胱积热证； 膀胱蓄热证
V010-N00508.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heat accumulation in the baldder; Bladder heat accumulation pattern; syndrome/pattern of heat accumulation in the bladder
V010-N00508.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜膀胱证类｜膀胱实证
V010-N00508.definition: 因邪热入里，蕴结膀胱所致。临床以小腹硬满，拘急不舒，小便自利，或小便灼痛，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉数有力，伴见发热，口渴，或神志如狂等为特征的证候。

V010-N00508.label: 膀胱蕴热证
V010-N00508.aliases: 膀胱积热证； 膀胱热证； 膀胱实热证； 膀胱蓄热证； 热积膀胱证； 热结膀胱证
V010-N00508.englishNames: syndrome of accumulated heat of bladder
V010-N00508.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肾和膀胱证候｜膀胱证候
V010-N00508.definition: 邪热蕴积膀胱，以小腹胀，小便灼热疼痛，发热口渴，舌红苔黄，脉数有力等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00508.label: 膀胱蕴热证
V010-N00508.aliases: 膀胱实热证； 热迫膀胱证； 热结膀胱证； 热积膀胱证； 膀胱积热证； 膀胱蓄热证
V010-N00508.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heat accumulation in the baldder; Bladder heat accumulation pattern; syndrome/pattern of heat accumulation in the bladder
V010-N00508.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜膀胱证类｜膀胱实证

V010-N00508.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00508.label: 膀胱蕴热证
V010-N00508.aliases: 膀胱实热证； 膀胱积热证； 膀胱蓄热证； Bladder heat accumulation pattern； Bladder heat excess pattern； Bladder heat retention pattern； Excess heat in the urinary bladder； 热迫膀胱证； 热结膀胱证； 热积膀胱证
V010-N00508.englishNames: Heat accumulating in the urinary bladder pattern; syndrome/pattern of heat accumulation in the baldder; Bladder heat accumulation pattern; syndrome/pattern of heat accumulation in the bladder
V010-N00508.pinyinNames: páng guāng yùn rè zhèng; bang guang yun re zheng
V010-N00508.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00508.definition: Characterized by lower abdominal hardness, fullness and contracture, hot, painful urination, fever without aversion to cold, and mania. This pattern often occurs when heat enters the urinary bladder.

V010-N00508.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00508.label: 热积膀胱证
V010-N00508.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of heat accumulating in the bladder
V010-N00508.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by distension and fullness of the lower abdomen, strangury, frequent urination and fever without chills

V010-N00509.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00509.label: 膀胱虚寒证
V010-N00509.englishNames: bladder deficiency cold pattern/ syndrome; Bladder deficiency cold pattern; syndrome/pattern of deficiency-cold in bladder
V010-N00509.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜膀胱证类｜膀胱虚证
V010-N00509.definition: 因肾阳亏虚，膀胱气化失司所致。临床以小腹冷痛，小便失禁或不利，或夜尿多、尿清长，舌苔白滑，脉细弱，伴见畏冷，肢凉等为特征的证候。

V010-N00509.label: 膀胱虚寒证
V010-N00509.englishNames: bladder deficiency-cold syndrome/pattern; syndrome of deficient cold of bladder
V010-N00509.definition: 肾阳亏虚，膀胱气化失司，以畏冷肢凉，小腹冷痛，小便失禁或不利，或夜尿多、尿清长，苔白滑等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00509.label: 膀胱虚寒证
V010-N00509.englishNames: syndrome of deficient cold of bladder
V010-N00509.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜肾和膀胱证候｜膀胱证候
V010-N00509.definition: 肾阳亏虚，膀胱气化失司，以畏冷肢凉，小腹冷痛，小便失禁或不利，或夜尿多、尿清长，苔白滑等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00509.label: 膀胱虚寒证
V010-N00509.englishNames: bladder deficiency cold pattern/ syndrome; Bladder deficiency cold pattern; syndrome/pattern of deficiency-cold in bladder
V010-N00509.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜膀胱证类｜膀胱虚证

V010-N00509.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00509.label: 膀胱虚寒证
V010-N00509.aliases: 膀胱虚冷证； Bladder deficiency cold pattern
V010-N00509.englishNames: bladder deficiency cold pattern/ syndrome; Bladder deficiency cold pattern; syndrome/pattern of deficiency-cold in bladder; Deficiency cold of the urinary bladder pattern
V010-N00509.pinyinNames: bang guang xu han zheng; páng guāng xū hán zhèng
V010-N00509.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00509.definition: Characterized by cold intolerance, cold limbs, lower abdominal pain with a cold sensation, urinary incontinence, inhibited urination, frequent urination at night with clear, profuse urine. The tongue coating is white and slippery. This pattern often occurs when kidney yang fails to secure the qi transformation of the urinary bladder.

V010-N00509.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00509.label: 膀胱虚寒证

V010-N00509.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00509.label: 膀胱虚寒证
V010-N00509.englishNames: bladder deficiency cold pattern/ syndrome; syndrome of deficient cold of bladder
V010-N00509.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising when kidney yang deficiency causes impaired bladder qi transformation, marked by frequent urination, incontinence of urine or dribbling of urine, cold feeling in the lower abdomen, whitish moist tongue coating and weak pulse

V010-N00493.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00493.label: 胞宫痰湿阻滞证
V010-N00493.aliases: 痰凝胞宫证； 痰阻胞宫证
V010-N00493.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm-dampness obstruction in the uterus
V010-N00493.pinyinNames: bao gong tan shi zu zhi zheng
V010-N00493.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜胞宫证类
V010-N00493.definition: 因痰湿偏盛，阻滞脉络，蕴积胞宫所致。临床以带下量多，色白、清稀或秽浊，体形肥胖，困倦乏力，舌质淡，舌苔白腻，脉滑或濡缓，可伴见闭经，不孕等为特征的证候。

V010-N00493.label: 痰凝胞宫证
V010-N00493.englishNames: syndrome of coagulated phlegm in uterus; syndrome of coagulated phlegm in womb
V010-N00493.definition: 痰湿阻滞胞宫，以带下色白量多，或闭经，或不孕，肥胖乏力，舌淡，苔白腻，脉滑或濡缓等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00493.label: 胞宫痰湿阻滞证
V010-N00493.aliases: 痰凝胞宫证； 痰阻胞宫证
V010-N00493.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm-dampness obstruction in the uterus
V010-N00493.pinyinNames: bao gong tan shi zu zhi zheng
V010-N00493.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜胞宫证类

V010-N00493.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00493.label: 痰凝胞宫证
V010-N00493.aliases: 痰湿凝结胞宫证； 痰阻胞宫证； Phlegm obstructing the uterus pattern； Phlegm-dampness obstructing the uterus pattern； Phlegm congealment in the uterus pattern； Phlegm obstructing the uterus
V010-N00493.englishNames: Phlegm retention in the uterus pattern; Phlegm obstructing the uterus pattern
V010-N00493.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00493.definition: Characterized by profuse, white vaginal discharge or amenorrhoea/infertility, obesity and fatigue. The tongue is pale with a white, greasy coating. The pulse is slippery or soft and delayed. This pattern often occurs when phlegm-dampness obstructs the uterus.

V010-N00503.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00503.label: 胞宫虚寒证
V010-N00503.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of uterine deficiency-cold; Uterine deficiency cold pattern
V010-N00503.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜胞宫证类
V010-N00503.definition: 因阳气亏虚，胞宫失却温煦所致。临床以小腹冷痛，喜温、喜按，畏寒、肢凉，面色苍白，或月经色淡、质稀，带下清稀，或不孕，流产，舌质淡，舌苔白，脉沉弱等为特征的证候。

V010-N00503.label: 胞宫虚寒证
V010-N00503.englishNames: uterine deficiency cold pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of deficiency-cold of uterus; syndrome of deficient cold in uterus; syndrome of deficient cold in womb
V010-N00503.definition: 肾阳亏虚，胞宫失却温煦，以畏冷肢凉，小腹隐痛，喜温喜按，月经色淡质稀，或带下清稀，或不孕，或流产，腰膝酸冷，面白，舌淡苔白，脉沉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00503.label: 胞宫虚寒证
V010-N00503.englishNames: syndrome of deficient cold in uterus
V010-N00503.path: 病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候｜阳虚证
V010-N00503.definition: 肾阳亏虚，胞宫失却温煦，以畏冷肢凉，小腹隐痛，喜温喜按，月经色淡质稀，或带下清稀，或不孕，或流产，腰膝酸冷，面白，舌淡苔白，脉沉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00503.label: 胞宫虚寒证
V010-N00503.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of uterine deficiency-cold; Uterine deficiency cold pattern
V010-N00503.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜胞宫证类

V010-N00503.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00503.label: 胞宫虚寒证
V010-N00503.aliases: 胞宫阳虚证； Uterine deficiency cold pattern； Uterine yang deficiency pattern； Yang deficiency of the uterus
V010-N00503.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of uterine deficiency-cold; Deficiency cold in the uterus pattern; Uterine deficiency cold pattern
V010-N00503.pinyinNames: bao gong xu han zheng; bāo gōng xū hán zhèng
V010-N00503.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00503.definition: Characterized by cold intolerance, cold limbs, lower abdominal pain with a cold sensation that alleviates upon warmth and pressure and a pale menstrual colour and thin quality of menses. Alternatively, thin, clear vaginal discharge, infertility, miscarriage and a pale complexion may be present. The tongue is pale with a white coating. The pulse is deep and weak. This pattern often occurs when yang qi fails to warm the uterus.

V010-N00503.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00503.label: 胞宫虚寒证
V010-N00503.englishNames: uterine deficiency cold pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of deficiency-cold of uterus

V010-N00503.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00503.label: 胞宫虚寒证
V010-N00503.definition: a pattern/syndrome attributed to deficiency of kidney yang that fails to warm the uterus, and manifested by aversion to cold with cold limbs, aching and coldness of the lumbus and knees, dull pain in the lower abdomen which is alleviated by warmth and

V010-N00504.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00504.label: 胞宫血热证
V010-N00504.aliases: 胞宫郁热证； 胞宫积热证
V010-N00504.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood-heat in the uterus; Blood and heat accumulation in the uterus pattern
V010-N00504.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜胞宫证类
V010-N00504.definition: 因热邪蕴积胞宫所致。临床以小腹灼热、疼痛，月经提前、量多、色鲜红，甚则血崩不止，或带下血色，黄稠黏滞，气味臭秽，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00504.label: 胞宫血热证
V010-N00504.aliases: 胞宫郁热证； 胞宫积热证
V010-N00504.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood-heat in the uterus; Blood and heat accumulation in the uterus pattern
V010-N00504.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜胞宫证类

V010-N00504.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00504.label: 胞宫血热证
V010-N00504.aliases: 胞宫郁热证； 胞宫积热证； Blood and heat accumulation in the uterus pattern； Blood heat build up in the uterus pattern； Heat accumulating in the uterus
V010-N00504.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood-heat in the uterus; Blood heat in the uterus pattern; Blood and heat accumulation in the uterus pattern
V010-N00504.pinyinNames: bao gong xue re zheng; bāo gōng xuè rè zhèng
V010-N00504.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00504.definition: Characterized by a burning pain in the lower abdomen, and earlier period with profuse volume and bright red colour. Yellow, sticky and smelly vagina discharge may also be present. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is rapid. This pattern often occurs when heat accumulates in the uterus.

V010-N00504.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00504.label: 胞宫积热证
V010-N00504.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of accumulated heat in the uterus; syndrome/pattern of accumulated heat in uterus

V010-N00504.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00504.label: 胞宫积热证
V010-N00504.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of accumulated heat in the uterus
V010-N00504.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by scorching pain in the lower abdomen, early periods and large amount of bright red menstrual discharge, or yellowish thick and fetid leukorrhea, reddened tongue with yellow coating and rapid pulse

V010-N00425.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00425.label: 心肝血虚证
V010-N00425.englishNames: heart-liver blood deficiency pattern/ syndrome; Heart and liver blood deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of heart and liver blood deficiency
V010-N00425.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜心脏兼证类｜心肝兼证｜心肝两虚证
V010-N00425.definition: 因血虚亏损，心肝失养所致。临床以头晕、眼花，面色苍白，爪甲不荣，心慌、惊悸，手足麻木，少寐、多梦，或两胁不舒，月经量少、色淡，舌质淡，舌苔薄白，脉细等为特征的证候。

V010-N00425.label: 心肝血虚证
V010-N00425.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脏腑兼证
V010-N00425.definition: 血液亏虚，心肝失养，以心悸心慌，多梦健忘，头晕眼花，两胁隐痛，妇女月经量少，面、舌、爪甲色淡白，脉细等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00425.label: 心肝血虚证
V010-N00425.englishNames: heart-liver blood deficiency pattern/ syndrome; Heart and liver blood deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of heart and liver blood deficiency
V010-N00425.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜心脏兼证类｜心肝兼证｜心肝两虚证

V010-N00425.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00425.label: 心肝血虚证
V010-N00425.aliases: Heart and liver blood deficiency pattern
V010-N00425.englishNames: heart-liver blood deficiency pattern/ syndrome; Heart and liver blood deficiency pattern; Blood deficiency of the heart and liver pattern; syndrome/pattern of heart and liver blood deficiency
V010-N00425.pinyinNames: xin gan xue xu zheng; xīn gān xuè xū zhèng
V010-N00425.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00425.definition: Characterized by palpitations, dream-disturbed sleep, poor memory, dizziness, blurred vision, dull pain in the subcostal region, scanty menstrual volume and pale face/tongue/fingernails. The pulse is thready. This pattern often occurs when blood fails to nourish the heart and liver.

V010-N00425.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00425.label: 心肝血虚证

V010-N00429.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00429.label: 心胆气虚证
V010-N00429.englishNames: Heart and gallbladder qi deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency in heart and gallbladder
V010-N00429.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜心脏兼证类｜心肝兼证｜心肝两虚证
V010-N00429.definition: 因禀赋不足，心气亏虚，胆气不宁，神魂不安所致。临床以触事易惊，虚烦不寐，多梦易醒，甚则终日惶恐，心惕不安，舌质淡，脉弦细或缓促不定，伴见头晕，胸闷，气短、自汗，倦怠、乏力，小便清长等为特征的证候。

V010-N00429.label: 心胆气虚证
V010-N00429.aliases: 心胆不宁证； 心胆气虚不宁证； 心虚胆怯证
V010-N00429.englishNames: Syndrome of Timidity due to Deficiency of Heart Qi
V010-N00429.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脏腑兼证
V010-N00429.definition: 心气亏虚，胆气不宁，以心悸失眠，胆怯易惊，头晕胸闷，舌淡等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00429.label: 心胆气虚证
V010-N00429.englishNames: Heart and gallbladder qi deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency in heart and gallbladder

V010-N00429.pinyinNames: xin dan qi xu zheng; xīn dǎn qì xū zhèng
V010-N00429.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00429.definition: Characterized by palpitations, insomnia, timidity, jumpiness or easily startled, dizziness and chest tightness. The pale is tongue. This pattern often occurs as a result of heart qi deficiency and gallbladder qi uneasiness.

V010-N00426.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00426.label: 心肺气虚证
V010-N00426.englishNames: Heart and lung qi deficiency pattern; heart-lung qi deficiency pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of heart and lung qi deficiency
V010-N00426.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜心脏兼证类｜心肺兼证｜心肺两虚证
V010-N00426.definition: 因心肺两脏气虚所致。临床以心悸，久咳不止，动辄气促或喘，胸中憋闷，神疲、乏力，舌质淡，脉弱等为特征的证候。

V010-N00426.label: 心肺气虚证
V010-N00426.englishNames: syndrome of qi deficiency of heart and lung; syndrome/pattern of heart-lung qi deficiency
V010-N00426.definition: 心肺两脏气虚，以心悸咳嗽，气短而喘，动则尤甚，胸闷，神疲乏力，语声低怯，自汗，舌淡，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00426.label: 心肺气虚证
V010-N00426.englishNames: syndrome of qi deficiency of heart and lung
V010-N00426.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脏腑兼证
V010-N00426.definition: 心肺两脏气虚，以心悸咳嗽，气短而喘，动则尤甚，胸闷，神疲乏力，语声低怯，自汗，舌淡，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00426.label: 心肺气虚证
V010-N00426.englishNames: Heart and lung qi deficiency pattern; heart-lung qi deficiency pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of heart and lung qi deficiency

V010-N00426.definition: Characterized by palpitations, cough, shortness of breath, panting, chest tightness and lassitude. The tongue is pale. The pulse is weak. This pattern often results from qi deficiency of the heart and lung.

V010-N00427.label: 心肾不交证
V010-N00427.aliases: 心肾阴虚阳亢证； 心肾阴虚火旺证
V010-N00427.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart and kidney failure in interaction; heart-kidney noninteraction pattern/ syndrome; Heart and kidney systems disharmony pattern
V010-N00427.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜心脏兼证类｜心肾兼证
V010-N00427.definition: 因肾水亏虚，不能上济于心，心火炽盛，不能下交于肾所致。临床以心烦、失眠，惊悸、多梦，头晕、耳鸣，腰膝酸软，梦遗，口燥、咽干，五心烦热，甚则潮热、盗汗，舌质红，舌苔少，脉细数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00427.label: 心肾不交证
V010-N00427.englishNames: syndrome of disharmony between heart and kidney; heart-kidney non-interaction syndrome/pattern
V010-N00427.definition: 心肾阴液亏虚，阳气偏亢，既济失调，以心悸，心烦失眠，头晕耳鸣，腰膝酸软，梦遗，潮热盗汗，舌红少苔，脉细数为常见症的证候。

V010-N00427.label: 心肾不交证
V010-N00427.aliases: 君相火旺证； 心肾阴虚火旺证； 心肾阴虚阳亢证
V010-N00427.englishNames: syndrome of disharmony between heart and kidney
V010-N00427.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脏腑兼证
V010-N00427.definition: 心与肾的阴液亏虚，阳气偏亢，以心悸，心烦失眠，耳鸣，头晕，腰膝酸软，梦遗，便结尿黄，舌红少苔，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00427.label: 心肾不交证
V010-N00427.aliases: 心肾阴虚阳亢证； 心肾阴虚火旺证

V010-N00427.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart and kidney failure in interaction; heart-kidney noninteraction pattern/ syndrome; Disharmony between the heart and kidney pattern; Heart and kidney systems disharmony pattern
V010-N00427.pinyinNames: xin shen bu jiao zheng; xīn shèn bù jiāo zhèng
V010-N00427.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00427.definition: Characterized by palpitations, restlessness, insomnia, tinnitus, low back/knee and soreness and weakness. The tongue is red with a scanty coating. The pulse is thready, rapid and weak. This pattern often results from lack of coordination between heart fire and kidney water.

V010-N00428.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00428.label: 心肾阳虚证
V010-N00428.englishNames: heart-kidney yang deficiency pattern/ syndrome; Heart and kidney yang deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of yang deficiency in heart and kidney
V010-N00428.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜心脏兼证类｜心肾兼证｜心肾两虚证
V010-N00428.definition: 因秉质阳虚，或久病损伤心肾，温煦气化失司所致。临床以心悸、怔忡，肢体浮肿，小便不利，腰膝酸冷，形寒，畏冷，面色？白，甚则四肢厥逆，爪甲青紫，舌质淡或暗，舌苔白滑，脉沉迟而弱等为特征的证候。

V010-N00428.label: 心肾阳虚证
V010-N00428.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart-kidney yang deficiency; syndrome of yang deficiency of heart and kidney
V010-N00428.definition: 心肾阳气亏虚，温运无力，以畏寒肢冷，心悸怔忡，肢体浮肿，小便不利，腰膝酸冷，舌淡紫，苔白滑，脉沉弱为常见症的证候。

V010-N00428.label: 心肾阳虚证
V010-N00428.englishNames: syndrome of yang deficiency of heart and kidney
V010-N00428.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脏腑兼证
V010-N00428.definition: 心与肾的阳气亏虚，失却温运，以畏冷肢凉、心悸怔忡、小便不利、肢体浮肿、腰膝酸冷、舌淡紫、苔白滑、脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00428.label: 心肾阳虚证
V010-N00428.englishNames: heart-kidney yang deficiency pattern/ syndrome; Heart and kidney yang deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of yang deficiency in heart and kidney

V010-N00428.aliases: 心肾虚寒证； Heart and kidney yang deficiency pattern； Deficiency cold of the heart and kidney
V010-N00428.englishNames: heart-kidney yang deficiency pattern/ syndrome; Heart and kidney yang deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of yang deficiency in heart and kidney; Yang deficiency of the heart and kidney pattern
V010-N00428.pinyinNames: xin shen yang xu zheng; xīn shèn yáng xū zhèng
V010-N00428.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00428.definition: Characterized by cold intolerance, cold limbs, mild to severe palpitations, dysuria, leg oedema and low back/knee soreness and coldness. The tongue is pale purple with a white, slippery coating. The pulse is weak. This pattern often occurs when yang qi of the heart and kidney fails to warm the body.

V010-N00428.englishNames: heart-kidney yang deficiency pattern/ syndrome; syndrome of yang deficiency of heart and kidney
V010-N00428.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising when insufficient yang qi fails to warm and activate both the heart and the kidney, marked by palpitations, aversion to cold, lack of warmth in the extremities, inhibited urination, edema of the legs, aching and cold lumbus

V010-N00431.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00431.label: 心脾两虚证
V010-N00431.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of the heart and spleen; pattern/syndrome of dual deficiency of the heart and spleen; Heart and spleen systems deficiency pattern
V010-N00431.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜心脏兼证类｜心脾兼证
V010-N00431.definition: 因体虚或久病虚损，心脾气血阴阳亏虚所致。临床以心悸、怔忡，神疲、眩晕，少寐、多梦，呵欠频作，健忘，食少，腹胀，便溏，面色淡白，烦劳则甚，舌质淡或嫩，脉弱或细，可伴见产后焦虑、忧郁，悲伤欲哭，月经量少、色淡，淋漓不断，或梦交、遗精，阳痿、早泄，眼睑振跳，或痫病反复发作等为特征的证候。

V010-N00431.label: 心脾两虚证
V010-N00431.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of both heart and spleen; syndrome/pattern of deficiency of both heart and spleen
V010-N00431.definition: 心血不足，脾气虚弱，以心悸，神疲，食少，腹胀，便溏，舌淡嫩，脉细弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00431.label: 心脾两虚证
V010-N00431.aliases: 心脾不足证； 心脾亏损证； 心脾亏虚证
V010-N00431.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of both heart and spleen
V010-N00431.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脏腑兼证
V010-N00431.definition: 泛指心脾阳气、阴血亏虚，以心悸，神疲，食少，腹胀，便溏，舌淡脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00431.label: 心脾两虚证
V010-N00431.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of the heart and spleen; pattern/syndrome of dual deficiency of the heart and spleen; Heart and spleen systems deficiency pattern

V010-N00431.aliases: 心脾亏虚证； Heart and spleen systems deficiency pattern
V010-N00431.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of the heart and spleen; Deficiency of the heart and spleen pattern; pattern/syndrome of dual deficiency of the heart and spleen; Heart and spleen systems deficiency pattern
V010-N00431.pinyinNames: xin pi liang xu zheng; xīn pí liǎng xū zhèng
V010-N00431.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00431.definition: Characterized by palpitations, lassitude, low food intake, abdominal distension and loose stools. The tongue is pale. The pulse is weak. This pattern often occurs when heart blood and spleen (yang) qi become deficient.

V010-N00431.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V010-N00431.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of deficiency of both heart and spleen

V010-N00431.label: 心脾两虚证
V010-N00431.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of dual deficiency of the heart and spleen; syndrome of deficiency of both heart and spleen
V010-N00431.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by palpitation, amnesia, insomnia or dream-disturbed sleep, loss of appetite, abdominal distention, loose bowels, lassitude, sallow face, pale tender-soft tongue and fine weak pulse

V010-N00448.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00448.label: 肝火犯肺证
V010-N00448.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of liver fire invading the lung; Liver fire invading the lung system pattern; syndrome/pattern of liver fire invading the lung
V010-N00448.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肝脏兼证类｜肝肺兼证
V010-N00448.definition: 因肝火炽盛，上逆犯肺，肺失肃降所致。临床以咳嗽阵作，呛咳或挛咳不已，胸胁灼痛，急躁、易怒，口苦，咽干作痒，甚则咳血，舌质红、舌苔薄黄，脉弦数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00448.label: 肝火犯肺证
V010-N00448.englishNames: syndrome of liver fire invading lung
V010-N00448.definition: 肝火炽盛，上逆犯肺，肺失清肃，以胸胁灼痛，咳嗽阵作，甚则咳血，急躁易怒，头胀头晕，口苦口渴，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00448.label: 肝火犯肺证
V010-N00448.englishNames: syndrome of liver fire invading lung
V010-N00448.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脏腑兼证
V010-N00448.definition: 肝火炽盛，上逆犯肺，肺失肃降，以胸胁灼痛，急躁易怒，口苦口干，咳嗽阵作，甚至咳血，舌红苔薄黄，脉弦数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00448.label: 肝火犯肺证
V010-N00448.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of liver fire invading the lung; Liver fire invading the lung system pattern; syndrome/pattern of liver fire invading the lung

V010-N00448.label: 肝火犯肺证
V010-N00448.aliases: 木火刑金证； Liver fire invading the lung system pattern； Wood fire tormenting metal pattern
V010-N00448.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of liver fire invading the lung; Liver fire invading the lung system pattern; syndrome/pattern of liver fire invading the lung; Liver fire affecting the lung pattern
V010-N00448.pinyinNames: gan huo fan fei zheng; gān huǒ fàn fèi zhèng
V010-N00448.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00448.definition: Characterized by a burning pain in the chest and subcostal region, restlessness, irritability, a dry, bitter mouth and paroxysmal coughs. In severe cases, haemoptysis may be present. The tongue is red with a thin, yellow coating. The pulse is wiry and rapid. This pattern often occurs when exuberant liver fire affects the descending of lung qi.

V010-N00448.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00448.label: 肝火犯肺证
V010-N00448.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of liver fire invading the lung
V010-N00448.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by bitter taste in the mouth, dizziness and red eyes, irritability, irascibility, moving pain in the chest and hypochondriac region, cough with thick expectoration or even hemoptysis, reddened tongue and rapid tight string-li

V010-N00452.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00452.label: 肝肾阴虚证
V010-N00452.aliases: 肝肾虚火证； 肝肾阴亏证
V010-N00452.englishNames: Liver and kidney yin deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of yin deficiency in liver and kidney; liver-kidney yin deficiency pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00452.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肝脏兼证类｜肝肾兼证｜肝肾两虚证
V010-N00452.definition: 因肝肾阴分亏虚，虚热内扰所致。临床以眩晕，耳鸣，五心烦热，低热，颧红，腰膝酸软，视物不清，甚则视歧，舌质红，舌苔少，脉细数，或伴见胸胁疼痛等为特征的证候。

V010-N00452.label: 肝肾阴虚证
V010-N00452.englishNames: liver-kidney yin deficiency syndrome/pattern; syndrome of yin deficiency of liver and kidney
V010-N00452.definition: 肝肾阴液亏虚，虚热内扰，以曼眩耳鸣，五心烦热，低热颧红，头胀胁痛，视力减退，腰膝酸软，舌红少苔，脉弦细数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00452.label: 肝肾阴虚证
V010-N00452.aliases: 肝肾虚火证； 肝肾阴虚型
V010-N00452.englishNames: syndrome of yin deficiency of liver and kidney
V010-N00452.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脏腑兼证
V010-N00452.definition: 肝肾阴液亏虚，虚热内扰，以眩晕耳鸣、五心烦热、低热颧红、胁痛、腰膝酸软、舌红少苔、脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00452.label: 肝肾阴虚证
V010-N00452.aliases: 肝肾虚火证； 肝肾阴亏证
V010-N00452.englishNames: Liver and kidney yin deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of yin deficiency in liver and kidney; liver-kidney yin deficiency pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00452.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肝脏兼证类｜肝肾兼证｜肝肾两虚证

V010-N00452.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM

V010-N00452.englishNames: Liver and kidney yin deficiency pattern; Yin deficiency of the liver and kidney pattern; syndrome/pattern of yin deficiency in liver and kidney; liver-kidney yin deficiency pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00452.pinyinNames: gan shen yin xu zheng; gān shèn yīn xū zhèng
V010-N00452.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00452.definition: Characterized by dizziness, tinnitus, feverish sensations in the palms, soles and chest, a low-grade fever, flushed cheeks, pain in the subcostal region, and low back/knee soreness and weakness. The tongue is red with a scanty coating. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when yin deficiency of the liver and kidney causes deficiency heat.

V010-N00452.definition: a pattern/syndrome attributed to insufficiency of yin fluid of the liver and the kidney with harassment of endogenous heat, marked by dizziness, blurred vision, tinnitus, forgetfulness, insomnia and dream-disturbed sleep, hypochondriac pain, aching lu

V010-N00453.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00453.label: 肝胃不和证
V010-N00453.aliases: 肝气犯胃证； 肝胃不调证
V010-N00453.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of disharmony of liver and stomach; Disharmony of liver and stomach systems pattern

V010-N00453.definition: 泛指因肝失疏泄，肝气郁滞，或肝郁化火，横逆犯胃，胃失和降等肝胃功能失调引起的一类证候。

V010-N00453.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00453.label: 肝气犯胃证
V010-N00453.aliases: 肝胃不和证； 肝木犯胃证
V010-N00453.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of liver qi invading the stomach; syndrome/pattern of liver qi invading the stomach
V010-N00453.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肝脏兼证类｜肝胃兼证｜肝胃不和证｜肝胃气滞证
V010-N00453.definition: 因肝失疏泄，横逆犯胃所致。临床以胃脘痞闷，胸胁胀满，喜太息，呃逆、嗳气，呕吐，病情随情志变化而增减，舌苔薄白，脉弦等为特征的证候。

V010-N00453.label: 肝胃不和证
V010-N00453.englishNames: syndrome of incoordination beteeen liver and stomach; liver-stomach disharmony syndrome/pattern
V010-N00453.definition: 肝气郁结，横逆犯胃，胃失和降，以胃脘、胁肋胀满疼痛，嗳气，呃逆，吞酸，精神抑郁，纳呆，苔薄黄，脉弦等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00453.label: 肝气犯胃证
V010-N00453.aliases: 肝胃不调证； 肝胃不和证
V010-N00453.englishNames: syndrome of liver qi invading the stomach
V010-N00453.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脏腑兼证
V010-N00453.definition: 肝气郁滞，横逆犯胃，胃失和降，以胃脘、胁肋胀满疼痛，嗳气、呃逆、吞酸，情绪抑郁，不欲食，苔薄黄，脉弦等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00453.label: 肝胃不和证
V010-N00453.aliases: 肝气犯胃证； 肝胃不调证
V010-N00453.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of disharmony of liver and stomach; Disharmony of liver and stomach systems pattern

V010-N00453.aliases: 肝胃不和证； 肝木犯胃证
V010-N00453.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of liver qi invading the stomach; syndrome/pattern of liver qi invading the stomach
V010-N00453.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肝脏兼证类｜肝胃兼证｜肝胃不和证｜肝胃气滞证

V010-N00453.label: 肝气犯胃证

V010-N00453.englishNames: Liver qi affecting the stomach pattern; pattern/syndrome of liver qi invading the stomach; syndrome/pattern of liver qi invading the stomach
V010-N00453.pinyinNames: gān qì fàn wèi zhèng; gan qi fan wei zheng
V010-N00453.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00453.definition: Characterized by vomiting, acid reflux, repeated belching, gastric discomfort, and distending pain in the chest and subcostal region that aggravate upon emotional disturbance. The tongue coating is thin and white. The pulse is wiry. This pattern often occurs when liver qi stagnation affects the stomach.

V010-N00453.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00453.label: 肝胃不和证
V010-N00453.aliases: 肝气犯胃证； 肝胃不调证； Disharmony of liver and stomach systems pattern； Liver qi invading the stomach pattern； Liver–stomach disharmony pattern； Incoordination between the liver and stomach
V010-N00453.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of disharmony of liver and stomach; Disharmony of liver and stomach systems pattern; Disharmony between the liver and stomach pattern
V010-N00453.pinyinNames: gan wei bu he zheng; gān wèi bù hé zhèng
V010-N00453.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00453.definition: Characterized by gastric distension, fullness and pain, a poor appetite, belching, nausea, vomiting, dizziness, pain in the subcostal region, and restlessness. The pulse is wiry. This pattern often occurs when liver qi stagnation affects the descending of stomach qi.

V010-N00453.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00453.label: 肝胃不和证

V010-N00453.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00453.label: 肝气犯胃证
V010-N00453.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of liver qi invading the stomach
V010-N00453.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by dizziness, hypochondriac pain, irritability, epigastric distension and pain, anorexia, belching, nausea, vomiting and string-like pulse, also known as the liver-stomach disharmony pattern/syndrome

V010-N00449.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00449.label: 肝火犯胃证
V010-N00449.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver fire invading the stomach; Liver fire invading the stomach system pattern
V010-N00449.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肝脏兼证类｜肝胃兼证｜肝胃不和证｜肝胃郁热证
V010-N00449.definition: 因肝火炽盛犯胃，胃失和降所致。临床以胁肋、胃脘灼热、作痛，口苦，口干，呕吐苦水，大便秘结，小便黄，舌质红，舌苔黄。脉弦数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00449.label: 肝火犯胃证
V010-N00449.englishNames: syndrome of liver fire invading stomach
V010-N00449.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脏腑兼证
V010-N00449.definition: 肝火炽盛，横逆犯胃，胃失和降，以胁肋、胃脘灼热作痛，口苦口干，呕吐苦水，便结尿黄，舌红苔黄，脉弦数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00449.label: 肝火犯胃证
V010-N00449.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver fire invading the stomach; Liver fire invading the stomach system pattern
V010-N00449.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肝脏兼证类｜肝胃兼证｜肝胃郁热证

V010-N00449.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00449.label: 肝火犯胃证
V010-N00449.aliases: Liver fire invading the stomach system pattern
V010-N00449.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver fire invading the stomach; Liver fire invading the stomach system pattern; Liver fire affecting the stomach pattern
V010-N00449.pinyinNames: gan huo fan wei zheng; gān huǒ fàn wèi zhèng
V010-N00449.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00449.definition: Characterized by a burning pain in the stomach and subcostal region, a dry, bitter mouth, constipation and yellow urine. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is wiry and rapid. This pattern often occurs when liver fire affects the descending of stomach qi.

V010-N00454.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00454.label: 肝胆湿热证
V010-N00454.englishNames: liver-gallbladder dampness-heat pattern/syndrome; Liver-gallbladder dampness-heat pattern; syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the liver and gallbladder
V010-N00454.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肝脏兼证类｜肝胆兼证｜肝胆实热证
V010-N00454.definition: 因湿热内蕴，肝胆疏泄失常所致。临床以身目发黄，发热，口苦，胁肋胀痛，或胁下有痞块，纳呆，呕恶，厌油腻，尿黄，舌质红，舌苔黄腻，脉滑或濡数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00454.label: 肝胆湿热证
V010-N00454.englishNames: syndrome of dampnessheat of liver and gallbladder; syndrome/pattern of dampness-heat in liver and gallbladder
V010-N00454.definition: 湿热内蕴，肝胆疏泄失常，以身目发黄，发热，口苦，胁肋胀痛，或胁下有痞块，纳呆厌油，恶。心呕吐，尿黄，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00454.label: 肝胆湿热证
V010-N00454.englishNames: syndrome of dampnessheat of liver and gallbladder
V010-N00454.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脏腑兼证
V010-N00454.definition: 湿热内蕴，肝胆疏泄失常，以身目发黄，发热，口苦，胁肋胀痛，或胁下有痞块，纳呆呕恶，厌油腻，尿黄，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00454.label: 肝胆湿热证
V010-N00454.englishNames: liver-gallbladder dampness-heat pattern/syndrome; Liver-gallbladder dampness-heat pattern; syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the liver and gallbladder
V010-N00454.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肝脏兼证类｜肝胆兼证｜肝胆实热证

V010-N00454.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00454.label: 肝胆湿热证
V010-N00454.englishNames: liver-gallbladder dampness-heat pattern/syndrome; Damp heat in the liver and gallbladder pattern; Liver-gallbladder dampness-heat pattern; syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the liver and gallbladder
V010-N00454.pinyinNames: gan dan shi re zheng; gān dǎn shī rè zhèng
V010-N00454.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00454.definition: Characterized by yellowish skin and eyes, fever, a bitter mouth, distending pain or masses in the subcostal region, poor appetite, nausea, vomiting, aversion to oily food, and yellowish urine. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when internal damp heat affects the qi flow of the liver and gallbladder.

V010-N00454.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00454.label: 肝胆湿热证

V010-N00454.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00454.label: 肝胆湿热证
V010-N00454.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by fever and chills, jaundice, hypochondriac and abdominal pain, bitter taste in the mouth, nausea and rapid slippery pulse

V010-N00480.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00480.label: 肺热移肠证
V010-N00480.englishNames: Lung heat transmitting into the intestine pattern; syndrome/pattern of lung heat transmitted to the intestine
V010-N00480.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肺脏兼证类｜肺大肠兼证
V010-N00480.definition: 因肺热炽盛，下移大肠，传导失司所致。临床以发热，咳嗽或喘，腹胀，大便秘结，口渴，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉滑数或实等为特征的证候。

V010-N00480.label: 肺热移肠证
V010-N00480.englishNames: Intestine-heat in case of Lung-heat Syndrome
V010-N00480.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脏腑兼证
V010-N00480.definition: 肺热炽盛，肠失传导，以发热口渴，咳嗽气喘，腹胀便秘，舌红苔黄，脉数或实等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00480.label: 肺热移肠证
V010-N00480.englishNames: Lung heat transmitting into the intestine pattern; syndrome/pattern of lung heat transmitted to the intestine
V010-N00480.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肺脏兼证类｜肺大肠兼证

V010-N00480.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00480.label: 肺热移肠证
V010-N00480.englishNames: Lung heat transmitting into the intestine pattern; syndrome/pattern of lung heat transmitted to the intestine; Lung heat transmitting to the large intestine pattern
V010-N00480.pinyinNames: fei re yi chang zheng; fèi rè yí cháng zhèng
V010-N00480.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00480.definition: Characterized by fever, thirst, cough, panting, abdominal bloating and constipation. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is rapid or replenish. This pattern often occurs when exuberant lung heat transmits downward to the large intestine.

V010-N00481.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00481.label: 肺燥肠闭证
V010-N00481.englishNames: Lung dryness with intestinal obstruction pattern; pattern/syndrome of lung dryness with intestinal obstruction; syndrome/pattern of lung dryness and intestinal block
V010-N00481.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肺脏兼证类｜肺大肠兼证
V010-N00481.definition: 因肺燥津亏，腑气闭塞所致。临床以咳嗽或喘，烦渴，腹胀，时作绞痛，大便秘结，数日不通，或可触及肿物，舌质红，舌苔黄燥或焦黄，脉沉实等为特征的证候。

V010-N00481.label: 肺燥肠闭证
V010-N00481.englishNames: syndrome of lung dryness and constipation
V010-N00481.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脏腑兼证
V010-N00481.definition: 肺燥津亏，腑气闭塞，以咳嗽，口渴，气喘，便秘不通，腹胀满痛，苔黄燥，脉沉实等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00481.label: 肺燥肠闭证
V010-N00481.englishNames: Lung dryness with intestinal obstruction pattern; pattern/syndrome of lung dryness with intestinal obstruction; syndrome/pattern of lung dryness and intestinal block
V010-N00481.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肺脏兼证类｜肺大肠兼证

V010-N00481.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00481.label: 肺燥肠闭证
V010-N00481.aliases: Lung dryness with intestinal obstruction pattern
V010-N00481.englishNames: Lung dryness with intestinal obstruction pattern; pattern/syndrome of lung dryness with intestinal obstruction; syndrome/pattern of lung dryness and intestinal block; Lung dryness affecting the large intestine pattern
V010-N00481.pinyinNames: fei zao chang bi zheng; fèi zào cháng bì zhèng
V010-N00481.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00481.definition: Characterized by cough, thirst, panting, constipation, and abdominal fullness/distension/pain. The tongue coating is yellow and dry. The pulse is deep and excessive. This pattern often occurs when lung dryness consumes body fluids and blocks intestinal qi.

V010-N00481.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00481.label: 肺燥肠闭证
V010-N00481.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of lung dryness and constipation

V010-N00481.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00481.label: 肺燥肠闭证
V010-N00481.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of lung dryness with intestinal obstruction
V010-N00481.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by cough, dyspnea, thirst, constipation, abdominal distension, yellow dry coating of the tongue and sunken replete pulse

V010-N00482.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00482.label: 肺肾阴虚证
V010-N00482.englishNames: lung-kidney yin deficiency pattern/ syndrome; Lung and kidney yin deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of yin deficiency in the lung and kidney
V010-N00482.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肺脏兼证类｜肺肾兼证｜肺肾两虚证
V010-N00482.definition: 因肺肾阴液亏损，虚热内扰所致。临床以干咳、痰少，痰中带血，咽干、声嘶，或鼻燥、少涕，时或鼻衄，不闻香臭，舌质红，舌苔少，或光润无苔，脉沉细或数，可伴见骨蒸潮热，盗汗，颧红，腰膝酸软，形体消瘦等为特征的证候。

V010-N00482.label: 肺肾阴虚证
V010-N00482.englishNames: lung-kidney yin deficiency syndrome/pattern; syndrome of yin deficiency of lung and kidney
V010-N00482.definition: 肺肾阴液亏虚，虚热内扰，以咳嗽痰少，或痰中带血，或干咳短气，咽干或声嘶，腰膝酸软，骨蒸潮热，盗汗消瘦，颧红，舌红少苔，脉细数为常见症的证候。

V010-N00482.label: 肺肾阴虚证
V010-N00482.englishNames: syndrome of yin deficiency of lung and kidney
V010-N00482.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脏腑兼证
V010-N00482.definition: 肺肾阴液亏虚，虚热内扰，以咳嗽痰少，或痰中带血、咽干或声嘶、腰膝酸软、体瘦、骨蒸潮热、盗汗、颧红、舌红少苔、脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00482.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00482.label: 肺肾阴虚证
V010-N00482.aliases: Lung and kidney yin deficiency pattern
V010-N00482.englishNames: lung-kidney yin deficiency pattern/ syndrome; Lung and kidney yin deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of yin deficiency in the lung and kidney; Yin deficiency of the lung and kidney pattern
V010-N00482.pinyinNames: fei shen yin xu zheng; fèi shèn yīn xū zhèng
V010-N00482.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00482.definition: Characterized by cough with scanty phlegm or blood-stained sputum, a dry throat or hoarseness, low back/knee soreness and weakness, weight loss, bone-steaming tidal fever, night sweats and flushed cheeks. The tongue is red with a scanty coating. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when yin fluids deficiency of the lung and kidney causes deficiency heat.

V010-N00482.definition: a pattern/syndrome attributed to deficiency of yin fluid of the lung and the kidney with harassment of endogenous heat, marked by cough with scanty expectoration, dryness of the mouth and throat or hoarseness of voice, aching lumbus and limp legs, bo

V010-N00519.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00519.label: 肺脾两虚证
V010-N00519.englishNames: Lung and spleen deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency in the lung and spleen
V010-N00519.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肺脏兼证类｜肺脾兼证
V010-N00519.definition: 因肺虚及脾，或久病虚损，肺脾两脏亏虚所致。临床以久咳不已，动辄气短、喘促，咯痰清稀。食少、纳呆，腹胀、便溏，舌质淡胖，边有齿痕，舌苔白或滑，脉濡或弱，伴见倦怠乏力，言语声低，自汗，畏风，容易感冒，每因气候变化、饮食不当而诱发或加重等为特征的证候。

V010-N00519.label: 肺脾两虚证
V010-N00519.englishNames: Lung and spleen deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency in the lung and spleen
V010-N00519.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肺脏兼证类｜肺脾兼证

V010-N00527.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00527.label: 脾肾阳虚证
V010-N00527.englishNames: Spleen and kidney yang deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of yang deficiency in spleen and kidney; spleen-kidney yang deficiency pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00527.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜脾脏兼证类｜脾肾兼证｜脾肾两虚证
V010-N00527.definition: 因脾肾阳气亏虚，虚寒内生所致。临床以腰酸无力，脐腹冷痛，得温稍缓，久泄不止，或五更即泻，完谷不化，或久痢赤白，或浮肿、少尿，舌质淡胖，舌苔白滑，脉迟缓，尺部无力，伴见畏冷、肢凉，面色？白等为特征的证候。

V010-N00527.label: 脾肾阳虚证
V010-N00527.englishNames: syndrome of yang deficiency of spleen and kidney; spleen-kidney yang deficiency syndrome/pattern
V010-N00527.definition: 脾肾阳虚，温化无权，虚寒内生，以畏寒肢冷，面色(白光)白，腰酸，腹部冷痛，久泻久痢，或完谷不化，或浮肿尿少，舌淡胖，苔白滑，脉沉迟无力为常见症的证候。

V010-N00527.label: 脾肾阳虚证
V010-N00527.aliases: 脾肾虚寒证； 脾肾阳衰证； 气虚阳微证
V010-N00527.englishNames: syndrome of yang deficiency of spleen and kidney
V010-N00527.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脏腑兼证
V010-N00527.definition: 脾肾阳虚，温化无权，虚寒内生，以畏寒肢冷，面色？白，腰酸，腹部冷痛，久泻久痢，或完谷不化，或浮肿尿少，舌淡胖，苔白滑，脉沉迟无力为常见症的证候。

V010-N00527.label: 脾肾阳虚证
V010-N00527.englishNames: Spleen and kidney yang deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of yang deficiency in spleen and kidney; spleen-kidney yang deficiency pattern/ syndrome

V010-N00527.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00527.label: 脾肾阳虚证
V010-N00527.aliases: 脾肾虚寒证； Spleen and kidney yang deficiency pattern； Deficiency cold of the spleen and kidney
V010-N00527.englishNames: Spleen and kidney yang deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of yang deficiency in spleen and kidney; Yang deficiency of the spleen and kidney pattern; spleen-kidney yang deficiency pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00527.pinyinNames: pi shen yang xu zheng; pí shèn yáng xū zhèng
V010-N00527.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00527.definition: Characterized by cold intolerance, cold limbs, a bright, pale complexion, low back soreness, abdominal pain with a cold sensation, chronic diarrhoea with stools that contain undigested food. Alternatively, oedema and scanty urine may be present. The tongue is pale and enlarged with a white, slippery coating. The pulse is deep, slow and weak. This pattern often occurs when yang qi deficiency of the spleen and kidney causes internal deficiency cold.

V010-N00527.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00527.label: 脾肾阳虚证

V010-N00527.label: 脾肾阳虚证
V010-N00527.englishNames: spleen-kidney yang deficiency pattern/ syndrome; syndrome of yang deficiency of spleen and kidney
V010-N00527.definition: a pattern/syndrome attributed to insufficient yang qi of the spleen and the kidney with endogenous cold, marked by bright pale complexion, aversion to cold with cold limbs, coldness and pain in the loins and lower abdomen, chronic diarrhea, or edema w

V010-N00510.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00510.label: 脾系证类
V010-N00510.englishNames: category of spleen system syndromes/patterns; Spleen system patterns
V010-N00510.definition: 泛指由外邪侵袭，或饮食、劳伤、水饮、瘀血等引起脾及其络属腑脏、经络病变的一类证候。注：包括脾证和胃证。

V010-N00510.label: 脾系证类
V010-N00510.englishNames: category of spleen system syndromes/patterns; Spleen system patterns
V010-N00510.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语

V010-N00510.englishNames: category of spleen system syndromes/patterns; Spleen system patterns; Patterns of the spleen system

V010-N00520.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00520.label: 胃气上逆证
V010-N00520.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of ascending counterflow of stomach qi; Stomach qi uprising pattern
V010-N00520.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃实证
V010-N00520.definition: 因寒温不调，或药物、食物中毒，或饮食不节，情志抑郁等，致使胃气不降，逆而上冲所致。临床以突发恶心，剧烈呕吐，或呃逆、嗳气，呃声响亮、有力，舌苔厚，脉弦滑，或伴见寒、热、食、痰、虫等邪客胃脘相应征象为特征的证候。

V010-N00520.label: 胃气上逆证
V010-N00520.englishNames: syndrome of adverse rising of stomach qi
V010-N00520.definition: 胃失和降，胃气上逆，以嗳气，呃逆，呕吐等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00520.label: 胃气上逆证
V010-N00520.englishNames: syndrome of adverse rising of stomach qi
V010-N00520.path: 病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病｜气逆证
V010-N00520.definition: 因寒热等刺激，使胃气失于和降而上逆，以呕吐或呃逆、嗳气等为主症的证候。

V010-N00520.label: 胃气上逆证
V010-N00520.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of ascending counterflow of stomach qi; Stomach qi uprising pattern
V010-N00520.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃实证

V010-N00520.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00520.label: 胃气上逆证
V010-N00520.aliases: Stomach qi reverse flow pattern； Stomach qi uprising pattern
V010-N00520.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of ascending counterflow of stomach qi; Ascending of stomach qi pattern; Stomach qi uprising pattern
V010-N00520.pinyinNames: wei qi shang ni zheng; wèi qì shàng nì zhèng
V010-N00520.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00520.definition: Characterized by vomiting, hiccups, and belching. This pattern often occurs when cold, heat, diet or emotions causes stomach qi to ascend.

V010-N00522.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00522.label: 胃热证
V010-N00522.aliases: 胃火证； 胃热壅盛证； 胃火炽盛证
V010-N00522.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of stomach heat; stomach heat pattern/ syndrome; Stomach heat pattern
V010-N00522.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类
V010-N00522.definition: 泛指因热邪犯胃，或饮食失节，五志怫郁，导致热蕴于胃，胃失和降，气火上逆，或兼夹伤阴、动血、血瘀等所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00522.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00522.label: 胃火炽盛证
V010-N00522.aliases: 胃实热证； 胃火炽证； 胃热炽盛证； 胃热炽证； 胃火证
V010-N00522.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of intense exuberant stomach fire
V010-N00522.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃热证
V010-N00522.definition: 因嗜食辛辣温燥，胃热化火，或五志怫郁，气火犯胃，灼伤血络所致。临床以口角皲裂、糜烂或溃脓，口舌溃疡，灼痛、剧痛，不能进食，口臭，渴喜冷饮，或牙龈脓肿、灼痛，或齿衄、溢血不止，舌质红或绛，舌苔黄或黑燥，脉洪数，或伴见胃脘灼痛，大便燥结，小便短赤，烦躁，神志狂乱等为特征的证候。

V010-N00522.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00522.label: 胃热炽盛证
V010-N00522.aliases: 胃热壅盛证； 胃中积热证
V010-N00522.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃热证
V010-N00522.definition: 因饮食失节，过食肥甘、醇酒辛辣，导致积热内蕴，壅滞于胃所致。临床以胃脘灼痛、拒按，嘈杂、泛酸，或多食、善饥，渴喜冷饮，大便秘结，小便短黄，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉数，可伴见牙龈肿痛，齿衄，口臭等为特征的证候。

V010-N00522.label: 胃火炽盛证
V010-N00522.englishNames: syndrome of exuberance of stomach fire
V010-N00522.definition: 火热炽盛，壅滞于冒，以胃脘灼痛，喜冷，发热口渴，或口臭，牙龈肿痛，齿衄，便结尿黄，舌红苔黄，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00522.label: 胃火炽盛证
V010-N00522.aliases: 胃火证； 胃热炽盛证； 胃热熏蒸证； 胃热证； 胃实热证； 胃中积热证
V010-N00522.pinyinNames: syndrome of exuberance of stomach fire; wei huo chi sheng zheng
V010-N00522.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脾和胃证候｜胃系证候
V010-N00522.definition: 火热炽盛，壅滞于胃，以胃脘灼痛、喜冷，发热口渴，或口臭、牙龈肿痛、齿衄，便结尿黄，舌红苔黄，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00522.label: 胃热证
V010-N00522.aliases: 胃火证； 胃热壅盛证； 胃火炽盛证

V010-N00522.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃热证

V010-N00522.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00522.label: 胃火证
V010-N00522.aliases: 胃热炽盛证； 胃火炽盛证； 胃实热证； 胃热证； Stomach heat exuberance pattern； stomach fire exuberance pattern； Excess stomach heat pattern； Stomach heat pattern
V010-N00522.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00522.definition: Characterized by a burning stomach pain with tenderness, thirst with a preference for cold drinks, gum swelling and pain, gum bleeding, constipation and scanty, yellow urine. Hunger after eating food and a foul breath may be present. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is rapid. This pattern often occurs when accumulated fire heat in the stomach affects the descending of stomach qi.

V010-N00522.definition: a pattern/syndrome due to impairment of the stomach by pathogenic heat or caused by overeating of hot pungent food, mainly manifested by thirst, foul breath, hyperorexia, oliguria with dark urine, constipation, and ulceration of the mouth or gingiviti

V010-N00521.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00521.label: 胃气虚证
V010-N00521.aliases: 胃气亏证； 胃气亏虚证
V010-N00521.englishNames: Stomach qi deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of stomach qi deficiency; stomach qi deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00521.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃虚证
V010-N00521.definition: 因胃气虚弱，纳运失司所致。临床以胃脘痞闷、隐痛、喜按，不思饮食，或得食痛缓，神疲、乏力，舌质淡嫩，舌苔薄白，脉弱等为特征的证候。

V010-N00521.label: 胃气虚证
V010-N00521.englishNames: stomach qi deficiency syndrome/pattern; syndrome of deficiency of stomach qi
V010-N00521.definition: 胃气虚弱，纳运失职，以胃脘痞胀、隐痛，喜按，不思饮食，或得食痛缓，神疲乏力，舌淡嫩，苔薄白，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00521.label: 胃气虚证
V010-N00521.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of stomach qi
V010-N00521.path: 病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病｜气虚证
V010-N00521.definition: 胃气虚弱，纳运失职，以胃脘痞胀、隐痛，喜按，不思饮食，或得食痛缓，神疲乏力，舌淡嫩，苔薄白，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00521.label: 胃气虚证
V010-N00521.aliases: 胃气亏证； 胃气亏虚证
V010-N00521.englishNames: Stomach qi deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of stomach qi deficiency; stomach qi deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00521.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃虚证

V010-N00521.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00521.label: 胃气虚证
V010-N00521.aliases: 胃气亏证； 胃气亏虚证
V010-N00521.englishNames: Stomach qi deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of stomach qi deficiency; stomach qi deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00521.pinyinNames: wei qi xu zheng; wèi qì xū zhèng
V010-N00521.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00521.definition: Characterized by gastric distension/tightness and dull pain that alleviates upon pressure or after eating food, a poor appetite, and fatigue. The tongue is pale and tender. The pulse is weak. This pattern often occurs when stomach qi fails to perform absorption and transportation.

V010-N00521.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00521.label: 胃气虚证

V010-N00521.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00521.label: 胃气虚证
V010-N00521.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by dull epigastric pain relieved by pressure, anorexia, pale tongue and weak pulse

V010-N00523.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00523.label: 胃阴虚证
V010-N00523.aliases: 胃阴亏虚证； 胃阴不足证
V010-N00523.englishNames: Stomach yin deficiency pattern; stomach yin deficiency pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of stomach yin deficiency; syndrome/ pattern of stomach yin deficiency
V010-N00523.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃虚证
V010-N00523.definition: 因阴液亏虚，胃失濡润、和降所致。临床以胃脘痞胀或隐痛，善饥、嘈杂，不欲多食，口燥、咽干，呃逆呕哕，气短声微，大便干结，舌质红而干裂，舌苔少或无，脉细数，伴见烦热、懊憹，手足心热，形体消瘦等为特征的证候。

V010-N00523.label: 胃阴虚证
V010-N00523.aliases: 胃虚热证； 胃阴不足证； 胃阴亏耗证； 胃阴亏虚证
V010-N00523.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of stomach yin
V010-N00523.path: 病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜阴阳证候｜阴虚证
V010-N00523.definition: 阴液亏虚，胃失濡润、和降，以口燥咽干，饥不欲食，或胃脘嘈杂、痞胀，或胃脘隐隐灼痛，或干呕呃逆，便结，舌红少津，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00523.label: 胃阴虚证
V010-N00523.aliases: 胃阴亏虚证； 胃阴不足证
V010-N00523.englishNames: Stomach yin deficiency pattern; stomach yin deficiency pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of stomach yin deficiency; syndrome/ pattern of stomach yin deficiency
V010-N00523.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃虚证

V010-N00523.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00523.label: 胃阴虚证
V010-N00523.aliases: 胃阴亏虚证； 胃阴不足证
V010-N00523.englishNames: Stomach yin deficiency pattern; stomach yin deficiency pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of stomach yin deficiency; syndrome/ pattern of stomach yin deficiency
V010-N00523.pinyinNames: wei yin xu zheng; wèi yīn xū zhèng
V010-N00523.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00523.definition: Characterized by a dry mouth and throat, hunger but no desire to eat food, and a dull stomach ache with a burning sensation. Gastric upset/distension, retching, hiccups and constipation may also be present. The tongue is dry and red. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when yin fluids fail to nourish the stomach.

V010-N00523.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00523.label: 胃阴虚证

V010-N00523.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00523.label: 胃阴虚证
V010-N00523.definition: a pattern/syndrome attributed to insufficiency of yin fluid to moisten the stomach and marked by dryness in the mouth, thirst, anorexia, constipation, retching and reddened peeled tongue

V010-N00526.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00526.label: 脾气虚证
V010-N00526.englishNames: Spleen qi deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of spleen qi deficiency; spleen qi deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00526.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证
V010-N00526.definition: 因脾气不足，脾失健运所致。临床以食少、腹胀，食后尤甚，大便溏薄，肢体倦怠，少气懒言，面色萎黄，舌质淡，舌苔白，脉缓弱，可伴见浮肿，消瘦等为特征的证候。

V010-N00526.label: 脾气虚证
V010-N00526.englishNames: spleen qi deficiency syndrome/pattern; syndrome of deficiency of spleen qi
V010-N00526.definition: 脾气不足，运化失职，以食少，腹胀，食后尤甚，大便溏泻，神疲肢倦，舌淡苔白，脉缓弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00526.label: 脾气虚证
V010-N00526.aliases: 脾气亏证； 脾气虚弱证； 脾虚气弱证
V010-N00526.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of spleen qi
V010-N00526.path: 病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病｜气虚证
V010-N00526.definition: 气虚脾失健运，以食少、腹胀、大便溏薄、神疲、肢体倦怠、舌淡脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00526.label: 脾气虚证
V010-N00526.englishNames: Spleen qi deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of spleen qi deficiency; spleen qi deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00526.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证

V010-N00526.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00526.label: 脾气虚证
V010-N00526.aliases: 脾气亏虚证； Spleen qi deficiency pattern； Spleen qi depletion pattern； Spleen qi insecurity pattern； Insufficiency of spleen
V010-N00526.englishNames: Spleen qi deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of spleen qi deficiency; spleen qi deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00526.pinyinNames: pi qi xu zheng; pí qì xū zhèng
V010-N00526.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00526.definition: Characterized by low food intake, abdominal distension that aggravates after eating food, loose stools, and lassitude. The tongue is pale with a white coating. The pulse is slack and weak. This pattern often occurs when spleen qi fails to transport and transform.

V010-N00526.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00526.label: 脾气虚证

V010-N00526.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00526.label: 脾气虚证
V010-N00526.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by dizziness, fatigue, sallow face, indigestion, abdominal distension, lassitude, anorexia and loose bowels

V010-N00524.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00524.label: 脾不统血证
V010-N00524.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of spleen failing to govern the blood; pattern/syndrome of spleen failing to control the blood; Spleen failing to control the blood pattern
V010-N00524.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾气虚证
V010-N00524.definition: 因脾气虚弱，不能统摄血行所致。临床以各种慢性出血，或紫瘢，或月经淋漓、量多、先期，崩漏，舌质淡，脉弱，伴见神疲、乏力，食少、腹胀，便溏等为特征的证候。

V010-N00524.label: 脾不统血证
V010-N00524.englishNames: syndrome of spleen failing to manage blood; syndrome/pattern of spleen failing to control blood
V010-N00524.definition: 脾虚气弱，不能统摄血行，以各种慢性出血，或紫癜，或妇女月经过多、先期、淋漓不尽，崩漏，伴面色萎黄，食少，腹胀，便溏，神疲乏力，舌淡，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00524.label: 脾不统血证
V010-N00524.aliases: 脾不摄血证； 脾虚失统证
V010-N00524.pinyinNames: pi bu tong xue zheng; syndrome of spleen failing to manage blood
V010-N00524.path: 病证｜证候｜脏腑证候｜脾和胃证候｜脾系证候
V010-N00524.definition: 脾气虚弱，不能统摄血行，以各种慢性出血，或紫癜，或妇女月经淋漓、量多、先期、崩漏，食少，腹胀，便溏，神疲乏力，舌淡脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00524.label: 脾不统血证
V010-N00524.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of spleen failing to govern the blood; pattern/syndrome of spleen failing to control the blood; Spleen failing to control the blood pattern
V010-N00524.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾气虚证

V010-N00524.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00524.label: 脾不统血证
V010-N00524.aliases: 脾不摄血证； Spleen failing to hold blood within the vessels
V010-N00524.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of spleen failing to govern the blood; pattern/syndrome of spleen failing to control the blood; Spleen failing to control blood pattern; Spleen failing to control the blood pattern
V010-N00524.pinyinNames: pi bu tong xue zheng; pí bù tǒng xuè zhèng
V010-N00524.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00524.definition: Characterized by chronic bleeding, purpura, uterine bleeding, heavy menstrual flow, early menstruation, poor appetite, abdominal distension, loose stools and fatigue. The tongue is pale. The pulse is weak. This pattern often occurs when spleen qi fails to keep the blood within the vessels.

V010-N00524.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00524.label: 脾不统血证

V010-N00524.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00524.label: 脾不统血证
V010-N00524.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of spleen failing to control the blood; syndrome of spleen failing to manage blood
V010-N00524.definition: a pattern/syndrome that arises when weak spleen qi fails to control blood, resulting in various kinds of chronic bleeding such as purpura, flooding and spotting in women, accompanied by sallow complexion, anorexia, loose bowels, lassitude, lack of st

V010-N00531.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00531.label: 脾虚血亏证
V010-N00531.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood depletion due to spleen deficiency; Spleen deficiency and blood depletion pattern; syndrome/pattern of blood depletion clue to spleen deficiency
V010-N00531.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾气虚证
V010-N00531.definition: 因脾气虚弱，生血不足所致。临床以眩晕，食少、腹胀，大便溏薄，面色无华，爪甲苍白，消瘦，疲乏，舌质淡，脉细无力。或伴见闭经，月经后期、量少等为特征的证候。

V010-N00531.label: 脾虚血亏证
V010-N00531.englishNames: syndrome of blood deficiency due to Spleen Deficiency
V010-N00531.path: 病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病｜血虚证
V010-N00531.definition: 脾气虚弱，生血不足，以食少，腹胀，便溏，头晕，疲乏，妇女闭经、月经后期、量少，面白，舌淡，脉细无力等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00531.label: 脾虚血亏证
V010-N00531.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood depletion due to spleen deficiency; Spleen deficiency and blood depletion pattern; syndrome/pattern of blood depletion clue to spleen deficiency
V010-N00531.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾气虚证

V010-N00531.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00531.label: 脾虚血亏证
V010-N00531.aliases: Spleen deficiency with blood insufficiency pattern
V010-N00531.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood depletion due to spleen deficiency; Spleen deficiency and blood depletion pattern; Spleen deficiency with blood deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of blood depletion clue to spleen deficiency
V010-N00531.pinyinNames: pi xu xue kui zheng; pí xū xuè kuī zhèng
V010-N00531.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00531.definition: Characterized by low food intake, abdominal distension, loose stools, dizziness, fatigue, amenorrhea, delayed period, scanty menstruation, and a pale face. The tongue is pale. The pulse is thready and weak. This pattern often occurs when spleen qi fails to generate sufficient blood.

V010-N00528.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00528.label: 脾虚气滞证
V010-N00528.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi stagnation due to spleen deficiency; Spleen deficiency with qi stagnation pattern
V010-N00528.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾虚兼夹证
V010-N00528.definition: 因秉质脾虚，或久思伤脾，病后中气不复，气机阻滞，脾失健运所致。临床以脐腹胀痛，得嗳气或矢气则缓，肠鸣漉漉，便溏不爽，舌质淡，舌苔薄白，脉弦或紧，伴见食少，神疲、乏力等为特征的证候。

V010-N00528.label: 脾虚气滞证
V010-N00528.englishNames: syndrome of spleen deficiency and qi stagnation
V010-N00528.path: 病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病｜气滞证
V010-N00528.definition: 脾气虚弱，气机阻滞，以食少，腹胀痛，便溏不爽，肠鸣矢气，神疲乏力，脉弦等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00528.label: 脾虚气滞证
V010-N00528.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi stagnation due to spleen deficiency; Spleen deficiency with qi stagnation pattern
V010-N00528.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾虚兼夹证

V010-N00528.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00528.label: 脾虚气滞证
V010-N00528.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi stagnation due to spleen deficiency; Spleen deficiency with qi stagnation pattern
V010-N00528.pinyinNames: pi xu qi zhi zheng; pí xū qì zhì zhèng
V010-N00528.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00528.definition: Characterized by low food intake, abdominal distension/pain, loose stools with a sensation of incomplete evacuation, bowel sounds, flatus and lassitude. The pulse is wiry. This pattern often results from spleen qi deficiency with an obstructed flow of qi.

V010-N00529.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00529.label: 脾虚水泛证
V010-N00529.aliases: 脾虚水停证； 脾虚水困证
V010-N00529.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of spleen deficiency with water flood; syndrome/pattern of water flooding due to spleen deficiency; Spleen deficiency with water flooding pattern
V010-N00529.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾虚兼夹证
V010-N00529.definition: 因脾虚失运，水液内停或泛溢所致。临床以面浮、肢肿。或有腹水，舌质淡胖，舌苔白滑，脉濡或弱，伴见食少，腹胀，便溏，神疲、乏力，面色淡白等为特征的证候。

V010-N00529.label: 脾虚水泛证
V010-N00529.englishNames: syndrome of water diffusion due to spleen deficiency; syndrome/pattern of spleen insufficiency and water diffusion
V010-N00529.definition: 脾阳虚衰，温运失职，水湿内停，泛溢肌肤，以食少，腹胀，便清，面浮肢肿，或有腹水，神疲乏力，面白，舌淡胖，苔白滑，脉德或弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00529.label: 脾虚水停证
V010-N00529.aliases: 脾气虚水泛证； 脾气虚水湿证； 脾气虚水停证； 脾虚水泛证； 脾虚水湿证
V010-N00529.englishNames: pattern of spleen deficiency and water retention
V010-N00529.path: 病证｜证候｜气血津液证候｜津液病｜水液停聚证
V010-N00529.definition: 脾气虚弱，运化失职，水液内停，以食少，腹胀，便溏，面浮肢肿，或有腹水，神疲乏力，面白，舌淡胖，苔白滑，脉濡或弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00529.label: 脾虚水泛证
V010-N00529.aliases: 脾虚水停证； 脾虚水困证
V010-N00529.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of spleen deficiency with water flood; syndrome/pattern of water flooding due to spleen deficiency; Spleen deficiency with water flooding pattern
V010-N00529.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾虚兼夹证

V010-N00529.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00529.label: 脾虚水泛证
V010-N00529.aliases: 脾虚水停证； 脾虚水困证； 脾气虚水停证； 脾气虚水湿证； Spleen deficiency with qi stagnation pattern
V010-N00529.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of spleen deficiency with water flood; syndrome/pattern of water flooding due to spleen deficiency; Spleen deficiency with water retention pattern; Spleen deficiency with water flooding pattern
V010-N00529.pinyinNames: pi xu shui fan zheng; pí xū shuǐ fàn zhèng
V010-N00529.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00529.definition: Characterized by low food intake, abdominal distension, loose stools, lassitude, a pale complexion, and facial puffiness. Ascites may also be present. The tongue is pale and enlarged with a white, slippery coating. The pulse is soft. This pattern often occurs when spleen qi fails to transport and transform, resulting in water retention.

V010-N00529.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00529.label: 脾虚水泛证
V010-N00529.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of spleen insufficiency and water diffusion

V010-N00529.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00529.label: 脾虚水泛证
V010-N00529.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of spleen deficiency with water flood; syndrome of water diffusion due to spleen deficiency
V010-N00529.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by edema of the face and limbs or together with ascites, associated with reduced food intake, abdominal distension, sloppy stools, lassitude, lack of strength, pale complexion, pale plump tongue with white slippery coating, a

V010-N00530.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00530.label: 脾虚湿阻证
V010-N00530.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of spleen deficiency with dampness obstruction
V010-N00530.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾虚兼夹证
V010-N00530.definition: 因脾气虚弱，湿邪中阻，或湿浊上泛，神水积滞所致。临床以头身困重，胸闷，脘痞、腹胀，食少，倦怠，便溏，小便浑浊，面垢，舌质淡，边有齿痕，舌苔腻浊，脉濡或缓，可伴见视物昏蒙，目胀、眵多，头痛，浮肿等为特征的证候。

V010-N00530.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00530.label: 脾虚湿困证
V010-N00530.aliases: 脾虚夹湿证； 脾虚湿蕴证； 脾虚湿盛证； 脾虚湿泛证； 脾虚湿滞证
V010-N00530.englishNames: Spleen deficiency with dampness accumulation pattern; syndrome/pattern of spleen deficiency with dampness encumbrance; pattern/syndrome of spleen deficiency with dampness encumbrance
V010-N00530.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾虚兼夹证｜脾虚湿阻证
V010-N00530.definition: 因饮食、劳倦或思虑过度伤脾，或年老体弱，久病虚损，脾运化水湿功能失常所致。临床以脘腹痞胀或痛，泛恶欲吐，食少、纳呆，头身困重，倦怠乏力，肢体浮肿，大便稀溏或泄泻，小便短少，舌质淡胖，边有齿痕，舌苔白润或腻，脉濡缓，可伴见水肿，腹水，带下清稀、量多等为特征的证候。

V010-N00530.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00530.label: 脾虚湿蕴证
V010-N00530.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of spleen deficiency with dampness accumulation
V010-N00530.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾虚兼夹证｜脾虚湿阻证
V010-N00530.definition: 因禀赋不耐，或饮食不节，脾虚运化失职，湿邪内生，蕴于肌肤所致。临床以纳呆，腹胀，大便溏薄，浸黄，头身困重，白带量多，舌质淡，舌苔薄白或腻，脉濡缓或细滑，或伴见湿疹，疱疹，阴疮，黧黑斑等为特征的证候。

V010-N00530.label: 脾虚湿困证
V010-N00530.englishNames: syndrome of dampness stagnancy due to spleen deficiency
V010-N00530.definition: 脾气虚弱，水湿内停，以食少，腹胀，大便清泻，身体困重，或有微肿，舌淡胖，苔白润或腻，脉濡缓等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00530.definition: 脾气虚弱，湿浊内停，以食少，腹胀，便溏，身体困重，或有微肿，舌淡胖，苔白润或腻，脉濡缓等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00530.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00530.definition: Characterized by low food intake, abdominal distension, loose stools, and body heaviness or mild oedema. The tongue is pale and enlarged with a white, moist or greasy coating. The pulse is soft and slack. This pattern often results from internal retention of turbid dampness due to spleen qi deficiency.
